En: Don't be squeamish. It is *commonplace* to relocate the workforce as the need arises. All nations do it. It's called settlement. He shakes his head and mumbles: "Some kind of bourgeois art-fascist..."
Zh: “不要这么神经质。根据对土地的需求重新安置劳动力是*司空见惯*的事情。所有国家都应该这样做。这叫移民。”他摇摇头，嘟囔到：“你这个资产阶级的艺术法西斯主义者……”

En: Mhm, the lieutenant hums. "Straight to the open pit mine. Or cleaning up radiation in Severnaya Zemlja."
Zh: “嗯，”警督沉吟到。“直接送到露天矿场。或者去清理萨凡纳泽姆贾的放射物。”

En: The smallest doubt takes root in him -- perhaps this cop is... no, it can't be. This has helped your standing in his eyes.
Zh: 一点点疑惑在他心里扎了根——也许这个警察是……不，这不可能。这样能帮你提升在他眼中的地位。

En: You feel like you're forgetting something... never mind. It's not important. Push on!
Zh: 你觉得自己忘了什么东西……没关系。这不重要。继续吧！

En: The fat Union-man let them put it there. Corrupt as he is. Probably got a fat check for it too, shared with *the law*...
Zh: “工会的那个胖子让他们立在那里的。跟他一样腐败。也许也拿到了一张数额丰厚的支票，跟*执法人员*分享……”

En: Accusations of corruption. Push them aside with a sharp change of topic, officer! Put the heat on *him*.
Zh: 腐败的指控。把它们推到一边，赶紧换个话题，警官！给*他*施加压力。

En: I did. He nods. "A needless, sentimental gesture. I should have spared the bullet for a deformed monster of liberal capitalism. Shameful really..."
Zh: “没错。”他点点头。“一种不必要的，多愁善感的姿态。我应该把子弹留给自由资本主义的畸形野兽。真的很丢脸……”

En: Yes. Shameful. The lieutenant takes a quick note. "So many others to *punish* over the years -- isn't that right, detective?" He turns to you.
Zh: “是的。丢脸。”警督飞快地做了点笔记。“这么多年，有那么多别的人要*惩罚*——不对吗，警探？”他转向你。

En: Hmm... he keeps having *opinions* about the Union's leadership.
Zh: 嗯……他对工会的领导很有*意见*。

En: Another hideous disappointment... He pokes at the ash: "Unions are the *real* enemy; the true enemy of the proletariat, placating the masses."
Zh: “他是又一个可憎的失望……”他戳了戳灰烬。“工会是*真正*的敌人；无产阶级真正的敌人，安抚了大众。”

En: Who's a disappointment -- Evrart Claire?
Zh: “谁让人失望——艾弗拉特·克莱尔？”

En: That deformed toad? I wouldn't expect him to wipe his own ass. I mean the *brains* of the operation. The smart one.
Zh: “那只丑陋的蛤蟆？我没指望他能把自己的屁股擦干净。我的意思是行动的*主脑*。聪明的那个。”

En: Disappointment -- so personal. He displays a familiarity with the Union's top brass.
Zh: 失望——如此地个人化。他表现出自己对工会高层的熟悉。

En: Got it.
Zh: “明白。”

En: Edgar!
Zh: 埃德加！

En: You mean Edgar, Evrart's brother?
Zh: “你是说埃德加，艾弗拉特的兄弟？”

En: Doesn't Evrart run the Union?
Zh: “工会不是艾弗拉特在领导吗？”

En: That mobster toad couldn't run a shit-house. He has *no* political education. His twin, Edgar Claire, that one's been to one of those East Revachol Universities. He talks a big game about uprising and alienation and so on...
Zh: “那只蛤蟆暴徒连个破地方都管不好。他完全*没有*接受过政治教育。他的双胞胎兄弟，埃德加·克莱尔，那个以前去瑞瓦肖东部的大学上过学。他吹嘘了一大通起义啊，异化啊，等等之类的游戏……”

En: The old man chortles with a nod. "He talks a big game about *uprising* and *social base* -- they must have sent the smart one to some University in Le Jardin where it's 'alienation' this and 'hegemony' that..."
Zh: 老人咯咯笑了。“他吹嘘了一大通什么*起义*啊，还有*社会基础*什么的——他们肯定把聪明的那个送去勒雅尔丹上大学了，在那里学会了什么*异化*这个的，*领导权*那个的……”

En: You've talked to Edgar?
Zh: “你跟埃德加聊过？”

En: First against the wall with him... He's stopped poking at the ash now, just shakes his head.
Zh: “一开始是隔着墙跟他聊……”他不再戳弄灰烬，只是摇摇头。

En: Of course. Maybe the Claires asked him to...
Zh: 当然了。也许是克莱尔兄弟求他的……

En: The Claires wouldn't miss a man hidden in their own back yard -- not all this time. Nothing happens in Martinaise without them knowing.
Zh: “克莱尔兄弟不会错过一个藏在他们自家后院的人——至少不是一直这样。马丁内斯发生的一切就没有他们不知道的。”

En: We're not the first people you've met from the city, are we?
Zh: “我们不是你第一次见到的城里人，对吗？”

En: Mr. Dros, did you kill the Krenel mercenary for the Claires? To incite a riot? (Proceed.)
Zh: “德洛斯先生，你是为了克莱尔兄弟杀死科奈尔雇佣兵的吗？为了煽动一场暴动？”（继续。）

En: You know why I killed that fucker, comrade... He shakes his head. "As to Edgar, I'm not doing anything for that swine again."
Zh: “你知道我为什么杀了那个混账，兄弟……”他摇摇头。“至于埃德加，我再也不会为那头猪做任何事了。”

En: You know why I killed that fucker, droite... He shakes his head. "As to Edgar, I'm not doing anything for that swine again."
Zh: “你知道我为什么杀了那个混账，右派的家伙……”他摇摇头。“至于埃德加，我再也不会为那头猪做任何事了。”

En: What? You're stupid for a communist... He shakes his head. "I'm not doing anything for that swine again."
Zh: “什么？作为一个康米主义者，你实在是太愚蠢了……”他摇摇头。“我再也不会为那头猪做任何事了。”

En: I'm not doing anything for that swine again. He shakes his head.
Zh: 他摇摇头。“我再也不会为那头猪做任何事了。”

En: First against the wall with them, he sputters. "Keeping the mills running, collaborants, the whole lot. They should go *before* the owners..."
Zh: “一开始是隔着墙跟他们聊，”他说到。“保持工厂运转，合作，所有事情。他们应该走在所有者*前面*的……”

En: He's been sweet-talked by this Edgar. They must've met in person for such animosity to have developed.
Zh: 他被这个埃德加的花言巧语哄住了。他们肯定亲自见过面才会激起如此的仇恨。

En: The Claires know everything about Martinaise, of course they know him too! Maybe they asked him to...
Zh: 克莱尔兄弟知道马丁内斯的一切，当然也该知道他！也许他们请求他……

En: Have you approached them?
Zh: “你接近过他们吗？”

En: I haven't approached anyone! I've hid. It was Edgar who came to me.
Zh: “我没有接近任何人！我一直在躲藏。是埃德加来找我的。”

En: How did he know you were here?
Zh: “他怎么知道你在这里？”

En: He didn't just stumble in like an oaf, he nods to you. "He figured it out. Some kids told him about a monster on the island. I told you, he has brains." He points to the path leading to the tower.
Zh: “他可不像白痴一样跌跌撞撞过来的，”他朝你点点头。“他琢磨出来的。小孩告诉他岛上有怪兽。我告诉过你，他脑子很好使。”他指向通往塔楼的小路。

En: Stepped right off the boat and walked down where you came. I even kept the door open for him -- thought he was a man of the left. Wouldn't rat me out.
Zh: “下船之后，沿着你来的路走过来的。我甚至还帮他开了门——还以为他是个左翼分子。不会出卖我。”

En: He shrugs. "I was right about one of those things."
Zh: 他耸耸肩。“其中有一件事我搞对了。”

En: How did he know you were here?
Zh: “他怎么知道你在这里？”

En: That's around the time the Claires came to power.
Zh: 那大概就是克莱尔兄弟掌权的时候。

En: When was this?
Zh: “这是什么时候的事？”

En: Twenty years ago. Neither of them could *walk* now, could they? They were less fat then.
Zh: “20年前。现在他们俩都*走不动*了，对吧？那时候他们没那么胖。”

En: You can't live alone... He's stopped poking at the ash now, just shakes his head.
Zh: “你没办法独立生活……”他不再戳弄灰烬，只是摇摇头。

En: First against the wall with them, he sputters. "First against the wall. For keeping the mills of capital going. They should go *before* the owners."
Zh: “一开始是隔着墙跟他们聊，”他说到。“一开始是隔着墙。为了维持工厂资本的运转。他们应该走在所有者*前面*的。”

En: Okay, got it.
Zh: “好吧，明白了。”

En: What did you talk about?
Zh: “你们聊了些什么？”

En: Don't go straight for the kill, exhaust everything else first, soften him up...
Zh: 先别直接说杀人的事，先彻底探讨别的问题，软化他的态度……

En: Edgar did the talking. Paid his *respects*, like I were a fossil in a uniform. Offered platitudes about *the struggle*, flaunted his pink degree. Even quoted Mazov.
Zh: “埃德加说得多。表达他的*尊敬*，好像我是个穿着制服的古化石。说了一堆*奋斗*的陈腔滥调，炫耀自己的粉红学位。甚至还引用了马佐夫的理论。”

En: Never trust a social democrat who quotes Mazov... he suddenly remembers: "Oh, and charity too. They love their charity -- offered me blankets and social housing. I still have the gas cooker he brought."
Zh: “永远也不要相信引用马佐夫理论的工人主义者……”他突然想起来了：“哦，还有慈善。他们喜欢慈善活动——承诺给我毛毯和社会住房*。我这里还有他带来的煤气炉呢。”

En: Again? What have you done for Edgar before?
Zh: “再也不做？你之前为埃德加做过什么？”

En: Again? What have you done for him before?
Zh: “再也不做？你之前为他做过什么？”

En: And he let you be here?
Zh: “然后他就让你待在这里？”

En: *Let* me be here? He looks around. "The ZoC is an unlawful successor of the Commune of Revachol. We took this fortification from the loyalists. Even the Claires understand this..."
Zh: “*让*我待在这里？”他环顾四周。“SAR是瑞瓦肖公社的非法继承者。我们从保皇派手里夺走了这个防御工事。甚至连克莱尔兄弟都能理解这一点……”

En: Tried teaching him some Mazovian socio-economics. They didn't stick. We parted ways. He coughs.
Zh: “试过教他一些马佐夫的社会经济学。他们没有坚持。我们就分道扬镳了。”他咳嗽起来。

En: They let him be here. 'Understanding' was a courtesy -- but why such a courtesy?
Zh: 他们让他待在这里。*理解*是一种好意——不过为什么是这种好意呢？

En: First against the wall with them, he sputters. "First against the wall, for keeping the mills of capital. They should go *before* the owners..."
Zh: “一开始是隔着墙跟他们聊，”他说到。“一开始是隔着墙。为了维持工厂资本的运转。他们应该走在所有者*前面*的……”

En: Let's let this one slide.
Zh: “我们把这个放在一边。”

En: Okay, he didn't do the hanged man for them. But he's insinuating something.
Zh: 好吧，他不是为了他们才杀了吊人。但他在暗示什么。

En: What was the deal between him and Edgar?
Zh: 他跟埃德加之前有什么交易？

En: Why did Forewoman Tiphaine Holly withdraw?
Zh: 为什么女工头蒂费纳·霍利会离开？

En: He shot the statue.
Zh: 他射中了雕像。

En: Talked to Evrart about previous Forewoman.
Zh: 跟艾弗拉特聊过前任女工头的事。

En: Indeed. What more could there possibly be to say about those beats.
Zh: “的确。对于那些节拍，还有什么好说的呢？”

En: Good, traditional Revacholian beats. Not moronic at all.
Zh: “很好，很传统的瑞瓦肖节拍。一点也不低能。”

En: Regressive beats. (Nod.) "The beats still have a long way to go."
Zh: “退化的节拍。”（点点头。）“那个节拍还有很长的路要走呢。”

En: You know, those beats are actually quite *progressive*.
Zh: “你知道吗，其实那些节拍挺*进步*的。”

En: Indeed. (Don't tell him.)
Zh: “的确。”（不要告诉他。）

En: I let them in the church. The boom-boom is now in the church.
Zh: “我让他们去教堂了。现在他们会在教堂里吵闹。”

En: I saw you. The old man nods. "Serves that pigsty right to have them in there. Ghoulish sarcophagus, the Ecclesiastes are all paedophiles..." His voice trails off into a gust of sea wind, he looks at the church on the coast.
Zh: “我看见你了。”老人点点头。“让他们待在那里，是那个猪舍活该。让人毛骨悚然的石棺，传道书讲的都是恋童癖……”他看着海岸边的教堂，声音消失在一阵海风中。

En: I've heard it on the radio too, that boom-boom. It's the same violent decadence all over again for the hundredth time... Misanthropy masquerading as culture.
Zh: “我在电台里听到，那些吵吵闹闹的玩意。几百遍了，都是同一种强烈的堕落……伪装成文化的愤世嫉俗。”

En: *Beats...* The old man scoffs. "Violent bourgeois language. Even music is a form of homicidal competition. Saxophone blowing anti-communism..." His voice trails off into a gust of sea wind.
Zh: “*节拍*……”老人嘲弄到。“暴力的资产阶级语言。就连音乐都是一种杀气腾腾的竞争形式。萨克斯管吹奏着反康米主义的曲调……”他的声音消失在一阵海风中。

En: There is more here, you can feel it. He was not outright lying but almost...
Zh: 还有更多东西，您能感觉到。他并不是完全在撒谎，不过也差不多……

En: That is a euphemism.
Zh: 那是一种委婉的说法。

En: There is more here, but you may not have the information to pry it loose from him...
Zh: 还有更多东西，不过也许您掌握的信息还不够从他嘴里套出来……

En: This has to be one of the mysteries you never got to solve...
Zh: 这会是一个你永远也解不开的谜……

En: You have a feeling there was more here, but what? This has to be one of the mysteries you don't get to solve...
Zh: 你有一种感觉，这里还隐藏着更多东西，不过是什么呢？这会是一个你永远也解不开的谜……

En: Nothing mysterious about missing one thing in a hundred. Dust yourself off and proceed.
Zh: 百里缺一没什么不可思议的。振作起来，继续前进吧。

En: Get over it, proceed!
Zh: 克服这个难关，继续前进！

En: The connection comes to you, like a splash of cold water. Dark, cold water...
Zh: 这种联系朝你袭来，就像被浇了一盆冷水。黑暗，冰冷的水……

En: Oh no, the connection doesn't come to you! On such a *pivotal* moment...
Zh: 哦不，你没有想出这里的联系！在这么*关键*的一个时刻……

En: Twenty years ago, when you met Edgar. The Claires didn't run the Union yet, did they?
Zh: “20年前，你见到埃德加的时候。克莱尔兄弟还不是工会的领袖，对吗？”

En: Heh... A sputter from the old man.
Zh: “嗨……”男人支支吾吾。

En: Who *did*?
Zh: “是谁在*领导*？”

En: That bourgeois cow... Tiphaine Holly was her name. He narrows his eyes. "Licked the rich man's hand every time he came to town. Never seen a labour leader so hot on mutual cooperation..."
Zh: “那头资产阶级的母牛……名字叫蒂费纳·霍利。”他眯起眼睛。“每次那个有钱人进城的时候，她都会舔他的手。从没见过一个工会领袖如此热衷于相互合作……”

En: He acknowledges it. Here we go, a twist, behind the dark bend...
Zh: 他知道这回事。可以，突破口来了……

En: And money -- she liked that too. That Holly was a real bridge-builder and a deal-maker... His eyes glisten suddenly, with hatred.
Zh: “还有钱——那个她也喜欢。那家伙是个真正的调解人，一个交易人……”他的眼睛里突然闪烁出仇恨的光芒。

En: Bordering on sentimentality, it drips out of him. Tempered by something familiar to you. A familiar rage.
Zh: 近乎可以说是感情用事，他明显流露出这种情绪。被某种你很熟悉的东西调和了。一种熟悉的愤怒。

En: She was also a *woman*, wasn't she?
Zh: “她也是个女人，不是吗？”

En: She was also a woman, wasn't she? Like that Klaasje...
Zh: “她也是个女人，对吧？就像那个卡拉洁……”

En: And then she just... disappeared.
Zh: “然后她就这么……消失了。”

En: She was. And she was real soft on those money-men. Had a Barbara Muskova bag over her shoulder that she liked to bring to work...
Zh: “她的确是。而且她对那些有钱人真的很温柔。肩膀上挎着芭芭拉·穆斯科娃的包，她喜欢背着它去上班……”

En: Barbara Muskova and Numb 12, Joyce Messier's choices...
Zh: 芭芭拉·穆斯科娃和麻木12号，乔伊斯·梅西耶的选择……

En: Women do like their Barbara Muskova and their Numb 12...
Zh: “女人的确很喜欢她们的芭芭拉·穆斯科娃和麻木12号……”

En: Mmmhm... She'd probably spray a tanker full of that *shit* on her. Of course, I never got close enough to smell it...
Zh: “嗯……她可能在自己身上喷了一整罐那种*鬼玩意*。当然，我从没靠近去闻过……”

En: Called in they say -- on the eve of battle. Ran away. Vanished like a piss-stain, or a spot of her expensive perfume... He squints and smiles at the black logs.
Zh: “他们说，打了个电话——在战斗前夕。跑了。像尿渍一样被冲刷干净，或者是她昂贵的香水印一样，消失了……”他眯起眼睛，对着焦黑的木块笑了。

En: Called in they say -- on the eve of battle. Ran away. Vanished like a piss-stain... He squints and smiles at the black logs.
Zh: “他们说，打了个电话——在战斗前夕。跑了。像尿渍一样被冲刷干净了……”他眯起眼睛，对着焦黑的木块笑了。

En: Did she? The lieutenant feels it too, in his black gaze. "They say her *daughter* called in, not her personally. But that wasn't really her daughter, was it?"
Zh: “她有吗？”警督也感觉到了，就在他的眼睛里。“他们说她的*女儿*打来了电话，而不是她自己。不过那并不是她的女儿，不是吗？”

En: Did she? The lieutenant's voice is calm. "They say her *daughter* called in, not her personally. But that wasn't really her daughter, was it?"
Zh: “她有吗？”警督的声音很平静。“他们说她的*女儿*打来了电话，而不是她自己。不过那并不是她的女儿，不是吗？”

En: No, I guess it was not... You could swear you see the embers glow again, under his eyes on the dust.
Zh: “不是，我猜不是……”你可以发誓自己看见了余烬重燃，就在他眼睛下面的灰尘中。

En: Edgar had someone make the call -- why is that, Mr. Dros?
Zh: “埃德加找人打了个电话——为什么会这样，德罗斯先生？”

En: Because the cow caught a bullet in her right lung. Fell into the canal grasping her tit and drowned. Or bled -- hard to say. It was a sloppy job. On a moving target.
Zh: “因为母牛的右肺部中了一枪。她抓着胸口摔进运河淹死了。或者是失血过多——这很难说。那是一份草率的工作。一个移动的目标。”

En: She was going home, waddling. Dressed in yellow. Drunk like she often was. The ruins were black around her and she had a yellow leather bag under her arm. She tried to cross the canal.
Zh: “她正要回家，摇摇晃晃的。穿着黄色衣裳。像往常一样醉醺醺的。周围的废墟漆黑一片，不过她的胳膊底下还夹着那个黄色皮包。她想要穿过运河。”

En: Heading home to Grand Couron or Betancourt... Some place like that. Where they build those new batiments for the people who flourish in the hell around her. And the ruins...
Zh: “回到大科戎或者是贝当古的家……某些类似的地方吧。他们在那里建起了新住宅，在她身处的地狱周围拔地而起。还有那些废墟……”

En: You shot her.
Zh: “你朝她开枪了。”

En: *Someone* shot her, he shrugs. His eyes grow cold suddenly. "Or maybe the cow just fell. My memory is full of holes. All I know is..."
Zh: “*有人*朝她开枪了，”他耸耸肩，眼神突然变得冰冷。“或者，那头母牛是自己掉下去的。我的记忆千疮百孔。我只知道……”

En: Another, big spike of rage. Different from the one he has for her...
Zh: 又是一阵暴怒。跟他对她的愤怒不太一样……

En: Nothing changed. Not in the *material base*, not in the *hegemony*, there was no uprising. Just words... The Union fizzled, sogged. Nothing came of it. Nothing.
Zh: “什么也没有改变。*物质基础*没有变，*领导权*没有变，也没有起义。只有言语……工会失败了，沉溺了。毫无结果。什么也没有。”

En: Edgar didn't keep his part of the deal.
Zh: “埃德加没有履行他的承诺。”

En: Heh... A sputter again, nothing more.
Zh: “嗨……”又是一阵结巴，没有别的了。

En: No. That's not quite it, is it?
Zh: 不。不是这样的，不是吗？

En: But did she? They say it was her daughter who called in for her. That wasn't her daughter, was it?
Zh: “但是她有吗？他们说是她女儿打的电话。那不是她的女儿，对吧？”

En: She couldn't make the call herself.
Zh: “她自己没办法打电话。”

En: Why?
Zh: “为什么？”

En: Here it is. The bend in the river...
Zh: 河道的拐点，要来了……

En: The truth!
Zh: 真相！

En: Because she was dead.
Zh: “因为她死了。”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: How come?
Zh: “怎么会？”

En: Just say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: The cow caught a bullet in her right lung, fell into the canal grasping her tit and drowned. Or bled -- hard to say. It was a sloppy job. And a moving target.
Zh: “母牛的右肺部中了一枪，抓紧胸口摔进运河淹死了。或者是失血过多——这很难说。那是份马虎的工作。一个移动的目标。”

En: It was you. (Make a motion, like shooting a rifle.)
Zh: “是你做的。”（做一个步枪开火的动作。）

En: Be abstract here. A bit of drama.
Zh: 抽象一点。戏剧化一点。

En: Heh. He does not fall for it. "It was someone. *Someone* shot her," he shrugs. His eyes grow cold suddenly.
Zh: “哼。”他没有上当。“是某个人干得。*某个人*朝她开枪了，”他耸耸肩，眼神突然变得冰冷。

En: Or maybe she just fell. I get these violent ideations.... My memory is filled with holes, especially the Thirties. All I know is...
Zh: “或者她只是掉下去了。我有这种暴力的构思能力……我的记忆千疮百孔，特别是30年代的事。我只知道……”

En: You killed her?
Zh: “你杀了她？”

En: *Someone* did, he shrugs. His eyes grow cold suddenly. "Or maybe the cow just fell. The past is blurry, all I know is..."
Zh: “*某个人*杀了她，”他耸耸肩，眼神突然变得冰冷。“或者，也许是那头母牛掉下去了。过去很模糊，我只知道……”

En: If you were to testify to this -- give the RCM something on Edgar -- you could walk. The lieutenant says in a voice even calmer, as if it were nothing at all.
Zh: “如果你能证明这一点——告诉RCM一些关于埃德加的事情——就没你的事了。”警督的声音更加镇定了，仿佛这根本不算什么。

En: We would strike everything you've done and process you as a POW. You were in a war. You were on assignment. We could even extradite you to the Samaran People's Republic.
Zh: “我们可以赦免你所做的一切，把你当成一个战俘处理。你参加过一场战争。你在执行任务。我们甚至可以把你引渡到萨马拉共和国。”

En: A degenerate workers' state? Goat shit? No, thank you. I'm Revacholian, he spits. "My days are short. I will rot away here -- in a Moralintern cell. I will not testify to anything." He coughs.
Zh: “那个堕落的工人国家？山羊屎？不了，谢谢。我是瑞瓦肖人，”他吐了一口唾沫。“我的日子不多了。我会在这里腐烂——在国际道德伦理委员会的牢房里。我不会为任何事情作证的。”他咳嗽起来。

En: But you did *do* it.
Zh: “不过你的确*做过*。”

En: You can tell a comrade. It won't be *that* usable.
Zh: “你可以告诉一位同伴。不会*那么*有用的。”

En: You can tell me, here. It won't be *that* usable.
Zh: “你可以告诉我，在这里。不会*那么*可用的。”

En: We have ways to make you talk -- in that Moralintern cell.
Zh: “我们有办法让你开口——在国际道德伦理委员会的牢房里。”

En: I saw it happen and I liked it. That's all I have to say. I didn't live and fight for forty years to end up as a collaborationist. I've heard it on Channel 8, 40AM, Radio Revachol Late Night...
Zh: “我看见它发生了，而且我很喜欢。我只能这么说。40年的生活和抗争，可不是为了最后落得个通敌卖国的名声。我在8频道听到过，40AM，瑞瓦肖深夜电台……”

En: Everyone is a blobber in this world. Everyone betrays everyone. They're all already locked up -- for betrayal. The best ones, the ones with heart, were slaughtered, trampled... He looks to the city.
Zh: “在这个世界上，每个人都是告密者。大家互相背叛。他们已经都被关起来了——因为背叛。最优秀的人，最善良的那些人，被屠杀，被践踏……”他看着城市。

En: The same old freezing hatred.
Zh: 同样的悠远而又冰冷的背叛。

En: Oh, there's plenty to say, hard-core man.
Zh: 哦，还有很多可以说的呢，硬汉。

En: What more is there to say? You've *always* got *something to say.
Zh: 还有什么可以说的？你*总是*有什么话说。

En: It was I who cleared them from the ice.
Zh: “是我把他们从冰面上赶走的。”

En: I saw you. The old man nods. "I didn't think you'd be *proud* of it -- evicting mentally handicapped vagrants," he shrugs. "But that's property law for you. I wouldn't be surprised if a Frittte sprung up on the ice, tomorrow..."
Zh: “我看见你了。”老人点点头。“我不觉得你会为此感到*骄傲*——驱逐那些有精神障碍的流浪汉，”他耸耸肩。“不过对于你来说，那是物权法的问题。如果明天一家弗利多突然出现在冰面上的话，我也不会觉得吃惊。”

En: I don't think now is the time for this, officer. The lieutenant tries to nip it...
Zh: “我觉得现在不是说这个的时候，警官。”警督试着打断这个话题……

En: I don't think now is the time for this, officer. The lieutenant tries to nip it..
Zh: “我觉得现在不是说这个的时候，警官。”警督试着打断这个话题……

En: I don't think now is the time for this, officer. The lieutenant tries to nip it...
Zh: “我觉得现在不是说这个的时候，警官。”警督试着打断这个话题……

En: I don't think now is the time for this, officer. The lieutenant tries to nip it...
Zh: “我觉得现在不是说这个的时候，警官。”警督试着打断这个话题……

En: I don't think now is the time for this, officer. The lieutenant tries to nip it...
Zh: “我觉得现在不是说这个的时候，警官。”警督试着打断这个话题……

En: ...to no avail!
Zh: ……完全没用！

En: ...to no avail!
Zh: ……完全没用！

En: ...to no avail!
Zh: ……完全没用！

En: ...to no avail!
Zh: ……完全没用！

En: ...to no avail!
Zh: ……完全没用！

En: I haven't lived and fought for forty years to end up as a collaborationist. I've heard it on Channel 8, 40AM and Le Canal du Crime...
Zh: “40年的生活和抗争，可不是为了最后落得个通敌卖国的名声。我听见过——在8频道，40AM还有犯罪运河……”

En: I haven't lived and fought for forty years to end up as a collaborationist. I've heard it -- on Channel 8, 40AM, Radio Revachol Late Night...
Zh: “40年的生活和抗争，可不是为了最后落得个通敌卖国的名声。我听见过——在8频道，40AM，瑞瓦肖深夜电台……”

En: C'mon. Just a little. You're buddies.
Zh: 拜托。只要一点点。你是他的兄弟。

En: Threaten with PAIN. All human beings respect pain. It's the truth.
Zh: 用痛苦作威胁。全人类都尊崇痛苦。这是事实。

En: I didn't live and fight for forty years to end up as a collaborationist. I've heard it -- on Channel 8, 40AM *and* Radio Revachol Late Night...
Zh: “40年的生活和抗争，可不是为了最后落得个通敌卖国的名声。我听见过——在8频道，40AM*还有*瑞瓦肖深夜电台……”

En: Okay then. That's that. (Point to your head.) "But I know."
Zh: “那好吧。就这样吧。”（指着你的脑袋。）“不过我知道的。”

En: Edgar didn't keep his part of the deal.
Zh: “埃德加没有履行他的承诺。”

En: Heh... a sputter again. "Now that sounds like you want me to *testify* in your charade of law. My days are numbered. Let them rot away in a Moralintern cell -- I've said all I will." He coughs.
Zh: “嗨……”又是一阵结巴。“现在听起来，你想让我为你们那套装模作样的法律*作证*。我剩下的日子不多了。让他们腐烂在国际道德伦理委员会的牢房里吧——我该说的都说了。”他咳嗽起来。

En: All you know is I saw it happen -- and I liked it. I liked it a lot. Her plump body, bobbing up and down in that canal like a cork. That chick-yellow bag still on her, strangling her... Cold black coals look at the canal, then at you -- blink.
Zh: “你只知道我看着它发生了——而且我很喜欢，非常喜欢。她那圆滚滚的身体，像软木塞一样在运河里浮浮沉沉。那个淡黄色的包还背在她身上，勒住她的脖颈……”冰冷的黑眼睛看着运河，然后看着你——眨了眨眼。

En: There is *plenty* here to work with once he's in custody -- and the lieutenant knows it. He gives you a little nod to proceed.
Zh: 一旦他被拘留，还有*很多*工作要做——警督知道这一点。他朝你微微点头，示意你继续。

En: There is *plenty* here to work with once he's in custody -- proceed with a sure hand now!
Zh: 一旦他被拘留，还有*很多*工作要做——现在，稳扎稳打地继续下去！

En: Slap yourself in your head again, jump start it!
Zh: 再敲敲自己的脑袋，来个跨接起动！

En: Dumbo, do something, you can't zone out now, this isn't doodle-loo dance time.
Zh: 白痴，做点什么吧，你不能现在开小差，这可不是乱蹦乱跳的时候。

En: Slap yourself in your head, jump start it!
Zh: 敲敲自己的脑袋，来个跨接起动！

En: Wait. It was about him meeting Edgar, and a deal...
Zh: 等等。关于他和埃德加的见面，还有交易……

En: By god, we are on the edge! In the very end -- and you can't even remember what you're trying to connect, can you? While the murder suspect stares at you with contempt!
Zh: 天啦，我们正身处边缘！已经到最后了——你甚至都想不起来该怎么连接这些线索，是吗？杀人嫌疑犯正轻蔑地盯着你看呢！

En: Something with the Union boss... (Punch yourself in the head.)
Zh: “跟工会老大有关……”（敲打自己的脑袋。）

En: Kim, what do you think? About this... you know...
Zh: “金，你怎么看？关于这个……你知道的……”

En: Officer! The lieutenant watches you beat yourself in the head -- again. The second time in this interview.
Zh: “警官！”警督看着你又开始敲打自己的脑袋。这是走访过程中的第二次了。

En: Officer! The lieutenant watches you beat yourself in the head -- to make a connection in the murder case.
Zh: “警官！”警督看着你敲打自己的脑袋——为了跟凶杀案联系起来。

En: The communist watches you beat yourself in the head -- again. The second time in this interview. It yields no revelations.
Zh: 康米主义者看着你又开始猛烈地敲打着自己的脑袋。这是走访中的第二次了。不过没有带来任何启示。

En: The communist watches you violently beat yourself in the head to make a connection in his case. It yields no revelations.
Zh: 康米主义者看着你猛烈地敲打着自己的脑袋，想要找出跟他的案子之间的关联。没有带来任何启示。

En: Mr. Dros, about this deal you made. He turns to him. "With Edgar. The death of the Krenel mercenary was only *coincidentally* beneficial to the Claires. But..." He leans closer.
Zh: “德罗斯先生，关于你的交易。”警督转向他。“跟埃德加的交易。科奈尔雇佣兵的死亡，只是*碰巧*对克莱尔兄弟有利。不过……”他靠近了一些。

En: He quickly realises what is happening.
Zh: 他很快意识到到底发生了什么。

En: Something with the Union boss... the elections. The previous leader...
Zh: “跟工会老大有关……选举。前任领导……”

En: What about the *other* people you've killed for them?
Zh: “那你为他们杀的*其他*人呢？”

En: Other people?
Zh: “其他人？”

En: About this deal you made. The lieutenant immediately understands what is happening, and turns to the suspect.
Zh: “关于你的交易，”警督立即明白了个中缘由，转向了嫌疑人。

En: What? He's beginning to sense it now. Something is off.
Zh: “什么？”现在他开始感觉到了。有什么东西不太对劲。

En: God dammit. Why are you so stupid? That's it -- we're aborting this mental failure. Back to questions.
Zh: 该死。你为什么这么蠢？就这样吧——我们要中止这种精神故障。继续回到问题上面。

En: Get a hold of yourself, this is just one little thing. You still have everything else! Go on, finish the interrogation!
Zh: 控制住自己，这只是一件小事。你还别的呢！继续，完成审讯！

En: You *have* to straighten your back and get back to it now. You're the last detective of the RCM here. Finish the interrogation, it doesn't matter if you forgot one thing.
Zh: 现在你*必须*挺直腰杆，重回战场。你是这里最后一名RCM的警探了。完成审讯，忘记一件事情也没关系。

En: There is no other officer on the scene, only you. You *have* to get a hold of yourself -- finish the interrogation.
Zh: 现场没有别的警官了，只有你。你*必须*控制住自己——完成这次审讯。

En: Get your head back in the game. Everyone else is gone. It has to be you, finish the damn interrogation, forget this.
Zh: 集中对付眼前的任务。所有人都不在了。只有你，完成这个该死的审讯，忘了这个。

En: NOW!
Zh: 就是现在！

En: With Edgar. The death of the Krenel mercenary was only *coincidentally* beneficial to the Claires. But...
Zh: “跟埃德加的交易。科奈尔雇佣兵的死亡，只是*碰巧*对克莱尔兄弟有利。不过……”他靠近了一些。

En: To your right you see the lieutenant give you a quick sideways glance...
Zh: 警督站在你右边，飞快地朝你使了个眼色……

En: The previous forewoman of the Union -- Tiphaine Holly.
Zh: “工会的前任女工头——蒂费纳·霍利。”

En: Like -- the previous forewoman of the Union.
Zh: “比如说——工会的前任女工头。”

En: I didn't fight forty years to end up an informant for the international regime. He wags a finger at the lieutenant. "What happened happened."
Zh: 他朝他摆了摆手指：“我抗争了40年，可不想最后落了个向国际体制告密的下场。该发生的已经发生了。”

En: They promised political change. And they didn't deliver.
Zh: “他们承诺了政治改革。但是并没有兑现。”

En: Look who's up. He scoffs. "You're worse off than me."
Zh: “看看谁醒了。”他嘲弄到。“你比我还糟糕。”

En: We will have plenty of time to talk about this, Mr. Dros. He does not let him gloat. "When you're in pre-detention -- it takes *years* in pre-detention."
Zh: “我们有很多时间聊这个问题，德罗斯先生。”他没有让他继续幸灾乐祸。“在你未决羁押期间——未决羁押需要*好多年*呢。”

En: Go ahead. The straggler closes his gap toothed smiled. "I've been in solitary confinement my whole life."
Zh: “来吧。”逃兵收起笑脸。“我这一生都处在单独监禁状态。”

En: Still dumb, your eyes are transfixed on his digit. It's yellow with nicotine...
Zh: 还是一言不发，你目不转睛地盯着他的手指。它们被尼古丁熏得焦黄……

En: Before, when you asked him about the Union he said it was a *disappointment*. They promised him something. Political.
Zh: 之前，你问他工会的时候，他说很*失望*。他们承诺过他什么东西。政治上的。

En: You are *THE LAW*. He must divulge the information!
Zh: 你是*法律*。他必须泄露这条消息！

En: Kim, we're not solving this part. What do we do?
Zh: “金，我们解决不了这部分问题。我们该怎么做？”

En: We will have plenty of time to talk about this later, Mr. Dros. The lieutenant does not let him gloat. "When you're in pre-detention -- it can take *years* in pre-detention."
Zh: “我们之后还有很多时间可以讨论这个问题，德罗斯先生。”他没有让他继续幸灾乐祸。“在你未决羁押期间——未决羁押需要*好多年*呢。”

En: Look who's up! He grins at you. "From the drunken stupor. This one's worse for wear than me... emotionally frayed. Life is hard for us human beings in deregulation hell, isn't it?"
Zh: “看看谁醒了。”他朝你咧嘴一笑。“从醉醺醺的恍惚状态里清醒了吗。这家伙甚至比我还糟糕……神经紧张。对于人类来说，生活在解除管制的地狱里可不容易，不是吗？”

En: You fucking killed the previous foreman. I know it.
Zh: “是你他妈的杀了前任工头。我知道的。”

En: Look who's up! he grins at you. "From the drunken stupor. This one's worse for wear than me... and so emotional. Life is hard for us human beings in deregulation hell, isn't it?"
Zh: “看看谁醒了。”他朝你咧嘴一笑。“从醉醺醺的恍惚状态里清醒了吗。这家伙甚至比我还糟糕……而且还这么情绪化。对于人类来说，生活在解除管制的地狱里可不容易，不是吗？”

En: Ease off it. This was not an unmitigated disaster. The lieutenant mitigated it. Just proceed, calmly...
Zh: 放松一下。这不是一场彻头彻尾的灾难。警督缓和了一下。只要继续下去，冷静些……

En: That's it? I've gotta say that? There are no other thoughts in my head?
Zh: 就这样？就只能说这些？我的脑子里没有别的想法了？

En: You could say he has dirty fingernails, but that's just a fact, it's not going to do anything.
Zh: 你可以说他的手指甲很脏，不过这只是一个事实，没太大用处。

En: That's, regrettably, all you've got, yes.
Zh: 就这些，很遗憾，你只能想到这些，没错。

En: Every *fucking* morning, for thirty-four years... He grinds his teeth in rage. "Throwing that ball. One ball against the other... I've always loathed that game. That is *not* a working class game. I don't care what they say on Radio June."
Zh: “*他妈的*，每天早晨都是，整整34年……”他愤怒地咬紧牙关。“扔那个该死的球。用一个球砸另一个球……我一直都很讨厌那个游戏。这可*不是*工人阶级的游戏。我不在乎他们在六月电台里说的那些话。”

En: Royalist ghouls play it like it was *life itself*! Click-clack, he makes the sound of balls connecting, "across the water each day. And that uniform, like a parrot's plumage! I won't even mention that he's a traitor to his *race*. A pétanque maniac *race traitor*."
Zh: “那个保皇派的食尸鬼一直在玩，搞得好像这个游戏就是*生活本身*！咔哒咔哒，”他发出小球连在一起的声音，“每天都在对岸玩。还有那套制服，就像鹦鹉的羽毛！我甚至都不想提他背叛自己*种族*的事。一个地掷球疯子，*种族叛徒*。”

En: I remember him... He points to his black eye. "I remember him from *La Noce* -- not him personally, his make and model. There were tens of thousands of them. I thought we took them all out before the liberals came to their rescue. We missed one..."
Zh: “我记得他……”他指着他黑色的眼睛。“我是从*胡桃士兵*里认出他的——不是他本人，而是他的构造和模型。成千上万个。我还以为在自由主义者赶来营救之前，我们就把他们全都干掉了。我们漏了一个……”

En: *That* one. With his shaky finger he points to the city, toward the crater near the plaza where a lonely pine tree stands.
Zh: 他用颤抖的手指指向城市，指向广场附近的一个弹坑，那里有一颗孤独的松树。“*那*一个。”

En: There doesn't seem to be a single person under the pine today...
Zh: 今天松树下面好像一个人也没有……

En: There doesn't seem to be a single person under the pine today. Not even Gaston, alone.
Zh: 今天松树下面好像一个人也没有。连加斯顿都不在。

En: Just nod.
Zh: 只是点点头。

En: Whoa-whoa. Let's back off before you get too agitated.
Zh: “停停停。在你变得太激动之前，我们先退后一步。”

En: Now I don't know about...
Zh: “现在我不知道……”

En: There's no one there...
Zh: “那里没人……”

En: Let's definitely back off now. Calm down.
Zh: “现在我们必须退后一步。冷静下来。”

En: What is there to be *agitated* about? The unholy ghoul?! His hand trembles with rage. "I love him there. He reminds me of everything we fought for. At least we killed that Frissel and his kingsmen..." He's overtaken by a coughing fit.
Zh: “有什么好*激动*的？那个罪恶的食尸鬼？！”他的双手因为愤怒而颤抖。“我喜欢他站在那里。提醒着我，我们到底是在为什么而战斗。至少我们杀了弗里塞尔和他的骑士……”他突然咳嗽起来。

En: Calm down? I'm not angry... His hand still trembles. "I *adore* him. He reminds me of everything we fought for. At least we killed that Frissel and his kingsmen..." He's overtaken by a coughing fit.
Zh: “冷静？我又不生气……”他的手还在颤抖。“我*喜欢*他。他提醒了我，我们到底是在为什么而战斗。至少我们杀了弗里塞尔和他的骑士……”他突然咳嗽起来。

En: Fat and plump. Like a pheasant, just *begging* to be popped off.... A grin stretches across his face and he whispers: "Please, Mr. Dros. Shoot me."
Zh: “又胖又圆。像一只野鸡，*祈求*着突然死亡……”他咧嘴一笑，小声说到：“求你了，德罗斯先生。杀了我。”

En: Just nod.
Zh: 只是点点头。

En: Not yet. I like to *look* at him strut around, place the cross-hair on his medals. The smile lingers. "Right on his face, and just... fiddle the trigger. *Think* about it. Let the bon-bon melt in my mouth..."
Zh: 笑容还未消散。“还没到时候。我喜欢*看着*他招摇过市，用十字准线瞄准他的勋章。就在他的脸上，然后就这么……扣动扳机。*想想*看。让夹心软糖融化在我的嘴巴里……”

En: Fat and plump, like a pheasant... He does not hear you. "Just *begging* to be popped off." A grin stretches across his face and he says very softly: "Please, Mr. Dros. Shoot me."
Zh: “又胖又圆。像一只野鸡……”他没听见你说话。“只是*祈求*着突然死亡。”他咧嘴一笑，柔声说到：“求你了，德罗斯先生。杀了我。”

En: He whispers with such predatory hunger it borders on *longing*.
Zh: 他带着对掠夺的欲望——在*憧憬*边缘徘徊的欲望——低语着。

En: You'd like to kill him?
Zh: “你想杀了他？”

En: A treat. Better served for later... he's a pleasure delayer.
Zh: 一场盛宴。最好留着之后再说……他是喜欢把好东西留到最后享受的人。

En: Save the treat for later?
Zh: “把这场盛宴留到之后？”

En: Save the treat for later? the lieutenant asks cheerfully.
Zh: “把这场盛宴留到之后？”警督愉快地问到。

En: Nod.
Zh: 点点头。

En: He *is* a juicy bon-bon, that one. A real treat. For the black day -- the blackest. When I put that gun in my own mouth. I think: no, don't waste it. Put this lead in that cock René. For the boys he killed -- and then I look at him throw those balls and I suddenly feel... He lets out a wistful sigh.
Zh: “他*是*一颗美味多汁的夹心软糖，那家伙。一个真正的乐趣。为了留给黑暗的那天——最黑暗的那天——我把枪塞进自己嘴里的那天。我想到：不，别浪费子弹。把这枚铅弹留给那只大公鸡雷内。为了他杀掉的那些小伙子——然后，我看着他玩球的样子，突然感觉到……”他发出一声渴望的叹息。

En: Better. I even hid one bullet so I'd always have one. For him... The lines on his face straighten as he looks inland. "Haven't seen him around lately, strutting around... must be down with arthritis. I hope it hurts like hell. I hope he sweats blood."
Zh: 自己好多了。我甚至还藏了一枚子弹，这样永远都会还剩一颗。留给他的那一颗……”他看向内陆，脸部线条紧绷起来。“最近没见到他了……肯定是关节炎犯了吧。希望能疼死他。希望他痛不欲生。”

En: Better. I even hid one bullet so I'd always have one. For him... The lines on his face straighten as he looks inland. "Haven't seen him there lately... must be down with arthritis. Old cunt..."
Zh: 自己好多了。我甚至还藏了一枚子弹，这样永远都会还剩一颗。留给他的那一颗……”他看向内陆，脸部线条紧绷起来。“最近没见到他了……肯定是关节炎犯了吧。老不死的……”

En: He *is* a juicy bon-bon, that one. A real treat. For the black day -- the blackest. When I put that gun in my own mouth. I think: no, don't waste it. Put this lead in that cock René. For the boys he killed -- and then I look at him throw those balls and I suddenly feel... He lets out a wistful sigh.
Zh: “他*是*一颗美味多汁的夹心软糖，那家伙。一个真正的乐趣。为了留给黑暗的那天——最黑暗的那天——我把枪塞进自己嘴里的那天。我想到：不，别浪费子弹。把这枚铅弹留给那只大公鸡雷内。为了他杀掉的那些小伙子——然后，我看着他玩球的样子，突然感觉到……”他发出一声渴望的叹息。

En: A real treat. For the black day -- the blackest day, he says, almost salivating. "When I put the gun in my own mouth, I always think: No. Put this lead in that cock René. And I go to look at him throw those balls. And I suddenly feel..." He breathes out.
Zh: 公社社员摇摇头，几乎有些垂延欲滴。“一个真正的乐趣。为了留给黑暗的那天——最黑暗的那天，”他的脸上依然挂着笑容。“当我把枪塞进自己嘴里，我总是会想：不，把这枚铅弹留给那只大公鸡雷内。看着他玩球的样子，我突然感觉到……”他呼出一口气。

En: Hearing it may destabilize him -- you sure you've gotten everything from him?
Zh: 听到这个可能会让他动摇——你确定已经从他那里得到想要的一切了？”

En: You know, about that René...
Zh: “你知道吗，关于那个雷内……”

En: Yes, where is he? he tenses up. "I hope he doesn't have *debilitating* arthritis. Or kidney stones. He can still come out to play with balls and get shot in the head, right?"
Zh: “是的，他在哪？”他紧张起来。“希望他没有*让人衰弱*的关节炎。或者是肾结石。他还能出来玩球，然后被人一枪打中脑袋，对吗？”

En: Oh my, god, he's even *worried* for him.
Zh: 我，的，天，他甚至开始为他*担心*了。

En: René is dead. He died of old age, a couple of days ago.
Zh: “雷内死了。几天之前，老死了。”

En: Bad arthritis, yes. He's not playing this week. (Lie.)
Zh: “很严重的关节炎，没错。他这周不会出来玩了。”（撒谎）

En: Anyway. Tell me something else, Mr. Dros...
Zh: “无所谓了。跟我说点别的吧，德罗斯先生……”

En: Heh, yes, of course... He mutters to himself. "Must be passing a kidney stone. I hope it's excruciating. At least it keeps him from throwing his balls..."
Zh: “呃，是的，当然……”他喃喃自语。“肯定是肾结石。希望它很折磨人。至少让他不能扔球玩……”

En: Heh, yes of course. He seems to relax a bit. "I hope it hurts like hell, I hope he sweats blood. Must be torture -- not to be throwing his balls for a *whole week*..."
Zh: “呃，是的，当然……”他似乎放松了一些。“希望他疼的要死要活，希望他痛不欲生。一定很折磨人吧——*整整一星期*都不能扔球玩……”

En: He was worried for him.
Zh: 他在为他担心。

En: He seems relieved. Could he have been worried for him?
Zh: 他似乎放松了一些。难道是在为他担心吗？

En: They are veterans of the same war. Somewhere west, in Coal City his enemy is lying in a dark room, on a metal slider. In L'Ossuaire Municipal, like he will too. Soon. Half of the war between these men is over.
Zh: 他们是经历过同一场战争的老兵。在西边的某个地方，煤城里，他的敌人躺在一个黑暗的房间里，一个金属滑块上。躺在市政公墓里，他也会这样。很快。这些人之间的战争已经结束了一半。

En: He reminds him of himself. The same hatred. The same... you try to think of another thing -- but no, it's just the hatred.
Zh: 他让他想到了自己。相同的仇恨。一模一样……你试着想出别的什么东西——不过没有，只有仇恨。

En: I waited too long… The old communard looks at you, his blackberry eyes shaking -- in disbelief. "I waited too long and now he's dead."
Zh: 老康米主义者看着你，黑色的眼睛在颤抖——满是怀疑。“我等得太久了……我等得太久了，结果现在他死了。”

En: No...
Yes.
Zh: “是的。”

En: Just kidding...
Zh: “只是开玩笑……”

En: No you're not! He wouldn't go away for so long... The old communard looks at you -- his blackberry eyes shaking in disbelief. "I waited too long... I waited too long and now he's dead."
Zh: “不，你没有！他不会离开这么久的……”老康米主义者看着你，黑色的眼睛因为怀疑而颤抖。“我等得太久了……我等得太久了，结果现在他死了。”

En: Are you okay Mr. Dros? To go on?
Zh: “你还好吧，德罗斯先生？可以继续吗？”

En: You think I haven't seen people die? It's all I've seen them do. Fuck and die -- all the other plans we had. To love. To colonize the pale. It's all fucked...
Zh: “你以为我没见过别人死去吗？我只看见人们死去。媾合和死亡——还有我们有过的所有其他计划。为了爱。为了殖民灰域。全他妈的搞砸了……”

En: He's not okay. This is just another black day, in a row of black days -- something *strange* is keeping him together, making him endure...
Zh: 他不好。在所有那些黑暗的日子里，这不过是其中之一罢了——某种*奇怪*的东西让他振作自己，让他维持……

En: ...an idea. Told to him by grown ups, from radio towers and leaflets, in beautiful print when he was still a teenager: everything is possible. If we fight.
Zh: ……一种想法。通过那些无线电发射塔和印刷精美的传单，成年人告诉还是个青少年的他：一切皆有可能。只要我们投身战斗。

En: And then he lost. So did they all.
Zh: 然后他失败了。他们全都失败了。

En: It doesn't look like he is. Okay.
Zh: 看起来他不像。好吧。

En: Glad we talked about *what*? Another erratic gesture. He's trembling...
Zh: “很高兴我们谈论了*什么*？”又是一个古怪的手势。他在颤抖……

En: Who fucking cares? It does not seem to strike a fire in him anymore...
Zh: “谁他妈在乎？”它似乎再也不能点燃他心中的那团火焰了……

En: I don't want to talk about god damn social democrats. Traitors is all they are. Brain dead... He waves his arm, agitated and despondent at the same time.
Zh: “我不想提那些该死的工人主义者。他们全都是叛徒。脑死亡了……”他挥舞着胳膊，激动不安，同时又心灰意冷。

En: René still presses on his mind.
Zh: 雷内的事还压在他的心头。

En: The flame of anger dulls in him. He tires of it, all of it...
Zh: 愤怒的火焰在他心中渐渐熄灭。他倦了，对一切都感到厌倦……

En: Frissel the First, Filippe the Second, what's the difference? Syphilitic murderers the lot. I don't want to think about those things anymore. I'm tired of all of it!
Zh: “弗里塞尔一世，菲利普二世，有什么区别？都是染上梅毒的杀人犯。我不想再提这些事了。我已经厌倦这一切了！”

En: René must have been quite a loss for him. Maybe you could still get him to talk about things that don't require as much rage... because it's not there anymore.
Zh: 雷内对他来说一定是个巨大的损失。也许你还能从他那里问出一些不那么让他愤怒的事情……因为那些愤怒已经不再。

En: I don't even care about those whores anymore... He stares despondently into the reeds. "Get it over with. Take me in."
Zh: “我甚至都不在乎那些婊子了……”他沮丧地凝视着芦苇丛。“赶快把事情做完。逮捕我吧。”

En: Okay then.
Zh: “那好吧。”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: Cuno squints into the distance, confused. "Walterschlong?" he whispers to himself.
Zh: 坤诺眯起眼睛看着远方，有些困惑。“视界化？”他喃喃自语。

En: Slippery fuck didn't keep his word... The kid's been listening, mouth agape.
Zh: “狡猾的杂种没有信守诺言……”小孩一直在听，嘴巴都没合拢。

En: The kid watches you beat yourself in the head -- again. The second time in this interview.
Zh: 小孩看着你又在猛烈地敲打着自己的脑袋。这是走访过程中的第二次了。

En: The kid watches you violently beat yourself in the head -- in order to make a connection in the murder case.
Zh: 小孩看着你猛烈地敲打着自己的脑袋——为了想出跟凶杀案之间的关联。

En: The scent of blood in the air... but what else? There was something you can't remember...
Zh: 空气中弥漫着血的味道……但是还有什么呢？还有些你记不起来的东西……

En: Something about the tracks? Suddenly all those tracks are so confusing... go with something else first!
Zh: 跟轨道有关的东西？突然间，所有轨道都变得迷惑起来……先做点别的事吧！

En: Nothing else comes up. The old man watches you stimulate thoughts by hitting yourself.
Zh: 想不出别的什么了。老人看着你敲打自己，想要刺激脑中的想法。

En: Nothing else comes up. You see the Cuno watch you try to stimulate thought processes by hitting yourself.
Zh: 想不出别的什么了。坤诺看着你敲打自己，想要刺激思维过程。

En: Nothing else comes up. You see the lieutenant watch you try to stimulate thought processes by hitting yourself.
Zh: 想不出别的什么了。警督看着你敲打自己，想要刺激思维过程。

En: I'm sorry this didn't do anything... usually hurting yourself does.
Zh: 很抱歉，这样好像没用……平常揍你自己好像是可以的。

En: Wait, don't forget the footprints! The diagonal prints in the dust in the secret space behind Klaasje's bedroom! *Now* they're gonna come up!
Zh: 等等，别忘了脚印！卡拉洁卧室背后的那个秘密空间，尘土上的斜纹脚印！*现在*轮到它们了！

En: You got it! Remember, the boot prints were like no *modern* sole...
Zh: 你可以的！还记得吗，那些可不像是*现代*的鞋底印……

En: Yes. Ouch. So good it *hurts*. Those were not *modern* prints...
Zh: 是的。好痛。好到让人*疼痛*的。那些可不是*现代*的脚印……

En: Yo, a word... He gestures to talk to you on the side.
Zh: “哟，跟你说两句……”他比了个手势，要在旁边跟你说两句。

En: Officer, a word... He gestures to talk to you on the side.
Zh: “警官，跟你说两句……”他比了个手势，要在旁边跟你说两句。

En: Maybe don't beat yourself any more though? You're not immortal.
Zh: 要不还是别打自己了？你又不是长生不老。

En: I'm sorry this didn't do anything... usually hurting yourself does.
Zh: 很抱歉，这样好像没用……平常揍你自己好像是可以的。

En: I'm sorry this didn't do anything... usually hurting yourself does.
Zh: 很抱歉，这样好像没用……平常揍你自己好像是可以的。

En: My god... I've got nothing at all!
Zh: “天啦……我什么都没想到！”

En: Of course! Thank you, head, thank you.
Zh: 当然！谢谢你，我的大脑，谢谢。

En: Ow...
Nothing comes up. The old man watches you stimulate thoughts by hitting yourself.
Zh: 什么也没出现。老人看着你敲打自己，想要刺激脑中的想法。

En: You see the Cuno watch you try to stimulate thought processes by hitting yourself.
Zh: 坤诺看着你敲打自己，想要刺激思维过程。

En: Fucking communard! Fucking asshole! Look at him, just staring -- hit him where it hurts!
Zh: 该死的公社社会！该死的混账！看看他，就这么盯着他看——打他的痛处！

En: Yo, a word... He gestures to talk to you on the side.
Zh: “哟，跟你说两句……”他比了个手势，要在旁边跟你说两句。

En: I'm sorry this didn't do anything... usually hurting yourself does something for you.
Zh: 很抱歉，这样好像没用……平常揍你自己好像是可以的。

En: You see the lieutenant watch you try to stimulate thought processes by hitting yourself.
Zh: 警督看着你敲打自己，想要刺激思维过程。

En: Officer, a word... He gestures to talk to you on the side.
Zh: “警官，跟你说两句……”他比了个手势，要在旁边跟你说两句。

En: I'm sorry this didn't do anything... usually hurting yourself does something for you.
Zh: 很抱歉，这样好像没用……平常揍你自己好像是可以的。

En: Officer, a word... The lieutenant wants to talk to you on the side, as you slap yourself furiously.
Zh: “警官，跟你说两句……”你拼命在扇自己耳光，警督想拉你到边上说两句。

En: Excuse us for a moment, Mr. Dros. [Leave.]
Zh: “失陪一下，德罗斯先生。”[离开。]

En: No, I'm almost there! Just let me have a few more punches...
Zh: “不要，我就快到了！让我再多打几下……”

En: No, I'm almost there! Just let me have a few more punches...
Zh: “不要，我就快到了！让我再多打几下……”

En: Almost *where?* Almost ready to bleed to death? He looks at the bloodstain on your pant leg...
Zh: “就快到*哪里*？就快准备好流血致死吗？”他看着你裤腿上的血迹……

En: Ooh, that's the good stuff. THE MOTIVE! There you go, see, this works. DO THE MOTIVE. The pain has dislodged something in your soaked sponge of a brain...
Zh: 哦哦哦，那可是好东西。动机！怎么样，看见没，这下成了吧。找到动机。疼痛从你大脑浸透的海绵体里强行剥离了什么东西……

En: No, c'mon. He's half whispering. "A *word*, let's go."
Zh: “不行，来吧。”他的声音稍微放大了一些。“说*两句*，我们走。”

En: No, c'mon. The lieutenant's impatient. "A *word*, let's go."
Zh: “不行，来吧。”警督不耐烦了。“说*两句*，我们走。”

En: Yo, detective Dick, a word... The boy gestures to the side as you slap yourself.
Zh: “哟，迪克警探，我们说两句……”看着自己扇耳光的你，男孩朝旁边比了个手势。

En: Excuse us for a moment, Mr. Dros. [Leave.]
Zh: “失陪一下，德罗斯先生。”[离开。]

En: Almost *where?* Almost ready to bleed to death? He looks at the bloodstain on your pant leg...
Zh: “就快到*哪里*？就快准备好流血致死吗？”他看着你裤腿上的血迹……

En: Politics. Hit him with POLITICS and he may start giving his motive...
Zh: 政治。用政治攻击他，他也许会说出自己的动机……

En: Don't leave any loose ends. Get him on everything.
Zh: 不要留下任何交代不清楚的细节。让他把一切都说清楚。

En: You've almost got him. Just a last little push...
Zh: 你就快抓到他了。只要最后再稍微推一把……

En: Tie up every loose end, now. There's no other chance.
Zh: 现在，把所有不清楚的细节全部讲明白。不会再有别的机会了。

En: Leave no stone unturned! Get him on what matters most!
Zh: 彻彻底底！这是最重要的事情，不能放过他！

En: He would have a good view of the tribunal from here. It's not just empty  boasting.
Zh: 从这里他应该能清楚地看到审判。这绝对不只是空洞的吹嘘。

En: The gun. The murder weapon is the perfect opener.
Zh: 那支枪。凶器是最完美的开场白。

En: A spasm of rage, sudden and uncontrollable.
Zh: 一阵愤怒的抽搐，很突然，很难控制。

En: You're with the enemy, kid. His voice screeches. "A fucking halberdier of the market-liberal regime."
Zh: “你跟敌人在一起，孩子……”他的声音很刺耳。“你是市场自由主义政权的守卫。”

En: Just one more, it can't be more than one now...
Zh: 再来一个，现在不可能超过一个了……

En: Yes. You were in the Whirling-in-Rags. What were you doing there? Sneaking?
Zh: “是的。你去过褴褛飞旋。你在那里做什么？偷偷摸摸吗？”

En: Tryin' to rack your brains... He squints at you, black pearls gleaming with hatred: "You're *desperate* to report something back to your masters. They must have really loved that dead fuck..."
Zh: “绞尽脑汁了，是吗？”他斜了他一眼，黑珍珠一样的眼睛散发出憎恶的光芒。“*不顾一切*地想要跟你的主人汇报吗。看来他们肯定很喜欢那个死掉的混账……”

En: So you just killed him?
Zh: “所以你就杀了他吗？”

En: So you killed him?
Zh: “所以你杀了他？”

En: I *had* them in my sights, both of them -- him and the whore. I was breathing with them, in phase, and I pulled the trigger and flew on the air until I landed in his mouth... He begins to smile.
Zh: “他们*都在*我的视线里，两个人都在。我跟他们一起呼吸。协调一致，然后我扣动扳机，子弹划过天空，直到降落在他嘴里……”他笑了起来。

En: Oh the inhumanity... He closes his black eyes. "One paramilitary less in Revachol." You can almost see him squeeze a tear out of his eye. His fists begin to tremble from the anger.
Zh: “是啊，很残暴地杀了他……”他闭上双眼。“瑞瓦肖又少了一个准军事部队成员。”你几乎看见他从眼里挤出了一滴眼泪。他的拳头因为愤怒而颤抖。

En: Hold your breath.
Zh: 屏住呼吸。

En: Just nod.
Zh: 只是点点头。

En: The lieutenant raises his right arm to hush you...
Zh: 警督抬起右臂，让你不要出声……

En: Hush, he does not need to be pushed any more. The ball is rolling...
Zh: 嘘，他不需要别人推了。球自己滚了起来……

En: How did you...
Zh: “你是怎么……”

En: ...while the lieutenant listens, holding his breath.
Zh: ……警督也在一旁屏住呼吸，静静听着。

En: On second thought -- about something else...
Zh: “我仔细一想——还有别的事……”

En: Figured. He sighs and holds his lower abdomen. A flash of pain there... it angers him.
Zh: “意料之中。”他叹了口气，把手按在下腹部。那里在隐隐作痛……让他很恼火。

En: He heard you. He just wants to hear you say it... you're in!
Zh: 他听见了。他只想听你说出来……你进来了！

En: Damn, he saw you. He's watched it happen.
Zh: 该死，他看见你了，他知道在广场发生了什么。

En: And so they did.
Zh: “而且他们确实这么做了。”

En: We ain't with them yo, the kid splurts. "This is fuckin' Revachol West representin' here."
Zh: “我们跟他们可不是一道的，”小孩唾沫横飞。“我们他妈可是瑞瓦肖西部的代表。”

En: The corpse in ceramic armour, hanging behind the Whirling-in-Rags. Did you shoot him?
Zh: “那具穿着陶瓷盔甲，挂在褴褛飞旋背后的尸体。是你朝他开的枪吗？”

En: *What*?
He was sent to protect fair, just, beautiful corporate interests in an ugly labour dispute. He was murdered.
Zh: “那里有一场丑陋的劳资纠纷，他被指派保护公平、公正、美好的企业利益。他被人杀了。”

En: He died in the arms of a lover, guarding her *and* the fragile, beautiful corporate interests of Wild Pines against militant labour.
Zh: “他死在情人的臂弯里，守卫着她，*还有*野松公司脆弱又美丽的公司利益，对抗那帮好斗的劳工。”

En: I've said enough. Did you kill him?
Zh: “我已经说得够多了。是你杀了他吗？”

En: A beautiful, strong man sent here by the honourable private military company Krenel.
Zh: “一个美好又强壮的男人，是光荣的私营军事公司科奈尔派到这里来的。”

En: Are you being *clever*? What is this socially abhorrent joke?
Zh: “你是*揣着聪明装糊涂*吗？这是什么，跟社会格格不入的笑话吗？”

En: The fascist death squad who took a bullet in the mouth on the night of March 4th.
Zh: “3月4号晚上，法西斯暗杀小队的一名成员嘴部中弹了。”

En: Watch your mouth, Mr. Dros. The lieutenant squeezes the handle of his pistol.
Zh: “说话客气点，德罗斯先生。”警督握紧了手枪的枪柄。

En: I'm absolutely sincere. Now, did you use that rifle to shoot him?
Zh: “我非常地真诚。现在，是你用那支步枪杀了他的吗？”

En: Okay, I mean the paramilitary death squad.
Zh: “好吧，我的意思是准军事级暗杀小队。”

En: The worm, there? He spits southward, toward the coast. "In the monster-armour?"
Zh: “那边的蠕虫吗？”他朝着南边、海岸的方向吐了一口唾沫。“穿着怪兽盔甲？”

En: Nod.
Zh: 点头。

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: You know who I mean.
Zh: “你知道我什么意思。”

En: His name was Lely. He was part of a security detail here in Martinaise.
Zh: “他的名字叫莱利，在马丁内斯这边做安保工作。”

En: His name was Ellis Kortenaer. He was part of a security detail here in Martinaise.
Zh: “他的名字叫埃利斯·科顿艾尔，在马丁内斯这边做安保工作。”

En: I've used it for killing people.
Zh: “我用它杀人。”

En: Killing people?
Zh: “杀人？”

En: It's a gun. That's what they're for. You want a moralist euphemism -- defending your family and your property? I haven't done that.
Zh: “这是一支枪。枪就是用来干这个的。还是说你想要一种仁义而委婉的说法——保护你的家人和财产？我没干过那个。”

En: I've used it to kill people.
Zh: “我用它杀人。”

En: Interesting. The lieutenant nods. "During, or *after* the War?"
Zh: “有意思。”警督点点头。“那是在战时，或者是在*战后*？”

En: There is no *after* the war. He shakes his head and smiles, his teeth rotten black: "Class war is never over."
Zh: “根本没有*战后*。”他摇摇头，笑了，牙齿烂成了黑色：“阶级战争永远不会停止。”

En: So he's continued killing *after* hostilities ended. Okay, okay...
Zh: 所以在战争结束*之后*，他还在继续杀人。好吧，好吧……

En: And this has been during, or *after* the War?
Zh: “那是在战时，或者是在*战后*？”

En: So you're saying you killed people, *after* active fighting stopped?
Zh: “你说的杀人，是在战争停止*之后*吗？”

En: This is it. You can feel it, like battery acid on the tip of your tongue -- something you haven't felt in a while, but...
Zh: 就是它了。你能感觉到，就像是舌尖尝到了电瓶水的味道——你已经有一阵子没有过这种感觉了，不过……

En: But what?
Zh: 不过什么？

En: No time!
Zh: 没时间了！

En: This is what you *live* for. This is *the shit*.
Zh: 这就是*活着*的目的。这就是*狗屎*。

En: The great serotonin jackpot.
Zh: 血清素中大奖了。

En: Of course, you're on the trail now, move in...
Zh: 当然，现在你已经追踪到线索了，继续……

En: ... for the kill.
Zh: ……为了杀人。

En: What have I used it for... He looks you dead in the eye: "I've used it for *killing people*."
Zh: “我用它做了什么……”他用死气沉沉的眼睛看着你：“我用它来*杀人*。”

En: No reply. His leg twitches.
Zh: 没有回应。他的腿抽搐着。

En: Here we go! A trail of blood, the lieutenant smells it too...
Zh: 有了！这里有血的味道，警督也闻到了……

En: Here we go! A trail of blood.
Zh: 有了！这里有血的味道。

En: You can smell it.
Zh: 你能闻到。

En: Even the kid can smell it...
Zh: 就连小孩都闻到了……

En: Killing people? Like straight *offin'* them?
Zh: “杀人？就像直接*干掉*他们吗？”

En: Killing people?
Zh: “杀人？”

En: You've done a lot of that?
Zh: “你做过很多次吗？”

En: Nice and honest...
Zh: “很诚实……”

En: You need to *contextualize* it for him first. Turn the key elsewhere -- the lock is here. It's here.
Zh: 你需要先把他放在*上下文的环境里*理清一下。转动别处的钥匙——锁就在这里。它就在这里。

En: He sounds like he hasn't gotten to speak to another human being in a long time. Especially about politics. That's what you should do first.
Zh: 听起来他已经很久没跟其他人说过话了。特别谈论有关政治的话题。所以你首先就应该这么做。

En: You went in too fast. Over-eager.
Zh: 你冲得太快。热切过头了。

En: THE SOLUTION.
Zh: 谜底。

En: The who now? He leans in and cups his ear.
Zh: “你说谁？”他靠近了一些，竖起耳朵。

En: He heard you. He just wants to hear you say it again. This is dramatic flare on his part... Right choice, we're in! Do it, sire!
Zh: 他听见了。他只想听您再说一次。这是他的角色里最激动人心的展开……正确的选择，吾辈攻进来了！开始吧，大人！

En: Did you use that gun to shoot and kill a Colonel of the security contractor Krenel?
Zh: “你用这支枪射杀了安全服务契约商科奈尔的一名上校吗？”

En: Did you use that gun to shoot and kill the mercenary on the coast?
Zh: “你用这支枪射杀了对岸的雇佣兵吗？”

En: Go in straight, no euphemisms, he doesn't like those...
Zh: 直接点，别拐弯抹角，他不喜欢这样……

En: Be careful now, slow and steady does it. Make him repeat it first.
Zh: 现在谨慎些，慢慢来，稳一点。让他先重复一遍。

En: No-no. Be careful now, slow and steady does it. Make him repeat it first.
Zh: 不不不。现在谨慎些，慢慢来，稳一点。让他先重复一遍。

En: Strangely... like a puppet on a string. There's something off, you feel it. This was the right question. You just...
Zh: 不可思议……像是吊在线上的木偶。有些不太对劲，你能感觉到。这个问题是对的。你只要……

En: What did I just say... He keeps shaking his head, erratically suddenly. He brushes something out of his eye...
Zh: “你刚说什么……”他不停地摇头，突然间变得杂乱无章。他从眼睛里揉出了什么东西……

En: What did *I* just tell you? Don't drop the ball now...
Zh: *我*刚才是怎么跟你说的？不要现在犯错……

En: Oh no, you were wrong. Don't listen to your *hands* for god's sake, you're too close...
Zh: 哦不，你错了。看在老天爷的份上，别听你的*手*瞎说，你已经这么接近了……

En: I know you *want* to tell me -- have you killed anyone with that gun in the last week or two?
Zh: “我知道你*想*告诉我的——你最近这一两个星期有没有用那支枪杀过人？”

En: Don't mess this up, remember -- he *wants* to tell you. Get personal.
Zh: 记住，别搞砸了——他*想要*告诉你。说点私人的话题。

En: Wait -- so which one do I say then?
Zh: 等等——所以我该说哪个呢？

En: Nothing comes to you. Silence, his black eyes look at you.
Zh: 你什么也没想到。他默默地用黑色的眼睛看着你。

En: And in them -- a chill, like electricity running up your spine. Crawling into your skull:
Zh: 在那里面——一阵寒意，就像电流穿过你的脊椎。爬进你的骨头：

En: ALL IS NOT AS IT SEEMS.
Zh: 一切并不是表面看起来那样。

En: What?
Zh: 什么？

En: Brush it off.
Zh: 摆脱掉。

En: The feeling dissipates, the silence remains.
Zh: 这种感觉消散了，只留下沉默。

En: Detective? The lieutenant turns to you, with well disguised impatience.
Zh: “警探？”警督转向你，不耐烦的情绪隐藏地很巧妙。

En: Dammit, ask it already! -- he wants to say.
Zh: 该死的，赶紧问啊！——他很想这么说。

En: I don't *want* to tell you anything, you grotesque murderer.
Zh: “我什么都不*想*跟你说，你这个畸形杀人犯。”

En: And *why* did you think that was a good idea? Don't listen to me -- I'm wrong *all the time*.
Zh: 你*为什么*会觉得这是个好主意？别听我的——我*一直以来*都是错的。

En: That's not the *kill*, that's running circles, sink your teeth in it for God's sake...
Zh: 那不是*杀人*，那是在兜圈子，看在老天爷的份上，全力以赴吧……

En: Oh yes... that one, he looks up at the sky and clacks his tongue: "Ugly piece of work, that boy..."
Zh: “哦，是啊……那个啊，”他仰望天空，砸吧着舌头：“那小子，是一件丑陋的作品……”

En: Did you *kill* him? The lieutenant takes a sudden step toward him.
Zh: “是你*杀*了他吗？”警督突然朝他的方向上前一步。

En: Now. Push him now.
Zh: 现在。现在推他一把。

En: (Step closer:) "Did you fucking shoot him?"
Zh: （靠近一些：）“是你射杀他的吗？”

En: What does that mean? Did you kill him?
Zh: “那是什么意思？是你杀了他吗？”

En: I don't need your cooperation. I've got this. (Show him the Triangong 4-46.)
Zh: “我不需要你的合作。我有这个。”（把特里安戈4-46拿给他看。）

En: We've done the ballistics. (Point to the tower.) "The shot came from this island."
Zh: “我们做过弹道学分析了。”（指向塔楼。）“子弹是从这座小岛射出去的。”

En: I've done the ballistics. (Point to the tower.) "The shot came from this island."
Zh: “我做过弹道学分析了。”（指向塔楼。）“子弹是从这座小岛射出去的。”

En: You're a communist. I talked to the dead man, he *told* me communism killed him.
Zh: “你是一个康米主义者。我跟死人聊过了，他*告诉*我是康米主义杀了他。”

En: C'mon, what am I forgetting? (Hit yourself on the side of your head.)
Zh: 拜托，我忘了什么？（击打脑袋的侧面。）

En: I am a son of a welder, and an officer of the Commune of Revachol. He spits a big one at the lieutenant's feet. "I do not collaborate with murderers and pederasts of the liberal regime."
Zh: “我是一个焊工的儿子，瑞瓦肖公社的一名官员。”他朝警督的脚下吐了一大口唾沫。“我不会跟杀人犯和自由主义政权的同性恋合作的。”

En: I am a son of a welder, and an officer of the Commune of Revachol. He spits a big one at your feet. "I do not collaborate with murderers and pederasts of the liberal regime."
Zh: “我是一个焊工的儿子，瑞瓦肖公社的一名官员。”他朝你的脚下吐了一大口唾沫。“我不会跟杀人犯和自由主义政权的同性恋合作的。”

En: A drop of blood in the saliva...
Zh: 唾液中有一丝血迹……

En: An ugly piece of work, that boy... He flashes a gap-tooth smile.
Zh: 他裂开嘴笑了一下。“那小子，真是丑得不行……”

En: It is him, isn't it? He flashes a gap-tooth smile. "An ugly piece of work, that boy..."
Zh: “是他，不是吗？”他裂开嘴笑了一下。“那小子，真是一件丑陋的作品……”

En: Tear into him. Pile it on him. Everything you got on him, the more the better...
Zh: 朝他发起猛攻。继续给他施压。把你对他的全部了解都用上，越多越好……

En: There were May bells behind the victim's window. (Show him the dried flower.)
Zh: “被害人的窗户背后就有铃兰。”（把干花那给他看。）

En: Okay. Let's back off for a moment. Tell me this...
Zh: “好吧。我们先缓一下。跟我说说这个……”

En: Heh...
Not a lot of guns around that use military-grade ammunition, are there?
Zh: “这附近没有很多使用军事级弹药的枪支，不是吗？”

En: It's a real gun, he points to your sidearm, "not like your little musketeer pistol. I've seen you prance around with that, jumping hoops for the liberals..."
Zh: “那是一支真枪，”他指着你的配枪，“不像你的小步兵手枪。我见过你拿着那些玩意趾高气扬地走来走去，为了自由主义者赴汤蹈火……”

En: It's a real gun, he points to the lieutenant's holster, "not like your little musketeer pistols. I've seen you prance around with those, jumping hoops for the liberals..."
Zh: “那是一支真枪，”他指着警督的手枪枪套，“不像你的小步兵手枪。我见过你拿着那些玩意趾高气扬地走来走去，为了自由主义者赴汤蹈火……”

En: You look like imbeciles. Why don't you ask them to give you *real* weapons? He chortles. "Going against automatic rifles with these toy guns... of course you got those boys killed!"
Zh: “你看起来像个低能儿。为什么不找他们要点*真正的*武器呢？”他咯咯地笑了。“用玩具枪对抗那些自动步枪……那些小子肯定会死的！”

En: You look like imbeciles. Why don't you ask them to give you real weapons, huh? He chortles. "Going against automatic rifles with a *flame bomb*... of course you got all those boys killed!"
Zh: “你看起来像个低能儿。为什么不找他们要点真正的武器呢？”他咯咯地笑了。“用*火焰弹*对抗那些自动步枪……那些小子肯定会死的！”

En: You know peacetime laws in Moralintern-affiliated nations forbid it -- it's a rarity.
Zh: 你知道在隶属于国际道德伦理委员会的国家，和平时期是禁止使用它的——这是一件罕见的珍品。

En: It's a rare weapon. I've got you with this one. No one else has these.
Zh: “这是一支少见的武器。而你这里有一支。没人有这些玩意的。”

En: Looks to me like it could be used for a long range shot.
Zh: “在我看来，它可以用作远距离射击。”

En: Yes, it's a real gun, he points to your sidearm, "not like that little musketeer pistol. I've seen you prance around with that, jumping hoops for the liberals..."
Zh: “是的，它只一支真正的枪，”他指着你的配枪，“不像你的小步兵手枪。我见过你拿着那些玩意趾高气扬地走来走去，为了自由主义者赴汤蹈火……”

En: Yes, it's a *real* gun, not like your little musketeer pistols. I've seen you prance around with those, jumping hoops for the liberals...
Zh: “是的，它只一支*真正的*枪，不像你的小步兵手枪。我见过你拿着那些玩意趾高气扬地走来走去，为了自由主义者赴汤蹈火……”

En: So he saw you... okay. So what. Don't let it divert you.
Zh: 所以他看见你……好吧。那又怎样。别被它带偏了。

En: We saved a lot of them -- their leader Titus... We handled that situation.
Zh: “我们救了很多人——他们的头目提图斯……我们处理好了那种情况。”

En: We saved a lot of them -- Alain, uhm, and that musician... we handled it.
Zh: “我们救了很多人——阿兰，呃，还有那个音乐家……我们处理好了。”

En: Stop changing the subject -- we have the murder weapon. (Point to it.)
Zh: “别转移话题——我们找到凶器了。”（指着它。）

En: Like *fuck* you did. You didn't handle anything. I watched it happen, you let those beasts rip right into them. Got the fat kid killed, the old man too.
Zh: “你*他妈*做了个屁。你什么都处理不好。我看见了全过程，你让他们直接被撕成了碎片。那个胖小子死了，还有那个老人。”

En: Like *fuck* you did. I watched it happen, you let those beasts rip right into them. You got that girl killed like it was *nothing*.
Zh: “你*他妈*做了个屁。你什么都处理不好。我看见了全过程，你让他们直接被撕成了碎片。你害死了那个女孩，好像这根本*不算什么*。”

En: You didn't handle anything. I watched it happen -- you let those fucks rip right into them. Got that girl killed too.
Zh: “你什么都处理不好。我看见了全过程——你让他们直接被撕成了碎片。那个女孩也死了。”

En: You didn't handle anything. I watched it happen -- you let those murderers rip right into them. Got most of them killed, even the fat one.
Zh: “你什么都处理不好。我看见了全过程——你让他们直接被撕成了碎片。大部分人都死了，就连那个胖子也是。”

En: None of those people mean *anything* to you. The vultures feed on this city and you prepare the meal for them.
Zh: “那些人对你来说没有*任何*意义。秃鹰以这座城市为食，而你为它们准备好了晚餐。”

En: You're getting diverted. Push the gun. Only the gun matters.
Zh: 你快被带偏了。说回枪的事。只说枪的事。

En: So you watched the fight? The lieutenant points inland. "Did you like what you saw? The mayhem? It was all your doing. Your plan. *You* got them killed."
Zh: “所以你看到冲突了？”警督指向内陆。“你喜欢自己看见的吗？那场大骚乱？那都是你的杰作。你的计划。是*你*害死他们的。”

En: You don't know anything... A twitch runs across the right side of his face as he stares the lieutenant down.
Zh: “你什么都不知道……”他凝视警督，左脸一阵抽搐。

En: Stop squirming. I have the murder weapon.
Zh: “别挣扎了。我拿到凶器了。”

En: You know what... You're right. I'm convinced this made the shot. Should we call it? The lieutenant looks at the weapon demonstratively.
Zh: “你知道吗……”警督看着武器：“你说得没错。我确信这就是凶器。我们直接去找他对峙？”

En: (Dramatically ask.) "You think we have the murder weapon?"
Zh: （戏剧性地问到）“你觉得我们有凶器吗？”

En: I'm calling it: we have the murder weapon.
Zh: “那我就说了：我们拿到凶器了。”

En: 4.46 jacketed ammunition, modified for range, he lists. "We have it. This is it."
Zh: “4.46包壳弹药，改进过射程，”他罗列到。“我们找到了。就是它。”

En: Good... The lieutenant takes out his notebook and draws a single line.
Zh: “很好……”警督掏出自己的笔记本，画了一条线。

En: This feels good, doesn't it? Tying things up like this -- when you have the murder weapon, you have the killer.
Zh: “这种感觉很好，不是吗？像这样得到满意的结果——当你找到凶器的时候，就抓到凶手了。”

En: Murder... The old man does not say more -- he just glances into the reeds and then twitches once more...
Zh: “谋杀……”老人不再回应——他只是瞥了一眼芦苇丛，又抽搐起来……

En: Like a marionette, on some invisible string...
Zh: 就像一个牵线木偶，被吊在看不见的细线上……

En: You let them all die. Pranced around, let your little *friend* be shot too... I didn't get a good look at that, tell me, did he bleed out?
Zh: “你把他们都害死了。趾高气扬，你那位*小朋友*也中枪了……我没能好好看清，告诉我，他流了多少血？”

En: Don't talk to me about Kim!
Zh: “别跟我提金！”

En: Shut up. I'm calling it: I have the murder weapon.
Zh: “闭嘴。我可以大声说出来：我拿到凶器了。”

En: I know what it feels like. I lost people because I was weak too.
Zh: “我知道那是什么感觉。我失去了一些人，因为我也很软弱。”

En: Who are you trying to prove this to, huh? Your friend? He's not here. He cracks his knuckles: "He's dead, isn't he?"
Zh: “哈，你想向谁证明这一点，你的朋友吗？他不在这里。”他掰着指关节说到：“他死了，不是吗？”

En: He's not dead, he's in the hospital.
Zh: “他没死，他在医院。”

En: That's the murder weapon down. I've got more on you.
Zh: “凶器已经找到了。我还有很多你的罪证。”

En: The world will *rejoice* when he dies. One fascha less... He hisses, then glances into the reeds and twitches suddenly...
Zh: “当他死去的时候，全世界都会为之*庆祝*。又少了一个法西斯分子……”他嘘了一声，瞥了一眼芦苇丛，突然抽搐起来……

En: I saw you poking around there, looking for evidence. You're damn diligent when it comes to dead *fasces*. A jitter passes him: "Did you like the view?"
Zh: “我看见你在那边闲逛，寻找证据。碰到跟那个死掉的*法西斯分子*有关的事情，你还真是该死的呕心沥血啊。”他的身体抖了一下：“你喜欢那幅景象吗？”

En: You had direct visibility. There are embrasures in the concrete, *specifically* meant for a topfaller to use. And you had a long range rifle in your possession. The lieutenant softens his voice:
Zh: “你可以直接看到。混凝土上有射击孔，*专门*为顶尖狙击手用的。而你正好拥有一支远距离射程的步枪。”

En: You've been here a long time, Mr. Dros -- too long. You need medical aid...
Zh: 警督的声音变得柔和了一些：“你在这里待得太久，德罗斯先生——太久了。你需要医疗救护……”

En: You've been here a long time, Mr. Dros -- too long. You clearly need medical aid...
Zh: 警督的声音变得柔和了一些：“你在这里待得太久，德罗斯先生——太久了。很明显，你需要医疗救护……”

En: I'm ready to die, the man interrupts him, then coughs: "I've done my part."
Zh: “我已经准备好去死了……”老人打断了他的话，咳嗽起来：“我已经做了自己该做的事。”

En: It's the best uninterrupted line of sight into that window in all of Martinaise.
Zh: “在整个马丁内斯，要看到那扇窗户，这里的视线是最好、最不受干扰的。”

En: The view was perfect. With a pair of binoculars I could've seen *in* the room.
Zh: “景色美极了。有了那副望远镜，我都能看见房间*里面*的景象。”

En: One thing -- where's the *scope*? How did you make the shot without a scope? We have everything else...
Zh: “有一件事——*瞄准镜*在哪？没有瞄准镜你是怎么开枪的？别的我们已经都找到了……”

En: Okay then. (Concede.)
Zh: “那好吧。”（让步。）

En: Imbecile... He shakes his head.
Zh: “低能……”他摇摇头。

En: Because it's a *sniper's nest*, you stupid fuck. Radio Gauche is right, you have worms in your brain... Another sudden twitch, then one more one in his right eye...
Zh: “因为这是个*狙击手掩体*，你这个愚蠢的白痴。电台里说得没错，你的脑子里有虫……”又是一阵突然的抽搐，紧接着是右眼……

En: He's practically admitting to it: dead *fasces* -- for *fascist* -- done his *part*.
Zh: 他实际已经承认了：死掉的*法西斯分子*——就是*法西斯主义者*——完成了自己的*使命*。

En: He *lost* it, he just doesn't know where it is, forget it, push on...
Zh: 他*弄丢*了，他只是不知道它在哪里，忘掉了，再逼紧一些……

En: The worm, there? He spits southward, then points at your armour: "In the monster-armour you *took* from him."
Zh: “那边的蠕虫吗？”他朝着南边吐了一口唾沫，然后指着你的盔甲说：“穿着你从他身上*拿走*的怪兽盔甲。”

En: It's to protect myself.
Zh: “这是为了保护我自己。”

En: You don't have to explain to me... He flashes a gap-tooth smile. "An ugly piece of work, that boy..."
Zh: “你不用跟我解释……”他露齿一笑。“那小子，是一件丑陋的作品……”

En: Exhaust him with proof. Pile it all on him, get a confession.
Zh: 用证据让他精疲力尽。不断地给他施压，让他认罪。

En: You said *fasces*? You're admitting you killed him?
Zh: “你说*法西斯分子*？你承认杀了他吗？”

En: He's practically admitting to it.
Zh: 他实际已经承认了。

En: Just one thing remains unclear: the rifle does not seem to have a scope.
Zh: 还有一件事不清楚：这支步枪似乎没有瞄准镜。

En: He's practically admitting to it. Just one thing -- the rifle does not have a scope.
Zh: 他实际已经承认了。只有一件事——这支步枪没有瞄准镜。

En: You're sad for your fascha brother aren't you? One twig got broken, now the others are sad... He waves his hand. There's a twitch -- then one more one in his right eye...
Zh: “你在为你的法西斯兄弟伤心，是吗？一根树枝折断了，现在其他的很伤心……”他摆摆手。突然又是一阵抽搐——紧接着是右眼……

En: Forget about your stupid fucking scope, I don't know where it is! Find it yourself -- it's your problem now.
Zh: “忘了那个愚蠢的瞄准镜吧，我不知道它在哪！自己找去吧——现在这是你的问题了。”

En: Stupid droite. He scoffs.
Zh: “愚蠢的右派。”他嘲弄到。

En: Petty-bourgeois law... He snorts and spits. "This is all you care about, comrade? The only thing in the world for you types..."
Zh: “小资产阶级法律……”他哼了一声，然后吐了一口唾沫。“你就只在乎这个，是吗？对于你这种人来说，世界上只有这一件事……”

En: Petty-bourgeois law... He snorts and spits. "This is all you care about, right? The only thing in the world for you types..."
Zh: “小资产阶级法律……”他哼了一声，然后吐了一口唾沫。“你就只在乎这个，是吗？对于你这种人来说，世界上只有这一件事……”

En: A drop of blood in the saliva...
Zh: 唾液中有一丝血迹……

En: That's right. Pile it all on him now. Three should do it, maybe four...
Zh: 没错。现在继续给他施压。三个应该够了，也许四个……

En: Tear into him again. Pile it on him.
Zh: 再次朝他发起猛攻。继续给他施压。

En: Lie! You have a witness.
Zh: 撒谎！您有目击证人。

En: The lieutenant looks at you with worry in his eyes.
Zh: 警督看着你，满眼都是担忧。

En: Not this, he seems to say. Anything but this.
Zh: 他似乎在说，不要说这个。什么都可以，就是这个不行。

En: Yes. I held a *seance* with his *soul*. It has shown me the way -- and the way leads to you.
Zh: “是的。我举行了一场*降神会*，召唤了他的*灵魂*。它为我指引了道路——而这条路的终点是你。”

En: It was intuition. Had he spoken, he would have said communism killed him.
Zh: “这是一种直觉。如果让他说的话，他会说是康米主义杀了他。”

En: May bells -- behind the victim's window! I saw them growing *here*. (Point to them.)
Zh: “铃兰——在被害人窗户的背后！我看见它们在*这里*生长。”（指向它们。）

En: I wonder what brand of boots you're wearing?
Zh: “不知道你穿的靴子是什么牌子的？”

En: You did it -- because you're on the side of the Union, right? It was political.
Zh: “你这么做——是因为你站在工会那一边，对吗？这跟政治有关。”

En: You're lost, comrade. You're lost... He shakes his head, tufts of grey-white hair on his skull and chin...
Zh: “你输了，同志。你输了……”他摇摇头，脑袋上灰白色的头发和下巴也跟着晃动……

En: You're lost, droite. You're lost... He shakes his head, tufts of grey-white hair on his skull and chin...
Zh: “你输了，右派的家伙。你输了……”他摇摇头，脑袋上灰白色的头发和下巴也跟着晃动……

En: Matter does not behave in such a way. Those are aberrant bourgeois musings: magic *erl-creatures*, esoteric theosophy. It's all cryptofascism.
Zh: “物质不是这样运动的。那些是异常的资产阶级冥想：*异种生物*，秘传的通神学。全都是秘密法西斯主义。”

En: You fucked with the wrong police officer. I have para-natural abilities.
Zh: “你惹错警官了。我有超能力。”

En: *Intuition* is an aberrant psychologism. He chortles. "It reeks of cryptofascism. The parasite class use intuition to justify their rank in life. It's all just palmistry and magic *erl-creatures*."
Zh: “*直觉*是一种异常的心理学主义。”他咯咯笑了起来。“它散发着秘密法西斯主义的恶臭。寄生虫阶级用直觉为他们生活中的等级辩护。这一切只不过是手相术和魔法*异种生物*而已。”

En: Nature does not behave in a *para-natural* manner, he scoffs. "Aberrant bourgeois musings -- magic *erl-creatures* and esoteric sensations. It's all cryptofascism."
Zh: “自然并不是以*超能力*的方式运作的，”他嗤笑到。“异常的资产阶级冥想——魔法*异种生物*和深奥的感觉。全都是秘密法西斯主义。”

En: Your brain is *rotting* from the radio waves. He looks at the air, then turns to the lieutenant.
Zh: “你的大脑被无线电波*腐蚀*了。”他望向天空，然后转向警督。

En: He does not answer the provocation. It does not look like he thinks this approach worked.
Zh: 他没有回应挑衅。看来他并不认为这种方法会奏效。

En: Your brain is rotting from radio waves... He looks at the air, then squints with suspicion.
Zh: “你的大脑被无线电波腐蚀了……”他望向天空，然后怀疑地眯起眼睛。

En: But still, somehow you *knew* it was a communist.
Zh: 不过，不知怎么的，你*知道*他是一个康米主义者。

En: Nothing comes up -- yet the old man watches you stimulate thoughts by hitting yourself.
Zh: 什么也没出现——老人看着你敲打自己，想要刺激脑中的想法。

En: Nothing comes up. Cuno watches you try to stimulate thought processes by hitting yourself.
Zh: 什么也没出现。坤诺看着你敲打自己，想要刺激思维过程。

En: Nothing comes up. You see the lieutenant watch you try to stimulate thought processes by hitting yourself.
Zh: 什么也没出现。警督看着你敲打自己，想要刺激思维过程。

En: He does not look worried -- yet. He has that *do what you have to do* expression, with a pinch of *don't hit yourself again*.
Zh: 他看起来并不担心——暂时没有。他露出一副*随便你怎么折腾*的表情，还隐含着一丝*别又自己打自己*的味道。

En: Wait, here it comes -- the god damn May bells, the dried may bells on Klaasje's roof!
Zh: 等等，它来了——该死的铃兰，卡拉洁屋顶上干枯的铃兰！

En: Wait, here it comes -- the god damn May bells, the dried may bells on Klaasje's roof!
Zh: 等等，它来了——该死的铃兰，卡拉洁屋顶上干枯的铃兰！

En: Oh yes!
Zh: 哦耶！

En: My head hurts now.
Zh: 现在我觉得脑袋疼。

En: There were May bells in the grass when you got here! They're revolutionary symbols, from the war!
Zh: 你到这里来的路上，草丛里就长着铃兰！它们是战时大革命的符号！

En: Who cares -- there were May bells in the grass when you got here!  And on Klaasje's balcony!
Zh: 谁在乎——你过来的路上，看到草丛里就长着铃兰！还有卡拉洁的阳台！

En: There were May bells in the grass when you got here! And may bells on Klaasje's balcony!
Zh: 你到这里来的路上，草丛里就长着铃兰！还有卡拉洁的阳台！

En: Who cares -- there were May bells in the grass when you got here, *and* on Klaasje's balcony! Is this a coincidence?
Zh: 谁在乎——你过来的路上，看到草丛里就长着铃兰，*还有*卡拉洁的阳台！这是个巧合吗？

En: Oh yes!
Zh: 哦耶！

En: My head hurts now.
Zh: 现在我觉得脑袋疼。

En: And nowhere else -- nowhere in all of Martinaise have you seen them!
Zh: 别的地方都没有——你在马丁内斯别的地方都没有见过！

En: Nowhere else -- nowhere in all of Martinaise have you seen them this spring.
Zh: 别的地方都没有——这个春季，你在马丁内斯别的地方都没有见过！

En: You need to punch yourself again!
Zh: 你需要再揍自己一顿！

En: Damn May bells... He looks at the blossoming field behind you. "The whole island is turning white with them..."
Zh: “该死的铃兰……”他看着身后盛开的花田。“整座小岛都要跟它们一起变白了……”

En: So many this year too. The spring is coming, no... it's already here. Wash the filth away...
Zh: “这么多年了。春天要来了，不对……它已经到了。把污秽全部冲走……”

En: I haven't seen these flowers anywhere else in Martinaise. Only here.
Zh: “我没在马丁内斯别的地方见过这种花。只有这里。”

En: A young woman called Klaasje -- ring any bells? These dried flowers were behind her window. (Continue.)
Zh: “一个名叫卡拉洁的年轻女人——想起什么了吗？这种干花出现在了她的窗户背后。”（继续。）

En: A young woman called Klaasje -- ring any bells? Flowers like these were behind her window. (Continue.)
Zh: “一个名叫卡拉洁的年轻女人——想起什么了吗？这种花出现在了她的窗户背后。”（继续。）

En: You like that name, don't you? She had intimate relations with the victim. The mercenary.
Zh: “你喜欢那个名字，不是吗？她跟被害人之间有亲密关系。那个雇佣兵。”

En: You know her, right? She had intimate relations with the victim. The mercenary.
Zh: “你认识她，对吗？她跟被害人之间有亲密关系。那个雇佣兵。”

En: They blossom on the islets before. We fertilized them with our blood. He looks to the water. "Rèsurrection was snow white in May, before they ruined it."
Zh: “它们以前在小岛上开过花。我们用自己的鲜血给它们施肥。”他看向水面。“在他们毁掉它之前，五月的复兴岛像雪一样白。”

En: South, the Bay of Martinaise is dotted with little freckles of islets, turning green, with white flowers in white snow...
Zh: 南部，马丁内斯海湾上布满星星点点的小岛，它们正在慢慢变绿，还有那些雪白的花儿……

En: *Klaasje*...
With the *victim*... He turns his sight from the whitening field of flowers and falls silent. Then the muscles in his jaw twitch, a spasm.
Zh: “跟*被害人*……”他把目光转向那片白茫茫的花海，沉默不语。接着，他下巴上的肌肉一阵抽搐，是痉挛。

En: Damn May bells... He looks at the blossoming field: "The whole island is turning white with them..."
Zh: “该死的铃兰……”他看着绽放的花田：“整座小岛都要跟它们一起变白了……”

En: There is a small tremble -- looks like a smile. A crooked smile. Yet isn't quite voluntary. He's about to burst...
Zh: 一阵轻微的颤栗——看起来像是在微笑。一个扭曲的微笑。不过并不是自愿的。他就要爆发了……

En: He knows her -- but hadn't heard the name.
Zh: 他认识她——不过没听过这个名字。

En: He repeats the name with care. As if it were at risk of breaking.
Zh: 他温柔地重复着这个名字。就好像它有破碎的风险。

En: Yes Klaasje. You hadn't heard her name, had you?
Zh: “是的，卡拉洁。你没听过她的名字，对吧？”

En: My ears don't reach the city.
Zh: “我的耳朵听不见城里的声音。”

En: He seems tender suddenly, nostalgic even. A strange mood swing.
Zh: 突然间，他的表情变得柔和起来，甚至可以说是怀旧。一种奇怪的感情波动。

En: He suddenly jerks to life: "You know who he was -- a Coalition trained murderer, armoured and armed. He wasn't human, the blunt end of a hammer, *dripping with blood*..."
Zh: 他突然活了过来：“你知道他是谁——联盟训练的杀人犯，全副武装。他只有一半是人，另一半是*鲜血淋漓*的大锤……”

En: Over? It was *over* when they shelled the coast... and bodies ripped apart from the pressure. It was *over* then. For all of us. His eyes look right through you.
Zh: “结束？当他们朝海岸开炮的时候，就已经*结束*了……尸体被压力撕扯的四分五裂。那时就已经*结束*了。对于所有人来说都一样。”他的目光直接穿透了你的身体。

En: You fucks don't understand. The ordnance, the mist of blood... it's *beyond belief* their aggression, when you attack their class interests.
Zh: “你们这群混账是不会明白的。大炮，血雾……当你向他们的阶级利益发起进攻时，他们的攻击性是*难以置信*的。”

En: I'm sorry for what happened. The lieutenant softens his voice: "But we're not *with* the Moralintern. We're Revacholian citizenry, like you."
Zh: “我为过去的事情感到遗憾。”警督的声音变得柔和起来：“不过我们跟国际道德伦理委员会不是*一伙*的。我们是瑞瓦肖公民，就像你一样。”

En: You're the enemy, his voice screeches. "You're halberdiers of the market liberal regime."
Zh: “你是敌人，”他的声音很尖利。“你是市场自由主义政权的守卫。”

En: He would really, *really* get riled up if you said:
Zh: 他真的、*真的*会被激怒的，如果你这么说的话：

En: We're Revacholians like you. We don't work for the dogs up in Delta. We subvert the system from within.
Zh: “我们跟你一样是瑞瓦肖人。我们没有为德尔塔的那帮狗杂种做事。我们从内部颠覆了整个系统。”

En: I'm Revacholian like you. I don't work for the dogs up in La Delta. I subvert the system from within.
Zh: “我跟你一样是瑞瓦肖人。我没有为德尔塔的那帮狗杂种做事。我从内部颠覆了整个系统。”

En: You're right. We're collaborationists, but we at least *do* something, we keep peace on the streets, while you just break everything.
Zh: “你说得对。我们是卖国贼，不过至少我们*做了*一些事情。我们维持街上的和平，而你只会破坏一切。”

En: You're right. I'm a collaborationist, but I at least *do* something. I keep peace on the streets, while you just break everything.
Zh: “你说得对。我是个卖国贼，不过至少我*做了*一些事情。我维持街上的和平，而你只会破坏一切。”

En: Subvert the system from *within*... you diseased dog! You lick their balls, that's what you do... he almost chokes from his own voice.
Zh: “从*内部*颠覆系统……你这只有病的狗杂种！你只会跪舔他们，只会这个……”他几乎要被自己的声音噎住了。

En: We're ten times more radical than you. We're radical centrist. We keep this place *sane*.
Zh: “我们比你要激进十倍都不止。我们是激进的中间派，让这个地方保持*理智*。”

En: I'm ten times more radical than you. I'm a radical centrist. I keep this place *sane*.
Zh: “我比你要激进十倍都不止。我是一个激进的中间派，让这个地方保持*理智*。”

En: We're going to have a parliament. It will safeguard the market and stabilize the streets. That's what *we're* for -- real democracy.
Zh: “我们会有一个议会。它会保护市场，稳定街道的秩序。这就是*我们*所追求的——真正的民主。”

En: We're going to have a parliament. It will safeguard the market and stabilize the streets. That's what *I'm* for -- real democracy.
Zh: “我们会有一个议会。它会保护市场，稳定街道的秩序。这就是*我*所追求的——真正的民主。”

En: I don't care. I don't care what happened 50 years ago. This is now and we need to keep the city safe.
Zh: “我不在乎。我不在乎50年前发生了什么。现在是现在，我们需要保证这座城市的安全。”

En: I don't care. I don't care what happened 50 years ago. This is now and I need to keep the city safe.
Zh: “我不在乎。我不在乎50年前发生了什么。现在是现在，我需要保证这座城市的安全。”

En: We know what happened here, in this city. You rabid lunatics tore it to pieces and killed 50 million people.
Zh: “我们知道这里发生过什么，在这座城市里。你们这群狂暴的疯子把它撕成了碎片，杀了5000万人。”

En: I know what happened here, in this city. You rabid lunatics tore it to pieces and killed 50 million people.
Zh: “我知道这里发生过什么，在这座城市里。你们这群狂暴的疯子把它撕成了碎片，杀了5000万人。”

En: Keep the *peace*? You call this peace? Every twenty seconds there's a gun shot. The war's still there, only we're *losing* it... he almost chokes from his own voice.
Zh: “维护*和平*？你把这叫和平？每隔20秒钟就会有一声枪响。战争还在继续，只不过我们*要输*了……”他几乎要被自己的声音噎住了。

En: You call this *sane*? Every twenty seconds there's a gun shot. Kids shooting shit, while they come and pick them... fucking child molesters... he almost chokes from his own voice.
Zh: “你把这叫*理智*？每隔20秒钟就会有一声枪响。小孩他妈的都在开枪，而他们会来把他们带走……他妈的猥亵儿童……”他几乎要被自己的声音噎住了。

En: Stabilize... that parliament will be the lock on the cage. It won't *stabilize* shit. The market is ruin, dripping with pity and suffering... he almost chokes from his own voice.
Zh: “稳定……你说的议会将会变成囚笼上的锁。它连屁都*稳定*不了。市场被糟蹋了，充斥着怜悯和苦难……”他几乎要被自己的声音噎住了。

En: It was 200,000! 200,000 tops. Those numbers are *madness*, he hisses. "Millions, tens of millions have died after the Landing! In *your* hands..." he almost chokes from his own voice.
Zh: “是200,000！最多200,000。那些数字太*疯狂*了，”他发出嘶嘶的声音。“几百万人，几千万人都在登陆后死去了！死在了*你*的手里……”他几乎要被自己的声音噎住了。

En: Safe? You call this safe? This is *defeat*! Every twenty seconds there's a gun shot. The war never ended, we're just *losing* it... he almost chokes from his own voice.
Zh: “安全？你把这叫安全？这叫*失败*！每隔20秒钟就会有一声枪响。战争永远不会结束，只是我们*要输*了……”他几乎要被自己的声音噎住了。

En: You *see* the killer in him. Coughing from the thin intensity of his own voice. The words have run out, his eyes budge from their sockets.
Zh: 你在他身上*看到*了杀手的影子。他的声音很虚弱，呛得自己咳嗽个不停。言语已经用尽，他的眼珠在眼窝里微微移动。

En: The whole world is a locked mechanism for him, all of history, with only one shaft of light that shone in 44 years ago.
Zh: 对于他来说，整个世界都是一个锁定机构。在所有历史中，只有44年前出现过一束光。

En: In his fit of rage he seems to have broken loose from something. A little fire gutters deep in his eyes, like a pilot light in the hallway...
Zh: 怒不可遏的他似乎从什么东西里面挣脱了出来。他的眼睛深处燃烧着一团小小火苗，就像走廊里的信号灯……

En: Got your attention... He looks you dead in the eye, pupils shaking. "*Now* you stop beating druggies and prostitutes in your basement. *Now* you come to investigate. Not when they die by the hundreds..." He breathes through flared nostrils...
Zh: “吸引了你的注意……”他直视你的眼睛，瞳孔在颤动。“*现在*你们不会在地下室毒打瘾君子和妓女了。*现在*你来调查了。当成千上百的人死去的时候……”他的鼻孔外张，用力呼吸着……

En: He was a soldier too. He was a man.
Zh: “他还是一名士兵。他是一个人。”

En: He was a rapist. I'm not saying he didn't deserve it.
Zh: “他是一个强奸犯。我并不是说这不是他应得的下场。”

En: He was a killer. But he was still under the protection of the law.
Zh: “他是一个杀人犯。不过他依然受到法律的保护。”

En: ...beating us to the ground. Moaning with joy... He breathes in with strange animation: "You hounds get so thorough when a company-trained killer dies. I haven't seen you on this coast for *forty years*. You know... maybe I should have killed one sooner?"
Zh: “……把我们打倒在地。发出愉悦地呻吟……”他深吸一口气，带着一种奇异的活力：“公司训练的杀人狂魔死了，你们这群猎犬反而变得歇斯底里。我有*40年*没在海岸上见过你了。你知道吗……也许我应该早点杀人的？”

En: This is it. Shot him, shot him, say shot him not killed him...
Zh: 时机到了。射了它一枪，射了它一枪，说‘射了它一枪’，不要说‘杀了他’……

En: Everything is brands with you individualists... Who cares what *brand* my shoes are? Sansa... He looks at his running shoes, covered in mud. "Some shit."
Zh: “在你们利己主义者看来，什么都是牌子……谁在乎我的鞋是什么*牌子*的？桑萨……”他看着脚上那双满是泥泞的运动鞋。“都是狗屎。”

En: The maker is called Sansarique -- you see their V-shaped logo -- but can't make out the size.
Zh: 生产商叫桑萨瑞克——你见过它们的V形商标——不过你辨认不出尺寸。

En: Show me the soles please, Mr. Dros.
Zh: “请把鞋底给我看看，德罗斯先生。”

En: Fucking imbecile... The old man stretches out his leg. A black and white spiral pattern covers the sole of the worn out old running shoes on his feet.
Zh: “该死的低能儿……”老人伸出他的腿。他的脚上穿着一双磨破的旧运动鞋，鞋底的花纹是黑白相间的螺旋图案。

En: The maker is called Sansarique -- and the size is 42-44.
Zh: 生产商叫桑萨瑞克——尺寸是42-44码。

En: The maker is Sansarique -- the model is Corbeille and the size is 43.
Zh: 生产商叫桑萨瑞克——型号是花篮，尺寸是43码。

En: These are not the unusual, horizontal patterned soles you saw in the dust on the floor of the hidden room. They do, however, seem to be about the same size...
Zh: 这跟你在秘密房间地板的尘土上看到的痕迹不同——那个不寻常的、横向花纹的鞋底印。不过，尺寸似乎是一样的……

En: The size fits, but not the sole... The lieutenant comes to the same conclusion.
Zh: “尺寸是吻合的，但是鞋底印不同……”警督得出了相同的结论。

En: The size fits, but not the sole... The lieutenant leans in to inspect.
Zh: “尺寸是吻合的，但是鞋底印不同……”警督靠近查看着。

En: Show me the soles of your shoes please.
Zh: “请把鞋底给我看看。”

En: Fine. Let's leave it at that.
Zh: “好吧。先放下这个问题。”

En: You fascists have the tenacity of a limpet. He wipes dirt off his running shoe.
Zh: “你们这群法西斯主义者像帽贝一样固执。”他拍掉运动鞋上的泥土。

En: More. He's gonna crack, but you need a little more.
Zh: 还不够。他就要吃不消了，不过你还需要再多一点。

En: Almost. But you need *one* more. Just one. Or maybe two...
Zh: 差不多了。不过你还需要*一个*证据。只要一个。或者也许是两个……

En: This pushed him, but not enough... just a little more...
Zh: 这个推了他一把，不过还不够……还要再来一点……

En: Almost! He almost burst out there. Keep piling arguments, anything...
Zh: 差不多了！他几乎就要爆发了。再多一点证据，任何事情都可以……

En: Yeah... this just did nothing.
Zh: 是啊……这根本没用。

En: You must get around a lot -- to stay undetected all these years... The lieutenant's voice is soft, friendly. "Do you know any *secret* paths? Pinball workshops?"
Zh: “你肯定经常到处躲藏——这么多年没被人发现……”警督的声音亲切而友好。“你知不知道什么*秘密*通道呢？弹球工坊？”

En: I may... A curious tremor passes his face.
Zh: “我也许知道……”他的脸上出现一阵奇怪的震颤。

En: The coast too -- before they piled their containers on top of it. Filled with broken, useless trash for fat fingered bourgeois children to play with...
Zh: “海岸也是——在他们把集装箱堆在顶上之前。堆满了破碎又没用的垃圾，供那些手指粗大的资产阶级小孩玩耍……”

En: He must get around a lot -- to stay undetected all these years.
Zh: 他肯定经常到处躲藏——这么多年才没被人发现。

En: You've been in Martinaise your whole life -- know any... secret paths?
Zh: “你这辈子都待在马丁内斯——那你知道什么……秘密通道吗？”

En: I may... A strange tremor passes his face.
Zh: “我也许知道……”他的脸上出现一阵奇怪的震颤。

En: Who cares about shoes, we got you without the prints too.
Zh: “谁管那些鞋子，不用鞋印我们也能抓到你。”

En: Wait, maybe it's simpler than that...
Zh: 等等，也许没那么复杂……

En: Sire, he doesn't have to be wearing them *right now*.
Zh: 大人，他*现在*不需要穿着它们。

En: Simpler? No. This is another loose thread you will *never* connect!
Zh: 更简单？不。这又是一条你*永远*也连接不上的线索！

En: People change shoes. It doesn't mean you weren't there -- near the room the victim died in -- sneaking around.
Zh: “人是会换鞋穿的。这并不意味着你没去过那里——就在被害人死去的房间附近——偷偷摸摸地。”

En: Racking those brains, are you? He squints at you, black pearls gleaming with hatred. "Desperate to report something back to your masters. They must have really loved that dead fuck..."
Zh: “绞尽脑汁了，是吗？”他斜了你一眼，黑珍珠一样的眼睛散发出憎恶的光芒。“不顾一切地想要跟你的主人汇报。看来他们肯定很喜欢那个死掉的混账……”

En: The prints were his, you can see it in those eyes, he can't keep them from flickering, looking for something...
Zh: 鞋印是他的，你能从那双眼睛里看出来，他无法控制住那闪烁的目光，似乎在寻找什么……

En: The old man stares at his own prints in the ash around the fire. Silent suddenly, some strange process within him. A gush of wind. Seagulls in the distance.
Zh: 老人凝视着火堆周围灰烬上的脚印。他突然陷入沉默，一种奇怪的心理活动在他心中酝酿。一阵风吹起。远处传来海鸥的鸣叫。

En: The lieutenant gives you a quick sideways glance and nods to acknowledge...
Zh: 警督飞快地瞥了一眼，点头表示会意……

En: God damn footprints, everywhere... I hate them...
Zh: “该死的脚印，到底都是……我恨他们……”

En: The lieutenant raises his brow.
Zh: 警督扬起眉头。

En: What do we do now, we're not getting these prints to match...
Zh: “我们现在怎么做，这些脚印不匹配……”

En: What do I do now?! I'll never get these prints to match.
Zh: “我现在该这么做？这些脚印是永远匹配不上的。”

En: Not now. Stop yourself.
Zh: 现在不行。阻止自己。

En: Khm. (Cough.)
Zh: “咳咳。”（咳嗽几声。）

En: Tryin' to rack your brains... He squints at him, eyes gleaming with hatred: "You're *desperate* to report something back to your masters. They must have really loved that dead fuck..."
Zh: “绞尽脑汁了，是吗？”他斜了他一眼，眼睛散发出憎恶的光芒。“*不顾一切*地想要跟你的主人汇报吗。看来他们肯定很喜欢那个死掉的混账……”

En: People *change* shoes, detective... He turns to the old man. "It was you. You were there, weren't you, crawling in the Whirling-in-Rags..."
Zh: “大家都会*换*鞋的，警探……”他转向老人呢。“是你。你去过那里，不是吗，偷偷溜进了褴褛飞旋……”
