En: The old man shakes his head. "You're desperate to report something back to them, aren't you? Your liberal masters. They must have really loved that dead fuck..."
Zh: 老人摇摇头。“这么不顾一切地想跟他们汇报点什么吗？你这个自由主义大师。看来他们肯定很喜欢那个死掉的混账……”

En: Corrupt henchmen of paedophiles... The old man shakes his head. "You're desperate to report something back to them, aren't you? Your liberal masters. They must have really loved that dead fuck..."
Zh: “腐败的恋童癖的走狗……”老人摇摇头。“这么不顾一切地想跟他们汇报点什么吗？你这个自由主义大师。看来他们肯定很喜欢那个死掉的混账……”

En: Corrupt henchman of paedophiles... The old man shakes his head. "You're desperate to report something back to them, aren't you? Your liberal masters. They must have really loved that dead fuck..."
Zh: “腐败的恋童癖的走狗……”老人摇摇头。“这么不顾一切地想跟他们汇报点什么吗？你这个自由主义大师。看来他们肯定很喜欢那个死掉的混账……”

En: What are you doing, he's thinking. We almost got him here.
Zh: 你在做什么，他想到。我们就快逮到他了。

En: He leans closer. "What were you doing? Some kind of reconnaissance? Preparing the scene? Listening in on her?"
Zh: 他靠近了一些。“你做了什么？某种勘察？准备现场？偷听她说话？”

En: What are you talking about?
Zh: “你在说什么？”

En: Not now!  Don't melt down now, you're so close. Rewind this back to the previous thought and just say that.
Zh: 现在不行！现在不能崩溃，你已经很接近了。倒回到之前那个想法，那么说就好。

En: You're *desperate* to report something back to your masters. He squints at you, black pearls gleaming with hatred. "They must have really loved that dead fuck..."
Zh: 他斜了他一眼，黑珍珠一样的眼睛散发出憎恶的光芒。“*不顾一切*地想要跟你的主人汇报吗。看来他们肯定很喜欢那个死掉的混账……”

En: The Débardeurs' Union is a social democratic piss-stain, and the fat bourgeois pig who keeps it... He shakes his head.
Zh: “装卸工会是工人主义的污点，控制它的那头资产阶级肥猪……”他摇摇头。

En: You did it. You had the means *and* the motive. It's over.
Zh: “是你做的。你有手段*和*动机。一切都结束了。”

En: Mr. Claire? What about him?
Zh: “克莱尔先生？他怎么了？”

En: Never trust a social democrat. Social democrats are pederasts -- and women. They're the real enemy.
Zh: “永远也不要相信工人主义者。他们都是同性恋——还有女人。他们是真正的敌人。”

En: There is *something* here for later, he knows his name. But don't let this break the pace now, push forward...
Zh: 这里面好像有点*问题*，之后再细究，他知道他的名字。不过先不要因此打乱步调，再向前推进……

En: How?
Zh: 怎么会？

En: But this *did* nothing.
Zh: 不过这*并没有*起到任何作用。

En: Perhaps you suspected it *before* you took the case.
Zh: 也许在你接手这个案件*之前*，你就已经有所怀疑了。

En: Was it *supposed* to?
Zh: *应该*起作用吗？

En: The vision was you remembering that.
Zh: 直觉告诉你，你记起来了。

En: Turn back to him.
Zh: 继续与他对话。

En: Is this... the miracle?
Zh: 这是……奇迹吗？

En: No. The miracle is still waiting. This is the darkness.
Zh: 不是。奇迹还在等待发生。这是黑暗。

En: Standing there, slack-jawed, the old man shakes his head. "Brain *festering*..."
Zh: “站在那儿，目瞪口呆，”老人摇摇头。“大脑*溃烂*……”

En: I will look deeper then.
Zh: 那我就再深入一些。

En: Actually, I'm beginning to think he's right and this is just cryptofascism.
Zh: 事实上，我开始觉得他是对的，这确实只是秘密法西斯主义。

En: The inland sea is dark, vast, and on the surface meaningless...
Zh: 内海黑暗，广阔，表面上毫无意义……

En: Yes, I see. It's intuitive. (Nod.) Like fascism.
Zh: 是的，我看见了。这是一种直觉。（点点头。）就像法西斯主义。

En: No. There is more here. A sliver of something. Some kind of future.
Zh: 不。远远不止这些。一小片什么东西。某种未来。

En: Yes. You have a vast royalist soul and it's reaching out for something -- in the future.
Zh: 是的。你拥有广阔的保皇主义灵魂，它伸向了什么——在未来。

En: But aren't I... way out in the West?
Zh: 但我不是……离西边很远吗？

En: You are. Soon it will happen.
Zh: 是的。很快就会发生。

En: Yes. He looks the lieutenant in the eye. "Think of it as a form of *critique*."
Zh: “是的。”他看着警督的眼睛。“把它想象成一种*批判*的形式。”

En: Then I pull the trigger. He looks dead in the eye. "Think of it as a form of *critique*."
Zh: “然后我会扣动扳机。”他的眼睛死气沉沉的。“把它想象成一种*批判*的形式。”

En: Are you *always looking* through the scope of a rifle? He explains: "I'm just trying to *understand*."
Zh: “你*总是*通过步枪瞄准镜来看东西吗？”他解释到：“我只是想尝试去*理解*一下。”

En: Through the scope of your rifle?
Zh: “通过步枪的瞄准镜吗？”

En: Click.
Zh: 咔哒。

En: Why *were* you looking at them that night?
Zh: “那天晚上你*为什么*要看他们？”

En: One more thing -- *why* were you looking at them that night?
Zh: “还有一件事——那天晚上，你*为什么*要看他们？”

En: A rifle's scope has the best magnification.
Zh: “步枪瞄准镜的放大率是最棒的。”

En: Start with when he first saw him? It will give him a chance to ramble.
Zh: 从他第一次看见他是什么时候开始？给他一个闲聊的机会。

En: I'm always looking... He cocks his head to the side -- then turns his eyes to the city. Another tremor passes his right side, lower in intensity.
Zh: “我一直在看……”他把头歪向一边——然后看向城市。身体右侧又是一阵抽搐，不过强度低了一些。

En: Helps him see all the *shit*...
Zh: 帮他看清所有那些*破事*……

En: ...you pull the trigger?
Zh: “……你扣动了扳机？”

En: He has his specific device for it though.
Zh: 不过，他有自己特殊的方法。

En: ...if it's part of the *shit* you see...
Zh: “……如果那也是你看到的*破事*中的一部分……”

En: And if you don't like it...
Zh: “如果你不喜欢的话……”

En: Click.
Zh: 咔哒。

En: Yes. He looks you in the eye. "Think of it as a form of critique."
Zh: “是的。”他看着你的眼睛。“把它想象成一种批判的形式。”

En: He will *not* stop now, these dialectical materialist types never do. Exploit it.
Zh: 他*不会*现在停下来的，这些辩证唯物主义者永远不会。利用这一点。

En: Helps him see all the *shit*...
Zh: 帮他看清所有那些*破事*……

En: No. A rifle's scope has better magnification.
Zh: “不。步枪瞄准镜的放大率是最好的。”

En: With binoculars?
Zh: “用望远镜？”

En: A rifle's scope has the best magnification. He nods.
Zh: 他点点头。“步枪瞄准镜的放大率是最好的。”

En: ...then you pull the trigger?
Zh: “……你就会扣动扳机？”

En: And if you don't like it...
Zh: “如果你不喜欢的话……”

En: You got him going. Connect every little piece now. Wrap this up like a gift...
Zh: 你让他开口了。现在所有小碎片都拼在了一起。把一切包裹起来，像礼物一样……

En: When? Before or after the war?
Zh: 什么时候？战前或是战后？

En: You mean, like, during the war?
Zh: “你的意思是说，战时吗？”

En: Why not? He shakes his head and smiles, his teeth rotten black: "Class war is never over."
Zh: “为什么不呢？”他摇摇头，笑了，牙齿烂成了黑色：“阶级战争永远不会停止。”

En: So you just shot him?
Zh: “所以你就射了他一枪？”

En: So you shot him?
Zh: “所以你射了他一枪？”

En: Oh the inhumanity... He closes his black eyes. "One paramilitary less in Revachol." You can almost see him squeeze a tear out of his eye. His fists begin to tremble from the anger.
Zh: “是啊，很残暴地杀了他……”他闭上双眼。“瑞瓦肖又少了一个准军事部队成员。”你几乎看见他从眼里挤出了一滴眼泪。他的拳头因为愤怒而颤抖。

En: I didn't think I had a shot like that in me anymore. I did. I saw him kneel there with his mouth full of death and that stupid look on his face. The smile quivers. "And his dick still in her..."
Zh: “我不觉得还能再遇到这样的射击机会了。我开枪了。我看见他跪在那里，嘴里满是死亡，还有脸上那副愚蠢的表情。”他的笑容在颤抖。“他们的下半身还纠缠在一起……”

En: There. A hot flash of rage almost carries the smile away. Some dark piece...
Zh: 一股潮热的怒火几乎卷走了笑容。某种黑暗的东西……

En: And so they did.
Zh: “他们也是。”

En: Nothing. I went to sleep. Next morning there were May bells everywhere. The world was white -- or what's left of it anyway. My last spring here... I knew the fascists would come to avenge their own...
Zh: “没什么。我去睡觉了。第二天早晨，到处都是铃兰。整个世界都是白色的——或者说只剩下白色。我在这里的最后一个春季……我知道法西斯分子会来，为自己人报仇……”

En: Then what?
Zh: “然后呢？”

En: Mr. Dros -- are you aware you're confessing to murder? the lieutenant asks after a second of silence.
Zh: 警督就这么看了他一秒，或者是两秒，然后打破了沉默：“德罗斯先生——你知道自己是在承认谋杀吗？”

En: Yes. A single word is all he gives.
Zh: “是的。”他只蹦出了这一个词。

En: Boom! I got you!
Zh: “哈！抓到你了吧！”

En: Adolescent imbecile. He squints.
Zh: “不成熟的低能。”他眯起眼睛。

En: Do you understand you're confessing to murder -- to a police officer?
Zh: “你明白你这是在承认谋杀吗——在一个警官面前？”

En: Be very very precise now... don't make a splash, you can still mess it up.
Zh: 现在一定要非常、非常精确……不要冲动，你还是可能把事情搞砸的。

En: The old man nods.
Zh: 老人点点头。

En: And you were looking at them -- the victim and a young woman -- having sex? Through the scope of your rifle that night? Before you shot him? The lieutenant takes out his notebook slowly, very slowly.
Zh: 警督慢慢地掏出笔记本，非常慢。“你当时在看他们——被害人和一个年轻女性——在做爱？那晚通过瞄准镜看到的吗？在对他开枪之前？”

En: God damn right I did. I just nailed you.
Zh: “我他妈真的做到了。我刚刚让你认罪了。”

En: Moronic, gloating psychopath. He squints.
Zh: “沾沾自喜的智障精神病患。”他眯起眼睛。

En: Why?
Zh: “为什么？”

En: Because that's what they were doing... He shrugs, then smacks his lips.
Zh: “因为他们就是这么做的……”他耸耸肩，然后咂了咂嘴。

En: You can coax it out of him, the lieutenant's preparing the ground.
Zh: 你可以哄他自己说出来，警督已经打好了基础。

En: I don't understand. He turns to you. "Do you, detective? I don't understand this part."
Zh: “我不明白。”他转向你。“你呢，警探？这部分我没明白。”

En: The motive! This is where the motive is going to come from...
Zh: 动机！这就是动机的来源……

En: Quick, a motive, while the iron is still hot. Get one out of him.
Zh: 快，动机，乘热打铁。让他自己说出来。

En: Wait, motive, why?
Zh: 等等，动机呢，为什么要这样做？

En: No, not shush! He could say he was taking the fall for someone. Insane. Coerced. It's useless in court without a motive, don't mess this up...
Zh: 嘘，嘘什么嘘！他可以说自己是替人背锅。发疯了。受到胁迫。没有动机的话，上法庭是没用的，千万别搞砸了……

En: Yeah, yeah, shush!
Zh: 是的，是的，嘘！

En: A motive. A *real* cop gets a motive now.
Zh: 动机。现在*真*警察要发现动机了。

En: Coax it out of him... he's still warm. They were fucking...
Zh: 哄他说出来……他正在兴头上。他们在啪啪啪……

En: A motive. There's some *seedy* motive here, don't you feel it? Get the motive.
Zh: 动机。这里面蕴藏着某种*不安的*动机，你没感觉到吗？问出他的动机。

En: Now, a motive! You still need a motive, the confession alone isn't enough...
Zh: 现在，动机！你还需要一个动机，只靠供认是不够的……

En: You don't shush me! He could say he was taking the fall for someone. Or disoriented. A confession is useless without a motive, don't mess this up.
Zh: 你敢嘘我！他可以说自己是替人背锅。或者迷惑了。没有动机的供认是没有用的，别搞砸了。

En: Wait, motive, why?
Zh: 等等，动机呢，为什么要这样做？

En: Yeah, yeah, shush!
Zh: 是的，是的，嘘！

En: Yeah, yeah, shush!
Zh: 是的，是的，嘘！

En: Wait, motive, why?
Zh: 等等，动机呢，为什么要这样做？

En: No, not shush! He could say he was taking the fall for someone. Disoriented. Tortured. It's useless in court without a motive, don't mess this up...
Zh: 嘘，嘘什么嘘！他可以说自己是替人背锅。发疯了。受到胁迫。没有动机的话，上法庭是没用的，别搞砸了……

En: Yeah, yeah, shush!
Zh: 是的，是的，嘘！

En: Wait, motive, why?
Zh: 等等，动机呢，为什么要这样做？

En: He could say he was taking the fall for someone. Insane. Coerced. It's useless in court without a motive, don't mess this up...
Zh: 他可以说自己是替人背锅。发疯了。受到胁迫。没有动机的话，上法庭是没用的，别搞砸了……

En: He could say he was taking the fall for someone. Disoriented, tortured. It's useless in court without a motive, don't mess this up...
Zh: 他可以说自己是替人背锅。发疯了。受到胁迫。没有动机的话，上法庭是没用的，别搞砸了……

En: He could say he was taking the fall for someone. It's useless in court without a motive, go be a cop now, don't mess it up...
Zh: 他可以说自己是替人背锅。发疯了。受到胁迫。没有动机的话，上法庭是没用的，现在好好当个警察，别搞砸了……

En: Of course this is only your mesolimbic reward pathway -- what does it know about police matters? Maybe you should just get high instead? This is such an unimportant moment.
Zh: 当然，这只是你的中脑缘奖励通路——它对警察的事了解多少？也许你应该去嗨一下？这一刻真的太不重要了。

En: High yes. Let's get high!
Zh: 嗨？对啊。我们嗨起来吧！

En: Wait, no, motive. Yes. Seems important.
Zh: 等等，不对，动机。是的。好像很重要。

En: Right.
Zh: 没错。

En: There's no high greater than a case solved for you, when will you learn? Get the motive, don't mess this up...
Zh: 没有什么比破案更嗨的了，你什么时候才能学的会？找出动机，别搞砸了……

En: How?
Zh: “怎么会？”

En: A rifle's scope has the best magnification.
Zh: “步枪瞄准镜的放大率是最棒的。”

En: I pull the trigger. He looks you in the eye. "Think of it as a form of *critique*."
Zh: “我扣动了扳机。”他看着你的眼睛。“把它想象成一种*批判*的形式。”

En: ...and if it's, you know, part of all that *shit* you see...
Zh: “……如果那也是，你知道的，你看到的*破事*中的一部分……”

En: Did you *kill* him? The kid puffs his chest. "Fucking tell this cop."
Zh: “你*杀了*他吗？”小孩挺起胸膛。“妈的，告诉这个警察。”

En:
You mean like... lately? *After* the War?	“你的意思是说……之后吗？*战后*？”
0x01000089000038BA	Dialogue Text	SEAFORT / DESERTER MURDER	Cuno	Well?" The Cuno turns to you, with impatience.
Zh: “嗯？”坤诺转向你，不是很耐烦。

En: Got nothing to say about that boomstick, huh? You chokin'? That's the stick that did it!
Zh: “对那支枪没什么要说的，是吗？你噎着了？就是那根棍子干得！”

En: It's a real gun, not like the little musketeer pistols you RCM fasces have.
Zh: “它是一支真正的枪，不像你们这群RCM法西斯分子的小步兵手枪。”

En: It's a real gun, he points at the lieutenant's sidearm, "not like your musketeer pistols."
Zh: “它是一支真正的枪，”他指着警督的配枪，“不像你这支小步兵手枪。”

En: Your brain is *rotting* from the radio waves. He looks at the air, then turns to the kid. "You too. They're *twisting* you."
Zh: “你的大脑被无线电波*腐蚀*了。”他望向天空，然后转向男孩。“你也是。他们在*扭曲*你。”

En: Whatever, man... Cuno looks at you. It doesn't look like he thinks this worked.
Zh: “无所谓了，老兄……”坤诺看着你。看来他觉得这样不管用。

En: He looks at you as if you're a malfunctioning machine, thinking: do what you do. Maybe even a pinch of *hit yourself again*?
Zh: 他看着你，好像你是一台出了故障的机器，想到：你该干嘛干嘛吧。甚至可以再来点*自己打自己*的戏码？

En: Bet you've been sneaking around a lot... hidden. The kid sounds agitated. "Know any secret paths? Cuno knows paths..."
Zh: “我打赌你一定经常偷偷摸摸的……躲藏吧。”男孩的声音有些激动。“知道什么秘密通道吗？坤诺知道通道……”

En: The kid gives you a quick sideways glance and nods to acknowledge...
Zh: 男孩飞快地瞥了一眼，点头表示会意……

En: The kid stares at you slack-jawed.
Zh: 男孩目瞪口呆地看着你。

En: Not now. Stop yourself.
Zh: 现在不行。阻止自己。

En: He thinks -- what are you doing. We almost got him here.
Zh: 他想到——你在做什么。我们就快逮到他了。

En: Khm. (Cough.)
Zh: “咳咳。”（咳嗽几声。）

En: Yo, people *change* shoes. He turns to the old man. "You were sneaking around, right? Casing the joint or what?"
Zh: “哟，人是会*换*鞋的。”他转向老人。“你一直偷偷摸摸的，对吧？踩点吗，还是什么？”

En: What do we do now, we're not getting these prints to match...
Zh: “我们现在怎么做，这些脚印不匹配……”

En: Fuckin' hell... The kid looks at him for one, maybe two seconds, breathing heavy with excitement.
Zh: 男孩看了他一秒，或者是两秒，突然兴奋地喘起粗气来。“他妈的……”

En: ...then you pull the trigger?
Zh: “……你就会扣动扳机？”

En: You always creepin' on people through your scope like that? The kid squints his eyes.
Zh: “你一直像那样用瞄准镜偷窥别人吗？”

En: Yes. A single word is all he gives.
Zh: “是的。”他只蹦出了这一个词。

En: Boom -- I got you. Me, the most boring cop on Earth.
Zh: “哈——抓到你了吧。我，就是这个地球上最无聊的警察。”

En: Boom -- the *revelation*.
Zh: “哈——*真相大揭秘*。”

En: I just fuckin' nailed you. Supercop of Jamrock.
Zh: “我刚刚让你认罪了。我是加姆洛克的超级警探。”

En: I just nailed you. Me. Fucking *me* -- this sorry cop.
Zh: “我刚刚让你认罪了。我。该死的*我*——抱歉警探。”

En: Adolescent imbecile... He squints.
Zh: “不成熟的低能……”他眯起眼睛。

En: Yes. He looks the kid in the eye. "Think of it as a form of *critique*."
Zh: “是的。”他看着男孩的眼睛。“把它想象成一种*批判*的形式。”

En: A rifle's scope has the best magnification.
Zh: “步枪瞄准镜的放大率是最棒的。”

En: Helps him see all the *shit*...
Zh: 帮他看清所有那些*破事*……

En: And if you don't like what you see...
Zh: “如果你不喜欢自己看到的东西……”

En: Click.
Zh: 咔哒。

En: Oh yes, he smacks his lips. "Cutting those drugs of hers into little lines with a knife, masturbating..."
Zh: “是的，”他砸吧着嘴唇。“用小刀把那些毒品切成小条，自渎……”

En: The bruises on her body -- any chance you've seen them through a *hole in a wall?*
Zh: “她身上那些瘀伤——你是不是从*墙上的小洞*看见的？”

En: Like that too, yes, he nods. "Bending like a bow against the glass..."
Zh: “有过，没错，”他点点头。“像弯弓一样靠在玻璃上……”

En: Ever see her through a window, on a roof?
Zh: “你有没有通过屋顶上的一个窗户观察过她？”

En: You've been through the secret route behind the Whirling-in-Rags. Those were *your* footprints there. You just changed your shoes. (Move on.)
Zh: “你用过褴褛飞旋背后的那条秘密通道。尘土里留下的是*你的*脚印。你刚换过鞋。”（继续。）

En: You've been through the secret route behind the Whirling-in-Rags. Those were *your* footprints in the dust. (Move on.)
Zh: “你用过褴褛飞旋背后的那条秘密通道。尘土里留下的是*你的*脚印。”（继续。）

En: You've been through the secret route behind the Whirling-in-Rags. (Move on.)
Zh: “你用过褴褛飞旋背后的那条秘密通道。”（继续。）

En: I've been through *all* of Martinaise -- every nook and cranny.
Zh: “我去过马丁内斯的*所有*地方——每一个角落和缝隙。”

En: And that too.
Zh: “那里也去过。”

En: Yes, that too. He shakes his head, almost in awe. "The things they did in that little room. What she'd *do* to feel good..." He explains: "Funny, the way light works..."
Zh: “是的，也去过那里。”他摇摇头，几乎有些敬畏的样子。“他们在那里做的那些事，在那个小房间里。她*做了*那些事就是为了自己爽快……”他解释到：“光的运作方式，是很有意思的……”

En: Got it.
Zh: “明白。”

En: Herding the strikebreakers like that -- I kept an eye on them. He stares inland, then back at you.
Zh: “像那样把破坏罢工者聚在一起——我一直盯着他们。”他望了望内陆，然后看向你。

En: One little thing -- what was her *name*, on the passport. Just curious...
Zh: 还有一件小事——护照上她的*名字*叫什么。只是好奇……

En: Those two took the cake.
Zh: 那两个人最该挨这一枪。

En: Thank god, the lieutenant is picking it up...
Zh: 谢天谢地，警督捡起来了……

En: Thank god, the kid is picking it up...
Zh: 还好，小孩捡起来了……

En: I don't really know. I was there one night and she was crying, like a child -- in the corner of her room, on the floor. Like she does sometimes....
Zh: “我真不知道。有天晚上我在那里，她在哭泣，像个孩子——蜷缩在房间角落的地板上。她有时会这样做……”

En: Why then?
Zh: “为什么呢？”

En: Seems like the answer was yes.
Zh: 看来答案是肯定的。

En: The calibre of bullet he used does not do that kind of damage.
Zh: 他使用的子弹口径不会造成那种伤害。

En: While he stands here and rots.
Zh: 而他却站在这里腐烂。

En: He knew she knows. She was looking at the island, figuring it out -- day by day, cigarette by cigarette...
Zh: 他知道她知道。她看着小岛，弄明白了——日复一日，香烟一根接着一根……

En: Let's talk about something else for now.
Zh: “现在我们说点别的吧。”

En: He draws shallow breaths.
Zh: 他浅浅地吸了一口气。

En: He draws shallow breaths.
Zh: 他浅浅地吸了一口气。

En: Let's talk about something else for now.
Zh: “现在我们说点别的吧。”

En: Three weeks ago, when the rich hag came in on her galley. Her honour guard came in tow.
Zh: “三周前，那个有钱女巫乘船到达的时候。她的仪仗队也进城了。”

En: By that you mean Joyce Messier, the Wild Pines rep?
Zh: “你的意思是乔伊斯·梅西耶，野松公司的代表？”

En: And by that you mean the representative of the harbour company?
Zh: “你的意思是港口公司的代表？”

En: Joyce... he means Joyce.
Zh: 乔伊斯……他指的是乔伊斯。

En: Wrinkled up whore, he nods.
Zh: “皱皱巴巴的婊子，”他点点头。

En: That must be the representative of the Harbour company, who came in on her boat.
Zh: 那一定是港口公司的代表，她是自己乘船来的。

En: Khm... (Cough.) "Moving on -- the negotiator's *security detail* arrives shortly after..."
Zh: “咳咳……”（咳嗽几声。）“继续——谈判专家到达之后，她的*安保人员*很快也到了……”

En: Khm... (Cough.) "Moving on -- the victim arrives some time after her..."
Zh: “咳咳……”（咳嗽几声。）“继续——被害人在她之后抵达……”

En: They moved into a deserted apartment above the roundabout. He nods toward the city. "Radio equipment out for all to see -- reactionary radio playing. Sloppy and drunk."
Zh: 他朝着城市点点头。“他们把船停在环岛上方的废弃公寓旁边。所有人都能看到他们的无线电设备——播放着反动派的电台。粗心大意，酒气熏天。”

En: I've seen their kind during the Landing. Those Occidental and Mesque falangues weren't conscripts -- boys, like us. They were wights. All they know is to destroy and hurt.
Zh: “登陆的时候我见过这种人。那些奥西登人和梅斯克的长枪派分子不是应征士兵……小伙子们，像我们一样。他们是尸鬼。只知道破坏和伤害。”

En: Wights?
Zh: “尸鬼？”

En: Them fucking... He looks at the charred wood. "I didn't like that."
Zh: “他们在做爱……”他看着炭化的木材。“我不喜欢那个。”

En: That's all it takes for the bullet to reach his head. He squints. "Now that I think of it, I wasn't aiming for his mouth. I wanted his brains to spill out on her... but..." he shrugs, "you can't have everything."
Zh: “就这样，子弹钻进了他的脑袋。”他眯起眼睛。“现在我这么一想，我不是真的瞄准了他的嘴巴。我希望他的脑浆全部喷溅在她身上……不过……”他耸耸肩，“总不能事事都如意吧。”

En: So you were jealous?
Zh: “所以你是在妒忌？”

En: Jealousy is a reactionary concept. I didn't *like* the reaver enjoying himself -- drugged out, soothed in the arms of a young woman. I wanted him to die so he could not enjoy life anymore.
Zh: “妒忌是一个反动的概念。我不*喜欢*看着那个掠夺者享受的样子——嗑药，在一个年轻女子的臂弯里寻求安慰。我想他死，这样他就再也不能享受生活了。”

En: And I wanted her to see his head explode, he nods. "That too. She should know better than to hold a child murderer between her thighs. I knew he'd be there for one more second, *writhing*..."
Zh: “而且，我想让她看着他的脑袋被打爆，”他点点头。“也有这个原因。她应该知道不该让一个连小孩都不放过的杀人犯爬上自己的床。我知道他还会多保持个一两秒，*蠕动*……”

En: For him to stop reacting to stimuli, to be broken off from the world. Cordoned into darkness.
Zh: 让他停止对刺激做出反应，让他跟这个世界诀别。被隔绝在黑暗之中。

En: Okay then.
Zh: “那好吧。”

En: *Splat*, a bloody spitball lands on the firewood.
Zh: *啪嗒*，一个带血的唾沫球落在木柴上。

En: And now he longs to see her covered in blood.
Zh: 现在，他渴望看见她满身是血的样子。

En: Her body sweating from the drugs, slick from cerebral haemorrhage.
Zh: 毒品让她的身体香汗淋漓，滑腻腻的都是大脑喷溅而出的血液。

En: This man has seen past her, like you did.
Zh: 这个男人看透了她，就像你一样。

En: He wants to see her covered in blood.
Zh: 他想看见她浑身是血的样子。

En: To punish her.
Zh: 为了惩罚她。

En: You wanted to punish her, so you killed him.
Zh: “你想惩罚她，所以你杀了他。”

En: You had feelings for that woman.
Zh: “你对那个女人有感情。”

En: Did you have feelings for that woman?
Zh: “你对那个女人有感情吗？”

En: How long had you been watching her?
Zh: “你观察她多久了？”

En: So in conclusion, it wasn't about him. It was about *her*. (Conclude.)
Zh: “所以总的来说，这一切并不是因为*他*，而是*她*。”（总结。）

En: Her... He repeats, staring at the ashes -- then the reeds. There's a twitch in the corner of his eye.
Zh: “她……”他重复着，凝视着灰烬——然后是芦苇丛。眼角有什么东西在抽搐。

En: Since she came to Martinaise. I saw her sneaking in the reeds early in the morning, behind the Feld building. It was dark, still winter. She didn't have her skimpy outfit on then, just a spot in the night, moving...
Zh: “从她到达马丁内斯开始。我看见她早上在芦苇丛里徘徊，就在菲尔德大厦背后。当时是冬天，天很黑。那时她穿的还没那么衣不遮体，只是夜色中的一个小点，移动着……”

En: Hiding something in the water. She had a fag after she'd done it. I was up in the ruins there -- she couldn't see me, but I could see her. Smoking... she was nervous, but not scared.
Zh: “在水里藏了些什么东西。完事之后，她一副累坏了的样子。我就在那边的废墟——她看不见我，不过我可以看见她。抽着烟……她很紧张。不过并不害怕。”

En: Past the Feld building, on the coast? What was she doing there?
Zh: “经过菲尔德大厦，在海岸边吗？她在那里做什么？”

En: What was she doing there?
Zh: “她在那里做什么？”

En: And beautiful.
Zh: 还很美。

En: And beautiful.
Zh: “还很美。”

En: What do you think she hid there?
Zh: “你觉得她在那里藏了什么东西？”

En: That too, he nods.
Zh: “没错，”他点点头。

En: How could you see what she looked like? You said it was dark.
Zh: “你怎么知道她什么样？你说当时很黑。”

En: The sun came up, her hair was like cobwebs. She smoked more fags and snorted a line of whatever shit she was on. Right there... he shakes his head. "She needed it just to move."
Zh: “太阳出来了，她的头发就像蜘蛛网。她抽了很多烟，还嗑了点不知道是什么的鬼玩意。就在那边……”他摇摇头。“她需要那样做才能动的起来。”

En: Her passport. And tickets to Villiers. He coughs. "And from there to Casherbrume."
Zh: “她的护照。还有前往维勒斯的票。”他咳了几下。“再从那里前往凯什布鲁姆。”

En: This is the hidden buoy she told us about... You looked into it?
Zh: “她跟我们说的就是那个隐藏的浮标……你查过了吗？”

En:
Some kind of hidden container on the coast? You looked into it?	“某种隐藏在海岸边的容器？你查过了吗？”
0x01000078000026CF	Dialogue Text	SEAFORT / DESERTER REASONING	The Deserter	After she was gone." He nods.
Zh: 他点点头。“在她离开之后。”

En: Did you keep what was in it? When we found the submersible it was empty.
Zh: “里面的东西在你这里吗？我们找到浮标的时候，里面已经空了。”

En: No. Why would I do that? I didn't need tickets to Villiers... I put them back. If I wanted to extort someone I'd do better.
Zh: “不在。我为什么要这么做？我又不需要去维勒斯的票……我把东西放回去了。如果我想勒索别人，我肯定干得比这个漂亮。”

En: Are you sure? We checked the submersible. There was nothing there.
Zh: “你确定吗？我们检查过那个浮标了。里面什么也没有。”

En: Are you sure? I checked the submersible. There was nothing there.
Zh: “你确定吗？我检查过那个浮标了。里面什么也没有。”

En: Where was this submersible, looks like the investigation missed it?
Zh: “这个浮标在哪里，看来调查好像错过了？”

En: You saw her name on the passport. But before, when I said her name is *Klaasje* -- you didn't seem to recognize it.
Zh: “你在护照上看到她的名字了。不过在这之前，当我说她叫*卡拉洁*的时候——你好像没认出来。”

En: Why would I need that trash? He looks to the reeds, confused. "I'm not going to Villiers..."
Zh: 他看着芦苇，有些困惑。“我要那些垃圾干什么？我又不去维勒斯……”

En: There it is again. The strange neurological state he's sometimes in.
Zh: 又来了。有时候他会陷入这种奇怪的神经状态。

En: A strange confusion comes over him from time to time. Some kind of aberration of the nervous system?
Zh: 他时不时会感到一种奇怪的困惑。也许是某种神经系统失常？

En: Yes. After she'd gone. It was a submersible. Well made, actually...
Zh: “是的。在她离开之后。那是个浮标。其实做得挺好的……”

En: Sloppy, we should have gotten her to tell us about this... the lieutenant mutters to himself. "Did you take the documents?"
Zh: “是我们马虎了，我们应该从她嘴里问出来的……”警督喃喃自语。“你拿走文件了吗？”

En: No. I put them back. Why would I take them, I'm not going to Falne... He seems confused, momentarily. "Or... I mean..."
Zh: “没有。我把东西放回去了。我拿那些东西干什么，我又不去维勒斯……”他似乎有些困惑，不过只有短暂的一刻。“或者……我的意思是……”

En: In the water, behind the camp site there, he waves erratically toward the coast. "I don't remember precisely. It was in the winter. It was cold out..."
Zh: “在水里，就在那边的营地背后，”他朝着海岸随意摆了摆手。“我记得不准确。那是在冬天。外面很冷……”

En: It didn't say *Klaasje* in there... He shakes his head.
Zh: “上面写的不是*卡拉洁*……”他摇摇头。

En: What did it say her name was -- in the passport?
Zh: “那她的名字叫什么——护照上的？”

En: It was something... He stutters. "I don't remember. It was dark that morning. I only remember her face on the photo."
Zh: “好像是……”他结结巴巴。“我不记得了。那个早晨很黑。我只记得照片上她的脸。”

En: It was something else... He stutters. "I don't remember. It was dark that morning. I only remember her face on the photo."
Zh: “是别的名字……”他结结巴巴。“我不记得了。那个早晨很黑。我只记得照片上她的脸。”

En: Did you keep the materials? When I found the submersible it was empty.
Zh: “那些材料你留下了吗？当我找到浮标的时候它已经空了。”

En: The sun came up and her hair was like cobwebs. She smoked more fags and snorted a line of whatever *shit* she was on. Right there... he shakes his head. "She needed it just to move."
Zh: “太阳出来了，她的头发像蜘蛛网一样。她抽了很多烟，还嗑了点不知道是什么的*鬼玩意*。就在那边……”他摇摇头。“她需要那样做才能动的起来。”

En: Moving on -- did you continue watching her after this? (Proceed.)
Zh: “我们继续——在这之后，你就一直在观察她？”（继续。）

En: I did. He almost smiles. "She had a face like an archipelago, with those birthmarks. And a body, hard and lean and bruised all over -- black and yellow. I could see she's taken a beating."
Zh: “是的。”他差点又笑了。“她有一张艾瑞奥吉特人的脸，还有胎记。她的身体，又瘦又结实，到处都是瘀痕——黑黑黄黄。我能看出她被打了一顿。”

En: Did you take the documents?
Zh: “那些文件是你拿走的吗？”

En: He's setting it up for you...
Zh: 他在给你下套……

En: In the Free State of Semenine. Hidden away at the edge of the Earth, near the pale.
Zh: 属于塞美尼自由州。藏在地球边缘，灰域附近。

En: How does he know those minute details about her body?
Zh: 他怎么知道她身体上的那些细节？

En: Footprints in the dust.
Zh: 尘土里的脚印。

En: Could have changed shoes.
Zh: 可能换过鞋。

En: Footprints don't match!
Zh: 脚印不匹配！

En: Secret routes?
Zh: 秘密路线？

En: Found the peephole.
Zh: 找到了偷窥孔。

En: A little inconsistency -- he was surprised to hear her name Klaasje, before. Would he not have seen it on the documents?
Zh: 有一点矛盾的地方——之前听到她叫卡拉洁的时候，他有些吃惊。他在文件上没有看见过吗？

En: You could tell she was a *spook* from the documents?
Zh: “你能从文件上看出她是个*间谍*吗？”

En: I could see who she was, too, he nods. "A spook. On the run. Revachol's the cloaca of capital now. All the bagmen and arms dealers end up here. To do drugs and have sex like animals."
Zh: “我能看出她是什么人，”他点点头。“一个间谍。在逃命。现在的瑞瓦肖是资本的下水道。所有劫匪和军火商都往这里跑。为了吸毒，为了像动物一样做爱。”

En: First -- you could tell she was a *spook* from the documents?
Zh: “首先——你可以从文件中看出她是一个*间谍*？”

En: She practically breastfed that man. You wouldn't believe the things she let him do to her... He shakes his head and stares at the ashes.
Zh: “她简直就是在给那个男人喂奶。你不会相信她让他做了些什么……”他摇摇头，出神地看着那堆灰烬。

En: The secret path. He could have just *changed* his shoes, the prints in the dust were his!\n
Zh: 秘密通道。他可能*换过*鞋子了，灰尘里那些脚印就是他的！

En: It quickly comes to you.
Zh: 你很快就想到了。

En: He must have... climbed to the roof maybe?
Zh: 也许他曾经……爬上过屋顶？

En: She had different colour hair on the photo, and glasses. *Forged*. Some sordid, bourgeois affair. I've heard about this kind of thing on the radio...
Zh: “相片上她的头发颜色不一样，还戴着眼镜。*伪装*。某种卑鄙的、资产阶级的事务。我在收音机里听到过这种事情……”

En: And the bruises -- you could see her bruises through the scope of a rifle?
Zh: “还有瘀伤——你能通过步枪瞄准镜看到她身上的瘀伤？”

En: You can't see that through a scope. It's just a blur there... He shakes his silver-grey head.
Zh: “瞄准镜可看不到那个。只是一团模糊……”他摇了摇银灰色的脑袋。

En: I've seen her like that, yes, he nods. "Cutting those drugs of hers into little lines with a knife, masturbating..."
Zh: “我见过她那样，是的，”他点点头。“用小刀把那些毒品切成小条，自渎……”

En: Mhm, he smacks his lips. "Bending like a bow against the glass..."
Zh: “嗯，”他砸吧着嘴唇。“像弯弓一样靠在玻璃上……”

En: You turn it on inside and it gets so dark out you can't see a man looking in. I learned that in the Twenties when they were still hunting me. I've seen people do *some* shit, but... He keeps shaking his head.
Zh: “你在里面把灯打开，外面特别黑，你就看不见有人正在往里面看。这一点我是在20年代学到的，那时他们还在追踪我。我见过别人干得*某些*破事，不过……”他不停地摇头。

En: You've been through the secret route behind the Whirling-in-Rags. Those were *your* footprints. You just changed your shoes. (Move on.)
Zh: “你用过褴褛飞旋背后的那条秘密通道。尘土里留下的是*你的*脚印。你可以换鞋的。”（继续。）

En: You've been through the secret route behind the Whirling-in-Rags. Those were *your* footprints. (Move on.)
Zh: “你用过褴褛飞旋背后的那条秘密通道。尘土里留下的是*你的*脚印。”（继续。）

En: You've been through the secret route behind the Whirling-in-Rags. (Move on.)
Zh: “你用过褴褛飞旋背后的那条秘密通道。”（继续。）

En: Everything in him fills with impossible longing, all at once.
Zh: 突然之间，他身体里的一切都充满了难以忍受的渴望。

En: You hear the familiar scribble of the lieutenant's pen. A quick glance at you...
Zh: 你听见警督的笔那熟悉的涂画声。他飞快地瞥了你一眼……

En: One more loose end down. We're doing this, detective.
Zh: 又摸清了一个细节。我们要成功了，警探。

En: One more thing -- the flowers, Mr. Dros. The dried flowers that were on the roof.
Zh: “还有一件事——那些花，德罗斯先生。屋顶上的干花。”

En: What about them?
Zh: “怎么了？”

En: Did you make that hole?
Zh: “那个洞是你挖的吗？”

En: You made that hole?
Zh: “那个洞是你挖的吗？”

En: With a clip point knife.
Zh: “用一把小尖刀。”

En: Good for listening in too. For hearing the moaning and the snorts.
Zh: 也很适合窃听。可以听见呻吟和鼻息声。

En: ... then at the man. "How did you get in there? The hidden pinball workshop?"
Zh: ……然后他看向老人：“你是怎么进去的？那个隐藏的弹球工坊？”

En: I can just walk in there now, after a good wash -- I told you they think I'm an antisocial. Closing hour is a good time. The kitchen's empty.
Zh: “我现在好好梳洗一下，就可以直接走进去——我告诉过你，他们觉得我是个反社会份子。旅店关门的时候不错，因为厨房里没人。”

En: I can just walk in the hostel now, after a good wash. They all think I'm an antisocial, a vagrant. Closing hour is a good time. The kitchen's empty then.
Zh: “我现在好好梳洗一下，就可以直接走进去——我告诉过你，他们觉得我是个反社会份子，是个流浪汉。旅店关门的时候不错，因为厨房里没人。”

En: You had to open the steel door in the kitchen? How?
Zh: “你必须打开厨房那扇铁门吧？怎么打开的？”

En: I got that open a long time ago. Some bourgeois game-merchant lived there -- I don't know... fifteen years ago? He left spare keys all over and I took one. Then I saw her turn the light on one night in my scope... He points toward the Whirling-in-Rags.
Zh: “我很早之前就打开那扇门了。那里住着一个可恨的游戏商人——我不知道……大概是15年前吧？他的备用钥匙丢得到处都是，我拿了一把。然后某天晚上，我通过瞄准镜看见她把灯打开了……”他指向褴褛飞旋的方向。

En: And he found use for it -- a spare key, like the one hanging behind the Union box window.
Zh: 而且他找到了它的用途——一把备用钥匙，就像工会包厢窗户后面挂的那一把。

En: And the door? The steel door in the kitchen, how do you open that?
Zh: “那门呢？厨房那扇钢门，你是怎么打开的？”

En: How did you get *in* there? The hidden pinball workshop?
Zh: “你是怎么*进去*的？那个隐藏的弹球工坊？”

En: He must knows his way around a creaky floorboard and a rusty hinge on a door...
Zh: 他肯定知道怎么绕过嘎吱嘎吱的地板和大门上锈蚀的铰链……

En: How did you get close enough to see the bruises, Mr. Dros?
Zh: “那些瘀伤要离得很近才能看见，你是怎么做到的，德罗斯先生？”

En: You climbed, right? You *climbed* behind her window?
Zh: “你爬上去的，对吧？你*爬到*她的窗户背后？”

En: How good are those fucking eyes of yours -- you use binoculars?
Zh: “你那双该死的眼睛到底有多好——你用了望远镜吗？”

En: I have my ways. A cracked smile appears on his dried white lips.
Zh: “我有我的办法。”他干枯发白的嘴唇上露出一个扭曲的笑容。

En: What *ways*? Tell me!
Zh: “什么*办法*？告诉我！”

En: Not in this lifetime droite. He waves you off with a cough, his thoughts elsewhere...
Zh: “这辈子你就别想了，右派的家伙。”他咳嗽一声，冲你摆摆手，思绪已经飘到了别处……

En: How did you get close enough to see her bruises, Mr. Dros?
Zh: “那些瘀伤要离得很近才能看见，你是怎么做到的，德罗斯先生？”

En: What are you talking about -- 'crab-man'? He waves you off with a cough.
Zh: “你说什么呢——蟹男？”他咳嗽一声，冲你摆摆手。

En: You've been through the secret route behind the Whirling-in-Rags. The lieutenant steps in: "Those were *your* footprints. You just changed your shoes."
Zh: “你用过褴褛飞旋背后的那条秘密通道。尘土里留下的是*你的*脚印。你可以换鞋的。”

En: You've been through the secret route behind the Whirling-in-Rags. The lieutenant steps in: "Those were *your* footprints."
Zh: “你用过褴褛飞旋背后的那条秘密通道。尘土里留下的是*你的*脚印。”

En: You've been through the secret route behind the Whirling-in-Rags. The lieutenant interrupts.
Zh: “你用过褴褛飞旋背后的那条秘密通道。”警督打断了你们的对话。

En: I've been through *all* of Martinaise -- every nook and cranny.
Zh: “我去过马丁内斯的*所有*地方——每一个角落和缝隙。”

En: But *that* nook too? The lieutenant does not let you finish.
Zh: “*那个*角落也是吗？”警督没让你把话说完。

En: This one's *gone*. Make up somehow, connect something else, fast!
Zh: 这个要*溜了*。想办法弥补，跟别的东西连在一起，快！

En: You lost it...
Zh: 你弄丢了……

En: Another question about her.
Zh: “关于她，还有一个问题。”

En: Her... he repeats, with strange slowness.
Zh: “她……”他重复着，慢得出奇。

En: A little pain there. A prick.
Zh: 那里有一点痛。刺痛。

En: You're a bad detective. Lazy and bad.
Zh: 你是个坏警探。又懒又坏。

En: One little thing missed and I drown in anxiety...
Zh: 只要错过一件小事，我就会溺死在焦虑里……

En: No. It's cool. I've already got him. I don't need to be perfect.
Zh: 不。没事的。我已经抓到他了。没必要追求完美。

En: Rightly so. Fix this now! Push on, extra carefully!
Zh: 理应如此。现在就解决这个问题！继续向前推进，加倍小心！

En: Dive for other clues now, like you always do. Make it up in the deep end...
Zh: 现在开始寻找其他线索，一直以来你都是这么做的。在最后弥补……

En: As you should be, son, this is pitiful. Make up for it now!
Zh: 这是你应该做的，小子，这也太可怜了。现在就弥补吧！

En: Is it? You don't feel like it is. You feel like you should make up for it by *scrutinizing* him extra carefully...
Zh: 是吗？你觉得不是。你觉得自己应该通过更加谨慎的*审视*来弥补……

En: No it's not. Fix this now! Move on extra carefully! Be incredibly *minute*!
Zh: 不，不是的。现在就解决这个问题！接下来要加倍小心！极其*详尽*！

En: Of course it's not *okay*. Make up for it now, maximum performance!
Zh: 当然不*可以*了。现在就弥补，发挥出最高性能！

En: On her.
Zh: 她。

En: Was that why you left the dried flowers behind her window?
Zh: “这就是你在她窗户背后留下干花的理由？”

En: One more thing about this woman...
Zh: “关于这个女人，还有一件事……”

En: One more thing, Mr. Dros -- the dried flowers. On the roof.
Zh: “还有一件事，德罗斯先生——干花。屋顶上的干花。”

En: One more thing about her...
Zh: “还有一件关于她的事……”

En: That fucking whore... He waves his hand, with sudden anger. Something comes over him...
Zh: “那个该死的婊子……”他摆摆手，突然有些愤怒。他突然想起了什么……

En: A strange, uncalled for rage he seems to have no control over.
Zh: 一种奇怪的、毫无犹豫的愤怒，他似乎无法控制。

En: There's... he sighs, "there's nothing to hold on to, only this... It's not enough."
Zh: “没有……”他深吸一口气——发出喘息的声响。“没有任何可以紧握不放的东西，只有这个……这还不够。”

En: Yes, he looks at the charred logs. "I don't know why I do the things I do anymore."
Zh: “是的，”他看着焦黑的木块。“我不知道自己为什么还要这么做。”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: You wanted to console her.
Zh: “你想安慰她。”

En: Neither does he. He lowers his head, like a sunflower on a withered stalk.
Zh: 他也不知道。他低下头，像一朵残留在枯萎茎杆上的向日葵。

En: Man needs to feel something else. It helps if you have your eye on something -- there, he looks to the city where the lights sparkle. "Something pretty. It's weakness, I know."
Zh: “人类需要感受别的东西。在这场持久战中，如果能有别的东西引起你的关注，那是有所帮助的，”他望向那座灯火闪耀的城市。“美丽的东西。我知道，这是一种软弱。”

En: Man needs to feel something else. In this fight, it helps if you have your eye on something there, he looks to the city. "It's weakness, I know."
Zh: “人类需要感受别的东西。在这场持久战中，如果能有别的东西引起你的关注，那是有所帮助的，”他望向城市。“我知道，这是一种软弱。”

En: Something *put* the thought in you. A compulsion.
Zh: “某些东西把这种想法*放进*了你的脑子里。一股冲动。”

En: The coals of his eyes glisten suddenly, like stones dripping with water. Is he crying?
Zh: 他黑色的眼睛突然闪闪发亮，就像滴水的石头。他在哭吗？

En: No... He starts to shake his head again, a sunflower on a withered stalk.
Zh: “不……”他又开始摇头，像一朵残留在枯萎茎杆上的向日葵。

En: When was this?
Zh: “这是什么时候的事？”

En: The day after I'd killed him.
Zh: “我杀了他的第二天。”

En: And you brought her May bells?
Zh: “你给她带去了铃兰？”

En: There have been others?
Zh: “还有其他的吗？”

En: Yes. Over the years. It's not un-proletarian to feel something.
Zh: “是的。这么多年以来。感觉这种东西算不上是反无产阶级。”

En: It's as if something *put* the thought there. To leave the flowers.
Zh: 就好像有什么东西把这些想法*放进去*的——留下那些花。

En: What do you mean *put*? He raises his eyes. They're round and wide.
Zh: “你说*放进去*是什么意思？”他抬起双眼，它们睁得又大又圆。

En: You wanted to manipulate her.
Zh: “你想操纵她。”

En: I don't understand... He shakes his head.
Zh: “我不明白……”他摇摇头。

En: Maybe... He lowers his head and just stares at the logs. "I told you, I have holes in my brain now. I wouldn't just sit here waiting for you..."
Zh: “也许吧……”他低下头，凝视着火堆。“我告诉过你，现在我的脑子里有洞。我本不会就这样坐在这里等你……”

En: Maybe... He lowers his head and just stares at the logs. "I have these... holes in my brain now. I wouldn't just sit here waiting for you..."
Zh: “也许吧……”他低下头，凝视着火堆。“现在我的脑子里……有这些洞。我不会就这么坐在这儿等你……”

En: I just got this feeling. From what you said. Do you agree?
Zh: “我就是有一种感觉。从你的话里听出来的。你同意吗？”

En: Nothing.
Zh: “没什么。”

En: A sudden pang of rage.
Zh: 一阵突然的愤怒。

En: Woman... he smiles suddenly.
Zh: “女人……”他突然笑了起来。

En: And inexplicably. It doesn't go with his pained voice.
Zh: 笑得莫名其妙。跟他痛苦的声音很不相配。

En: In the silence, the lieutenant draws a line in his notes.
Zh: 警督沉默地在笔记里画了一条线。

En: In the silence, the lieutenant draws a line in his notes. Then nods at you once more.
Zh: 警督沉默地在笔记里画了一条线。然后又朝你点了点头。

En: One more down.
Zh: 又弄清楚一件事。

En: Did you leave the dried May bells behind her window?
Zh: “是你把干花留在她窗户背后的吗？”

En: I did. I shouldn't have. It was a mistake... A tremor passes the right side of his face.
Zh: “是的。我不该这么做的。这是个错误……”他的左脸一阵颤抖。

En: A brief flash of terror.
Zh: 一阵短暂的恐惧。

En: This implies that he's thought about extorting her.
Zh: 这就意味着他想过敲诈她。

En: Also, a little inconsistency here -- he was surprised to hear her name Klaasje, before. Would he not have seen it on the documents?
Zh: 而且，这里还有点矛盾的地方——之前听到她叫卡拉洁的时候，他有些吃惊。他在文件上没有看见过吗？

En: The bruises. You can't make that out in a scope...
Zh: 瘀伤。通过瞄准镜是辩认不出来的……

En: The bruises. Can you make that out in a scope?
Zh: 瘀伤。能通过瞄准镜看出来吗？

En: And the fact that she was a *spook*. How did he come to that?
Zh: 还有她是个*间谍*的事实，他是怎么得出这个结论的？

En: Wait, she was a *spook*? How did he come to that?
Zh: 等等，她是个*间谍*。他是怎么想到的？

En: How did you see all this. The bruises, that she was beaten?
Zh: “你是怎么看到这一切的。她被打出来的那些瘀伤？”

En: Heh... He shakes his silver-grey head.
Zh: “唔……”他摇了摇银灰色的脑袋。

En: How did you see all this. The bruises; that she was beaten?
Zh: “你是怎么看到这一切的。她被打出来的那些瘀伤？”

En: You can't see bruises through a scope. It's just a blur... He shakes his silver-grey head.
Zh: “瞄准镜可看不见瘀伤。只是一团模糊……”他摇了摇银灰色的脑袋。

En: I'm not blind, am I? He shakes his silver head.
Zh: “我又没瞎，不是吗？”他摇了摇银色的脑袋。

En: And you could see her bruises -- through the scope of a rifle?
Zh: “你可以看见她的瘀伤——通过步枪瞄准镜吗？”

En: There! He's already admitted to it! Just ask...
Zh: 有了！他已经承认了！快问……

En: If you came ten years ago, I would have killed you. He wipes his eye.
Zh: “如果十年前你来到这里，我会杀了你。”他揉了揉眼睛。

En: She did deserve a good punishing.
Zh: “她确实应该受到惩罚。”

En: I'm not like that. I don't think like that.
Zh: “我不是那样的人。我喜欢那样。”

En: I hate women too, you know.
Zh: “我也恨女人，你知道的。”

En: Men are insane. (Shake your head.)
Zh: “男人都是疯子。”（摇摇头。）

En: No one gives a *shit* what you think, the old man spits in the ash. "You and your cronies kill ten working class men a day. I've heard the statistics on Channel 8."
Zh: “没人*他妈的*在意你是怎么想的，”老人朝灰烬吐了一口唾沫。“你，还有你的狐朋狗友，一天杀了10个工人阶级的人。我听到8频道的统计资料了。”

En: He nods. "Made a little love-nest up there. Sweaty linen and bottles they would use for god knows what... I saw other men there too, but I can't be sure. Even a woman once."
Zh: 他点点头。“在那里建了个小爱巢。汗湿的亚麻布，还有不知道用来做什么的瓶子……我看见那里还有其他男人，不过我也不确定。有次甚至还见到一个女人。”

En: True, there is something bourgeois about women... He nods. "The weak are more vulnerable to exploitation by capital, unless they rise up in arms, which the likes of her..." He shakes his head.
Zh: “真的，这个女人身上有种资产阶级的气质……”他点点头。“弱者更容易受到资本的剥削，除非他们能奋起反抗，而像她那样的人……”他摇摇头。

En: You stare at them too. In your mind, Her Innocence Dei still turns to leave, airport bag in hand, silks flowing in her wake...
Zh: 你也盯着他们。在你的脑海里，无罪女王转身离开，手里拖着旅行箱，丝绸在她身后飞舞……

En: The dream...
Zh: 那个梦境……

En: This has got nothing to do with that. (Try to forget it.)
Zh: 这肯定跟那个无关。（试着忘记。）

En: It's no good, Harry. Her voice rings in the evening air. It smells of burning buildings...
Zh: 这样不好，哈里。她的声音回荡在夜风中。闻起来就像燃烧的建筑物……

En: See you tomorrow, Harry. Her voice rings in the evening air, burning...
Zh: 明天见，哈里。她的声音回荡在夜风中。闻起来就像燃烧的建筑物……

En: That kind of thing is fine by the Party so it's fine by me, but it goes to show you... He just shakes his head.
Zh: “那种党派觉得可以的事，在我这里也没问题。不过它会告诉你……”他只是摇摇头。

En: A red haired woman? Ruby...
Zh: “一个红发女人？露比……”

En: *Twisted* by psychopharmaceuticals, alcohol, and the class interests of the bourgeoisie. They all are -- women nowadays... He raises his eyes from the ashes.
Zh: “被精神药物，酒精和资产阶级的利益*扭曲*。他们全都是——现在的女人啊……”他抬起凝视着灰烬的眼睛。

En: The world is insane... He raises his gaze. Something glimmers in there. Then it's gone.
Zh: “这个世界疯了……”他抬起双眼，里面有什么东西在闪烁。然后又消失不见。

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: The old man raises his gaze. Something glimmers in the corner of his black eye...
Zh: 老人抬起双眼。黑色的眼角有什么东西在闪烁……

En: A bitter taste on his tongue.
Zh: 他的舌尖尝到一种苦涩。

En: A red haired woman? Ruby...
Zh: “一个红发女人？露比……”

En: Let it be.
Zh: 随它去吧。

En: That kind of thing is fine by the Party so it's fine by me. But it goes to show you... He just shakes his head.
Zh: “对于康米党来说没问题的事情，在我这里也没问题。不过这只意味着……”他摇摇头。

En: Safe and sound, sire. Surely you have not misplaced the witness.
Zh: 安然无恙，大人。您一定没有把目击证人放错地方。

En: She got away. We don't know where she is.
Zh: “她走了。我们不知道她在哪。”

En: She got away. I don't know where she is.
Zh: “她走了。我不知道她在哪。”

En: We arrested her. (Lie.)
Zh: “我们逮捕了她。”（撒谎。）

En: I arrested her. (Lie.)
Zh: “我逮捕了她。”（撒谎。）

En: We arrested her.
Zh: “我们逮捕了她。”

En: I arrested her.
Zh: “我逮捕了她。”

En: I am not at liberty to say.
Zh: “我不能随便乱说。”

En: She got away, but she led us here first. She figured out someone was watching her from the seafort.
Zh: “她走了，不过在那之前，她指引我们来到了这里。她发现有人在海堡里观察她。”

En: She got away, but she led me here first. She figured out someone was watching her from the seafort.
Zh: “她走了，不过在那之前，她指引我来到了这里。她发现有人在海堡里观察她。”

En: Gone... He looks to the city and nods: "I knew it. She kept staring into the scope this last week. At the island, like she knew...." He sighs.
Zh: “走了……”他看着城市，点点头。“我知道。上周她一直盯着瞄准镜看。看着这座岛，就好像她知道……”他叹了口气。

En: Good for her... He looks to the city and nods: "That girl kept staring into the scope, you know -- in the end. This last week, kept staring at the island..."
Zh: “对她来说是好事……”他看着城市，点点头。“那女孩一直盯着瞄准镜看，你知道吗——在最后。最后那一周，一直盯着岛上看……”

En: Locked up with your masters, like I'll be... maybe we'll meet? He looks to the city. "She kept staring into the scope, you know -- in the end. Like she *knew*."
Zh: “和你的主人关在一起，我也会那样……也许我们会见面？”他看着城市。“她一直盯着瞄准镜看，你知道吗——在最后。好像她已经*知道*了。”

En: I know she's gone. He looks to the city. "Locked up, or on the run.... She kept staring into the scope, you know. In the end, this last week. At the fort. Like she *knew*."
Zh: “我知道她走了。”他看着城市。“被关起来了，或者逃跑了……她一直盯着瞄准镜看，你知道吗。在最后，最后那一周。看着碉堡。好像她已经*知道*了。”

En: You saw through her? So did I.
Zh: “你看透她了？我也是。”

En: Why did you?
Zh: “你为什么要这样做？”

En: I was there one night and she was crying. Like a child, in the corner of her room -- on the floor. I'd never seen her do that before.
Zh: “有天晚上我在那里，听到她在哭泣。像个孩子，蜷缩在房间的角落--在地板上。我之前从没见过她这个样子。”

En: You're delusional. There's nothing to *see* in the soul of the bourgeois woman. It's the same as the surface -- sick hedonism and desperation.
Zh: “这是你的妄想。资产阶级女性的灵魂里没有什么可以*看*的。跟表面一模一样——病态的享乐主义和绝望。”

En: The lieutenant nods at you, in acknowledgement.
Zh: 警督会意地朝你点点头。

En: Where is she... that *Klaasje*? The old man looks at you. "I haven't seen her there for days."\n
Zh: 老人看着你，突然记起了什么：“她在哪……那个*卡拉洁*？我有几天没见过她了。”

En: Where is she? The old man looks at you. "I haven't seen her there for days."
Zh: 老人看着你，突然记起了什么：“她在哪？我有几天没见过她了。”

En: Her... He repeats, staring at the ashes -- then at the reeds. There's a twitch in the corner of his eye.
Zh: “她……”他重复到，凝视着灰烬——然后是芦苇丛。眼角有什么东西在抽搐。

En: You hear a low frequency hiss, barely beneath the audible spectrum. Then it's gone.
Zh: 你听见一阵低频率的嘶嘶声，勉强在听觉频谱之内。然后就消失了。

En: You hear a low frequency hiss, barely. Beneath the audible spectrum. Then it's gone.
Zh: 你听见一阵低频率的嘶嘶声，很勉强。在听觉频谱之内。然后就消失了。

En: That's it. Motive. We have it.
Zh: 就是这个。动机。找到了。

En: It was about bitches. The boy nods grimly.
Zh: “是关于那个婊子的，”男孩严肃地点点头。

En: There -- motive, detective. We have it.
Zh: 有了——动机，警探。找到了。

En: At night, crying or smoking on the roof. Like she knew I was here... He says to no one in particular: "It doesn't matter."
Zh: “在晚上，哭泣，或者是在屋顶抽烟。她好像知道我在这里……”他没有刻意对任何人说的样子：“没关系的。”

En: Staring at the island, the fort, like she knew I was here... He adds, to no one in particular: "It doesn't matter."
Zh: “凝视着小岛，要塞，她好像知道我在这里……”他加了一句，没有刻意对任何人说：“没关系的。”

En: Look east...
Zh: 看向东边……

En: Shake it off.
Zh: 摆脱它。

En: Inside, in a cell, a young woman is withdrawing from amphetamines, barbiturates and alcohol. Shivering, she fades from your mind's eye...
Zh: 一间牢房里，一个年轻女子正在戒断安非他命，巴比妥和酒精。她颤抖着，从你的心眼中慢慢消失……

En: There, on a dilapidated jetty in a nameless village, two police officers and one special consultant look across a narrow strip of sea. The ruins of a seafort stick out of the water, built by Filippe II, re-appropriated by the Commune, then lost in the Landing...
Zh: 在一个无名村庄的废弃码头，两名警察和一个特别顾问隔着一条狭长的海面眺望。一座海堡探出水面，那是菲利普国王二世建造的，后来被公社另作他用，最后消失在登陆行动中……

En: He's there, doing... *what* exactly I don't know, Satellite-Officer Vicquemare points at the ruins. "Behind that anti-aircraft-something. That's why we can't see him."
Zh: “他在那里，做着……我也不知道*到底*在做什么。”随迁警官维克玛指向废墟。“在那个防空什么的背后。所以我们看不见他。”

En: Special consultant  Heidelstam is optimistic: "We'll see the boat when he comes. Let's go get a coffee until then. I know this interesting little place, where..." His voice trails off as the three walk down the jetty.
Zh: 特别顾问特兰特·海德斯塔姆比较乐观：“等他来的时候，我们就能看见船了。在那之前，我们先去喝杯咖啡吧。我知道一个有意思的小地方，那里……”三人离开码头，他的声音也渐渐消失。

En: We could get more... the lieutenant uses the opportunity to tell you -- in a lowered voice. "We've got him talking..."
Zh: “我们可以挖出更多消息……”警督乘机对你说到——声音压低了一些。“我们已经让他开口了……”

En: She'd look -- at night, crying or smoking on the roof -- staring right into me... He adds, to no one in particular: "It doesn't matter."
Zh: “她会看着——在晚上，在阳台上哭泣或者抽烟——直直地盯着我看……”他加了一句，没有刻意对任何人说：“没关系的。”

En: Like she *knew* I was here... He adds, to no one in particular: "It doesn't matter."
Zh: “她好像*知道*我在这里……”他加了一句，没有刻意对任何人说：“没关系的。”

En: Across the harbour, on the banks of the River Esperance, cold rain falls on Precinct 57 -- a two story box of duraluminum near the gates to Terminal H.
Zh: 穿过港口，在埃斯佩兰斯河岸，冰冷的雨滴坠落在57分局——那是一栋两层高的方形杜拉铝建筑，靠近H中转站的大门。

En: Across the harbour, on the South bank of the River Esperance, white snow falls on a two story box of duraluminum. Precinct 57, near the gates to Terminal H.
Zh: 穿过港口，在埃斯佩兰斯河的南岸，雪花飘落在一栋两层高的方形杜拉铝建筑上，靠近H中转站的大门。

En: Across the harbour, on the South bank of the River Esperance, the air stands still outside Precinct 57 -- a two story box of duraluminum near the gates to Terminal H.
Zh: 穿过港口，在埃斯佩兰斯河的南岸，57分局外面的空气静止不动——那是一栋两层高的方形杜拉铝建筑，靠近H中转站的大门。

En: Inside, in a cell, a young woman is withdrawing from amphetamines, barbiturates and alcohol. All at once. While two men in brown suits wave ICP badges at a young policeman. She hears the door open...
Zh: 一间牢房里，一个年轻女子正在戒断安非他命，巴比妥和酒精。一次性的。两个身穿棕色西服的男子向一名年轻警官挥舞着ICP的徽章。她听见门打开的声音……

En: ...and knows it's over. They've come for her. Outside the dusk gathers, the river  flows by, gold and orange into the Bay of Martinaise.
Zh: ……知道一切都结束了。他们是冲着她来的。屋外，暮色渐浓，河水流淌而过——金色和橙色的河水汇入马丁内斯海湾。

En: ...and knows it's over. They've come for her. Outside night falls, the river flows by, treacle black into the Bay of Martinaise.
Zh: ……知道一切都结束了。他们是冲着她来的。屋外，夜幕降临，河水流淌而过，浓稠如黑色的糖浆，汇入马丁内斯海湾。

En: ...and knows it's over. They've come for her. Outside it's springtime, the river  flows blue and green into the Bay of Martinaise.
Zh: ……知道一切都结束了。他们是冲着她来的。屋外，春日正浓，河水流淌而过，蓝绿相间，汇入马丁内斯海湾。

En: Smaller. Distant. Hidden. Not like the great chandelier she sees sparkle in the dusk below her. Streets, towers, tenements and cold water; and across the water -- a dark strip of ruins barely visible, if she didn't squint her eyes...
Zh: 越变越小。越来越远。隐匿不见。不像她看见的那个巨大吊灯，在她下方的暮色中闪闪发光。街道，高塔，房屋和冰冷的水；水的对岸——只有眯起眼睛，她才能勉强看见一片黑暗的废墟……

En: On the platform a young woman is withdrawing from amphetamines, barbiturates and alcohol. Yet still she smiles among the crowd, fading from your mind's eye...
Zh: 月台上，一个年轻女子正在戒断安非他命、巴比妥和酒精。不过她依然在人群中微笑，从你的心眼中慢慢消失……

En: On the platform a young woman is withdrawing from amphetamines, barbiturates and alcohol. Yet still she smiles among the crowd, among the great ghost of the city she's leaving -- for another, far south.
Zh: 月台上，一个年轻女子正在戒断安非他命、巴比妥和酒精。不过她依然在人群中，在这座城市的巨大幽影中微笑。她即将离开这里——前往另一个地方，前往遥远的南方。

En: Smaller. Distant. Hidden. Not like the great chandelier she sees sparkle in the night below her. Street lights, towers, tenements and water -- and across it, a dark strip of ruins barely visible, if she didn't squint her eyes...
Zh: 越变越小。越来越远。隐匿不见。不像她看见的那个巨大吊灯，在她下方的夜色中闪闪发光。街道，高塔，房屋和冰冷的水；水的对岸——只有眯起眼睛，她才能勉强看见一片黑暗的废墟……

En: Smaller. Distant. Hidden. Not like the great chandelier she sees sparkle in the spring air below her. Streets and towers, tenements and water -- and across it, a dark strip of ruins barely visible, if she didn't squint her eyes...
Zh: 越变越小。越来越远。隐匿不见。不像她看见的那个巨大吊灯，在她下方的春光中闪闪发光。街道，高塔，房屋和冰冷的水；水的对岸——只有眯起眼睛，她才能勉强看见一片黑暗的废墟……

En: Look north...
Zh: 看向北边……

En: Midtown, across the bay of Revachol. Cold rain falls on forty-story towers. Above them -- Lausanne Central Aerodrome; a cocoon suspended in the grey sky by a web of suspension wiring, encircled by hybrid aircraft.
Zh: 市中心，越过瑞瓦肖水湾。冰冷的雨滴坠落在一栋四层高的塔楼上。在那上方——是洛桑中心机场；就像一个被悬丝网牵扯的魔茧，悬浮在灰色的天空中，周身被混合动力飞机所包围。

En: Shake it off.
Zh: 摆脱它。

En: Midtown, across the bay of Revachol. Snow falls on forty-story towers. Above them -- Lausanne Central Aerodrome; a cocoon suspended in the snowy sky by a web of suspension wiring, encircled by hybrid aircraft.
Zh: 市中心，越过瑞瓦肖水湾。雪花飘落在一栋四层高的塔楼上。在那上方——是洛桑中心机场；就像一个被悬丝网牵扯的魔茧，悬浮在灰色的天空中，周身被混合动力飞机所包围。

En: Midtown, across the bay of Revachol. The oceanic wind washes forty-story towers. Above them -- Lausanne Central Aerodrome; a cocoon suspended in the sky by a web of suspension wiring, encircled by hybrid aircraft.
Zh: 市中心，越过瑞瓦肖水湾。海风吹拂着一栋四层高的塔楼。在那上方——是洛桑中心机场；就像一个被悬丝网牵扯的魔茧，悬浮在灰色的天空中，周身被混合动力飞机所包围。

En: Good bye, Martinaise.
Zh: 再见了，马丁内斯。

En: Across the water, on a dilapidated jetty in a nameless village -- made of grey cinder block houses with eternite roofs -- two police officers and one special consultant look across a narrow strip of sea.
Zh: 越过水面，在一个无名村庄的废弃码头——村子里满是灰色的亘石屋顶的煤渣砖房——两名警察和一个特别顾问隔着一条狭长的海面眺望。

En: As the men go, Patrol Officer Minot looks back over her shoulder -- at the crumbling fortification in the rain, like a rotten tooth rising out of the water...
Zh: 两人逐渐走远，巡警茱蒂特·迈诺特回头张望——那在风雨中摇摇欲坠的要塞，就像一颗浮出水面的烂牙……

En: As the men go, Patrol Officer Minot looks back over her shoulder -- at the crumbling fortification in the snowfall, like a rotten tooth rising out of the water...
Zh: 两人逐渐走远，巡警茱蒂特·迈诺特回头张望——那在漫天白雪中摇摇欲坠的要塞，就像一颗浮出水面的烂牙……

En: As the men go, Patrol Officer Minot looks back over her shoulder -- at the crumbling fortification, like a rotten tooth rising out of the water...
Zh: 两人逐渐走远，巡警茱蒂特·迈诺特回头张望——那个摇摇欲坠的要塞，就像一颗浮出水面的烂牙……

En: Good luck, Harry, she thinks. You need something *good* for this...
Zh: 祝你好运，哈里，她想到。你需要一些*好*发现……

En: The old man falls silent. Staring at your feet, the burnt logs.
Zh: 老人陷入沉默。他先是看了看你的脚，然后看向烧焦的木块。

En: You could get more out of him... He likes talking.
Zh: 你可以从他嘴里问出更多东西……他喜欢说话。

En: *Enough*. Take him in. Bend his arms behind his back and end this.
Zh: *够了*。逮捕他。把他的双手押在背后，结束这一切。

En: Who knows what he's seen and done over the years?
Zh: 谁知道这些年来他都看到些什么，又做了些什么？

En: Barely alive. They like to kill while they're on their drugs. After the landing, in the burning years I would take shots at them, *end* them. The worst ones. If I had a bullet to spare.
Zh: “苟且偷生。他们吸毒以后喜欢杀人。登陆之后，在那些燃烧的岁月里，我会朝他们开枪，*了结*他们。最糟糕的那些。如果我还有一颗多余的子弹。”

En: I could see they've returned now. To show their real face -- the face they don't dare show their bourgeois voters back on Mundi, with their families and polyester clothes...
Zh: “我看见现在他们又回来了。露出他们的真实面目——那些不敢在蒙迪的资产阶级选民面前展露的面孔，跟他们的家人在一起，还有涤纶衣裳……”

En: Rich hag?
Zh: “有钱的女巫？”

En: Wrinkled up whore, he nods.
Zh: “皱皱巴巴的婊子，”他点点头。

En: What is it with these *whores* and *pederasts*... aren't you a communist?
Zh: “你满嘴的*婊子*和*同性恋*是怎么回事，你不是个康米主义者吗？”

En: Whore. Good strong word. I use it often myself.
Zh: “婊子。这是个很好很有力量的词语。我自己也经常用。”

En: Yes, he nods enthusiastically. "Old-fashioned."
Zh: “是的，”他热情地点点头。“过时了。”

En: Lax sexual morals are a bourgeois ploy, he gargles a spit ball. "As to pederasty, the Party legalized it in '04. My Party, not your liberal masters." He spits it out on the dying coals.
Zh: “宽松的性道德是资产阶级的策略，”他吐了一口唾沫。“至于同性恋，党派在04年的时候就把它合法化了。我的党派，不是你那些自由主义派的主子。”他把唾沫吐在了快要熄灭的木炭上。

En: So don't you sermonize me, you racist shithole. He adds. "It's still bourgeois when the bourgeois does it. Fiddling with their sexual organs..."
Zh: “所以不要对我说教，你这个种族主义混球。”他补充到。“不过资产阶级这么做的时候，那还是资产阶级的。摆弄着他们的性器官……”

En: Some strange glandular process takes place in him at the thought. Like yeast rising...
Zh: 一想到这里，他体内的腺体发生了某种奇怪的变化。就像酵母在上升……

En: An anger too, in addition to loneliness.
Zh: 除了孤独之外，还有愤怒。

En: Khm, the lieutenant coughs.
Zh: “咳咳，”警督咳嗽了几声。

En: The old man has fallen silent, staring at your feet. The burnt logs in the fire are moist from the sea air.
Zh: 老人陷入沉默，凝视着你的脚下。火中烧焦的木块因为海风变得潮湿。

En: She had different colour hair on the photo -- and glasses. *Forged*. Some sort of sordid, bourgeois affair. I've heard about this kind of thing on the radio...
Zh: “相片上她的头发颜色不一样，还戴着眼镜。*伪造*的。某种卑鄙的、资产阶级的事务。我在收音机里听到过这种事情……”

En: Joyce... he means Joyce again.
Zh: 乔伊斯……他又提到了乔伊斯。

En: This is the so-called soucriant again, right? Joyce?
Zh: “这又是关于那个所谓的邪恶女巫的，对吧？乔伊斯吗？”

En: You mean the Wild Pines representative again, right?
Zh: “你说的还是野松公司的代表，对吗？”

En: Did you keep the documents in it?
Zh: “你把文件放在里面了吗？”

En: Did you keep the materials?
Zh: “材料在你这里吗？”

En: Yeah. Cuno nods knowingly. "The lightning gets shit going. Speedfreaks fuckin' in the bushes..."
Zh: “是的。”坤诺机警地点点头。“闪电丸能让你坚持下去。瘾君子在灌木丛里瞎搞……”

En: You climbed, right? You *climbed* behind her window, like the CRAB-MAN?
Zh: “你爬上去的，对吧？你*爬到*她的窗户背后，像蟹男一样？”

En: You've been through some secret route shit, huh? *Inside* the Whirling-in-Rags, creepin' around?
Zh: “你用过秘密通道，哈？在褴褛飞旋*里面*，偷偷摸摸？”

En: I've been through *all* of Martinaise -- every nook and cranny.
Zh: “我去过马丁内斯的*所有*地方——每一个角落和缝隙。”

En: Yeah, but that one too, right? Secret Whirling shit?
Zh: “是啊，不过那个也是，对吗？飞旋旅社的秘密通道什么的？”

En: We can totally get more out of him... the kid whispers. "He's squeelin'..."
Zh: “我们完全可以从他嘴里多问点东西……”男孩低语到。“他想告密……”

En: Someone must have known about it though. Maybe there's some secret to approaching it? I have no idea... I've never heard of a species like that.
Zh: “不过，肯定有人知道它。也许靠近它有什么秘密？我不知道……我从没听说过这样的物种。”

En: Cuno doesn't know anything about it, though. Except you stink bad, which is why it left you.
Zh: “不过坤诺什么都不知道。坤诺只知道你臭死了，所以它会离开你。”

En: I'll wait. I'm on standby, he thinks, his hands sweaty around the machine.
Zh: 我会等。我会严阵以待，他想到，他放在机器边的手全是汗。

En: Looks like someone's got hurt in a fight. This antennae is much smaller than the other one.
Zh: 看来有人在战斗中受伤了。这只触须比另一只要小很多。

En: Blink. (Quick.)
Zh: 眨眼。（很快。）

En: Please do not do that again.
Zh: 请不要再这样做了。

En: Of all the creatures I've met you are the most beautiful.
Zh: 在我见过的所有生物当中，你是最美丽的那一个。

En: What woman?
Zh: 什么女人？

En: You cannot lie to me. Behind you it smells of fires. So awfully far you were prepared to go in her presence. End it.
Zh: 你没办法对我说谎的。你身后有火焰的味道。如此遥远，而你已经准备好当着她的面离去。结束这一切。

En: Yes. For me everything is *always* normal. God is in his heaven -- everything is normal on Earth.
Zh: 是的。对于我来说，一切*总是*普通而寻常的。神明待在他的天堂里——地球上的一切平平无奇。

En: In the reeds, where the phasmid was hiding, you see a little flash of white -- porcelain white.
Zh: 在芦苇丛里，竹节虫躲藏的地方，你看见一道白光——陶瓷一般的白色。

En: He cannot believe what he's saying too much.
Zh: 他不敢相信自己居然说了这么多话。

En: In the reeds, where the phasmid was hiding, you see a little flash of white -- *porcelain* white.
Zh: 在芦苇丛里，竹节虫躲藏的地方，你看见一道白光——*陶瓷*一般的白色。

En: In some kind of strange, semi-catatonic state.
Zh: 处于某种奇怪的、半紧张性精神症的状态。

En: It looks like the insect had some kind of nest there, look... Maybe it has left *some* proof...
Zh: “看起来那只昆虫好像在那边有个巢穴，看……也许它留下了*某种*证据……”

En: Our suspect is not looking so good. We need to check on him -- also... He points to the reeds.
Zh: “我们的嫌疑人看起来不太好。我们应该看看他——还有，”他指向芦苇丛。

En: What now... the old man behind you repeats suddenly. He's put his hand into the ash -- it's dirty and black.
Zh: “现在怎么做……”你身后的老人突然复述到。他把手伸进灰烬里——它又脏又黑。

En: Our suspect is not looking so good. We need to check on him.
Zh: “我们的嫌疑人看起来不太好。我们应该看看他。”

En: What now... the old man behind you says suddenly. He's put his hand into the ash -- it's dirty and black.
Zh: “现在怎么做……”你身后的老人突然复述到。他把手伸进灰烬里——它又脏又黑。

En: In some kind of strange, semi-catatonic state.
Zh: 处于某种奇怪的、半紧张性精神症的状态。

En: In the reeds, where he's pointing, you see a flash of white -- *porcelain* white.
Zh: 顺着他手指的方向，你在芦苇丛中看到一道白光——*陶瓷*一般的白色。

En: Yo, our suspect's not looking so good. We need to check on him -- also, he points to the reeds.
Zh: “喂，我们的嫌疑人看起来不太好。我们应该检查一下他——还有，”他指向芦苇丛。

En: It looks like the phasmid had some kind of *nest* there -- look. Like a hoard, man...
Zh: “看来竹节虫在那边好像有个*窝*——看。像个宝库，老兄……”

En: Yeah, grandpa's not looking so good. We need to check on him...
Zh: “是啊，老头子看起来不太好。我们得去看看他……”

En: Relax. Now that you *know* it's here -- how long can it hide?
Zh: 放松。既然你*知道*它在这里——它还能藏多久呢？

En: Now that you know it exists -- you can get it another day. It can't hide forever...
Zh: 既然你知道它的存在——改天还可以再去找它。它不可能永远藏起来的……

En: Look! In the reeds, where the phasmid was hiding -- you see a little flash of white -- porcelain white. In a nest of some sort?
Zh: 看！在芦苇丛里，竹节虫躲藏的地方——你看见一道白光——陶瓷一般的白色。也许是某种巢穴？

En: In some kind of strange, semi-catatonic state. He's not looking so good.
Zh: 处于某种奇怪的、半紧张性精神症的状态。

En: What now... the old man behind you repeats suddenly. He withdraws his hand from the ash -- it's dirty and black.
Zh: “现在怎么做……”你身后的老人突然复述到。他把手从灰烬里抽了出来——它又脏又黑。

En: (Yell.) "No!"
Zh: （大叫。）“不要！”

En: Yo, we just saw a giant fucking insect, okay? Focus on that, not some... He looks around. "Where'd it go?"
Zh: “哟，我们刚刚才看见一只该死的大昆虫，好吗？集中一点，别注意什么……”他四下看了看。“它去哪了？”

En: I shouldn't have taken a bath, the pheromone washed off!
Zh: “我不该洗澡的，费洛蒙都被冲掉了！”

En: Damn it! Damn it! I didn't get it right... [Leave in rage.]
Zh: “该死！该死！我没弄好……”[愤怒地离开。]

En: It *definitely* had something to do with that! It was repelled by you, as if it was scared.
Zh: *绝对*跟那个有关！它被你驱赶了，好像是吓到了。

En: Your voice echoes alone on the water. The kid looks at you...
Zh: 水面上只有你的回音。小孩看着你……

En: I don't understand... I *had* the pheromone....
Zh: “我不明白……我*喷了*费洛蒙……”

En: Yeah, yeah right there -- it doesn't like bein' out in the open. Shifty fuck. It's gone now, but... He pants. "Wow."
Zh: “是啊，就在那里——看起来不经常在外面活动。他妈的够狡猾的。现在它走了，不过……”他喘着粗气。“哇哦。”

En: I think it went into the reeds there, on that islet... (Point North.)
Zh: “我觉得它跑进那边的芦苇丛了，就在那座小岛上……”（指向北方。）

En: I should have taken the pheromone from Morell!
Zh: “我应该从莫雷尔那里拿走费洛蒙的！”

En: Damn, we should have helped the cryptozoologists.
Zh: “该死，我们应该帮那些神秘动物学家的。”

En: Cuno doesn't know what that means -- Cuno just knows it was FUCKING GIANT. Holy hell...
Zh: “坤诺不明白你什么意思——坤诺只知道那玩意真他妈大。真他妈见鬼了……”

En: I could have learned something about the phasmid's behaviour. Searched for it with them.
Zh: “我本来可以了解一些竹节虫的习性。跟他们一起寻找。”

En: Damn, I didn't know it would be *connected* to the case...
Zh: “该死，我不知道这会跟案子*有关*……”

En: Man, quit beatin' yourself down, we just discovered a GIANT INSECT. Ain't no one done that... He looks across the water.
Zh: “伙计，别怪自己了，我们刚刚发现了一只巨大的昆虫。可没人做到过……”他望向对岸。

En: Yeah, cryptologist, exactly! Those are the fucks who study them. This is *unreal*, man... He runs out of breath.
Zh: “是啊，没错，神秘动物学家！研究他们的那些蠢蛋。这真是太*假了*，老兄……”他跑的下气不接下气。

En: He must be *really* out of it, yelling like that. Well, at least he's *alive*.... Officer Minot in the blue uniform frowns: "Jean, maybe something *happened*? He's in distress..."
Zh: “那样大喊大叫，他怕是*真的*昏了头。呃，至少他还*活着*……”身穿蓝色制服的迈诺特警官皱起眉头：“让，也许*出什么事*了？他陷入困境了……”

En: Three-hundred metres inland special consultant Trant Heidelstam cups his ear. Satellite-Officer Vicquemare nods to him on the jetty: "I heard it."
Zh: 内陆300米的地方，特别顾问特兰特·海德斯塔姆竖起耳朵。随迁警官维克玛站在码头上朝他点点头：“我听见了。”

En: What now? (Continue.)
Zh: “现在怎么办？”（继续。）

En: Where did it go? (Look North.) Can *you* see it?"
Zh: “它去哪了？”（望向北边。）“*你*能看见吗？”

En: Between the reeds there -- it doesn't like bein' out in the open. Shifty fuck... I saw it slip in there. It's gone now, but... He pants. "Wow."
Zh: “就在那边的芦苇丛里——看起来不经常在外面活动。他妈的够狡猾的……我看见它滑过去的。现在它走了，不过……”他喘着粗气。“哇哦。”

En: There was a pheromone -- like an ox-spray. I had to have it on and I didn't.
Zh: “有一种费洛蒙——就像公牛喷雾。我应该喷在身上的，但是我没有。”

En: The fuck -- *pherone*? Man, this ain't about no phermone! This is about the *phasmid*. Did you *see* the size of that?!
Zh: “什么狗屁*——费洛*？老兄，这跟那玩意根本没关系！我们说的可是*竹节虫*。你*看见*它的大小了吗？！”

En: There's a big smile on his lips, like he can't believe what he's saying: "We fucking *saw* it, yo -- it was real."
Zh: 他大大地咧开嘴笑了，仿佛他也不相信自己在说什么：“我们他妈的*看见*它了，哟——它是真的。”

En: What in the name of *god* was that?
Zh: “看在*老天爷*的份上，那到底是什么？”

En: You're right. It was GIANT.
Zh: “你说得对。真的巨大。”

En: Damn right, we just discovered a GIANT INSECT. Ain't no one done that... He looks across the water.
Zh: “这他妈的就对了，我们刚刚发现了一只巨大的昆虫。可没人做到过……”他望向对岸。

En: Relax. Now that you *know* it's here -- how long can it hide?
Zh: 放松。既然你*知道*它在这里——它还能藏多久呢？

En: He's right. Dust yourself off and move on. There will be other chances.
Zh: 他说得对。振作起来，继续前进。还会有机会的。

En: We'll find it again, man. We'll get it, junior officer Cuno thinks. We'll fuckin' nail that phasmid one day.
Zh: 我们还会找到它的，老兄。我们可以的，初级警员坤诺想到。总有一天，我们他妈的一定会搞定那只竹节虫。

En: How did it *do* that? Glide?
Zh: “它是怎么*做到*的？滑翔吗？”

En: Damn... Cuno's read about that shit in a *book*. Cuno's booked that shit. That was, like, a secret animal. Like one of those they *think* is real but haven't seen. The Insulindian phasmid...
Zh: “该死……坤诺在*书里*看到过这狗屁玩意。好像是，什么，神秘动物。就是那种别人*以为*是真的，但是没人见过的那种。伊苏林迪竹节虫……”

En: You know who would know more -- a cryptozoologist!
Zh: 你知道谁知道的更多——神秘动物学家！

En: A cryptozoologist? Oh god, there was one...
Zh: 神秘动物学？天啦，真有一个……

En: Yeah, it walked on water, like a water spider, or like -- one of those water walkers... He's lost for words, just pants from excitement. "This cop-shit is *insane*."
Zh: “是啊，它能在水面上走，像是一只水蜘蛛，或者……那种水上漂……”他激动地话都说不出来了。“当警察真尼玛太*疯狂*了。”

En: The cryptozoologist! There was one in the bar. Maybe she knew something?
Zh: “神秘动物学家！酒吧里有一个。也许她知道些什么？”

En: Okay, yes, you're probably right. I won't panic.
Zh: “好吧，是的，也许你是对的。我不会恐慌的。”

En: Who's gonna believe this?
Zh: “谁会相信呢？”

En: And you'll see it again. Now that you *know* it's real, how long can it hide?
Zh: 你还会见到它的。既然你已经*知道*它是真的，它还能藏多久呢？

En: *Everyone*, yo! We gotta tell the *world* about this. Case solved -- insect found. We're fuckin'... master detectives or some shit. We're *good*.
Zh: “*所有人*，哟哟哟！我们把这个告诉*全世界*。案子解决了——昆虫找到了。我们他妈的是……大侦探或者什么的。我们很*厉害*。”

En: He's truly satisfied with your performance in Death Island right now.
Zh: 现在他是真心为你在死亡岛上的表现感到满意。

En: What now... the old man behind you says suddenly. He's put his hand into the ash -- it's dirty and black.
Zh: “现在怎么做……”你身后的老人突然复述到。他把手伸进灰烬里——它又脏又黑。

En: In some kind of strange, semi-catatonic state.
Zh: 处于某种奇怪的、半紧张性精神症的状态。

En: Our suspect's not looking so good. We need to check on him -- also, man... he points to the reeds.
Zh: “我们的嫌疑人看起来不太好。我们应该检查一下他——还有，”他指向芦苇丛。

En: In the reeds, where he's pointing, you see a flash of white -- *porcelain* white.
Zh: 在芦苇丛里，竹节虫躲藏的地方，你看见一道白光——*陶瓷*一般的白色。

En: It looks like the insect had some kind of *nest* there -- look. Like a hoard, or some shit...
Zh: “看来竹节虫在那边好像有个*窝*——看。像个宝库，老兄……”

En: The air moves through it. Its slender sticks.
Zh: 空气从中穿过，细长的节肢。

En: I should have taken the pheromone from Morell!
Zh: “我应该从莫雷尔那里拿走费洛蒙的！”

En: The creature stands on long stilt-like legs, antennae hanging from its head like a woman's hair -- white and curled at the tips. It is no more than five steps away from you.
Zh: 那个生物站立着，长长的腿像踩着高跷，触须从它头上垂落，就像女人的发丝——白色的，顶端有些卷曲。它离你不超过5步远。

En: The segmented antennae move with apprehension, searching for something... you.
Zh: 节状的触须带着恐惧移动着，像是在寻找着什么……你。

En: Take long, deep breaths. Slow down your pulse. Don't move yet, and when you do -- be light as a feather.
Zh: 长长地深吸一口气。放缓你的脉搏。先不要动，等到动的时候——动作要像羽毛一样轻。

En: (Whisper.) "That's the..."
(Whisper.) "This is the Insulindian phasmid."
Zh: （低语。）“这就是伊苏林迪竹节虫。”

En: Approach carefully.
Zh: 小心翼翼地靠近。

En: Pheromones washed off.
Zh: 费洛蒙被洗掉了。

En: IT EXISTS!
Zh: 它真的存在！

En: Lena's childhood experience.
Zh: 莉娜的童年经历。

En: Shaved after pheromones.
Zh: 喷了费洛蒙之后剃过胡子。

En: Your corpse will be marked by stars
Zh: 你的尸体将会标上星星

En: The miracle, way out in the west
Zh: 奇迹，远在西边

En: Laid the pheromone on THICK.
Zh: 厚厚地涂上费洛蒙

En: The hiss is different from the strings you heard before. It says something *else*, in a lower pitch...
Zh: 这阵嘶嘶声跟你之前听见的弦乐器不太一样。它在诉说*别的*什么东西，以一种更加低沉的音调……

En: Listen carefully...
Zh: 仔细听……

En: Sssss-hsssss-tik-ssssss-hssss-tik...
Zh: 嘶嘶嘶嘶嘶-吱吱吱吱-滴滴-嘶嘶-吱吱吱吱-滴滴……

En: You smell...
Zh: 你闻了闻……

En: Tik-tik-tik... hisss... tik-tik-tik... hisss....
Zh: 滴滴-滴滴-滴滴……嘶嘶嘶嘶……滴滴-滴滴-滴滴……嘶嘶嘶嘶……

En: Be afraid. You smell wrong.
Zh: 畏惧。你的味道不对。

En: It is, the lieutenant whispers behind you. You hear the familiar ring of his jacket unzipping -- slowly. Painstakingly so...
Zh: “是的，”警督在你背后低语。你听见夹克拉链拉开时那熟悉的声音——慢慢地，轻轻地。特别费力……

En: You glance over your shoulder. The lieutenant holds a piece of milled aluminium. He begins to pull it open, extremely carefully -- it's the camera!
Zh: 你回头看了一眼。警督手中拿着一个滚花铝块。他非常小心地把它拉开——它是一个相机！

En: You glance over your shoulder. The lieutenant holds a piece of milled aluminium. He begins to pull it open, extremely carefully...
Zh: 你回头看了一眼。警督手中拿着一个滚花铝块。他开始把它拉开，动作非常小心……

En: No! The flash will scare the creature off! Warn him NOW!
Zh: 不！闪光灯会吓跑那个生物的！马上警告他！

En: No! The flash will scare the creature. Warn him NOW!
Zh: 不！闪光灯会吓到那个生物的！马上警告他！

En: Looks like camera! Yes!
Zh: 看起来像是相机！太好了！

En: (Whisper.) "It sounds like a weapon, Kim. It won't like that."
Zh: （低语。）“它的声音像武器一样，金。它不会喜欢的。”

En: Kim... (Whisper.) "The flash is loud. It won't like that."
Zh: “金……”（低语。）“闪光灯太响了。它不会喜欢的。”

En: (Whisper) "Are you sure you won't scare it off?"
Zh: （低语。）“你确定它不会被吓跑吗？”

En: (Point to it.) "What is that?"
Zh: （指向它。）“那是什么？”

En: My camera.
Zh: “我的相机。”

En: No! The sound of the flash will scare the creature off. Warn him NOW!
Zh: 不！闪光的声音会把生物吓跑的。马上警告他！

En: We *need* a photo -- no one will believe us. He continues to pull the lens open...
Zh: “我们*需要*一张相片——没人会相信我们的。”他继续拉开镜头……

En: We need a photo -- or no one will believe us. He continues to pull the lens open...
Zh: “我们需要一张相片——不然没人会相信我们的。”他继续拉开镜头……

En: From the corner of your eye, you see a sudden cascade of motion ripple through the phasmid's limbs. A series of ultrasonic clicks fills your ear...\n
Zh: 通过眼角的余光，你看见一连串突然的动作传送到竹节虫的节肢。一连串的超声波滴答声充满了你的耳朵……

En: From the corner of your eye, you see a sudden cascade of motion ripple through the insect's limbs. A series of ultrasonic clicks fills your ear...
Zh: 通过眼角的余光，你看见一连串突然的动作传送到昆虫的节肢。一连串的超声波滴答声充满了你的耳朵……

En: I am not palatable. Do not eat me. I am afraid.
Zh: 我不好吃。别吃我。我很害怕。

En: Okay, take the picture.
Zh: “好吧，照相吧。”

En: It's afraid. Stop *now*.
Zh: “它在害怕。*现在*就停下。”

En: Stop. Let me approach it first.
Zh: “打住。让我先靠近一点。”

En: With the sound of metal sliding against metal, the lieutenant reveals the lens. The glass glints in his hand as he begins to slide in an ampoule...
Zh: 伴随着金属滑动的声音，警督亮出了镜头。他开始填装安瓿，玻璃在他手中闪闪发光……

En: I won't be one of those fools who didn't take a picture... He has stopped fiddling with the camera, but does not put it down.
Zh: “我才不是那种不知道拍照的傻瓜……”他停下了摆弄相机的手，不过并没有把它放下。

En: He's letting his pride get in the way.
Zh: 他的自尊心在作祟。

En: (Whisper) "Who cares what they *think* Kim."
Zh: （低语）“谁在乎他们怎么*想，金。”

En: (Whisper) "I have the pheromone, I can approach it."
Zh: （低语）“我洒了费洛蒙，我可以接近它。”

En: He comes to, abruptly. "Understood. Of course," he says with a nod.
Zh: 他突然清醒过来。“当然。我能理解，”他点头说到。

En: Just listen to me!
Zh: “听我的！”

En: I don't think the pheromone will do anything. His whisper turns to a sceptical hiss -- but he has stopped now.
Zh: “我觉得费洛蒙没什么用。”他的低语变成了怀疑的嘶嘶声——但是现在他停下来了。

En: Shh... okay. The lieutenant puts his finger to his lips and nods.
Zh: “嘘……好吧。”警督把手指放在嘴唇上，点了点头。

En: The spindly mechanism turns itself back to you, its antennae taking their measure of the air, slowly...
Zh: 细长的机理转回到你的方向，触须正在检测周围的空气，慢慢悠悠……

En: (Say something to it, quietly... something like...)
Zh: （对竹节虫说点什么，小声些……比如说……）

En: (Say something to the insect, quietly, like...)
Zh: （对昆虫说点什么，小声些，比如说……）

En: Retreat slowly. [Leave.]
Zh: 慢慢撤回来。[离开。]

En: The creature tilts its tiny head to the side and appears to look at you. It is incredibly light, like the slightest gust of wind should blow it away, but it doesn't...
Zh: 那个生物把小脑袋歪向左边，似乎是在看你。它看起来非常轻，似乎只要一阵最轻柔的风就能将它吹走，不过并没有……

En: Its insect mind is impenetrable to your reasoning.
Zh: 昆虫的脑袋没办法理解你的推理。

En: (Whisper.) "What is that?"
Zh: （低语。）“那是什么？”

En: Hey.
Don't be afraid...
Zh: “别害怕……”

En: You exist...
Zh: “你真的存在……”

En: A sudden chirrup fills the air -- the walking stick moves its whole body, limbs working independently of each other, like the parts of a masterfully constructed machine.
Zh: 一阵突如其来的吱喳声弥漫在空中——那根手杖移动着整个身体，节肢能够独立地工作，就像是一台构造精巧的机器零件……

En: Nothing changes in the cyclical, praying motion of the creature's limbs. They are porcelain white on the inside, and reed-coloured on the out -- beige, light brown and striped. You are unsure if it is scared or not.
Zh: 生物节肢依然继续着循环的祈祷动作，没有任何改变。里面是瓷白色，外面是芦苇的颜色——米黄，浅棕，有条纹。你不确定它有没有被吓到。

En: There is a sadness in there -- or is it in you, from the dream... It's still with you, the pitiful *hey* you told her, even now...
Zh: 这里面蕴藏着一种悲伤——或者来自于你，源于梦境……它还在你身边，你对她说的那句可怜的*嗨*，即使到了现在……

En: It moves just an inch closer to you. Or does it only *feel* like it does?
Zh: 它离你又靠近了一英寸。或者，只是*感觉*如此？

En: Something in its body language has changed, just slightly...
Zh: 它的肢体语言有了变化，只有一点点……

En: No one hears you whisper. Behind you, the straggler sits despondently by the fire, oblivious to his surroundings.
Zh: 没人听到你的低语。在你背后，逃兵沮丧地坐在火堆旁，对周围的一切浑然不觉。

En: You see the phasmid turn to him, its mandible antennae reaching out. The motions are quick, sudden.
Zh: 你看见竹节虫转向他，伸出了下颌的触须。它的动作突然变快了。

En: You see the insect turn to him, its mandible antennae reaching out. Its motions are quick, sudden.
Zh: 你看见昆虫转向他，伸出了下颌的触须。它的动作突然变快了。

En: We can't just leave it standing there. We have to do *something*, detective. It could be... He thinks. "It could be connected somehow even..."
Zh: “我们不能让它就这么站在那儿。我们必须做点*什么*，警探。它可能……”他想到。“甚至可能有所关联……”

En: The ghost insect watches you disengage, continuing its hypnotizing motion. It's unclear whether it even registers that you're going...
Zh: 幽灵昆虫看着你挣脱出来，继续着催眠的动作。不清楚它到底有没有注意到你打算走开……

En: You've never seen him get this excited. His voice is almost trembling.
Zh: 你从没见过他这么兴奋的样子。他的声音几乎在颤抖。

En: He not as much as glances at the gigantic insect to his right -- nor does it look at him. Its antennae take their measure of the air, slowly... searching for something -- *you*.
Zh: 他连看都没看右边的巨型昆虫一眼——而它也没有看他。它的触须在探测着周围的空气，慢慢悠悠……像是在寻找什么东西……*你*。

En: I have absolutely no idea... The lieutenant whispers back. You hear the familiar ring of his jacket unzipping -- slowly. Painstakingly so...
Zh: “我完全不知道……”警督低声回答到。你听见夹克拉链拉开时那熟悉的声音——慢慢地，轻轻地。特别费力……

En: Meanwhile, in the antechamber of the Station 57 lazareth, a neatly packed pair of cargo pants and an orange bomber jacket sit in a locker. Nested on the jacket -- a small block of milled aluminium, tucked away in a leather case.
Zh: 与此同时，在57分局检疫所的接待室里，一条折叠整齐的工装裤和一件橙色的飞行员夹克躺在一个衣帽柜里。夹克上面——是一个滚花的小铝块，藏在一个皮套里。

En: An instant camera -- the Trigat Sunshine Mini. A moan of discomfort sounds from the lazareth, as he turns onto his side...
Zh: 一台快速照相机——崔格特阳光，迷你型。他转向一侧，检疫所里传来一阵不安的呻吟……

En: A camera -- an instant colour camera the lieutenant keeps tucked away in his coat pocket. A moan of discomfort sounds from the lazareth, as he turns onto his side...
Zh: 一台相机——警督藏在外套口袋里的快速彩色照相机。他转向一侧，检疫所里传来一阵不安的呻吟……

En: Back on an island 28 kilometres away, the gigantic insect moves its antennae, taking its measure of the air, slowly... it's searching for something -- *you*.
Zh: 回到28公里外的一座小岛上，巨型昆虫移动着它的触须，探测着周围的空气，慢慢悠悠……像是在寻找什么东西……*你*。

En: Slowly, with your breath held, you take two small steps toward the phasmid. The creature lets out a series of ultrasonic clicks that swarm around your head like swallows...
Zh: 你屏住呼吸，慢慢地朝着竹节虫的方向靠近两步。生物发出一系列超声波滴答声，像燕子一样聚集在你的脑袋旁边……

En: You barely get to take one step -- the invertebrate reacts with uncanny speed, skating away across the water. It's gone, like a skipping stone, leaving nothing but rings on the sea's calm mirror...
Zh: 你勉强迈出一步——这只无脊椎动物以离奇的速度做出了反应，一溜烟地滑过水面。它走了，像一颗跳跃的石头，只在平滑如镜的海面上留下一圈圈涟漪……

En: The tracheal system on the creature's abdomen expands in front of you, to take in and expel air -- it's *smelling* you.
Zh: 生物腹部的气管系统在你面前扩张开来，吸入和排放着空气——它在*闻*你。

En: Like laughter. A sort of happiness.
Zh: 就像笑声。某种幸福。

En: ...hissing and clicking, it extends its mandible-like antennae to greet you. You're right below it now, looking up at the colossal chitin of its white limbs. The head of the creature is crowned by reeds and its eyes are like small droplets of water.
Zh: ……嘶嘶声和嘀嗒声，它伸出类似下颌骨的触须向你致意。现在你就在它的正下方，抬头望着那白色节肢上巨大的甲壳。生物头部周围的芦苇仿佛它的王冠，上面点缀着很多只像小水滴一般的眼睛。

En: Sweat drips from your brow, soaking your chest... you reek of it, your chemicals.
Zh: 汗水从你的眉头滴落，打湿你的胸膛……你身上散发出化学药品的臭味。

En: Raise your hand slowly.
Zh: 慢慢抬起手。

En: (Whisper.) "Kim, show me the picture again..."
Zh: （低语）“金，把相片再拿给我看看……”

En: (Whisper) "Okay Kim, take the picture."
Zh: （低语）“好吧，金，照张相。”

En: Hello. I'm Harry. I don't really know who I am...
Zh: “你好。我是哈里。我真的不知道自己是谁……”

En: Hello. I don't know who I am.
Zh: “你好。我不知道我是谁。”

En: Disengage slowly. [Leave.]
Zh: 慢慢脱开。[离开。]

En: The insect stops its stridulation, seeming to observe you. Below its crown of reeds, little pin-prick eyes detect motion, glittering. The world stands still around you.
Zh: 昆虫止住了尖锐的声音，似乎在观察你。在它的芦苇王冠之下，小小的针形眼睛正在探测，闪闪发光。你周围的整个世界都静止了。

En: No reply. A total, ancient silence comes from its mouth, along with what appears to be some kind of foam... The stridulations of its limbs continue all around you.
Zh: 没有回应。它的嘴里发出一阵完全的、古老的沉默之声，还伴随着似乎是某种泡沫……它的节肢发出的尖锐声音将你重重环绕。

En: Praying to you.
Zh: 正在向你祈祷。

En: Tell me -- what are you doing?
Zh: 告诉我——你在做什么？

En: Spoke to the Hanged Man.
Zh: 跟被吊起来的男人对话。

En: Limbs are thinking.
Zh: 节肢在思考。

En: Did not give up on phasmid.
Zh: 不要放弃竹节虫。

En: Tasted it.
Zh: 品尝它。

En: Knows of parthenogenesis
Zh: 了解单性生殖

En: N-n-nothing...
Zh: 没，没什么……

En: Stand on your tiptoes and look more closely...
Zh: 踮起脚尖,再靠近一点查看……

En: Back off.
Zh: 退后。

En: You were right. Little bubbles form on the mouthparts of the creature -- on its segmented lower lip. It looks to be foaming, slowly. The foam is white, then yellowish...
Zh: 你是对的。小泡沫在生物的口器上形成——在分节的下唇上。看起来像在慢慢地吐泡泡。泡沫是白色的，然后有些微黄……

En: The faintest smell, like you've never felt before. Like burnt roses.
Zh: 最微弱的味道，你之前从未感觉到过。就像烧焦的玫瑰花。

En: (Whisper.) "Cuno, it's foaming."
Zh: （低语。）“坤诺，它在吐泡泡。”

En: (Whisper.) "Kim, it's foaming."
Zh: （低语。）“金，它在吐泡泡。”

En: Why are you're foaming?
Zh: “你为什么要吐泡泡呢？”

En: Let your heels drop back onto solid ground.
Zh: 让你的脚后跟落在坚实的地面上。

En: Careful. It may be poisonous. The lieutenant watches you apprehensively.
Zh: “小心。可能有毒。”警督担心地看着你。

En: The foam slowly turns a darker shade, like burnt caramel -- as the insect moves its mouthparts, masticating. The little bubbles begin to burst, one by one...
Zh: 泡沫颜色逐渐变深，仿佛烧焦的焦糖——昆虫的口器移动着、咀嚼着。小泡沫开始破裂，一个接着一个……

En: Letting out that same smell, like summer burning.
Zh: 散发出同样的味道，就像灼热的夏季。

En: Apricot blossoms. White blossoms erupting. A sensation, like cold hands on your face.
Zh: 杏花。白色的花朵怒而绽放。一种感觉，就像放在你脸上的那只冷冰冰的手。

En: Silence. Click. The foam slowly turns a darker tone, like burnt caramel -- as the insect moves its mouthparts, masticating on nothing in particular. Then the little bubbles begin to burst, one by one...
Zh: 寂静。嘀嗒嘀嗒。泡沫颜色逐渐变深，仿佛烧焦的焦糖——昆虫的口器移动着、咀嚼着。小泡沫开始破裂，一个接着一个……

En: The invertebrate stops, raising its scythe-like arms and tilting its tiny head, formed from the fused plates around its mouth. For a second, the effigy is frozen, then it nudges back into motion with a click.
Zh: 无脊椎动物停住了，高高举起镰刀般的胳膊，歪起小脑袋，它是由口器周围的融合骨板构成的。有那么一秒钟，这尊雕像静止不动，之后，随着嘀嗒一声响，它又重新动作起来。

En: Raise the other hand too.
Zh: 把另一手也举起来。

En: As you do, the invertebrate comes to life, its limbs moving independent of each other. As if each has a mind of its own. They are white like stalks of porcelain, knitting above you.
Zh: 与此同时，这只无脊椎动物活了过来，节肢各自独立运动，仿佛每一部分都有自己的思想。它们就像瓷器茎杆的一样白，在你上方接合着。

En: (Whisper.) "That's right. Pray."
Zh: （低语。）“没错。祈祷吧。”

En: Don't pray to me. I'm nothing.
Zh: “别向我祈祷。我什么都不是。”

En: Put your hands down instead.
Zh: 把你的手放下。

En: Suddenly there is silence.
Zh: 突然的沉默。

En: (Look behind you.) "It's smelling me..."
Zh: （回头看。）“它在闻我的味道……”

En: Maybe it *is* real, the pheromone... The lieutenant's mouth is agape.
Zh: “也许它*是*真的，费洛蒙……”警督惊讶地张大了嘴。

En: Put your hand down.
Zh: 把你的手放下。

En: The invertebrate comes back to life, stridulating. Sets of complex eyes follow you, moving in tandem, on either side of the insect's small head.
Zh: 无脊椎动物活了过来，发出尖锐的摩擦声。昆虫小脑袋两边的一对对复眼追随着你，一前一后地移动。

En: No. Stop. Be afraid.
Zh: 不要，停下来，敬畏它。

En: Unwittingly the insect continues its stridulations. As it moves, tuft-like structures still pretending to be plants rustle along on its joints.
Zh: 昆虫不经意地持续发出尖锐的摩擦声。它在移动，而关节上的簇状结构还在伪装成植物。

En: The reed-creature does not stop its stridulations -- it towers above you, parting the reeds it emerged from. Tuft like structures still rustle on its joints.
Zh: 芦苇样的生物没有停止尖锐的摩擦声——它耸立在你上方，离开了藏身的那片芦苇丛。簇状结构还在关节上沙沙作响。

En: About now he is ready to believe in anything.
Zh: 现在他什么都愿意相信了。

En: (Look up.) "You're smelling me..."
Zh: （向上看。）“你在闻我的味道……”

En: The insect's head is crowned with reed-like scales, the shape of seed heads. They rustle as the air moves. The ventricles at its abdomen continue to expanding, like lunglets...
Zh: 昆虫头部顶着芦苇样的鳞片，是谷穗的形状。它们随着空气的流动沙沙作响。腹部的心室还在持续扩张，就像小肺叶……

En: Breathing you in -- your sour, greasy semiochemicals on the breeze...
Zh: 吸入你的气息——弥漫在微风中那股酸臭、油腻的化学信息素味道……

En: Perhaps it is preparing to *eat* its god?
Zh: 也许它正准备*吃掉*自己的神明？

En: Sets of complex eyes follow you --droplets of dew on either side of the head.
Zh: 头部两侧如水滴一般的复眼注视着你的一举一动。

En: Okay... With a slow ring of metal, the lieutenant slides the lens open and raises it to eye level.
Zh: “好吧……”伴随着一阵低缓的金属摩擦声，警督打开镜头，把它举到齐眼的高度。

En: There is no change in the insects motion while its being aimed by the camera. It remains fixated on you.
Zh: 被相机对准的时候，昆虫的动作没有任何变化。它的注意力依然固定在你身上。

En: In three, the lieutenant whispers, his voice is tense. "If it moves, you jump back, I'll shoot. Here we go. Three, two, one..."
Zh: “倒数3下，”男人低语着，声音很紧张。“如果它动了，你跳回来，我会按下快门。来了。3，2，1……”

En: The shrill flash of the camera cuts the air like the blade of a sword. The phasmid freezes in its bright light -- head turned toward the lieutenant. Hypnotized by the flash, it stands frozen before you.
Zh: 相机尖锐的闪光像利剑一般划破长空。竹节虫在强光中僵住了——脑袋转向警督的方向。像是被闪光催眠了一般，它在你面前一动不动。

En: The sweat on your arms feels cold as ice. As if you're frozen as well, in the shadow of this giant statue of chitinous marble.
Zh: 你胳膊上的汗水冷若冰霜。站在这个巨大壳质大理石雕像的阴影之下，你仿佛也被冻住了。

En: (Yell.) "No!"
Zh: （大叫。）“不要！”

En: Where did it go? (Look north.) Can *you* see it?"
Zh: “它去哪了？”（望向北边。）“*你*能看见吗？”

En: How did it *do* that? Glide?
Zh: “它是怎么*做到*的？滑翔吗？”

En: Did you get it, did you get the picture?
Zh: “拍到了吗，相片拍到了吗？”

En: It appears the insect can walk on water. Like a water strider, you know. It's almost as fast... He stops, short of breath. "Uncanny..."
Zh: “看起来这种昆虫能在水面上行走。你知道的，就像水黾。快的简直……”他停了下来，呼吸急促。“不可思议……”

En: No. He shakes his head. "It's gone for now, lieutenant-yefreitor."
Zh: “没有。”他摇摇头。“现在它走了，荣誉警督。”

En: No. He shakes his head. "It's gone for now, Harry."
Zh: “没有。”他摇摇头。“现在它走了，哈里。”

En: No. He shakes his head. "It's gone for now, detective."
Zh: “没有。”他摇摇头。“现在它走了，警探。”

En: I don't think... He tries to explain, patting slightly: "I don't think it had *anything* to do with the ox-spray. It was just scared."
Zh: “我不觉得……”他试着解释，轻轻拍了拍你：“我不觉得这跟公牛喷雾有*任何*关系。它只是害怕了。”

En: It's blending into the tufts of reeds in the distance! Moving from islet to islet...
Zh: 它的身影逐渐融入到远方的芦苇丛中！在一个个小岛之间移动……

En: And you, a detective of the RCM, standing there with your mouth agape -- alone and dumbfounded.
Zh: 还有你，一名RCM的警探，站在这里，嘴巴大张——孤身一人，瞠目结舌。

En: I shouldn't have taken a bath, the pheromone washed off!
Zh: “我不该洗澡的，费洛蒙都被冲掉了！”

En: There is uncertainty in his phrasing.
Zh: 他的措辞里有一些不确定的成分。

En: It *definitely* had something to do with the ox-spray! It was repelled by you, as if it was scared.
Zh: *绝对*跟公牛喷雾有关！它被你驱赶了，好像是吓到了。

En: Your voice echoes on the water.
Zh: 你的声音回荡在水面上。

En: It *did* have something to do with the ox-spray!
Zh: “这*的确*跟公牛喷雾有关！”

En: Okay, but... He shakes his head in disbelief. "I'm not an entomologist, okay? Neither was the para-scientist. Who knows? The only thing I'm sure of is..."
