Zh: “好吧，不过……”他怀疑地摇摇头。“我不是个昆虫学家，好吗？而且也不是什么超自然科学家。谁知道呢？我唯一能肯定的就是……“

En: He shakes his head. In silence -- an expression on his face that you've never seen there before.
Zh: 他摇摇头，一言不发——他脸上的表情，是你之前从未见过的。

En: I don't understand... I *had* the pheromone....
Zh: “我不明白……我*喷了*费洛蒙……”

En: Tell me you got the picture...
Zh: “跟我说说那张相片……”

En: I think it went into the reeds there, on that islet... (Point North.)
Zh: “我觉得它跑进那边的芦苇丛了，就在那座小岛上……”（指向北方。）

En: Looks like it doesn't like to stay out in the open for long. The lieutenant squints where you're pointing.
Zh: 顺着你手指的方向，警督眯起眼睛张望。“看来它不喜欢在户外待很久。”

En: You didn't get the picture?
Zh: “你没有拍到吗？”

En: No... He shows you the white slip of photo paper. There's a rainbow of colour -- blue, white, yellow, and brown like a child's painting.
Zh: “没有……”他拿出那张白色的相纸。上面有彩虹的颜色——蓝色，白色，黄色，棕色，就像小孩的画作。

En: Even a wildlife photographer couldn't make out a familiar form, let alone a gigantic stick insect.
Zh: 即使是野生动物摄影师也无法辨认出任何熟悉的形状，更不用说是一只巨大的竹节虫了。

En: However hard you squint you can't make out anything recognizable, let alone a stick insect.
Zh: 不论多么努力地挤弄双眼，你还是辨认不出任何东西，更不用说是一只竹节虫了。

En: What now? (Continue.)
Zh: “现在怎么办？”（继续。）

En: There's a flicker of a smile on his lips, like he can't believe what he's saying: "We *saw* it -- it was real."
Zh: 他的嘴角闪过一丝微笑，仿佛他也不相信自己在说什么：“我们*看见*它了——它是真的。”

En: I should have taken the pheromone from Morell!
Zh: “我应该从莫雷尔那里拿走费洛蒙的！”

En: Say nothing, swallow it.
Zh: 什么也不说，咽下去。

En: It's just a blur, he says, looking at the slip of paper in his hand.
Zh: “就是一片模糊，”他看着手中的相片说到。

En: What now... the old man behind you repeats suddenly. He's put his hand into the ash -- it's dirty and black.
Zh: “现在怎么做……”你身后的老人突然复述到。他把手伸进灰烬里——那只手又脏又黑。

En: In some kind of strange, semi-catatonic state.
Zh: 处于某种奇怪的、半紧张性精神症的状态。

En: Our suspect's not looking so good. We should check him over -- also... He points to the reeds.
Zh: “我们的嫌犯看起来状态不好，我们应该看看他——还有……”他指向芦苇丛。

En: What in the name of *god* was that?
Zh: “看在*老天爷*的份上，那到底是什么？”

En: Damn, we should have helped the cryptozoologists.
Zh: “该死，我们应该帮那些神秘动物学家的。”

En: Helped them? He falls silent for a moment. "I don't see what more we could have done?"
Zh: “帮他们？”他陷入短暂的沉默。“我看不出我们还能做些什么？”

En: We could have learned something about the phasmid's behaviour. Searched for it with them.
Zh: “我们本来可以了解一些竹节虫的习性。跟他们一起寻找。”

En: We should have been more thorough Kim. We should have...
Zh: “我们本来应该再深入一些的，金。我们应该……”

En: You're right.
Zh: “你说得对。”

En: I'm not. We should have... it's my fault too. He looks across the water. The slip of photo paper still drying in his hand, hanging despondently for a second.
Zh: “我没有。我们的确应该……我也有错。”他望向对岸。手里的那张相纸还在风干，沮丧地低垂了一会儿。

En: I know. We *should* have... It's my fault too. He looks across the water. The slip of photo paper still drying in his hand, just hanging there for a second.
Zh: “我知道。我们*本来*应该……我也有错。”他望向对岸。手里的那张相纸还在风干，沮丧地低垂了一会儿。

En: It's too late now.
Zh: 现在已经太迟了。

En: He subdues the feeling. Dusts himself off and moves on. So should you. There will be other chances.
Zh: 他抑制住了这种情绪。拍掉身上的灰尘，继续前进。你也一样。还会有机会的。

En: A stick insect of some sort. Pretending to be the reeds... He shakes his head. "Has it been there the whole time?"
Zh: “某种竹节虫。伪装成芦苇的样子……”他摇摇头。“它是不是一直都在这里？”

En: You never had a chance. There was something off the moment you approached it. It was scared of you. Of humans.
Zh: 你从未有过机会。当你靠近的它的时候，感觉有什么不太对劲的地方。它很怕你。害怕人类。

En: Reed-like tufts stick out of its joints. As the insect moves its forearms it produces a faint hiss -- like a reel-to-reel machine spinning after the tape breaks.
Zh: 芦苇一样的簇毛从关节中伸展出来。昆虫移动前臂，发出一阵微弱的嘶嘶声——像是一台磁带被破坏后仍在运行的开盘录音机。

En: The segmented antennae move with apprehension, searching for something that's not there...
Zh: 节状的触须带着恐惧移动着，像是在寻找某种不存在的东西……

En: Where? Where did it go? The lieutenant has the camera in one hand -- and a slip of white paper in the other, developing.
Zh: “哪里？它去哪了？”警督一手拿着相机——另一只手拿着一张白色相片纸，正在显影。

En: I tried, he explains. "But it was moving too fast. And I didn't get the ampoule in right. And..." He gathers himself. "Dammit. I believe my eyes. It *was* there."
Zh: “我试过了，”他解释到。“不过它动作太快。我的安瓿还没弄好。而且……”他振作起来。“该死。我相信自己的眼睛。它*就在*那里。”

En: Damn it! Damn it! I didn't get it right... [Leave in rage.]
Zh: “该死！该死！我没弄好……”[愤怒地离开。]

En: Neither have you. But you know who would -- a cryptozoologist!
Zh: 你也没有。不过你知道谁可以——神秘动物学家！

En: A cryptozoologist? Oh god, there was one...
Zh: 神秘动物学？天啦，真有一个……

En: The cryptozoologist! There was one in the bar. Maybe she knew something?
Zh: “神秘动物学家！酒吧里有一个。也许她知道些什么？”

En: The paraplegic? She could have, yes... He seems unsure.
Zh: “那个截瘫病人？她有可能知道，没错……”他似乎不太确定。

En: The paraplegic? *Or* the other one on the coast? They could have, yes... He seems unsure.
Zh: “那个截瘫病人？*或者*是海岸上的那个人？他们是有可能知道，没错……”他似乎不太确定。

En: We missed it, he thinks. We damn missed a spot. We should have... then the lieutenant collects himself.
Zh: 我们错过了，他想到。我们漏掉了一个点。我们本来应该……紧接着，警督又重新振作起来。

En: I never thought the damn *cryptozoology* would factor into this... Well, we know it's here now. We *will* find it again.
Zh: “我从没想过那个该死的*神秘动物学*会……好吧，现在我们知道它就在这里。我们*还会*找到它的。”

En: Okay, yes, you're probably right.
Zh: “好吧，是的，也许你是对的。”

En: Am I? He shakes his head. "I don't know. I'm not an entomologist! Neither was the para-scientist. The only thing I'm sure of is..."
Zh: “我有吗？”他摇摇头。“我不知道。我不是个昆虫学家！而且也不是什么超自然科学家。我唯一能肯定的就是……“

En: It looks like it has some kind of nest there... Maybe there's proof in there.
Zh: “看来它在那边好像有个巢……也许在那里能找到证据。”

En: It was *definitely* that. He didn't like me. I didn't get to take a single step.
Zh: “*明显*就是的。他不喜欢我。我也没有迈出第一步。”

En: *Like* you? He shakes his head in disbelief. "I'm not an entomologist, okay -- neither was the para-scientist. Who knows, maybe you're right. The only thing I'm sure of is..."
Zh: “*喜欢*你？”他怀疑地摇摇头。“我不是个昆虫学家，好吗——而且也不是什么超自然科学家。谁知道呢，也许你是对的。我唯一能肯定的就是……“

En: Like a little boy... for a moment he's unable to keep it together when he looks at the slip.
Zh: 就像一个小男孩……当他看着相片的时候，有那么一瞬间完全失控了。

En: The ampoule will produce a loud hiss. He turns to you and whispers: "You're right. It could scare it away. I need a better moment, when it's not looking."
Zh: “安瓿会发出响亮的嘶嘶声。”他转向你，低语到。“你说得对。它可能会被吓跑的。我需要找个更好的时刻，等它没往这边看的时候。”

En: Something cracks in the lieutenant. He's letting his pride get in the way.
Zh: 警督身体内部有什么东西碎裂了。他的自尊心在作祟。

En: You see the phasmid turn to him, its mandible antennae reaching out. The motions are quick, sudden.
Zh: 你看见竹节虫转向他，伸出了下颌的触须。它的动作突然变快了。

En: You see the insect turn to him, its mandible antennae reaching out. Its motions are quick, sudden.
Zh: 你看见昆虫转向他，伸出了下颌的触须。它的动作突然变快了。

En: (Yell.) "No!"
Zh: （大叫。）“不要！”

En: What are you talking about, *pheromone*? The strange state the old man is in ends, momentarily. Something in the word animates him...
Zh: “你在说什么，*费洛蒙*？”老人的奇怪状态暂时中断了。话语中的某些东西让他恢复了生气……

En: God, I shouldn't have taken a bath! The pheromone washed off!
Zh: “老天爷，我不该洗澡的！费洛蒙都被冲掉了！”

En: You know who would know -- a cryptozoologist!
Zh: 你知道谁会知道——神秘动物学家！

En: Your voice echoes alone on the water. Not so much as a scoff from the old man.
Zh: 你的声音孤独地回荡在水面上。甚至连老人的咳嗽声都没有。

En: I don't understand... I *had* the pheromone....
Zh: “我不明白……我*喷了*费洛蒙……”

En: Dammit. What now? (Continue.)
Zh: “该死。现在怎么办？”（继续。）

En: I should have taken the pheromone!
Zh: “我应该喷费洛蒙的！”

En: What in the name of god was that?
Zh: “看在老天爷的份上，那到底是什么？”

En: I should have helped the cryptozoologists. It's too late now...
Zh: “我应该帮助那些神秘动物学家的。现在太迟了……”

En: It's not use telling him...
Zh: 告诉他也没用……

En: The cryptozoologist... there was one in the bar. I bet she knew something...
Zh: “神秘动物学家……酒吧里就有一个。我想她应该知道些什么……”

En: What was what? The straggler looks around. "It's just the reeds, playing tricks on you, droite..."
Zh: “那是什么？”逃兵环顾四周。“只是芦苇，它们在捉弄你，右派的家伙……”

En: A cryptozoologist? Oh god, there was one...
Zh: 神秘动物学？天啦，真有一个……

En: Subdue the regret. Dust yourself off, proceed. You'll get it in the next life, where you don't make mistakes. Do what you can with this one, while you're alive.
Zh: 控制住这种遗憾。振作起来，继续前进。下辈子你会成功的，那时候你就不会犯错了。这辈子就尽你所能吧，趁着你还活着的时候。

En: Looks like you're right. He's extending his hand into the dust now, for some odd reason. Smearing his finger in it, confused like a child...
Zh: 看来你是对的。出于某种奇怪的原因，他把手伸进了灰尘里。弄脏了自己的手指，困惑地像个孩子一样……

En: No one will believe me... no one will believe this was real.
Zh: “没人会相信我的……没人会相信这是真的。”

En: Wordless, he's staring at the ash. Not responding to your yelling.
Zh: 他凝视着余烬，沉默无语。对你的呼叫声无动于衷。

En: ...and then he is back to staring at the dust.
Zh: ……然后，他的目光又回到了那堆灰烬上。

En: Like a junkie...
Zh: 像一个瘾君子……

En: I don't... He's extending his hand into the dust now, for some odd reason. Smearing his finger in it, like a confused child...
Zh: “我没有……”出于某种奇怪的原因，他把手伸进了灰尘里。弄脏了自己的手指，困惑地像个孩子一样……

En: He must be *really* out of it, yelling like that. Well, at least he's *alive*.... Officer Minot in the blue uniform frowns: "Jean, maybe something *happened*? He's in distress..."
Zh: “那样大喊大叫，他怕是*真的*昏了头。呃，至少他还*活着*……”身穿蓝色制服的迈诺特警官皱起眉头：“让，也许*出什么事*了？他陷入困境了……”

En: Three-hundred metres inland special consultant Trant Heidelstam cups his ear. Satellite-Officer Vicquemare nods to him on the jetty: "I heard it."
Zh: 内陆300米的地方，特别顾问特兰特·海德斯塔姆竖起耳朵。随迁警官维克玛站在码头上朝他点点头：“我听见了。”

En: He must be *really* out of it, yelling like that. Well, at least he's *alive*.... Officer Minot in the blue uniform frowns: "Jean, maybe something *happened*? He's in distress..."
Zh: “那样大喊大叫，他怕是*真的*昏了头。呃，至少他还*活着*……”身穿蓝色制服的迈诺特警官皱起眉头：“让，也许*出什么事*了？他陷入困境了……”

En: Three-hundred metres inland, on the jetty, special consultant Trant Heidelstam cups his ear. Satellite-Officer Vicquemare nods to him: "I heard it."
Zh: 内陆300米，码头上，特别顾问特兰特·海德斯塔姆竖起耳朵。随迁警官维克玛朝他点点头：“我听见了。”

En: Crypto-what? Some odd connotation catches the old man's ear.
Zh: “神秘什么？”老人的耳朵捕捉到某种古怪的暗示。

En: Crypto-*fascist* probably.
Zh: 也许是神秘-*法西斯主义者*吧。

En: The lieutenant had a *camera*. A camera, he could have taken a picture. Now they'll all think you're mad...
Zh: 警督有一台*相机*。有了相机，他就能拍照。现在他们都觉得你疯了……

En: I got it... You hear the lieutenant whisper, as the creature's shape develops onto photo paper in his hand: a polychrome ghost of white streaks against the reeds and the sky. And you, as a shadow before it.
Zh: “拍到了……”你听见警督的低语声，那只生物的身形出现在他手中的相片里：一个白色条纹的多彩幽灵，跟芦苇和天空形成了鲜明的对比。还有你，它面前的阴影。

En: Immortalized.
Zh: 永生不朽。

En: For all time.
Zh: 永永远远。

En: *Slowly* reach out and touch the creature's whisker.
Zh: *慢慢*地伸出手，去碰触生物的触须。

En: Carefully pet its scythe-like forearm.
Zh: 小心地抚摸镰刀样的前臂。

En: We got it... (Back off.)
Zh: “我们搞定了……”（退后。）

En: The antennae hang from a great height. With your hand shaking you barely touch the tip of the left whisker. On contact the chitin curls into a spiral, like the tip of a poison ivy. Its touch on your fingertip feels cold, ticklish...
Zh: 触须从很高的地方垂落下来。你的手在颤抖，勉强碰到了左触须的末端。一接触到你的手指，壳质卷成了螺旋状，仿佛毒葛的尖端一般。它的碰触让你的指尖感觉冰冰凉凉，还有些发痒……

En: Be careful, detective... It's moving.
Zh: “小心，警探……它在动。”

En: It is surprisingly delicate -- the curly end of the whisker, like a young bine. It's even a bit wet.
Zh: 它出奇地纤弱——触须卷曲的末端，仿佛新生的藤蔓。甚至还有一点潮湿。

En: The sensation is electrifying, resounding through your body.
Zh: 这种感觉让你为之振奋，响彻你的全身。

En: Look at your finger.
Zh: 看着你的手指。

En: It tastes like... sugar. Very faint. The arthropod towers above you, tufts of reeds pointing from limb and head alike.
Zh: 尝起来像是……糖一样。一丝微弱的甜味。节肢动物矗立在你面前，节肢和类似脑袋的部位伸出芦苇簇状的东西。

En: Odourless, mostly comprised of water.
Zh: 没有味道，主要是水构成的。

En: Lick your finger.
Zh: 舔一下你的手指。

En: You were right, it glistens with some kind of moisture. The creature in front of you stays frozen...
Zh: 你是对的，某种水分让它变得闪闪发亮。你面前的节肢动物纹丝不动……

En: The limb before you is incredibly light, like eggshell. It's much lighter than a reed. You feel a soft push could tip the creature over, its hollow exoskeleton collapsing...
Zh: 你面前的节肢出奇地轻巧，就像蛋壳一样。它比芦苇轻的多。你觉得只需轻轻一推，这只生物就会被掀翻在地，中空的外骨骼也会塌陷……

En: Here, within the smooth white inner part of its limb you sense... something very intimate. Thoughts.
Zh: 在它光滑洁白的节肢内部，你感觉到……某种非常私密的东西。想法。

En: Warning!
Zh: 警告！

En: Run your hand up the slender limb, higher...
Zh: 把你的手放在纤细的节肢上，向上滑动，再高一些……

En: Pull your hand away.
Zh: 把手拿开。

En: A small shudder passes the creature's arm. High above you its black pearl-eyes still glisten, mesmerized by the light passing its nervous system.
Zh: 生物的胳膊稍微颤抖了一下。在你的头顶上方，那些宛如黑珍珠的小眼睛闪闪发亮，被通过神经系统的光芒迷住了。

En: There is some kind of countdown happening, as it slowly processes the overwhelming brightness of the signal. The invertebrate is regaining control...
Zh: 仿佛某种倒数计时正在进行，它正慢慢处理着信号传递的那压倒性的光亮。无脊椎动物正渐渐恢复对自己的控制……

En: The stimulus overloaded it. It's passing, like an extended moment, or a gall stone.
Zh: 刺激让它的神经超载了。它正在渐渐流逝，仿佛一段延伸的时间，或是胆囊结石。

En: Lieutenant, it's thinking with its *limbs*.
Zh: “警督，它在用*节肢*思考。”

En: It's your secret alone.
Zh: 这是你一个人的秘密。

En: The nervous system could be spread out like that... He whispers behind you. "Over the extremities, like a cuttlefish."
Zh: “神经系统可以那样展开……”他在你背后小声说到。“通过节肢，像一只乌贼。”

En: Or a *ryacintha*, an Occidental leaf insect with its brain stored in four leaf-like extensions. Or a mimicry octopus with its intelligent tentacles...
Zh: 或者*里亚辛塔*，一种奥西登竹节虫，它的大脑储存在四条像树叶一样的节肢里。或者是一种拥有智能触角的拟态章鱼……

En: Another shudder passes through the forearm under your palm -- feels like blood pumping through a brain. It's coming to, you withdraw your hand slowly.
Zh: 又一阵颤栗通过前臂传到你的手掌心——感觉像是血液流过大脑。它来了，你慢慢收回自己的手。

En: A sudden shiver passes the limb. Looks like the creature is awakening, wave by wave from its stupor.
Zh: 一阵突如其来的颤栗掠过节肢。看来这种生物正从恍惚中一波一波地苏醒。

En: Some sort of countdown process is happening. That's all you have time to think...
Zh: 某种倒数计时正在进行。你只有这么多思考的时间……

En: Another shudder pulses through the creatures limbs. It jolts back to life, like a record continuing were it left off -- in a swaying, praying motion. Even the small black pearls of its eyes do not stray from you...
Zh: 又一阵颤栗通过生物的节肢。它的关节重新恢复生机，就像中断的唱片继续开始播放——带着一种摇曳、祈祷的姿态。就连像黑珍珠一样的小眼睛都没有从你身上挪开……

En: A shudder pulses through the creatures limbs. It jolts back to life, like a record continuing were it left off -- in a swaying, praying motion. Even the small black pearls of its eyes do not stray from you...
Zh: 一阵颤栗通过生物的节肢。它的关节重新恢复生机，就像中断的唱片继续开始播放——带着一种摇曳、祈祷的姿态。就连像黑珍珠一样的小眼睛都没有从你身上挪开……

En: They are filled with adoration and curiosity. The adoration of some wheel,  or dominion spinning around its parent deity. And the curiosity of a common wasp, tasting sugar in a fizzy drink.
Zh: 它们充满崇拜和好奇。对于某种轮子，或者至高父神周身环绕的统治权的崇拜。还有一只普通大黄蜂的好奇心，品尝着汽水的甜蜜味道。

En: It's good, it's good, the lieutenant whispers, holding it up. "Don't worry. We got it."
Zh: “这样很好，这样很好，”警督举起相机，低语到。“别担心。我们可以的。”

En: For a moment there, he was afraid you didn't *get it*, but he's calmer now, looking at it.
Zh: 有那么一会儿，他害怕你没有*明白*，不过现在看着它的样子，他镇定了许多。

En: The arthropod towers above you -- just like in the picture -- oblivious to your chattering. The ventricles on its abdomen slowly expanding, vestigial wings like barely visible gossamer hanging from the inside of its slender joints.
Zh: 节肢动物耸立在你上方——就像相片里的一样——没有注意到喋喋不休的你。它腹部的心室慢慢扩张开来，退化的翅膀宛如难以看清的薄纱，悬挂在纤细的关节内侧。

En: It's about to move, you can sense it!
Zh: 它要动了，你能感觉到！

En: Don't say it! Are you sure? This may be the only chance you get to touch it...
Zh: 别说出来！你确定吗？这可能是你唯一碰触它的机会……

En: (I'm sure.) "We got it, Kim..." (Keep backing.)
Zh: （我肯定。）“我们可以的，金……”（继续向后退。）

En: No, wait...
Zh: 不，等等。

En: The arthropod towers above you, frozen in place. A twitch passes one of its hind legs, as you...
Zh: 节肢动物耸立在你上方，僵在原地。一条后肢突然一阵抽搐，而你……

En: Wipe it off.
Zh: 把它擦掉。

En: Feels like nothing. The arthropod in front of you stays frozen...
Zh: 感觉什么都没有。节肢动物在你面前纹丝不动……

En: I want there to be more.
Zh: 我想要更多。

En: I want to know your mind.
Zh: 我想知道你在想什么。

En: There is no mind to speak of. And if there is, it's beyond your imagination -- too simple to be compatible with yours. Segmented mouthparts foam, it tilts its head.
Zh: 没什么可以说的。如果有，也超过了你的想象——简单到跟你的难以兼容。节状的口器吐着泡泡，它歪起自己的小脑袋。

En: It is impossible to see inside. There is only chitin, pretending to be reeds -- or polished, like stalks of marble. The occasional series of clicks, undecipherable to the human ear.
Zh: 看到里面是不可能的。只有壳质，假装成芦苇的样子——或者是打磨过的，像大理石茎杆。偶然发出的一系列嘀嗒声，人类的耳朵难以辨认。

En: What more is there in any of us? You think, as the sight of the insect fades and pain shoots up your right foot and into your abdomen, darkening your view... when it returns the insect twitches, feeling the blood on you...
Zh: 我们身上还有些什么？你想到，昆虫逐渐从你的视线消失，你的右脚和腹部感到一阵疼痛，你的眼前慢慢发黑……回过神之后，昆虫抽搐着，感受着你的血液……

En: The sight of the insect pulses with pain, as a streak of fire tries to shoot up your leg. You swallow it. Unmoved. Not now. There's blood dripping... warm.  The creature must feel it too, it twitches.
Zh: 昆虫的随着疼痛一起脉动，仿佛一道火焰试图朝你的大腿喷射过去。你忍住了。毫不动摇。现在还不行。鲜血滴落下来……很温暖。那个生物肯定也感觉到了，它在抽搐。

En: Mute, the insect foams from its mouthparts, tilting the plates of its fused together head. From left to right, without reason.
Zh: 沉默，昆虫的口器周围吐出泡泡，歪起由融合骨板构成的头部。从左到右，毫无缘由。

En: I exist.
Zh: 我存在。

En: I exist.
Zh: 我存在。

En: I exist too.
Zh: 我也存在。

En: Tell me what it's like for you.
Zh: 把你的感受告诉我。

En: Now I will tell you what it's like for me. For me it is a series of half-lit images. A kind of darkness, being intruded upon. Transient. Dim. Moist.
Zh: 现在我可以告诉你，我的感受是什么。对于我来说，那是一连串忽明忽暗的图像。某种黑暗，被侵入了。短暂。黯淡。潮湿。

En: Nothing. Its simple eyes give off no flicker of light, no one is home. The twitches of its limbs are insect-like, unknowable, perhaps without substance even.
Zh: 什么也没有。它单纯的眼睛没有发出光芒，没人在家。如果它的节肢像昆虫一样，那这种抽搐是不可知的，甚至也需要是没有实质的。

En: I want to see inside you.
Zh: 我想看看你里面。

En: It's spread too thin among its limbs, performing incomprehensible operations on the world; and you -- looking at it, mouth slightly open... You cannot even imagine what it thinks.
Zh: 它伸展来开，节肢太过纤细，进行着世界上最难以理解的行动；还有你——看着它，嘴巴微张……你根本想象不到它在想什么。

En: In its marrow -- a combination of complex biomolecules. Hormones, amino acids, lipids.
Zh: 在它的骨髓里——是复杂生物分子的组合。荷尔蒙，氨基酸，脂肪。

En: Another flash of pain. Again you swallow it, but this time, some of it does not stay down. You think you taste it in your mouth. So does the insect, twitching suddenly...
Zh: 又是一阵痛楚掠过。你再次将它咽了下去，不过这一次，还有部分依然残留着。你在嘴里尝到了它的滋味。昆虫也是一样，突然抽搐起来……

En: Suddenly -- another flash of pain. Worse than the one before. The taste of blood in your mouth. The insect tastes it too, twitching suddenly...
Zh: 突然间——又是一阵痛楚掠过。比之前地更严重。你在嘴里尝到血腥的味道。昆虫也尝到了，突然抽搐起来……

En: As you back off the phasmid also takes a step back into the reeds. Something tells you -- the next time you engage and disengage it will probably flee.
Zh: 当你向后退时，竹节虫也向芦苇丛里退了一步。有什么东西告诉你——下次你再接触或者挣脱，它可能就会逃跑。

En: Something stirs in the insect as you begin to back off. It seems to also takes a step back... Something tells you -- the next time you engage and disengage it will probably flee.
Zh: 你开始向后退时，昆虫的身体里好像有什么东西被激活了。似乎它也向后退了一步……有什么东西告诉你——下次你再接触或者挣脱，它可能就会逃跑。

En: As you're turning away, the phasmid mirrors your movements, stepping on the water -- the long limbs carry its feather weight without breaking its surface.
Zh: 当你转过身去，竹节虫也做出跟你一样的动作，它踩在水面上——纤长的节肢承托着羽毛般轻重的节肢，并没有打破水面的平静。

En: For me, it's fire, burning.
Zh: 对于我来说，它是火焰，在燃烧。

En: Fire, burning.
Zh: 火焰，在燃烧。

En: For me it's *wunderbar*.
Zh: 对于我来说，它是很*不可思议*的。

En: It's *wunderbar*.
Zh: 它是很*不可思议*的。

En: I'm ill.
Zh: 我病了。

En: Not even the birds know that. Not even the water lilies.
Zh: 就连鸟儿都不知道。甚至就连水百合也不知道。

En: Where does this come from? All this? Around us? The world?
Zh: 这一切是从哪里来的？所有这一切？在我们周围？这个世界？

En: Is this a dream? What is happening?
Zh: 我是在做梦吗？出什么事了？

En: No. You are awake. I am real. Light is forming me. This is real.
Zh: 不。你是清醒的。我是真的。光组成了我。这是真的。

En: Shifting around in the reeds around it, in the muddy water... you notice some of its hind legs apparently standing on the water from time to time. It's *that* light...
Zh: 在周围的芦苇丛里快速移动，还有泥泞的水面……你注意到它的后肢会时不时地站立在水面上。它就是*那道*光……

En: And... is that a glimmer in the water, below it? Like plastic? Could it be hoarding something?
Zh: 还有……水里好像有光，就在下面？像是塑料？也许藏着什么东西？

En: Kim... there's something there.
Zh: “金……那里好像有什么东西。”

En: Not now...
Zh: 现在不行……

En: A nest? The whisper is anxious. "Don't do anything now. Later, when it's gone maybe..."
Zh: “一个巢穴？”他压低的声音有些紧张。“现在什么也不要做。等一会儿，也许等它走了之后……”

En: Of course, no time. The insect towers above you, parting the reeds it emerged from.
Zh: 当然，没有时间。昆虫耸立在你上方，离开藏身的芦苇丛。

En: Shapes of plants and animals. And *internal* sensations. A swarm of sounds, tiny vibrations on the inside of my forearms -- all speak of complexities totally beyond my understanding.
Zh: 植物和动物的形状。还有*内在的*感觉。一团声响，我前臂内侧的小小共鸣——这种复杂性完全超出了我的理解范围。

En: What is your illness?
Zh: 你生了什么病？

En: My body aches. I'm bleeding.
Zh: 我的身体很疼。我在流血。

En: I'm ill in my head. I'm insane. That's how it is for me.
Zh: 我脑子有病。我疯了。对我来说就是这样。

En: In my heart. For me it's sadness -- input after input.
Zh: 在我心里。对于我来说，它是一种悲伤——源源不断地进入我的心脏。

En: If I tell you, what will happen?
Zh: 如果我告诉你，会怎么样呢？

En: Then I will tell you what it's like for me.
Zh: 那我会告诉你，对于我来说是怎么样的。

En: For me it is not like that. I have states, not emotions. For example, I experience excitement at unexpected sugar rewards, but that is not important.
Zh: 对于我来说并不像那样。我有的是状态，没有情绪。举个例子，我会对意想不到的糖分奖励感到兴奋，不过这并不重要。

En: I am not. There isn't even a central nervous system in my head. Only mouthparts for eating wetland plants.
Zh: 我没有。我的脑袋里甚至没有中枢神经系统。只有吃湿地植物的口器。

En: I smelled it, as soon as you stepped on the island -- strawberries. Fresh burst of red strawberries. Ripe turning riper. Soon you will be rotten.
Zh: 我嗅到了，甚至是当你刚刚踏上这座岛屿的时候就嗅到了——草莓。新鲜的红草莓。从成熟变得更加成熟。很快你就会腐烂。

En: Now I will tell you how it is for me. For me it is a series of half-lit images. A kind of darkness, being intruded upon. Transient. Dim. Moist.
Zh: 现在我可以告诉你那是什么感觉。对于我来说，它是一连串忽明忽暗的图像。某种黑暗，被打扰了。短暂。模糊。潮湿。

En: Fire? Where?
Zh: 火焰？哪里？

En: Inside.
Zh: 心里。

En: In the city, all around. It's going *down*.
Zh: 在城市里，到处都是。它在变*小*。

En: On the horizon. Pale fire. This thing we're both sensing is coming to an end.
Zh: 在地平线上。灰域的火焰。我们感觉到的东西马上就要结束了。

En: That is your problem. Nothing ever ends for me. There is only room for two, maybe three pictures in my mind.
Zh: 那是你的问题。对于我来说，没有什么结束。在我的脑海里，只有2副，或者是3副画面的空间。

En: I am oblivious to the city. It is only on my margins. A ball I sometimes spin. A toy, Or the cylinder of a discarded trash bin.
Zh: 我对城市一无所知。它仅仅存在于我的边缘。是我偶尔会旋转的一颗球。一个玩具，或者是废墟垃圾箱的圆筒。

En: I do not have fire inside me. In me there is not even blood, but lymph -- like sap from a wine palm.
Zh: 我的内部没有火焰。甚至连血液都没有，只有淋巴液——就像酒椰树的汁液一样。

En: Yes, holy is the lord of hosts. And all the Earth is filled with his glory.
Zh: 是的，万主之神是圣洁的。整个地球都充满了他的荣耀。

En: I am at the end of a narrow funnel. Weightless. So light it only feels like *something* to be me. In truth -- perhaps I'm nothing? I certainly do not have a soul. And if I did, it would never burn.
Zh: 我身处在一个狭窄漏斗的底端。毫无重量。轻到我只能感觉到自己是*某种东西*。事实上——也许我什么都不是？我肯定是没有灵魂的。如果有，它也永远不会燃烧。

En: I am at the end of a narrow funnel. Weightless. So light it only feels like *something* to be me. In truth -- perhaps I'm nothing? I certainly do not have a soul. And if I did, it would never ache.
Zh: 我身处在一个狭窄漏斗的底端。毫无重量。轻到我只能感觉到自己是*某种东西*。事实上——也许我什么都不是？我肯定是没有灵魂的。如果有，它也永远不会感觉到痛。

En: You're the type of animal I would like to be.
Zh: 我想变成你这种动物。

En: I'm glad to be me -- an incredibly sensitive instrument.
Zh: 我很高兴我是我——一种极其敏感的容器。

En: The fuck is happening to me right now?
Zh: 我他妈现在到底是怎么了？

En: I don't know. You're just a shadow for me. Far away, faintly transmitting, but for a curious smell.
Zh: 我不知道。对于我来说，你只是个阴影。遥远，微弱的传输信号，不过有一种古怪的味道。

En: Are you sure?
Zh: 你确定吗？

En: A small leg. That's horrible.
Zh: 一条小腿。真是太可怕了。

En: That's cool.
Zh: 真是太酷了。

En: Yes. The leg tried to move around independently, making it hard to walk.
Zh: 是的。我的腿会试着独立活动，这让我走路变得很困难。

En: Intruded upon -- by what?
Zh: 侵入——被什么侵入？

En: For me it is a series of half-lit images. A kind of darkness, being intruded upon. Transient. Dim. Moist.
Zh: 对于我来说，它是一连串忽明忽暗的图像。某种黑暗，被侵入了。短暂。黯淡。潮湿。

En: So what if the next picture doesn't come? This creature is not the photographer, just the camera.
Zh: 如果下一个画面没有来临呢？这种生物不是相片，而是一台照相机。

En: You don't have a foot there now!
Zh: 你现在连一只脚也没了！

En: Yes, thankfully someone ate it. The next time I moulted I grew an antenna again!
Zh: 是的，谢天谢地，有人把它吃掉了。下次蜕皮的时候，我又会长出一只新触须！

En: Okay. I don't want to hear more about that.
Zh: 好吧。那件事我不想再听下去了。

En: This would explain its antenna being smaller.
Zh: 这就解释了为什么它的触须变小了。

En: *This* is the explanation I came up with?
Zh: *这*就是我想出来的解释？

En: Got it. Solved it.
Zh: 明白了。解决了。

En: No -- it's what the three metres tall stick insect came up with.
Zh: 不是——这是三米高的竹节虫想出来的。

En: Officially, it was the three metres tall stick insect who solved it.
Zh: 官方看来，是三米高的竹节虫解决的。

En: So, you see, it's sometimes also difficult being a stick insect. The leg tried to move independently, making it hard to walk. But hearing about it makes you uncomfortable, I understand.
Zh: 所以，你看见了，有时候当竹节虫也是很困难的。我的腿试着独立活动，让走路变得很困难。不过你听到这个会感觉到不太舒服，我能理解。

En: Change of topic!
Zh: 换个话题！

En: No. The leg tried to move around independently, making it hard to walk.
Zh: 不。我的腿试着独立活动，让走路变得很困难。

En: So, you see, it's sometimes difficult to be an insect. All of nature is a kind of horror, or strife -- though none of it as horrible as you. With all of creation reflected in your forebrain.
Zh: 所以，你看见了，有时候当竹节虫也是很困难的。所有天性都是某种恐惧，或者冲突——不过没有哪个像你一样可怕。所有创造物都会反映在你的前脑。

En: All's well that ends well.
Zh: 结果好一切都好。

En: Way worse has happened to me.
Zh: 我身上还发生过更糟糕的事情。

En: Yes, I am lucky. It is nothing compared to the horror that is you -- with all of creation reflected in your forebrain. A nerve mirror of horrifying fidelity. Constant, never-ending damnation.
Zh: 是的，我很幸运。相比你的恐惧，这根本算不上什么——所有创造物都会反映在你的前脑。惊骇真实的一面神经镜子。恒定的，永无止境的诅咒。

En: Yes I'm sure. Why do you ask?
Zh: 是的，我很肯定。你为什么这么问？

En: No, I'm not. Why are you asking?
Zh: 不，我不确定。你为什么这么问？

En: Sometimes, when moulting, I regrow a lost limb. One time something went wrong and a small leg replaced a missing antenna.
Zh: 有时候，蜕皮的时候，我失去的节肢会重新长出来。有次出了点差错。一条小腿代替了失去的触须。

En: Of course, it is nothing compared to the horror that is you -- with all of creation reflected in your forebrain, in terrible fidelity, a fire mirror. Eternal, never-ending damnation.
Zh: 当然，相比你的恐惧，这根本算不上什么——所有创造物都会反映在你的前脑。在可怕真实里，一面火焰的镜子。恒定的，永无止境的诅咒。

En: It would take a million years of evolution -- or a total reversal in the condition of the world -- for your pain to end.
Zh: 那需要上百万年的进化——或者在这个世界情况下，是完全的逆转——-你的痛苦才会终结。

En: Are you the miracle?
Zh: 你是一个奇迹吗？

En: No. You are the miracle.
Zh: 不。你就是奇迹。

En: *How?*
Zh: *怎么会*？

En: The moral of our encounter is: I am a relatively median lifeform, while you are extreme, all-engulfing madness. A volatile simian nervous system, ominously new to the planet.
Zh: 我们这次相遇的寓意是：我是一种相对中性的生命形式，而你是极端的，能吞没一切的疯狂。一种反复无常的神经系统，对于这颗星球来说，是一种全新的不祥预兆。

En: You are a violent and irrepressible miracle. The vacuum of cosmos and the stars burning in it are afraid of you. Given enough time you would wipe us all out and replace us with nothing -- just by accident.
Zh: 你是暴力和难以抑制的奇迹。宇宙的真空，还有在那里燃烧的星星都害怕你。如果时间足够，你会把我们统统抹去，不会有什么东西来代替——而且对你来说可能只是个意外。

En: Kim. Am I having a violent epileptic seizure?
Zh: “金。我是不是严重癫痫发作了？”

En: It doesn't look like that, no.
Zh: “看起来不像，没有。”

En: Then, I think I'm having a vision. About the final fate of mankind.
Zh: “那样的话，我好像看到一个幻觉。关于人类最终的命运。”

En: Okay. After a second the lieutenant asks: "Is it somehow related to the case?"
Zh: “好吧。”警督顿了几秒，问到：“跟案子有什么关联吗？”

En: I am a detective.
Zh: 我是一名警探。

En: So am I. I was born to detect sucrose rewards and semiochemicals. What were you born to detect?
Zh: 我也是。我生来就是探测蔗糖奖品和化学信息素的。你生来是探测什么的？

En: I was born to detect you.
Zh: 我生来就是探测你的。

En: Yes. No one detected me for such a long, long time. For thousands of years. I dithered, out of sight. Draped myself in greenery.
Zh: 是的。已经很久，很久没有人发现我了。有1000年了。我在看不见的地方，颤抖着。为自己披上绿色的伪装。

En: This is my masterpiece.
Zh: 这是我的杰作。

En: It was very disorienting at first, but I'm keeping my shit together.
Zh: 一开始很混乱，不过我还是坚持下来了。

En: Few of us can begin to imagine the horror of you -- with all of creation reflected in your forebrain. It must be like the highest of hells, a kaleidoscope of fire and writhing glass. Eternal damnation.
Zh: 只有极少数人能想象到你的恐惧——所有创造物都会反映在你的前脑。肯定就像身处地狱地底层，一个火焰和翻腾玻璃的万花筒。永恒的诅咒。

En: It's hell. I change my mind. I want to be you.
Zh: 这是地狱。我改变主意了。我想成为你。

En: Even when you're sleeping... And when you wake, you carry it around on your neck. With eyes open that cannot help but swallow more behind the mirror. I feel great, mute empathy for you.
Zh: 甚至是在你睡觉的时候也是……而且当你醒来的时候，你可以把它挂在脖子周围，双眼睁开，在镜子背后忍不住又咽下了更多。我对你表示深深地、无能为力的同情。

En: That's absolutely nothing.
Zh: 这算不上什么。

En: You want to be a phasmid? Are you sure?
Zh: 你想当一只竹节虫？你确定吗？

En: The leg tried to move around independently, making it hard to walk.
Zh: 我的腿试着独立活动，让走路变得很困难。

En: See! It's nothing.
Zh: 看见没！什么也没有。

En: Yes, compared to the immeasurable, fiery empyrean of glass and terror in *your* head, it seems trivial. I just thought you should know.
Zh: 是的，相比那不可估量、炽热的玻璃穹顶和*你*脑袋里的恐惧来说，它似乎并不重要。我只是觉得你应该知道。

En: Maybe you would find it interesting!
Zh: 也许你会觉得很有意思呢！

En: What does it look like?
Zh: “看起来什么样？”

En: You're just staring at it, he whispers.
Zh: “你只是盯着它，”他低语到。

En: We need to know. Perhaps it's sent to us by a god?
Zh: 我们需要知道。也许是神明派来的？

En: Then all we can do is beat our fists against it? Day after day. With no answer.
Zh: 那我们唯一能做的就是举起拳头对抗它？日复一日。没有答案。

En: What exactly *are* you?
Zh: 你到底*是*什么？

En: I am an unknown species of the order Phantasmodea -- endemic to the Insulindian isola. For the last three hundred and fifty years I have hidden in plain sight, masquerading as the reeds. Moulding, cloning myself, unfolding at night to play with trash bins and buoys.
Zh: 我是竹节虫目的一种未知物种——伊苏林迪洲特有的。在过去的350年里，我一直隐藏在显而易见的地方，伪装成芦苇的样子。塑造、克隆着自己，到了晚上会现出原形，跟垃圾桶和浮标一起玩耍。

En: I have to say good bye now. I have no more thoughts. That was all.
Zh: 现在我该说再见了。我没什么想法了。就这些。

En: No. There is *one* more.
Zh: 不。还有*一个*。

En: Thank you. I also have one more thing to say to you: that woman -- turn from the ruin. Turn and go forward. Do it for the working class.
Zh: 谢谢你。我还有最后一件事要对你说：那个女人——离开了废墟。转身向前。为了工人阶级。

En: Thank you. I also have one more thing to say to you before you go. That woman -- turn from the ruin. Turn and go forward. For all mankind.
Zh: 谢谢你。在你离开之前，我还有最后一件事要对你说。那个女人——离开了废墟。转身向前。为了全人类。

En: Thank you. I also have one more thing to say to you before you go. That woman -- turn from the ruin. Turn and go forward. For Revachol.
Zh: 谢谢你。在你离开之前，我还有最后一件事要对你说。那个女人——离开了废墟。转身向前吧。为了瑞瓦肖。

En: Thank you. I also have one more thing to say to you before you go. That woman -- turn from the ruin. Turn and go forward. For freedom.
Zh: 谢谢你。在你离开之前，我还有最后一件事要对你说。那个女人——离开了废墟。转身向前。为了自由。

En: Thank you. I also have one final thing to say to you: that woman -- turn from the ruin. Turn and go *forward*.
Zh: 谢谢你。我也还有最后一件事要对你说：那个女人——远离废墟吧。转过身去，继续*向前*。

En: She was middle class. It doesn't take a three-metre stick insect to tell you that.
Zh: 她是个资产阶级。用不着一只三米高的竹节虫来告诉你这个吧。

En: That must be incredibly hard. The arthropods are in silent and meaningless awe of you. Know that we are watching -- when you're tired, when the vision spins out of control. The insects will be looking on. Rooting for you.
Zh: 那肯定特别艰难。节肢动物对你产生了一种静默无声而且毫无意义的敬畏。要知道，我们在看着你——当你厌倦的时候，当视觉失去控制的时候。昆虫会一直注视着你。支持你。

En: I can't.
Zh: 我做不到。

En: And when you fall we will come to raise you up, bud from you, banner-like, blossom from you and carry you apart in a sky funeral. In honour of your passing. (But not me, because I am just a leaf eater.)
Zh: 当你倒下，我们会来鼓舞你，在你身上发芽、宛如旗帜，在你身上开花，在天葬中将你分离。为了纪念你的逝去。（不过我不会，因为我只是个吃树叶的。）

En: In honour of your will, lieutenant-yefreitor. That you kept from falling apart, in the face of sheer terror. Day after day. Second by second.
Zh: 为了纪念你的意志，荣誉警督。面对绝对无情的恐惧，你没有崩溃。日复一日。分分秒秒。

En: In honour of your shit, lieutenant-yefreitor. Which you kept *together* in the face of total, unrelenting terror. Day after day. Second by second.
Zh: 为了纪念你这坨狗屎，荣誉警督。面对绝对无情的恐惧，你还能*坚持*自我。日复一日。分分秒秒。

En: DETECTIVE
Zh: 警探

En: ARRIVING
Zh: 闪亮

En: ON THE SCENE
Zh: 登场

En: You can also eat it. If it's a leaf you can put it in your mouth. Yum yum. Or a reed.
Zh: 你也能吃掉它。当成一片树叶塞进你的嘴里。很美味。或者是一条芦苇。

En: So you look like a reed, and you eat reeds?
Zh: 所以你看起来像芦苇，而且还吃芦苇？

En: Yes. They don't mind.
Zh: 是的。它们不介意。

En: I have stayed hidden through four forms of government and two scientific revolutions. Three -- if you count stone tools. Until I was accidentally discovered by a detective of the Citizens Militia in Revachol, disctrict of Martinaise, March, '51.
Zh: 我一直在隐藏自己，经历了四种形式的政府和两场科技革命。三场——如果算上石器的话。直到我偶然被一位瑞瓦肖公民武装的警探发现，地点是马丁内斯的瑞瓦肖区，51年3月。

En: I have stayed hidden through four forms of government and two scientific revolutions. Until I was accidentally discovered by a detective of the Citizens Militia in Revachol, district of Martinaise, March, '51.
Zh: 我一直在隐藏自己，经历了四种形式的政府和两场科技革命。直到我偶然被一位瑞瓦肖公民武装的警探发现，地点是马丁内斯的瑞瓦肖区，51年3月。

En: I went unnoticed by the first settlers and the land surveyors of the suzerain. Also by the soldiers of the Revolution and the officials of the occupation. Even the Semenese islanders who came here first, but did not stay, have not seen me.
Zh: 第一批移居者没有发现我，宗主国的土地测量师没有发现我。大革命的士兵和占领国的官员没有发现我。甚至是第一批来到这里，却没有驻留此地的赛美岛民，也没有发现我。

En: And the 4,000-year-old Seraseolitic civilization buried so deep in the sediment that you do not even know it is there -- they too did not see me.
Zh: 拥有4000年历史的塞美尼西奥族文明深深地埋藏在沉积物中，你甚至都不知道它在那里——他们也没有发现我。

En: No. No one believed I exist -- almost no one. Until you came, detective. Dripping of blood that smells like strawberries.  Across the calm sea, the first in a thousand years.
Zh: 不。没人相信我的存在——几乎一个人都没有。直到你的出现，警探。血滴散发着草莓的香味。跨越平静的大海，千年以来的第一人。

En: It may have unknown, dangerous biochemical characteristics that help it maintain its camouflage.
Zh: 它可能拥有某种未知的、危险的生物化学特性，能帮它维持伪装。

En: Are you poisonous?
Zh: 你有毒吗？

En: No. *You* are. The moral of our encounter is: I am a relatively median lifeform -- while it is you who are total, extreme madness. A volatile simian nervous system, ominously new to the planet.
Zh: 不。*你*才有。我们这次相遇的寓意是：我是一种相对中性的生命形式，而你是极端的，能吞没一切的疯狂。一种反复无常的神经系统，对于这颗星球来说，是一种全新的不祥预兆。

En: Yes. I do not have a startle display, so I use a neurodegenerative allomone to aid in camouflage. Do not worry, it is only destructive over long periods of time.
Zh: 是的。我没法靠外表吓跑人类，所以我用一种神经变性利己素来协助伪装。别担心，只有经过很长一段时间才会表现出破坏性。

En: The pale, too, came with you. No one remembers it before you. The cnidarians do not, the radially symmetricals do not. There is an almost unanimous agreement between the birds and the plants that you are going to destroy us all.
Zh: 还有灰域，也跟着你一起到来。在你之前没人记得它。刺胞动物没有，辐射对称没有。鸟类和植物之间几乎达成了一致的协议——你会把我们全部摧毁。

En: That's insane.
Zh: 这也太疯狂了。

En: The case? The case is meaningless compared to this. (Laugh nervously.) "I have totally transcended the case."
Zh: “案子？跟这个相比，案子根本毫无意义。”（神经质地笑了。）“我已经完全超脱这个案子了。”

En: *I* think we should eat it. If it's a leaf you can put it in your mouth. Or a reed. Yum yum.
Zh: *我*觉得我们应该吃掉它。当成一片树叶塞进嘴里。或者是一条芦苇。很美味。

En: The killer.
Zh: 凶手。

En: Also that.
Zh: 我和你一样。

En: No one believed I exist -- almost no one. Until you came, detective. Dripping of blood that smells like strawberries. Across the calm sea, the first in a thousand years.
Zh: 没人相信我的存在——几乎一个人都没有。直到你的出现，警探。血滴散发着草莓的香味。跨越平静的大海，千年以来的第一人。

En: No. This is just an accident.
Zh: 不。这只是个意外。

En: He is in a bad state, deteriorating fast now. He thinks I am beneficial to him, but I am not. I only quicken his deterioration.
Zh: 他的状态非常糟糕，现在正在迅速恶化。他以为我对他有益，其实不然。我只会加速他的恶化。

En: I can also detect pheromones -- the ones on you tell me that you will not eat me. And that I will benefit from your closeness. In short, I love you.
Zh: 我也探测到了费洛蒙——你身上的味道告诉我，你不会吃掉我。而且我会从与你的亲密接触中受益。简而言之，我爱你。

En: You're destroying him?
Zh: 你在毁掉他？

En: Wait, so...
Zh: 等等，所以……

En: Too sensitive of a matter.
Zh: 这件事太敏感了。

En: Yes, of course. The three metres tall stick insect would be *offended*.
Zh: 是的，当然。三米高的竹节虫会*生气*的。

En: Yes, of course. The three metres tall stick insect would be offended.
Zh: 是的，当然。三米高的竹节虫会生气的。

En: Very slowly -- and only because he won't go away. It is meant to keep them from noticing me, to interfere with the pictures in their heads. But he has looked at me too long. And I'm destroying him.
Zh: 非常慢的毁灭他——只是因为他不肯走开。本来是为了让他不注意到我，我干扰了他大脑里的画面。不过他看了我太久。我正在毁灭他。

En: Was there an ancient Seraseolitic civilization?
Zh: 是不是存在一种古代的塞美尼西奥族文明？

En: Yes -- with stone tools and silk. They too missed me, although I had not developed the mutation needed for parthenogenesis yet, and scoured the neolithic hinterland as distinct individuals, not clones.
Zh: 是的——有石器还有丝绸。他们也没发现我，尽管当时我还没发展出单性生殖必要的突变，而且还搜寻了新石器时代的腹地，作为独立的个体，而不是克隆体。

En: I don't have that kind of power.
Zh: 我没有那种力量。

En: ...how?
Zh: ……怎么做到的？

En: Wait, the pale is human made?
Zh: 等等，灰域是人造的吗？

En: It was you. Coming from the west. From the Whirling. You were coming...
Zh: 那就是你了。来自西部。来自飞旋旅社。你来到地方……

En: Okay good. Forget it.
Zh: “好吧。忘了吧。”

En: No. What's going on?
Zh: “不。出什么事了？”

En: Nothing. Just looking at the stick insect. Everything is normal.
Zh: “没什么。只是看看竹节虫。一切都很正常。”

En: I think I'm having a vision. About the final fate of mankind.
Zh: “我好像看到一个幻觉。关于人类最终的命运。”

En: Sort of.
Zh: “算是吧。”

En: No. I told you what it's about. Our fate.
Zh: “不。我告诉过你是什么了。我们的命运。”

En: I think you should back away from the unstudied species now...
Zh: “我觉得现在你应该远离这个不知名的物种……”

En: I think we should take the picture -- and then you should *back away* from the unstudied species.
Zh: “我觉得我们应该照张相——然后你应该*远离*这个不知名的物种。”

En: Of all the creatures I've met you are the scariest.
Zh: 在我见过的所有生物当中，你是最吓人的一个。

En: I will.
Zh: 我会的。

En: She was hell on Earth. It doesn't take a three-metre stick insect to tell you that.
Zh: 她是人间炼狱。用不着一只三米高的竹节虫来告诉你这个吧。

En: She was hell on Earth. It doesn't take a three-metre stick insect to tell you that.
Zh: 她是人间炼狱。用不着一只三米高的竹节虫来告诉你这个吧。

En: She was hell on Earth. It doesn't take a three-metre stick insect to tell you that.
Zh: 她是人间炼狱。用不着一只三米高的竹节虫来告诉你这个吧。

En: She was hell on Earth. It doesn't take a three-metre stick insect to tell you that.
Zh: 她是人间炼狱。用不着一只三米高的竹节虫来告诉你这个吧。

En: Good bye. A series of chirrups surrounds you, like swallows on a cliff side, as the phasmid moves its forearms -- tymbals visible on the inside of its white stalks...
Zh: 再见。一连串唧唧声环绕着你，就像悬崖边上的燕子一样，竹节虫移动前臂——鼓室在白色茎杆内侧清晰可见……

En: The arthropod follows you with its antennae. As you back off, the cracks and hisses of the tape that's come to its end grow more distant...
Zh: 节肢动物伸出触须跟随着你。当你退后时，滴答声还有磁带临近结尾的嘶嘶声，变得越来越遥远……

En: It's gone... The lieutenant looks north, with the camera uselessly hanging from his fingers.
Zh: “它走了……”警督看向北方，相机徒劳地从他指尖垂落。

En: It's gone... The lieutenant looks north, with his hand raised to his brow.
Zh: “它走了……”警督看向北方，手抬到了眉毛的位置。

En: ...and something under it! In the place it stood, bobbing there, among the reeds. A collection of items.
Zh: ……下面好像有些什么！在它站立的地方，在芦苇丛中，上下浮动。一堆藏品。

En: And just like that it's gone -- skating away across the sea's calm mirror like a skipping stone, leaving nothing but  circles on the water...
Zh: 就这样，它走了——像一颗跳跃的石头，滑过平滑如镜的海面。除了水面上的圈圈涟漪，什么也没剩下……

En: You didn't get the picture?
Zh: “你没拍到相片吗？”

En: What's that -- in the reeds?
Zh: “那是什么——在芦苇丛里？”

En: What now? [Leave.]
Zh: “现在怎么办？”[离开。]

En: He squints. "Looks like a nest of some sort? We should have a look."
Zh: 他眯起眼睛。“看起来像是某种巢穴？我们应该去看一眼。”

En: Nothing but you, a detective of the RCM, standing there with your mouth agape.
Zh: 什么都没有，除了你，RCM的一名警探，站在原地，目瞪口呆。

En: Nothing but you, a detective of the RCM, standing there with your mouth agape.
Zh: 什么都没有，除了你，RCM的一名警探，站在原地，目瞪口呆。

En: It can walk on water?
Zh: “它可以在水面上走？”

En: Apparently, yes -- like a water strider, only... He shakes his head with amazement. "I've never seen *anything* like that in my life."
Zh: “显然是的——就像水黾，只是……”他惊愕地摇摇头。“我这辈子从来没见过*这种东西*。”

En: What *is* that?
Zh: 那*是*什么？

En: Forget about it. It walked on water!
Zh: 忘了吧。它可是能在水面上走啊！

En: Looks like material for some kind of nest. You should search it.
Zh: 看来像是某种筑巢的材料。你应该搜寻一下。

En: Yes, it's light enough to do that. Keep your eyes on the prize, it looks like material for some kind of nest there. You should search it.
Zh: 是的，现在的亮度正好够。盯着战利品看，它像是某种筑巢的材料。你应该搜寻一下。

En: You're staring at me. For about three minutes now.
Zh: 你一直看着我。现在大概快三分钟了吧。

En: Am I having a violent epileptic seizure?
Zh: 我是不是严重癫痫发作了？

En: Okay good. Forget it.
Zh: 那好吧。忘了吧。

En: It doesn't look like that.
Zh: 看起来不像。

En: Then, I think I'm having a vision. About the final fate of mankind.
Zh: 那样的话，我好像看到一个幻觉。关于人类最终的命运。

En: What does it look like?
Zh: 那我看起来什么样？

En: I already did.
Zh: 我已经这么做了。

En: Okay. Just looking at the stick insect. Everything is normal.
Zh: 好吧。只是在看一只竹节虫而已。一切都很正常。

En: What if it's not you? What if the three metres tall stick insect is having the vision -- while you're alone and  petrified.
Zh: 如果不是你的呢？如果产生幻觉的是这只三米高的竹节虫呢——当一个人傻站着，目瞪口呆的时候。

En: The creature appears to have forgiven your nerves -- for now. There it still stands, a thin ghost on stilt-like legs. Antennae hang from its head, like curled strands of human hair.
Zh: 生物似乎原谅了你的神经质——暂时而已。它就站在那里，一个纤细的幽灵，腿仿佛踩着高跷一样。它的头部垂下触须，像是一缕人类的卷发。

En: Hissing and clicking, the arthropod extends its mandible-like antennae to greet you again. You're right below it, looking up at the colossal chitin of its white limbs. Its small eyes look at nothing in particular.
Zh: 嘶嘶声和嘀嗒声，节肢动物伸出类似下颌部位的触须再次向你致意。你就在它的正下方，抬头望着那白色节肢上巨大的甲壳。它的小眼睛并没有盯着什么特别的目标。

En: No. You have rarely seen him with that face.
Zh: “没有。”你很少会在他脸上看到这副表情。

En: We are now just another pair of crackpots who did not take a picture of the giant cryptid.... Maybe we'll get another chance? We *know* it's here now...
Zh: “现在，我们只是两个怪人——没能拍下那只巨大神秘生物的相片……也许我们还有机会？现在我们*知道*它在这里了……”

En: He is *very* disappointed you didn't warn him -- or plan it with him...
Zh: 他感到*非常*失望，因为你没有警告他这一点——或者跟他一起计划。

En: Have you accidentally eaten another reed-phasmid?
Zh: 你有没有不小心吃掉过其他芦苇竹节虫？

En: Yes. I once cloned myself and ate the little ones. It was winter and I woke up at the wrong time. It was an accident.
Zh: 有的。我曾经克隆过自己，吃掉了小的那些。那是一个冬季，我在错误的时间醒了过来。这是个意外。

En: The Deserter, he's been here for a *long* time.
Zh: 那个逃兵，他在这里已经待了*很长*一段时间了。

En: It is a nervous shadow cast into the world by you, eating away at reality. A great, unnatural territory. Its advent coincides with the arrival of the human mind.
Zh: 它是你在这个世界上投下的不安阴影，正侵蚀着现实。一片巨大的、超自然的领域。它的到来与人类思维的到来是一致的。

En: Wait, what is the pale?
Zh: 等等，灰域是什么？

En: We suspect it will be something like the oxygen holocaust that wiped out anaerobic life 2.6 billion years ago -- when organisms first started breathing. Only much worse.
Zh: 我们猜想，它可能会像26亿年前那场消灭了所有厌氧生命的氧气浩劫一样——那是生物体第一次开始呼吸的时候，但你情况更加糟糕。

En: Worse how?
Zh: 怎么个更糟糕法？

En: Everything your eyes touch goes back there -- behind the nerve mirror. What if you blink? Are we still here? (Please don't blink). What if you misplace us all one day -- or just forget?
Zh: 你的眼睛接触到的一切都会回到那里——神经镜像的背后。如果你眨眼了呢？我们还会在这里吗？（请不要眨眼。）如果有一天你将我们的记忆混淆起来——或者遗忘了呢？

En: Instead of air, you exhale thoughts. There are no trees that eat thoughts.
Zh: 你呼出的不是空气，而是思想。没有树木是以思想为食的。

En: So it is already happening. Soon, one of you will close your eyes -- and open them to see that none of this ever existed.
Zh: 所以它已经发生了。很快，其中一个你会闭上眼睛——再次睁开之后，会发现这一切都没有存在过。

En: But I *want* to blink and undo 12 billion years of matter expansion.
Zh: 但是我*想要*眨眼，撤消这长达120亿年的物质膨胀。

En: This is the Gloaming I've been waiting for. Ever since I woke up in the hotel room.
Zh: 这就是我一直等待的黄昏。自从我在旅社房间里醒来之后。

En: I have already forgotten the whole world once -- when I drank too much.
Zh: 我已经将整个世界遗忘过一次了——当我喝太多的时候。

En: I will be extra extra careful not to blink, stick insect. Don't worry.
Zh: 我会特别特别小心，不让自己眨眼的，竹节虫。别担心。

En: I don't want to know.
Zh: 我不想知道。

En: Also very, very dangerous.
Zh: 而且还非常、非常危险。

En: So it is *already* happening. One day, one of you will close your eyes and sigh -- and open them to see that none of this ever existed.
Zh: 所以它*已经*发生了。有一天，其中一个你会闭上眼睛叹息——再次睁开之后，会发现这一切都没有存在过。

En: Have I always thought this way?
Zh: 我一直都是这么想的吗？

En: No -- you're only thinking it *now*. This is a revelation.
Zh: 不——你只是*现在*这么想。这是一个启示。

En: Simian butcherer... Soon, one of you will close your eyes -- and open them to see that none of this ever existed.
Zh: 类人猿屠夫……很快，其中一个你会闭上双眼——再次睁开之后，会发现这一切全没有存在过。

En: Please be. Or one day one of you will close your eyes and sigh -- and open them to see that none of this ever existed.
Zh: 请务必如此。或者有一天，其中一个你会闭上眼睛叹息——再次睁开之后，会发现这一切全没有存在过。

En: Yeah -- real normal. There's a giant stick insect there. Back off, before it eats you...
Zh: “是啊——非常普通。那里有一只巨大的竹节虫。退后，免得它把你给吃了……”

En: Of all the creatures I've met you are the kindest.
Zh: 在我见过的所有生物当中，你是最善良的。

En: I will try.
Zh: 我会试试。

En: No. There are no more thoughts.
Zh: 不。没有更多想法了。

En: A series of chirrups surrounds you, like swallows on a cliff side, as the phasmid moves its forearms -- tymbals visible on the inside of its white stalks...
Zh: 一连串唧唧声环绕着你，就像悬崖边上的燕子一样，竹节虫移动前臂——鼓室在白色茎杆内侧清晰可见……

En: The Insulindian phasmid, he says with his voice lowered in awe.
Zh: “伊苏林迪竹节虫，”他压低了声音，充满敬畏。

En: ...the Insulindian phasmid, he finishes your sentence in awe.
Zh: “……伊苏林迪竹节虫，”他敬畏地接完了你的句子。

En: Cuno can't believe how bad he is, without a camera -- in this situation the binoclard would be superior in every way.
Zh: 坤诺不敢相信自己究竟有多糟糕，居然没有相机——在这种情况下，四眼仔在各方面都更有优势一些。

En: Wait -- Insulindian Phasmid? How do you know this?
Zh: 等等——伊苏林迪竹节虫？你是怎么知道的？

En: Wait, how do you know about the phasmid?
Zh: “等等，你怎么知道这个竹节虫的？”

En: God, Kim had a camera. Do you?
Zh: “天啊，我记得金有一台相机。你也有吗？”

En: Everybody does. It's the fucking Insulindian phasmid.
Zh: “所有人都知道。这他妈就是伊苏林迪竹节虫。”

En: Oh my god, *Kim* had the camera!
Zh: 我的天啦，*金*有一台相机！

En: Cuno, do you have a camera or something?
Zh: “坤诺，你有相机或者什么的吗？”

En: Yeah... He shakes his head. "I don't have a camera. That sucks about Cuno."
Zh: “啊……”他摇摇头。“我没有相机。坤诺感觉他妈的糟透了。”

En: Cuno can't believe how lame he is -- without the camera right now. Should have stolen one, a real cop would have one...
Zh: 坤诺不敢相信自己究竟有多差劲——现在居然没有相机。应该偷一台的，一个真正的警察就该有相机……

En: Wait, we have to do something!
Zh: “等等，我们必须做点什么！”

En: Approach carefully.
Zh: 小心接近。

En: This is so sick. It *likes* you... The kid's mouth is agape.
Zh: “这太恶心了。它*很像*你……”小孩长大了嘴巴。

En: Fuck. Where did it go?
Zh: “该死。它去哪了？”

En: You never had a chance. There was something off the moment you approached it... The creature didn't *like* you.
Zh: 你从未有过机会。当你靠近的它那一瞬间，感觉就有什么不太对劲的地方……那个生物不*喜欢*你。

En: Cuno... there's something there.
Zh: “坤诺……那里有什么东西。”

En: A nest? The whisper is anxious. "We can't get to it yet, don't scare it off. Maybe later..."
Zh: “一个巢？”他压低的声音有些紧张。“我们暂时还不能过去，别把它吓跑了。也许之后再说吧……”

En: Whoah... maybe it's poison? Fucking hell... The kid watches you apprehensively.
Zh: “哇哦……它不会有毒吧？太操蛋了……”小孩担忧地看着你。

En: Cuno. Am I having a violent epileptic seizure?
Zh: “坤诺。我是不是严重癫痫发作了？”

En: Doesn't look like you're spazzin' out he whispers behind you. "Cuno knows all about seizures."
Zh: “看起来你是没疯，”他在你背后小声说到。“坤诺非常了解癫痫。”

En: What does it look like?
Zh: “那看起来是什么样的？”

En: Okay good. Forget it.
Zh: “那好吧。忘了吧。”

En: No, quit frontin'. What's up with you? We're a team, cop.
Zh: “不，别装腔作势了。你这是怎么了？我们是一队的，是警察。”

En: You're just staring at the giant insect.
Zh: “你只是盯着那只大昆虫看。”

En: Nothing. Just looking at the stick insect. Everything is normal.
Zh: “没什么。只是看看竹节虫。一切都很正常。”

En: I think I'm having a vision. About the final fate of mankind.
Zh: “我好像看到一个幻觉。关于人类最终的命运。”

En: Cool. So's Cuno -- Cuno's also having a vision of a *giant insect*. And it's *real*. Back off before it eats you...
Zh: “牛逼。坤诺也是——坤诺也看到了一只*大昆虫*的幻觉。而且它是*真的*。赶快退后，免得它把你吃了……”

En: It's gone... Cuno stares to the north. "Between those reeds there. Fucking hell it can..."
Zh: “它走了……”坤诺看向北方。“就在那边的芦苇丛里。妈的它居然可以……”

En: What now? [Leave.]
Zh: “现在怎么办？”[离开。]

En: What's that, in the water?
Zh: “那是什么，水里面？”

En: It can walk on water.
Zh: “它可以在水面上走。”

En: The fuck... He squints. "Is that *ceramic*? And more stuff -- like a *nest* in the reeds. We should peep it... fucking hell..."
Zh: “妈的……”他眯起眼睛。“那是*陶瓷*吗？还有更多东西——芦苇丛里像是有个*窝*。我们应该偷瞄一下……我去……”

En: Like a water spider, or like -- one of those water walkers... He's lost for words, just pants from excitement. "This cop shit is *insane*"
Zh: “像是一只水蜘蛛，或者……那种水上漂……”他激动地话都说不出来了。“当警察真尼玛太*疯狂*了。”

En: Damn it! Damn it! I didn't get it right... [Leave in rage.]
Zh: “该死！该死！我没弄好……”[愤怒地离开。]

En: Meanwhile, in the antechamber of the Station 57 lazareth, a neatly packed pair of cargo pants and a black bomber jacket sit in a locker. Nested on the jacket -- a small block of milled aluminium, tucked away in a leather case.
Fuel -- this should do the trick...
Zh: “燃油——这个应该管用……”

En: Empty... Let's look elsewhere.
Zh: “空的……我们去别处看看吧。”

En: Bell boys...
Zh: “服务员……”

En: The same rare brand... from Land's End, before. Interesting.
Zh: 这个牌子很罕见……之前在地之角见过。有意思。

En: Yes. It all adds up. He stares into the can for a second.
Zh: “是的。这样全都合情合理了。”他盯着罐子看了一两秒。

En: Affirmative.
Zh: 肯定的语气。

En: Why not? We have the weapon and ballistics. As you say it's... He looks north, over the fortification. "Pretty *boo-yah*."
Zh: “为什么不呢。武器和弹道学都已经确认。现在可以说是……”他看向北边，越过防御工事。“挺*哦耶*的。”

En: Then again... his face twitches.
Zh: 又来了……他的脸在抽搐。

En: He feels... uncomfortable suddenly.
Zh: 他突然感觉到……不太舒服。

En: He feels... uncomfortable suddenly.
Zh: 他突然感觉到……不太舒服。

En: There's a firing slit in the wall in front of you. Like a little window...
Zh: 你面前的墙上有一条射击口。就像一扇小窗户……

En: In our defence -- nothing pointed here. Many, many leads pointed elsewhere.
Zh: “按我们的话来说——这里没什么突出的。很多，很多线索都指向了别处。”

En: Inspect the wall through which the shot was made again.
Zh: 再次检查墙壁，子弹就是通过这里射出去的。

En: Inspect the wall.
Zh: 检查墙壁。

En: Touch the concrete first.
Zh: 先摸摸混凝土。

En: Quite old, and grimy from years without cleaning by anything other than the rain.
Zh: 非常古老，多年来没有被雨水之外的东西清洗过，所以还很肮脏。

En: Got you. [Leave.]
Zh: 抓到你了。[离开。]

En: There's a rain-soaked mattress on a concrete slab, only half-covered by the crumbling roof. At the head of it -- double embrasures -- firing slits, like two eyes in the wall.
Zh: 混凝土板上有一张被雨水浸透的床垫，只有一半被摇摇欲坠的屋顶遮住了。在最前面——是两个炮眼——射击口，就像墙壁的两只眼睛。

En: B triple prime... The lieutenant lowers his voice, stepping closer with his hand on his gun. "This looks like a good place to shoot from."
Zh: “B点位'''……”警督压低声音，把手放在墙上，靠上前来。“看来这是个射击的好地方。”

En: Look through the hole in the concrete.
Zh: 透过射击孔观察。

En: Inspect the mattress.
Zh: 检查床垫。

En: The springs screech as you lean on the mattress and crane your neck to look out...
Zh: 你倚靠在床垫上，伸出脖子往外看的时候，身下的弹簧发出了刺耳的声音。

En: Trepidation. A tingling feeling in your stomach...
Zh: 恐惧。你的胃部一阵刺痛……

En: A single-person mattress. Modern, civilian use. Brand name: Marjorie. There's a fuel stain on the cover, along with cigarette burns.
Zh: 一张单人床垫。现代，民用的。品牌名：马乔伊斯里。表面有燃料留下的污点，还有烟头烫出的印记。

En: Pick one out of the can.
Zh: 从罐子里拿出一个。

En: Back off.
Zh: 退后。

En: A small piece of Martinaise coastline opens up in the square in front of you, like a tiny landscape painting, one kilometre across the water. Dead in the centre is the Whirling-in-Rags.
Zh: 一小片马丁内斯的海岸线在你眼前的四方孔中展开，就像一副微型风景画，横跨海面一公里。正中央就是褴褛飞旋。

En: A small piece of Martinaise coastline opens up in the square in front of you -- like a tiny landscape painting, one kilometre across the water. The ruins look familiar.
Zh: 一小片马丁内斯的海岸线在你眼前的四方孔中展开——就像一副微型风景画，横跨海面一公里。这片废墟看起来很熟悉。

En: The red chimney and collapsed back of the four-story tenement in front of the Whirling-in-Rags -- Rue de Saint Ghislaine 10. The Doomed Commercial Area.
Zh: 褴褛飞旋前方是红色的烟囱和倒塌的后墙——属于一栋四层高的住宅楼——圣吉莱纳路10号。诅咒商业区。

En: The red chimney and collapsed rear wall of the four-story tenement in front of the Whirling-in-Rags -- Rue de Saint Ghislaine 10.
Zh: 褴褛飞旋前方是红色的烟囱和倒塌的后墙——属于一栋四层高的住宅楼——圣吉莱纳路10号。

En: A towering skyscraper, its top floors shaved off by artillery fire -- Capeside Apartments: Rue de Saint Ghislaine 33A and 33B.
Zh: 一座高耸的摩天大楼，顶层已经被炮火削去——岬岸公寓：圣吉莱纳路33A和33B。

En: On the left...
Zh: 左边……

En: On the right...
Zh: 右边……

En: And between the two...
Zh: 两者中间……

En: The box-shaped silhouette of the Whirling-in-Rags. You see the rooftop at night -- the upstairs window of Klaasje's room reflecting a streetlamp outside.
Zh: 是褴褛飞旋盒子形状的剪影。你看着夜色中的屋顶——卡拉洁房间楼上的窗户反射出街灯的光芒。

En: The box-shaped silhouette of the Whirling-in-Rags. You see a small fleck of white on the rooftop -- the upstairs window of Klaasje's room in the rain, reflecting light.
Zh: 是褴褛飞旋盒子形状的剪影。它那倾斜的屋顶。屋顶上一点微弱的白光吸引了你的眼球——那是雨中卡拉洁房间楼上的窗户，反射出光亮。

En: The box-shaped silhouette of the Whirling-in-Rags. You see a small fleck of white on the rooftop -- the upstairs window of Klaasje's room in the snow, reflecting light.
Zh: 是褴褛飞旋盒子形状的剪影。它那倾斜的屋顶。屋顶上一点微弱的白光吸引了你的眼球——那是雪中卡拉洁房间楼上的窗户，反射出光亮。

En: The box-shaped silhouette of the Whirling-in-Rags. Its sloped roof. A tiny fleck of light catches your eye on the rooftop -- sunlight reflecting off the upstairs window of Klaasje's room.
Zh: 是褴褛飞旋盒子形状的剪影。它那倾斜的屋顶。屋顶上一点微弱的光芒吸引了你的眼球——那是阳光反射在卡拉洁房间楼上的窗户上。

En: Motherfucker.
Zh: “狗杂种。”

En: There it is.
Zh: “就是这个。”

En: I can't be 100% certain, but...
Zh: “我不能100%的肯定，不过……”

En: What? Do you have line of sight to the window?
Zh: “什么？你能看到窗户吗？”

En: Do you have line of sight to the window?
Zh: “你能看到窗户吗？”

En: Kim, with a pair of binoculars, I would be able to see *inside* the room.
Zh: “金，如果有一副望远镜的话，我连房间*里面*都看得见。”

En: Whenever you wanted. Like your own little dollhouse...
Zh: 只要你想，随时可以。就像你自己的一栋小玩具屋……

En: A pair of binoculars? Or a scope of a *rifle*? He points to the makeshift bed. "You'd be prone, lying on the mattress, barrel resting on the embrasure..."
Zh: “一副望远镜？或者是*步枪*的瞄准镜？”他指着临时床铺。“你可以俯卧，躺在床垫上，枪管搁在射击孔上……”

En: Yes -- there's an opening between 33A and 10. I can see to the roof.
Zh: “是的——33A号和10号之间有一个开口。我可以看见屋顶。”

En: More than that.
Zh: 看见的不只窗户。

En: Cheek against the cheek rest, hand on the hair trigger. On a calm day like this...
Zh: 脸颊紧贴枪托，手指扣在微力扳机上。在这么一个无风的日子里……

En: Kim, I could make it -- I could make the shot.
Zh: “金，我可以的——我也能打中。”

En: I don't want to boast...
Zh: 我不想吹牛……

En: Good. He pats you on the back, three small pats in a row. "I think we have it, detective. The origin of the shot. This is the *sniper's nest*."
Zh: “好的。”他拍拍你的后背，一连拍了三下。“我想我们找到了，警探。射击的原点。这里就是*狙击手掩体*。”

En: *Why* didn't we come here before?
Zh: “*为什么*我们之前没来这里呢？”

En: That embrasure... What can you see through it?
Zh: “那个射击孔……你能透过它看见什么？”

En: This is B triple prime -- on the island... A nest.
Zh: 这里是B点的位置——在小岛上……一个掩体。

En: And an empty can of beans on the ground next to it -- filled to the brim with cigarette butts.
Zh: 旁边的地上还放着一个空的豆子罐头——里面装满了烟蒂。

En: The silhouette of a tobacco picker adorns the paper filter. The brand: Tioumoutiri.
Zh: 过滤纸上装饰着一个烟草采摘者的剪影。品牌名称：提欧穆特里。

En: Contemporary Revacholians prefer Drouin (a local blend from the southern islands) or Astra, the legendary cigarette from Graad. Tioumoutiri is favoured by older men for its paper filter tips, sweet smell, and added tar.
Zh: 同代的瑞瓦肖人更喜欢德鲁安（来自南部岛屿的一个本地品牌）或者是阿斯特拉，来自格拉德传奇香烟。提欧穆特里因为尖端的过滤纸，味道香和重焦油而更受到老年人的欢迎。

En: Tioumoutiri. Like the ones we found at Land's End, remember?
Zh: “提欧穆特里。跟我们在地之角找到的一样，还记得吗？”

En: I saw the same brand of cigarettes extinguished in Land's End. (Point west.)
Zh: “我在地之角看见过同一个品牌的烟蒂。”（指向西边。）

En: Someone's been smoking Tioumoutiri cigarettes. Not a lot of that around.
Zh: “有人在吸提欧穆特里牌香烟。这附近可不常见。”

En: I may have been wrong -- when I said it was unimportant. He stares into the can for a second. "This means the same person could have visited both locations."
Zh: “我可能是搞错了——当我说这个不重要的时候。”他出神地看了罐子一两秒。“这就意味着同一个人在这两个地方出现过。”

En: Could be a coincidence. Or -- the same person has visited Land's End and... He looks around, "...here."
Zh: “可能是个巧合。或者——同一个人去过地之角，而且……”他看了看周围，“……还来过这里。”

En: I didn't see any signs of smoking inside, though. If people live there, they keep it tidy -- this here may also be a smoking spot.
Zh: “不过，我在里面没有看到任何抽烟的迹象。如果有人生活在这里，那收拾得还是挺干净的——这里也可能是一个吸烟点。”

En: Someone's been smoking Tioumoutiri cigarettes.
Zh: “有人在抽提欧穆特里牌香烟。”

En: [Turn away.]
Zh: [转过身去。]

En: No, wait. He points to the embrasure. "This is important, I have a feeling... What can you see?"
Zh: “不，等等。”他指向射击孔。“这很重要，我有种感觉……你能看见什么？”

En: A good place to hide. Cosy. Relatively safe from the rain... He pokes the mattress.
Zh: “一个很好的藏身地点。舒适。遮风避雨性相对较好……”他戳了戳床垫。

En: A good place to hide. Relatively safe from the snow and the rain...
Zh: 一个很好的藏身地点。遮挡雨雪效果相对较好……

En: This looks like a good place to aim from... The lieutenant looks around. He steps closer with his hand on his gun.
Zh: “这里看起来像是一个瞄准的好地方……”警督看了看周围，把手放在枪上，上前一步。

En: He nods. "The smoker's a clean person. I didn't see any signs of smoking inside. Keeps it tidy -- prefers to come out here to smoke."
Zh: 他点点头。“抽烟者是个很爱干净的人。我没看见里面有任何吸烟的痕迹。保持整洁——更喜欢来外面的这个位置抽烟。”

En: What does that mean? Do you have line of sight to the window?
Zh: “那是什么意思？你能看到窗户吗？”

En: I think we have it. The origin of the shot -- this is the *sniper's nest*. He pats you on the back, three small pats in a row.
Zh: 他拍拍你的后背，一连拍了三下。“我想我们找到了，警探。射击的原点。这里就是*狙击手掩体*。”

En: What are you talking about -- "Can't be certain?" It's certain.
Zh: 你在说什么——“不能确定？”这很肯定了。

En: I can see it, he nods. "Through the scope of a rifle. The shooter would be prone, lying on the mattress, barrel resting on the embrasure."
Zh: “我能看到，”他点点头。“通过步枪的瞄准镜。枪手可以俯卧，躺在床垫上，枪管搁在射击孔上。”

En: Why? We don't go everywhere in a thousand metre radius of the crime scene. That's not procedure.
Zh: “为什么？我们不能跑遍犯罪现场直径1000米内的所有地方吧。这不符合程序。”

En: Better late than never.
Zh: “迟到总比不到好。”

En: Finally.
Zh: “总算找到了。”

En: Boo-yah. Master cop work.
Zh: “哦耶。大师级警探。”

En: He nods. "Nothing pointed here -- many leads pointed elsewhere."
Zh: 他点点头。“没什么线索指向这里——很多线索都指向了别处。”

En: Seven people are dead.
Zh: “死了6个人。”

En: Six people are dead. We could have prevented it.
Zh: “死了7个人。我们本来可以阻止的。”

En: Don't beat yourself up, officer. We did not put guns in their hands, or get them drunk. He looks north, over the fortification, then adds:
Zh: “别自责了，警官。不是我们把枪放到他们手里的，也不是我们把他们灌醉的。”

En: It's only *moderately* effective cop work until we have the weapon. It will not be, how do you say it... He looks north, over the fortification. "*Boo-yah*, until we have that..."
Zh: “在我们发现武器之前，这只是*适度*有效的警察工作。它还不能说是……你是怎么说的……”他看向北边，越过了防御工事。“*哦耶*，直到我们发现那个……”

En: You're right.
Zh: “你说得对。”

En: He looks north, over the fortification. Then at the mattress.
Zh: 他看向北边，越过了防御工事。然后看着床垫。

En: We will make up for it. Here. I feel it.
Zh: 他看向北边，越过了防御工事，然后补了一句：“我们可以弥补的。就在这里。我能感觉到。”

En: The lieutenant pauses. Regret comes over him.
Zh: 警督停顿了一下。悔意将他包围了。

En: He's conflicted for a second. There's guilt there, it takes him a moment to rationalize it away.
Zh: 他抵触了一两秒。愧疚依然存在，他花了一些时间为自己辩解。

En: I could take the shot.
Zh: 我可以开枪命中。

En: This is where the shot came from...
Zh: 这就是子弹射出来的地方……

En: Cheek against the cheek rest, hand on the hair trigger. On a calm day like this...
Zh: 脸贴着面颊托，手放在微力扳机上。在这样一个无风的日子里……

En: ...but not with 100% certainty.
Zh: ……但是没有100%的可能性。

En: The wind blows suddenly. The clear surface of the water shudders. Yes. This is it.
Zh: 突然起风了。平静的水面泛起涟漪。是的，就是这里。

En: Is the shooter still here?
Zh: 枪手还在这里吗？

En: Could the shooter still be... here?
Zh: “枪手会不会还在……这里？”

En: The wind picks up slowly. The clear surface of the water shudders. Yes. This is it.
Zh: 风力渐渐增强。平静的水面泛起涟漪。是的，就是这里。

En: In the North, something moves. Leaving circles on the water. Long stalks in the shallows...
Zh: 在北边，有什么东西在移动。水面上留下一圈涟漪。浅滩处长长的茎杆……

En: Where? He looks behind his back.
Zh: “哪里？”他看向身后。

En: In Martinaise.
Zh: “在马丁内斯。”

En: On this island.
Zh: “在这座小岛上。”

En: Right *here*. (Point at the mattress.)
Zh: “就在*这里*。”（指着床垫。）

En: You think so? he whispers, pointing to the mattress. "We would *see* them if they were here."
Zh: “你这么认为吗？”他指着床垫，低语到。“如果他来过这里，我们应该能*看见*的。”

En: Perhaps it's a...
Zh: 也许是一个……

En: No, officer. It's not an *invisible* shooter. But... He lowers his voice even further. "This island, on the other hand..."
Zh: “不，警官。这不是一个*隐形的*枪手。不过……”他的声音又低沉了不少。“另一方面，这座小岛……”

En: But. He lowers his voice again. "This island on the other hand..."
Zh: “但是。”他再次压低了声音。“另一方面，这座小岛……”

En: I have always assumed it's someone local. He nods.
Zh: 他点点头。“我一直假设是本地人做的。”

En: He does not answer, just nods. With his back hunched, he looks around once more and says...
Zh: 他没有回答，只是点点头。他弓着背，又四下看了看，然后说……

En: We should move. Now.
Zh: “我们该走了。现在。”

En: Or *she*. He almost whispers. "We should move."
Zh: “或者是*她*。”他几乎是在耳语了。“我们该走了。”

En: You think he's here?
Zh: “你觉得他在这里？”

En: No answer comes. Not even a whisper on the water.
Zh: 没有回答。水面上没有分毫动静。

En: YES.
Zh: 是的。

En: Anything?
Zh: “有什么发现吗？”

En: Someone been hidin' here like a bitch, he whispers. "Maybe  jerkin' off too?"
Zh: “有人像婊子一样藏在这里，”他低语到。“也许还打过飞机？”

En: A rain-soaked mattress on a concrete slab. In front of it -- double embrasures -- firing slits like two eyes in the wall.
Zh: 混凝土板上有一张被雨水浸透的床垫，只有一半被摇摇欲坠的屋顶遮住了。在最前面——是两个炮眼——射击口，就像墙壁的两只眼睛。

En: Where? Cuno looks around the small compartment-sized room.
Zh: “哪里？”坤诺四下环顾着这个隔间大小的空间。

En: Motherfucker.
Zh: “狗娘养的。”

En: There it is.
Zh: “就是这个。”

En: I can't be 100% certain, but...
Zh: “我不能100%的肯定，不过……”

En: Motherfucker? He sounds excited. "You seein' the window or not?"
Zh: “狗娘养的？”他听起来很兴奋。“你看不看的见窗户？”

En: There what is, the window?
Zh: “是什么，窗户吗？”

En: You see the window or not?
Zh: “你看不看的见窗户？”

En: What are you talking about -- "Can't be certain?"
Zh: 你在说什么——“不能确定？”

En: More than that.
Zh: 不仅如此。

En: Cuno fucking knew it. This a sniper's nest, right? Fuckin' assassin action... Cuno *barely* understands what's happening -- but he likes the shit out of it.
Zh: “坤诺他妈的知道。这里是狙击手掩体，对吗？他妈的刺杀行动……坤诺*勉强*能明白到底发生了什么——不过他喜欢这样。”

En: In Martinaise.
Zh: “在马丁内斯。”

En: On this island.
Zh: “在这座小岛上。”

En: Right *here*.
Zh: “就在*这里*。”

En: Yeah, detective Cuno thinks it's some local asshole too. These people are rats...
Zh: “哦耶，坤诺警探也觉得是本地的混球。这些人都卑鄙的很……”

En: Right fucking on. He stops. A shudder.
Zh: “他妈的没错。”他停下来。打了个哆嗦。

En: You see someone here? He points to the mattress. "Fuckin' invisible shooter? Spooky shit..."
Zh: “你在这里看见谁了吗？”他指向床垫。“隐形枪手吗？狗屁幽灵吗……”

En: No, but what about... He points to the embrasure. "What's out there?"
Zh: “不，但是……”他指向击孔。“那外面有什么？”

En: No. You feel there's something important here.  The embrasure. Look again...
Zh: 不。你感觉这里有些很重要的东西。射击孔。再看一次……

En: Let's get a move on. We're out in the open here...
Zh: “我们赶紧吧。这里可是在明处……”

En: Yes -- there's an opening between 33A and 10. I can see to the roof.
Zh: “是的——33A号和10号之间有一个开口。我可以看见屋顶。”

En: Cuno, with a pair of binoculars, I would be able to see *inside* the room.
Zh: “坤诺，如果有一幅望远镜的话，我连房间*里面*都看得见。”

En: Someone's been smoking here.
Zh: “有人在这里抽烟。”

En: An old man's brand of cigarettes....
Zh: “一个老人喜欢的香烟品牌……”

En: Our shooter's a heavy smoker.
Zh: “我们的枪手是一个烟鬼。”

En: Tioumoutiri. Like the ones we found at Land's End, remember?
Zh: “提欧穆特里。跟我们在地之角找到的一样，还记得吗？”

En: Yes. This guy gets around.
Zh: “是的。这家伙在四处走动。”

En: Noted. The lieutenant stares into the can for a second.
Zh: “注意到了。”警督盯着罐子看了一两秒。

En: Say nothing, drop the cigarette back into the can.
Zh: 什么也不说，把香烟扔回罐子。

En: Well, guess what? I *am* an enemy commander.
Zh: “你猜怎么着？我*就是*敌方指挥官。”

En: Cities can't talk. It's bourgeois idealism... I don't wanna talk about this shit anymore.
Zh: “城市不会说话的。这是资产阶级的唯心主义……我不想再提这种破事了。”

En: This looked very much like the murder weapon. It can be used against him -- later.
Zh: 这个看起来很像是凶器，可以用来对付他——之后再说。

En: This looked very much like the murder weapon. It can be used against him to get a confession -- in time...
Zh: 这个看起来很像凶器。可以用来对付他，让他招供——等到合适的时候……

En: Good, *Cuno*. Be that. He nods toward Martinaise. "I saw the *traitors* of this city turn the lights back on. More and more each year. Ruins, glittering in the dark, like a fucking merry-go-round..."
Zh: “很好，*坤诺*。那样就好。”他朝着马丁内斯点点头。“我看着这座城市的*叛徒*把灯又重新打开了。一年比一年更多。废墟，在黑暗中闪闪发光，像一个该死的旋转木马……”

En: A shudder of disgust passes his right side. His left side remains motionless.
Zh: 一阵嫌恶的颤抖掠过他身体右侧。右侧还是纹丝不动。

En: He is not afraid of such displays. This was the wrong move...
Zh: 他不害怕这个。这一步走错了。

En: The present...
Zh: 现在……

En: He doesn't recognize it.
Zh: 他没有认出来。

En: But he can now.
Zh: 但他现在可以了。

En: He would answer, but something happened. It's like his tape cut off suddenly...
Zh: 他想回答，但是发生了一些事。就好像他的磁带突然间中断了……

En: My pig asked you a question. Quit spazzin' out and tell him about the... The kid doesn't get to finish the sentence.
Zh: “我家猪头问你问题呢。别再乱动了，告诉他……”男孩没有把话说完。

En: The *position*? Sounds like a hiding place...
Zh: *位置*？听起来像是个隐蔽的地方……

En: i wanna see phasmid with kim
Zh: 我想跟他一起看竹节虫

En: i wanna see phasmid with cuno
Zh: 我想跟坤诺一起看竹节虫

En: I want to ask again about the people you don't like.
Zh: “我想再问问那些你不喜欢的人。”

En: An old man wearing tracksuit trousers leans on the frame stock of his rifle. He gathers a big ball of spit in his mouth...
Zh: 一个穿着运动服裤的老人正靠在自己步枪的枪托上。他的嘴里积攒了一大口唾沫……

En: ...then spits it out into the extinguished fire before him. He raises his black eyes, hooded by creased eyelids, to meet yours.
Zh: ……然后一口吐在了面前熄灭的火堆里。他抬起黑色的眼睛，眼皮周围满是皱纹，随后对上了你的目光。

En: He's practically tearing up from spite. Hatred got the best of him a long time ago. This man hates everything.
Zh: 他几乎要被怨恨撕碎了。很久以前，仇恨就占据了他的内心。这个男人痛恨所有一切。

En: Nice gun you got there.
Zh: “你这把枪不错啊。”

En: Sir, I need you to put down that gun so we can talk further. We're with the police. (Proceed.)
Zh: “先生，我需要你把枪放下，这样我们也好进一步聊聊。我们是警察。”（继续。）

En: Sir, I need you to put down that gun so we can talk further. I'm with the police. (Proceed.)
Zh: “先生，我需要你把枪放下，这样我们也好进一步聊聊。我是警察。”（继续。）

En: Pick up the gun lying in the sand.
Zh: 拾起沙地里的枪。

En: His gaze follows your motions. The rifle feels surprisingly light in your hand, frame stocked and patched in places with tape and wire.
Zh: 他的目光追随着你的一举一动。步枪在你手里感觉很轻，枪托用胶带和电线固定在一起。

En: It's not nice, it's a piece of shit. He shrugs. "But it gets the job done."
Zh: “没什么不错的，一坨垃圾罢了。”他耸耸肩。“不过活还是干完了。”

En: Is that a Belle-Magrave?
Zh: “那是贝莱-马格雷吗？”

En: What make of rifle is that, exactly?
Zh: “这支步枪到底是什么牌子的？”

En: It's a Triangong 4-46.
Zh: “这是特里安戈4-46。”

En: A Samaran rifle... How did you get hold of one?
Zh: “一支萨马拉步枪……你是怎么弄到手的？”

En: Southeast Samaran-made. Exotic. Must be defunct too. No modern rifle manufacturer of that name springs to mind.
Zh: 东南部萨马拉人的作品。制造商肯定也已经倒闭了。没有想到哪家现代步枪制造商叫这个名字的。

En: A Samaran-made rifle.
Zh: “一支萨马拉步枪。”

En: It was sent to us by our brothers in the Hsin-Yao Commune. Military aid. He pats the rifle.
Zh: “是我们赫辛欧公社的兄弟送给我们的。军事援助。”他轻轻拍了拍步枪。

En: How did you get hold of it?
Zh: “你是怎么弄到手的？”

En: You're a glorified night-watchman. He looks you in the eye. "This is a service rifle. I can only lay it down before an enemy commander of corresponding rank."
Zh: “你不过是个冠冕堂皇的值班保安。”他望着你的眼睛。“这是一支军用步枪。我只会在级别相当的敌方指挥官面前放下枪。”

En: Unclouded by cataracts -- his eyesight is sharp.
Zh: 没有白内障——他的视力非常好。

En: The lieutenant pulls his pistol from the holster.
Zh: 警督从枪套里掏出手枪。

En: He scoffs. The corner of his black eye twitches. He does not reply to the command.
Zh: 他嘲弄地笑了起来，眼角抽搐。他没有回应这条命令。

En: His elbows rest on the frame stock, calmly for now, but he may still get it in his hands. Looks like he knows the weapon...
Zh: 他的胳膊肘依靠在枪托上，目前还是一副平心静气的样子，不过他还是可以把它拿在手上。看起来他很懂武器……

En: Yell at him, now! LOUD!
Zh: 冲他大喊，现在！大声一点！

En: Put the weapon down, NOW!
Zh: “把枪放下，现在！”

En: Kim? (Turn to the lieutenant.)
Zh: “金？”（转向警督。）

En: I *am* an enemy commander of rank -- put it down.
Zh: “我*的确*是敌军的指挥官——把枪放下。”

En: Warned him with anger.
Zh: 愤怒地警告他。

En: Erasure of Hsin Yao Commune.
Zh: 赫辛欧公社的覆灭。

En: Should've pushed harder.
Zh: 应该再逼紧一些。

En: Yelling. It's ineffective.
Zh: 大声喊叫。完全不起作用。

En: Caught him lying.
Zh: 抓到他在撒谎。

En: Dresscode: RCM official.
Zh: 着装要求：RCM警官。

En: Dresscode: Royalist reenactor.
Zh: 着装要求：保皇派重演者。

En: Okay, but keep the gun down while we talk.
Zh: “好吧，不过我们说话的时候要把枪放下。”

En: No. The lieutenant aims his pistol square at the man's head and says:
Zh: “不。”警督用手枪瞄准男人的头，说到：

En: The words "I *am* an enemy commander" sound cold as iron from your lungs. The old man still hugs his gun...
Zh: “我*是*敌军指挥官”这句话听起来冰冷如铁。老人还是抱着他的枪……

En: It's a good line but your voice slips on *commander*, producing a miserly little squeak. Sounds like you're afraid.
Zh: 这是一句很好的台词，不过在说到*指挥官*的时候有些破音，声音有些尖锐。听起来像是你害怕了。

En: It's a good line, but your voice slips on *commander*, producing a little squeak. Sounds like you're afraid.
Zh: 这是一句很好的台词，不过在说到*指挥官*的时候有些破音，声音有些尖锐。听起来像是你害怕了。

En: And what rank would that be, dog?
Zh: “那你是什么级别的呢，狗杂种？”

En: A big time operator of the pederast army. How about I keep it, huh? Hand it over to a real killer. A *briscade*.
Zh: “基佬大军的一流统帅。不如我还是留着它吧，怎么样？把它交给一个真正的杀手。一个*老杆子*。”

En: Lieutenant.
Zh: “警督。”

En: A big wheel of the 4th Regiment of the pederast army. He sighs. "To hell with it. It's a walking stick anyway...."
Zh: “一个很有影响力的人。隶属基佬大军第4军团。”他叹了口气。“见鬼去吧。反正它就是一根拐杖……”

En: It's out of bullets. The old man lays the rifle down, carelessly -- then stares at it, just lying there.
Zh: “里面没子弹了。”老人放下步枪，一点也不小心——然后就这么盯着它，躺在那里。

En: The lieutenant aims his pistol square at the man's forehead.
Zh: 警督用手枪瞄准了男人的额头。

En: Put it down *now*, sir.
Zh: “*现在*就把它放下，先生。”

En: It's out of bullets. The old man lays the rifle down, carelessly, then looks at it lying there.
Zh: “里面没子弹了。”老人漫不经心地放下步枪，然后就这么盯着它，躺在那里。

En: Lieutenant-Yefreitor.
Zh: “荣誉警督。”

En: Lieutenant Double-Yefreitor.
Zh: “双重荣誉警督。”

En: You don't see a magazine in the well.
Zh: 你没有看见弹匣。

En: There does not seem to be a magazine in the well...  the rifle's side is clearly visible.
Zh: 井里似乎没有杂志……步枪的侧面清晰可见。

En: You don't even have a magazine.
Zh: “你甚至连弹匣都没有。”

En: You're right. It's a good thing I got one in the chamber.
Zh: “你说得对。幸好我的枪膛里还有一发。”

En: I'm not from the homo army.
Zh: “我不是同性恋部队的。”

En: What's a *briscade*?
Zh: “*老杆子*是什么？”

En: Just put the gun down, okay? I don't know how else to convince you.
Zh: “把枪放下，好吗？我不知道还能怎么说服你。”

En: Did I offend your moralist sensibilities? You beat people to death with a baton, you fucking dog! The old man spits.
Zh: “我冒犯你的道德感了吗？你用警棍把人打死了，你这个该死的狗杂种！”老人吐了口口水。

En: Clearly not *you*. What do you want from me anyway?
Zh: “显然不是*你*。你到底想从我这里得到什么？”

En: You've retained your eyesight.
Zh: “你的视力保持得很好。”

En: My eyesight? He clears his throat. "Yes. Helps me see all the shit."
Zh: “我的视力？”他清了清喉咙。“是的。能帮我看清所有这些破事。”

En: Oh, wait. Yes.
Zh: 哦，等等。是的。

En: You *fasces* are pathetic when you're alone... He snorts. "To hell with it. It's a walking stick anyway..."
Zh: “当你一个人的时候，你们这群*法西斯分子*很可悲……”他嘲笑到。“见鬼去吧。反正这就是跟拐杖……”

En: Who are you?
Zh: “你叫什么？”

En: That's it for now, old man. Stay put. [Leave.]
Zh: “暂时先这样吧，老头。留在原地不要动。”[离开。]

En: The old man leans on the frame stock of his rifle, looking up at you.
Zh: 老人靠在步枪的枪托上，抬头望着你。

En: I ain't going anywhere.
Zh: “我哪里都不去。”

En: I ain't going anywhere.
Zh: “我哪里都不去。”

En: It has stayed true to him. He can still make it sing.
Zh: 这枪从未辜负于他，时至如今仍是神兵利器。

En: Military aid, he pats the rifle, "from our brothers in the Hsin-Yao Commune."
Zh: “军事援助，”他轻轻拍了拍步枪。“来自赫辛欧公社的兄弟。”

En: Your weapon has stayed true to you. Mine has stayed true to me too. (Show him the gun in your hand.)
Zh: “你的武器很听话，我的也是。”（把你手里的枪拿给他看。）

En: Your weapon has stayed true to you. Mine has stayed true to me too. (Put your hand on your belt.)
Zh: “你的武器很听话，我的也是。”（把手放在你的腰带上。）

En: Yes, I bet you've killed a lot of people with it... His eyes narrow. "...you fascist *fuck*."
Zh: “是啊，我打赌你一定用它杀了很多人吧……”他眯起眼睛。“……你这个法西斯主义*混账*。”

En: Have you come to make me one of them? His grip on the rifle tightens.
Zh: “你是来让我也死在你的枪下的么？”他握紧了手中的步枪。

En: We have *come* to ask you questions, nothing more. The lieutenant puts his hand on his holster.
Zh: “我们*来*是找你问问题的，没有别的。”警督把手放在了自己的枪套上。

En: I'm with the police. You can keep the gun, but keep it down. Not *one* move. (Proceed.)
Zh: “我是警察。你可以留着枪，不过要把它放下。*一步*都不许动。”（继续。）

En: His right eye twitches -- with what? Fear? Rage?
Zh: 他的右眼在抽搐——因为什么？恐惧？愤怒？

En: Another spitball lands in the ashes. That's all the answer he gives.
Zh: 又一团唾沫降落在灰烬中。这就是他给出的全部答案。

En: If you do not comply, we will take you in. Do you understand?
Zh: “如果你不配合，我们就会逮捕你。你明白吗？”

En: The danger levels here are hard to read. One moment he's a fire, the next -- a fire gone out.
Zh: 这里的危险程度很难判定。有那么一刻，他就像一团火，下一刻——又是一团熄灭的火焰。

En: Sorry for disturbing you. Good bye.
Zh: “抱歉打扰你了。再见。”

En: Fucking clowns... He squeezes his eyelids shut and shakes his head slowly.
Zh: “该死的小丑……”他紧闭双眼，慢慢摇摇头。

En: That was not the right move. You should have pushed on.
Zh: 这不是正确的举动。你应该继续施压。

En: Fucking clown... He squeezes his eyelids shut and shakes his head slowly.
Zh: “该死的小丑……”他紧闭双眼，慢慢摇摇头。

En: Yeah-yeah, one move and you'll kill me. Put me against the wall... He sighs. "To hell with it, it's a walking stick anyway."
Zh: “是啊是啊，再动一下你就会杀了我。把我按在墙上……”他叹了口气。“见鬼去吧，反正它就是根拐杖。”

En: It's out of bullets. He lays the rifle down, slowly. Then just looks at it lying there.
Zh: “里面没子弹了。”老人慢慢放下步枪。然后就这么盯着它，躺在那里。

En: Like an amputated limb in the sand.
Zh: 就像一截断肢，躺在沙堆里。

En: The Hsin-Yao Commune?
Zh: “赫辛欧公社？”

En: You heard me. It's good now. Like chalk wiped from the board. His gaze turns inwards.
Zh: “是啊，已经一去不返了。就如黑板上的粉笔印，被擦了个干净。”他的双眼有些失焦。

En: He's right. Almost no one remembers there was a third metastasis of the World Revolution, in the Safre Empire, extinguished in '06.
Zh: 他说得对。几乎没人记得世界大革命的第三次转移，发生在萨弗里帝国，在06年覆灭。

En: It's not wiped from the board. *I* remember it.
Zh: “它没有从黑板上擦掉。*我*还记得。”

En: Let it vanish.
Zh: 让它消失。

En: It's almost as if they were never there. Only the rifle remains, cradled by the old man.
Zh: 几乎就像是他们从未出现过。只剩下老人手里的这支步枪。

En: They wouldn't like hearing their name in your mouth. A damn dog...
Zh: “他们不喜欢从你嘴里听到他们的名字。一个该死的狗杂种……”

En: The time will come to win his trust, comrade. It is not now. You need to take care of the gun first.
Zh: 取得他信任的时机迟早都会到来。但不是现在。你需要先处理好枪的问题。

En: Or you're gonna blow my brains out before you question me? There's a moment's silence. "To hell with it. It's a walking stick anyway."
Zh: “或者你打算在质问我之前打爆我的脑袋？”一阵沉默。“见鬼去吧。反正它就是根拐杖。”

En: Look at him raise his bushy brows. That's a lie. He's empty.
Zh: 看看他，扬起那浓密眉毛的样子。他在撒谎。他的枪是空的。

En: I'm looking at another windbag who's got a problem with homo-sexuality.
Zh: “我正在看着一个只会夸夸其谈的人，而且对同性恋很有意见。”

En: It's war time slang for an experienced soldier of high rank. From the days of the Revolution in Revachol.
Zh: 这是战争时期的俚语，指的是一位经验丰富的高级士兵。来自大革命时期的瑞瓦肖。

En: No one cares, droite. He shakes his head.
Zh: “没人在乎，右派的家伙。”他摇摇头。

En: I shoulda known they'd send the fucking clowns for me... You hear him mumble to the blackened logs.
Zh: “我应该知道他们会派这些该死的小丑来找我的……”你听见他对着焦黑的木块喃喃自语。

En: You were right.
Zh: 您是对的。

En: He stares on, his wrinkled mouth moving without a sound -- a strange sadness, like a song.
Zh: 他凝望着，满是皱纹的嘴角在无声地蠕动——带着一股奇怪的悲伤，就像一首歌。

En: Let it be.
Zh: 随它去吧。

En: The future teaches you to be alone.
Zh: “未来教会你独处。”

En: What did you say?
Zh: “你说什么？”

En: The present...
Let him say it.
Zh: 让他说。

En: The present to be afraid and cold. The old man pulls back the hood of his plastic cape and looks up into the sky. It's blue grey, the same colour as the sea.
Zh: “现在教会你恐惧和冷漠。”老人拉起塑料斗篷的兜帽，抬头仰望天空——灰蓝色，跟大海的颜色一样。

En: The old man pulls back the hood of his plastic cape and looks up into the sky.
Zh: 老人拉起塑料斗篷的兜帽，抬头仰望天空。

En: Those words: 'the future teaches you...'
Zh: “那些话：‘未来教会你……’”

En: *Real music, real proletkult*. He nods. "That's La Revacholière, not your rock-and-roll misanthropy. *Chanson de soldat* of the black-and-whites."
Zh: “*真正的音乐，真正的无产者文化*。”他点点头。“那是《瑞瓦肖人》，不是什么愤世嫉俗的摇滚乐。黑与白的士兵之歌。”

En: My name... He looks across the water, then back at you: "...is Iosef Lilianovich Dros, Political Commissar of the 114th Anti-Aircraft Division of the 4th Army of the Commune of Revachol."
Zh: “我的名字……”他看向水面，然后回望着你：“……叫伊索夫·利连诺维奇·德罗斯，是瑞瓦肖公社第四军114防空师的政治委员。”

En: Marching song...
Zh: 进行曲……

En: What is La Revacholière?
Zh: “《瑞瓦肖人》是什么？”

En: Understood.
Zh: “明白了。”

En: You don't understand *anything*. The old man squints at you -- you see two black beads, gleaming.
Zh: “你*什么*都不明白。”老人斜视着你，你看见两颗闪闪发亮的乌黑眼珠。

En: It is the anthem of the World Revolution. His eyes remain fixed on the sky. "One of three."
Zh: “它是世界大革命的圣歌。”他的目光依然固定在天空中。“三首的其中之一。”

En: I know La Revacholière. It's the marching song of the World Revolution.
Zh: “我知道《瑞瓦肖人》。那是世界大革命的进行曲。”

En: There you go. His eyes remain fixed on the sky as he sighs and adds: "One of three."
Zh: “说对了。”他的目光依然固定在天空中，叹了口气，又补了一句：“三首的其中之一。”

En: In Graad they sang 'Brave Children, Favourites of History' and in Hsin-Yao it was... He struggles to remember, then gives up. "...some Samaran shit, I guess."
Zh: “在格拉德，他们唱的是‘勇敢的孩子，历史的宠儿’，在赫辛欧是……”他努力回忆着，然后放弃了。“……某些萨马拉语的破玩意吧，我猜。”

En: In Hsin-Yao they sang "Boy with a Scythe / Golden Sun."
Zh: 赫辛欧唱的是“大镰刀男孩与金色太阳。”

En: First, it wasn't *some Samaran shit*. It was 'Boy with a Scythe'...
Zh: “首先，那不是什么*萨马拉语的破玩意*。是叫‘大镰刀男孩’……”

En: La Revacholière... I've heard that name, somewhere else. In a dream.
Zh: “《瑞瓦肖人》……我听过那个名字，在别的什么地方。在梦里。”

En: I fucking know what they sang! he hisses. "I watched those little fuckers die in my arms -- little ones came to help us. Got cut to shreds..."
Zh: “我知道他们唱的是什么了！”他发出嘘声。“我看着那些小混蛋死在我的怀里——那些来帮我们的小孩。被撕成了碎片……”

En: You don't fucking tell me what they sang... He closes his eyes and exhales to calm himself.
Zh: “不用你他妈的告诉我他们唱的是什么……”他闭上双眼，慢慢呼气，想让自己平静下来。

En: His nostrils are still flaring with rage. He brings himself back under his own stewardship, slowly.
Zh: 他的鼻孔依然因为愤怒而张大着。慢慢地，他平复了自己的情绪。

En: No, that's not it. I've talked to her.
Zh: “不，不是的。我跟她聊过了。”

En: Everyone has. They named a fucking perfume after it.
Zh: “每个人都这样。他们还用它给一种该死的香水命名。”

En: Yes. Must've been that.
Zh: “是的。一定是那样。”

En: A fucking perfume... he sighs.
Zh: “一种该死的香水……”他叹了口气。

En: Talked to *her*? He raises his bushy brow and looks down from the sky -- straight into your bloodshot eye.
Zh: “跟*她*聊过？”他抬起浓密的眉毛，低头向下看——直直地望向你充血的眼睛。

En: Yes. I get these... cold spells.
Zh: “是的。我中了一些……寒冷咒语。”

En: Yes. In the church. (Point southwest.)
Zh: “是的。在教堂里。”（指向西南方。）

En: Nothing. We have serious things to talk about.
Zh: “没什么。我们有很严肃的事情要谈。”

En: It's the *drugs* you're all on. Druggies, winos, and whores... He closes his eyes in disgust.
Zh: “你们全都*中毒*了。不管是瘾君子，酒鬼还是婊子……”他厌恶地闭上眼睛。

En: There was something there -- when he said *talked to her*? He was curious...
Zh: 当他说出*跟她聊过*的时候——感觉似乎有些什么？他很好奇……

En: God's shithouse. He chortles. "Should've taken it down like they did in Graad; dismantled it for firewood."
Zh: “神明的厕所，”他咯咯地笑了。“应该把它拆掉，就像他们在格拉德做的一样；拆掉当柴火。”

En: All around you, the air slowly circulates the islet, carrying little swallows and black-beaked seagulls in its slow drift. They all -- every one of them, every bird, mammal, and crustacean...
Zh: 在你周围，海风环绕着这座小岛轻轻吹拂，小燕子和黑喙海鸥乘着这股轻风在空中飞舞。它们全都是一样——每一个都是，每一只鸟，哺乳动物，还有甲壳动物……

En: What?
Zh: 什么？

En: Rub your sides.
Zh: 摩擦身体两侧。

En: Keep their distance.
Zh: 保持距离。

En: The cold dissipates. The old man watches you, carefully.
Zh: 寒冷消散了。老人看着你，小心翼翼。

En: I've seen kids lose their minds and start *talking* to the city. Asking it to *protect* them, when the shelling gets bad. Calling it La Revacholière...
Zh: “我见过孩子们失去理智，开始跟这座城市*交谈*。当炮火袭击越来越严重的时候，向它寻求*保护*。把它叫做瑞瓦肖之灵……”

En: Doubt it, dog...
Zh: “我很怀疑，狗杂种……”

En: Thank you for clearing that up. (Conclude.)
Zh: “感谢你的澄清。”（总结。）

En: Heh. The old man squints and looks you straight in the eye -- two black beads, moist from the sea air.
Zh: “嗯。”老人斜起眼睛，直视着你——那两颗乌溜溜的眼珠，因为海风而变得湿润。

En: By the way, I'm a fascist.
Zh: “顺便说一句，我是个法西斯主义者。”

En: You're not. You're part of the meat shield surrounding the *real* fascists, while they rape children. That's what *you* are.
Zh: “你不是的。你是环绕在*真正*法西斯主义者之外的肉盾，而他们在圈内猥琐小孩。这就是*你*的真面目。”

En: When I said I've talked to *her* -- you were curious.
Zh: “我说我跟*她*聊过的时候——你很好奇。”

En: No, he was just confused. Let it go...
Zh: 不，他只是很困惑。随它去吧……

En: Don't be so sure...
Zh: 别这么肯定……

En: I'm not a shit-licking boujee dog. I'm a half-dead police officer who's just doing his job.
Zh: “我不是吃屎的资产阶级舔狗。我是个半死不活的警察，只是在做自己分内的事。”

En: The job of a boujee dog.
Zh: “资产阶级舔狗的工作。”

En: Forget about that for a moment. You need to address that remark first.
Zh: 暂时先忘掉那个。你需要先跟他聊聊。

En: You need to address that remark.
Zh: 你需要先跟他聊聊。
