En: Still warm from his parched hands. Not the metal. The metal is ice cold. This weapon has been modified several times.
Zh: 因为他手心的温度还很温热。不是金属的热度。金属是冰冷的。这支武器被改过好几次了。

En: Inspect it closer.
Zh: 近距离检查一下。

En: It's as you said. This is a Triangong.
Zh: “就像你说的：这是一支特里安戈。”

En: It's as he said: it's a Triangong. Made in Hsin-Yao.
Zh: “就像他说的：这是一支特里安戈。赫辛欧生产的。”

En: Stow the gun. (Conclude.)
Zh: 收起枪。（总结。）

En: The rifle's in a shabby state, like a crutch that's seen too much travel. Hieroglyphs are embossed into the forearm made of walnut.
Zh: 这支步枪破旧不堪，就像一支走过太多路的拐杖。胡桃木制的前柄上印着浮雕象形文字。

En: They say: 'Triangong 4.46. Hsin-Yao Commune. For Safre -- and for all mankind.'
Zh: 上面写着：‘特里安戈4.46。赫辛欧公社。为了萨弗里——为了全人类。’

En: I know Seraise?
Zh: 我懂萨弗里语？

En: Look at the butt of the gun.
Zh: 看看枪托。

En: This is Vulgate Seraise. You can barely intuit the words. *Know* is stretching it.
Zh: 这是一句萨弗里的俗语。光凭直觉理解这些词几乎不太可能。*知道*是一种延伸。

En: (Whisper.) "Kim, I know Seraise."
Zh: （耳语。）“金，我懂萨弗里语。”

En: What does it say? he asks doubtfully.
Zh: “上面说的是什么？”他怀疑地问到。

En: For Safre -- and for all mankind.
Zh: “为了萨弗里——为了全人类。”

En: That's what the little guys told us. The old man says silently. "Every day at 4 o'clock in the morning, they'd go on and on about their Safre, their mankind, and Mazov..."
Zh: “这是那些小伙子告诉我们的。”老人默默地说到。“每天早上4点钟，他们就会开始说个不停，关于他们的萨弗里，他们的人，还有马佐夫……”

En: Those men were commandos. They weren't shit on a stick, like us. They were small and... He doesn't say more. The thought dissipates on his lips.
Zh: “那些人是突击队员。他们是纯爷们，跟我们一样。他们很小，而且……”他不再言语。想法在他唇边消散了。

En: For Safre -- and for all mankind?
Zh: “为了萨弗里——为了全人类？”

En: On the butt you see Vespertine writing, burnt into the wood: Triangong 4.46 mm, made in Hsin-Yao.
Zh: 你在枪托上看见维斯珀文字，烧进了木头里：特里安戈4.46mm，赫辛欧生产。

En: No one said it has to be a Belle-Magrave... The lieutenant does not take his eyes off the old man. "We were just guessing."
Zh: “没人说过肯定是贝莱-马格雷……”警督的目光没有从老人身上移开。“我们只是猜测而已。”

En: This uses jacketed ammunition. 4.46.
Zh: “这支枪用的是包壳子弹。4.46。”

En: The right type and the right calibre, the lieutenant nods -- glancing at the gun.
Zh: “型号是对的，口径也是对的，”警督瞥了一眼枪，点点头。

En: The old man keeps following your motions with his gaze. His right arm twitches suddenly...
Zh: 老人的目光一直追随着你的一举一动。突然间，他的右臂开始抽搐……

En: This is a Triangong, made in Hsin-Yao.
Zh: “这是一支特里安戈，赫辛欧生产的。”

En: Worn. Personalized even. Looks like this weapon has seen a lot of use. Hasn't it, sir?
Zh: “用旧了。甚至个人改装过。看起来这支武器用过很多次了。不是吗，先生？”

En: It doesn't matter if it was made in Shantih-Shantih. All it has to do is use jacketed ammunition. And it does.
Zh: “它是不是因为和平生产的并不重要。唯一要做的就是使用包壳子弹。而且的确如此。”

En: From ballistics, it could easily have been a Triangong too.
Zh: 从弹道学来看，它也有可能是特里安戈。

En: Jacketed -- military-grade ammunition. Stable in flight, good for hitting something that's very, very far away... He says -- mostly to the old man.
Zh: “包壳——军事级弹药。飞行时状态稳定，很适合命中很远、很远距离的目标……”他说着——几乎就是说给老人听的。

En: No response from the old man. The plastic cape around his shoulders rustles in a small bout of wind.
Zh: 老人没有回应。他肩膀上的塑料斗篷在风中沙沙作响。

En: He's liking this.
Zh: 他喜欢这样。

En: As he speaks, he stresses every word. He's liking this.
Zh: 他说话的时候，每个词都喜欢重读。他喜欢这样。

En: The rifle has been patched and modified several times.
Zh: “这支步枪被修补改装过好几次。”

En: I wonder how old it is.
Zh: “我想知道它用了多少年了。”

En: I wonder how old it is.
Zh: “我想知道它用了多少年了。”

En: The old man does not answer. He just stares in front of him.
Zh: 老人没有回答。他只是凝视着前方。

En: The old man blinks slowly. A strange jitter comes over him, he pushes his right leg down and does not reply.
Zh: 老人慢慢眨眨眼。一种奇怪的不安包围着他，他放下右腿，没有回应。

En: Hmhm. The old man smacks his lips.
Zh: “嗯。”老人砸吧着嘴唇。

En: Things keep falling apart if you don't tend to them.
Zh: “如果你不注意，事情就会变得一团糟。”

En: Some kind of involuntary response? Something is slightly off with his motorics...
Zh: 某种无意识的回应？他的肌肉运动似乎出了点问题……

En: I am a deserter, a partisan, and a prisoner of war. This is my termless surrender. His eyes turn to the reeds again, dead and dull.
Zh: “我是一个逃兵，一个游击队员，一个战俘。这是我的无条件投降。”他的目光再次转向芦苇丛，死气沉沉，呆滞迟钝。

En: There, behind them, across the Delta -- the INSURCOM building. Coalition Government Insulindian Mission Control.
Zh: 那里，在它们背后，穿过德尔塔——是INSURCOM的大楼，联盟政府伊苏林迪指挥中心。

En: The Commune of Revachol... The lieutenant forgets to close his mouth. "Do you mean the ICM? You're a holdover from the..."
Zh: “瑞瓦肖公社……”警督忘了闭上嘴。“你的意思是ICM？你是一个留存官员……”

En: From the Insulindian Citizens Militia -- the Army of the Revolution. I was recruited in Jamrock in '07, trained in the Ecole de Contrôle Aérien and consigned to emergency defence duties in '08.
Zh: “来自伊苏林迪公民武装——大革命的军队。我是07年在加姆洛克被招募的，在航空学院接受训练，然后08年被指派参加紧急防御任务。”

En: I left my unit on the eve of the Landing. When I returned here on May 14th the Commune had fallen. Still armed -- and *ideologically trained* -- I wrote a criticism of myself. And resumed partisan duties.
Zh: “在登陆前夕，我离开了自己的部队。当我5月14号回来的时候，公社已经覆灭了。依然全副武装——依然接受过*思想训练*——我写了一篇自我反思的文章。之后继续履行游击队的职责。”

En: You've been on this island for 43 years?
Zh: “你在这座岛上待了43年？”

En: How long have you been on this island?
Zh: “你在这座岛上待了多久？”

En: No. He looks into the fire -- a wisp of smoke rises from somewhere between the charred logs. "I've been on other islands too."
Zh: “没有。”他看着火堆——焦黑木块的某个地方升腾起一阵烟雾。“我也去其他岛上待过。”

En: I was on Résurrection until they turned it into a *spa* in '18. Then I was on E48, a nameless sound, until the sea washed over it. Then I came back here. That was... He thinks. "Twenty-two years ago."
Zh: “当时我待在复兴岛，直到18年他们把它变成了一间*水疗馆*。然后我又去了E84，一座无名岛，直到大海把它淹没。然后我回到了这里。那是在……”他想了想。“22年前。”

En: Embers going out.
Zh: 余烬熄灭了。

En: How does it go -- the song?
Zh: “是怎么唱的——那首歌？”

En: How did it go... He looks at his gun in your hand and shakes his head slowly.
Zh: “是怎么唱的……”他看着你手里的枪，慢慢摇摇头。

En: How did it go... He looks at his gun on the ground and shakes his head slowly.
Zh: “是怎么唱的……”他看着地上的枪，慢慢摇摇头。

En: Something about shooting *rabbits,* I don't know... I can't remember. It doesn't matter. It's gone now.
Zh: “好像是关于打*野兔*的吧，我不知道……我不记得了。没关系。现在都没了。”

En: He waves erratically -- with his hand, annoyed that he can't remember. A little tremor passes through him.
Zh: 他挥着手——毫无章法，因为记不起来显得有些恼怒。一阵轻微的震颤穿过他的身体。

En: It was dear to him. He resents forgetting it.
Zh: 它对他来说很珍贵。他怨恨正在慢慢遗忘它的自己。

En: 'So if I can shoot rabbits then I can shoot fascists too' -- those are the next lines.
Zh: ‘如果我可以打野兔，那我也能打法西斯’——接下来的词是这样的。

En: I have trouble remembering things too.
Zh: “我也记不住东西。”

En: So if I can shoot rabbits, then I can shoot fascists too.
Zh: “如果我可以打野兔，那我也能打法西斯。”

En: What are you talking about? He squints and looks you straight in the eye -- two black beads, moist from the sea air.
Zh: “你在说什么？”他歪着头，直直地盯着你的眼睛——那两颗乌溜溜的眼珠，因为海风而变得湿润。

En: He squints and looks you straight in the eye -- two black beads, moist from the sea air.
Zh: 他歪着头，直直地盯着你的眼睛——那两颗乌溜溜的眼珠，因为海风而变得湿润。

En: You're a holdover from, the ICM, the Insulindian Citizens Militia?
Zh: “你是ICM，伊苏林迪公民武装的残党？”

En: You're a holdover from the Army of the Commune of Revachol?
Zh: “你是瑞瓦肖公社大军的残党？”

En: Yes. Recruited from Jamrock in '07, trained in the Ecole de Contrôle Aérien; consigned to emergency defence duties in '08.
Zh: “是的。我是07年在加姆洛克被招募的，在航空学院接受训练，然后08年被指派参加紧急防御任务。”

En: Yes, I am from the Insulindian Citizens Militia. Recruited from Jamrock in '07, trained in the Ecole de Contrôle Aérien; consigned to emergency defence duties in '08.
Zh: “是的，我隶属于伊苏林迪公民武装。07年在加姆洛克被招募，在航空学院接受训练，然后08年被指派参加紧急防御任务。”

En: Forty-three years... No. He looks into the fire -- a wisp of smoke rises from somewhere between the charred logs. "I've been on other islands too."
Zh: “43年……没有。”他看着火堆——焦黑木块的某个地方升腾起一阵烟雾。“我也去其他岛上待过。”

En: You said this is your *termless surrender*.
Zh: “你说这是你的*无条件投降*。”

En: So you're a communist soldier? From the communist army?
Zh: “所以你是一个康米主义战士？来自康米主义军队？”

En: I did, he breathes out with a wheeze. "And you opened it -- how?"
Zh: “是的，”他喘了一口气。“你把它打开了——怎么做到的？”

En: Did you close the blast door?
Zh: “那扇防护门是你关上的吗？”

En: Reactionary rock-and-roll music. He gestures north. "Playing on the water."
Zh: “我听见反动派的摇滚乐了。”他朝北方比了个手势。“从海里传来的。”

En: I fuelled the generator. Then used the console.
Zh: “我给发电机加了油。然后用控制台打开的。”

En: How did you know I was coming?
Zh: “你怎么知道我会来？”

En: I should've burned that console down... He shakes his head.
Zh: “我应该把控制台烧掉的……”他摇摇头。

En: The boat engine. He gestures north. "On the water..."
Zh: “船的引擎。”他朝北边比了个手势。“在水面上……”

En: It was not rock-and-roll. It was Sad FM!
Zh: “那不是摇滚乐。那是伤感FM！”

En: It was not reactionary. It was cool.
Zh: “那不叫反动。那叫酷。”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: Told you we shouldn't play Sad FM.
Zh: “早跟你说过了，不要播伤感FM。”

En: The fascists were right about rock-and-roll. It *is* degenerate... Hip-gyrating mental illness music.
Zh: “法西斯分子对摇滚乐的看法没错。它*的确*很堕落……只会扭屁股的精神病音乐。”

En: But you didn't say that, Kim.
Zh: “但是你没说过啊，金。”

En: I did.
Zh: “我说了。”

En: We have entered a world where he said you shouldn't. It is the only world.
Zh: 我们进入了一个他说你不该进入的世界。这是唯一的世界。

En: Sad FM, huh? I always hated that station. Phlegmatic, counter-revolutionary dirges... Sadness is a mental illness, a weapon of the bourgeoisie.
Zh: “伤感FM，是吗？我一直那讨厌那个电台。冷漠，反大革命挽歌……悲伤是一种精神病，是资产阶级的一种武器。”

En: Real music. It's La Revacholière, you shit-licking boujee dog. *Chanson de soldat* of the black-and-whites.
Zh: “真正的音乐。它是《瑞瓦肖人》，你们这群吃屎的资产阶级舔狗。黑与白的*士兵之歌*。”

En: The job of a shit-licker.
Zh: “吃屎舔狗的工作。”

En: I'm not a misanthrope, I'm a half-dead police officer who's just doing his job.
Zh: “我不是个愤世嫉俗的人。我是个半死不活的警察，只是在做自己分内的事。”

En: How have you survived all this time?
Zh: “这么久你是怎么活下来的？”

En: You said you deserted your unit?
Zh: “你说你抛弃了自己的部队？”

En: Again -- you've been hiding here for *43 years*?
Zh: “再确认下——你在这里藏了*43年*吗？”

En: Forty-three years and 10 months.
I was just sixteen years old, fifteen when I volunteered. I had a lapse of faith... He clears his throat. "And of courage too."
Zh: “那时我16岁，自愿报名的时候15岁。我失去了信心……”他清了清喉咙。“也失去了勇气。”

En: That's insane.
Zh: “这太疯狂了。”

En: That's steadfast.
Zh: “真是太坚定了。”

En: That's the length of my entire life.
Zh: “那是我一生的长度。”

En: I don't even know what that is.
Zh: “我甚至都不知道那是什么。”

En: It's not how a human being should live, but I had to... He grimaces, clearly in pain. "...I couldn't just forget. I couldn't just forget what I saw."
Zh: “人类不该这样生活，不过我必须这样……”他的面容因为痛苦而变得扭曲……“我不能就这么忘记。我不能忘记自己看见的一切。”

En: Always waiting. Always....
Zh: “一直等待着。一直……”

En: What have you been doing during all this time?
Zh: “这么久以来，你一直都在做什么？”

En: Hiding, fishing, waiting... He looks across the water.
Zh: “躲藏，钓鱼，等待……”他望向水面。

En: For what?
Zh: “为了什么？”

En: For her to return.
Zh: “等她回来。”

En: It's too long. It's not how a human being should live... He grimaces, clearly in pain. "But I couldn't just forget what I saw."
Zh: “太久了。人类不该这样生活……”他的面容因为痛苦而变得扭曲，“但是我不能忘记自己看见的一切。”

En: It's inhuman. It's sick. It's not how a human being should live, but I had to... He grimaces, clearly in pain. "I couldn't just forget. I couldn't just forget what I saw."
Zh: “这很不人道。这是一种病。人类不该这样生活，不过我必须这样，”他的面容因为痛苦而变得扭曲，“我不能就这么忘记。我不能忘记自己看见的。”

En: He just *couldn't*...
Zh: 他就是*做不到*……

En: You couldn't give up.
Zh: “你不能放弃。”

En: He nods.
Zh: 他点点头。

En: What have you been doing all this time?
Zh: “一直以来你都在做什么？”

En: Her, who?
Zh: “她，是谁？”

En: Girl Child Revolution.
Zh: “纯真革命。”

En: Where night falls... Hydrogen streetlamps burn on Rue de Saint-Ghislaine, golden light casting black shadows. Further inland, in Jamrock, the street grid appears black -- unlit avenue after unlit avenue. Altocumulus clouds form above Precinct 41.
Zh: 夜幕降临……圣吉莱纳路的氢气街灯被点燃，金色的光芒投射下黑色的阴影。遥远的内陆，在加姆洛克，街道网格似乎是黑色的——没有灯光的街道一条接着一条。高积云在41分局的上空渐渐成型。

En: Where it's morning. On Rue de Saint-Ghislaine, people are walking, the gas streetlights have already been switched off. Further inland, in Jamrock, the streets come alive with workers: men, women, children rushing -- muddy avenue after muddy avenue. The temperature is rising. Altocumulus clouds form above Precinct 41.
Zh: 那是一个清晨。圣吉莱纳路上，人们在行走，煤气街灯已经关闭。遥远的内陆，在加姆洛克，工人让街道恢复了生气：男人，女人，小孩，匆匆忙忙——泥泞的街道一条接着一条。温度在慢慢升高。高积云在41分局的上空渐渐成型。

En: Where the afternoon grows late. On Rue de Saint-Ghislaine people walk home, streetlights will soon be lit. Further inland the streets are alive with workers: men, women, children. Streethawks and migrant labourers. The temperature is steady. Altocumulus clouds form above Precinct 41.
Zh: 那里的午后正在迈向黄昏。圣吉莱纳路上，人们正走在回家的路上。煤气街灯很快就会被点亮。在遥远的内陆，工人让街道恢复了生气：男人，女人，小孩。街头小贩和移民劳工。温度很稳定。高积云在41分局的上空渐渐成型。

En: Where evening comes. On Rue de Saint-Ghislaine hydrogen streetlights switch on, casting black shadows. Further inland, the street grid appears dark -- unlit avenue after unlit avenue. The temperature is dropping. Altocumulus clouds form above Precinct 41.
Zh: 傍晚来临。圣吉莱纳路的氢气街灯被点燃，投下黑色的阴影。遥远的内陆，街道网格似乎是黑色的——没有灯光的街道一条接着一条。温度正在下降。高积云在41分局的上空渐渐成型。

En: Two police officers step out of the Whirling-in-Rags cafeteria. Satellite-Officer Jean Vicquemare inspects giant letters across the plaza mosaic, in dark red government-marked heavy fuel oil.
Zh: 两名警官走出褴褛飞旋的自助餐厅。随迁警官让·维克玛观察着广场地砖上的巨大字母，那是用染红的政府重燃油涂下的。

En: Always waiting. The old man turns his eyes from the shore and back to you.
Zh: “一直在等待。”老人的目光从岸边移开，转回到你身上。

En: I have another, serious question for you.
Zh: “我还有一个很严肃的问题要问你。”

En: There is nothing serious in this world. He looks at the gun lying on the ground. "It's a farce."
Zh: “这个世界上没有大问题。”他看着躺在地上的枪。“这是一场闹剧。”

En: There is nothing serious in this world. He looks at the gun in your hand. "It's a farce."
Zh: “这个世界上没有大问题。”他看着躺在地上的枪。“这是一场闹剧。”

En: Two police officers step out of the Whirling-in-Rags cafeteria. Satellite-Officer Jean Vicquemare inspects a series of burnt black letters splashed across the plaza mosaic.
Zh: 两名警官走出褴褛飞旋的自助餐厅。随迁警官让·维克玛观察着广场地砖上泼溅的一连串焦黑的字母。

En: Patrol Officer Judit Minot points west. "The fishing village..." She glances at her watch. "We meet in 15 minutes. It's a ten minute walk."
Zh: 巡警茱蒂特·迈诺特指向西边。“渔村……”她瞥了一眼手表。“我们15分钟后见。步行大概要10分钟。”

En: The officers go, leaving behind the writing -- still smouldering. ONE DAY, it says, I WILL RETURN TO YOUR SIDE.
Zh: 警官们离开了，留下地上的文字——依然还冒着黑烟。上面写着，总有一天，我会回到你身边。

En: The officers go, leaving behind the writing, still smelling of petroleum. ONE DAY, it says, I WILL RETURN TO YOUR SIDE.
Zh: 警官们离开了，留下地上的文字，依然还残留着一股石油的味道。上面写着，‘总有一天，我会回到你身边。’

En: Patrol Officer Judit Minot points west. "The fishing village..." She glances at her watch. "We meet in 15 minutes. It's a ten minute walk."
Zh: 巡警茱蒂特·迈诺特指向西边。“渔村……”她瞥了一眼手表。“我们15分钟后见。步行大概要10分钟。”

En: I come from there. (Point to the mainland.) "I can assure you, that is *not* what the people are planning."
Zh: “我是从那里来的。”（指向内陆。）“我可以向你保证，大家绝对*不是*这样计划的。”

En: I've been there. The city is a tinderbox. It may still happen.
Zh: “我去过那里。那座城市暗流涌动，革命还可能会发生。”

En: I've seen it. (Shake your head.) "Capital is too powerful. The rich are very well organized."
Zh: “我见过了。”（摇摇头。）“资本太过强大。有钱人的组织井然有序。”

En: Women will always betray you.
Zh: “女人总是会背叛你的。”

En: I dare not dream anymore.
Zh: “我再也不敢做梦了。”

En: I'm afraid she's gone.
Zh: “恐怕她已经走了。”

En: Nothing in history is guaranteed. But revolution is still a possibility.
Zh: “历史里没有什么是肯定的。不过大革命依然可能发生。”

En: She better come. I too have given my life to Mazovian socio-economics.
Zh: “她最好能来。我也会把自己的生命献给马佐夫社会经济学。”

En: Girl Child Revolution?
Zh: “纯真革命？”

En: Always...
Zh: “总是这样……”

En: Girl Child Nation is too strong for that.
Zh: “纯真国度对于那个来说太强了。”

En: The material base for an uprising has eroded. He nods and blinks his black eyes. "The working class has betrayed mankind and themselves..."
Zh: 他点点头，眨了眨黑色的眼睛。“叛乱的物质基础已经被侵蚀，工人阶级背叛了全人类，还有他们自己……”

En: The historic opportunity for a revolution has passed. It will not come back anymore. However hard I try, whatever I do.
Zh: “大革命的历史契机已经失去。它再也不会回来。无论我多么努力，无论我做什么。”

En: A waste. He blinks his black eyes. "The material base for an uprising has eroded, the working class has betrayed mankind and themselves..."
Zh: “浪费。”他眨了眨黑色的眼睛。“叛乱的物质基础已经被侵蚀，工人阶级背叛了全人类，还有他们自己……”

En: Good. He blinks his black eyes. "The material base for an uprising has eroded, the working class has betrayed mankind and themselves..."
Zh: “很好。”他眨了眨黑色的眼睛。“叛乱的物质基础已经被侵蚀，工人阶级背叛了全人类，还有他们自己……”

En: No. He blinks his black eyes. "The material base for an uprising has eroded, the working class has betrayed mankind and themselves..."
Zh: “不。”他眨了眨黑色的眼睛。“叛乱的物质基础已经被侵蚀，工人阶级背叛了全人类，还有他们自己……”

En: I am not a fool. He blinks his black eyes. "I know -- the material base for an uprising has eroded. The working class has betrayed mankind..."
Zh: “我不是傻子。”他眨了眨黑色的眼睛。“我知道——工人阶级背叛了全人类……”

En: It won't. He blinks his black eyes. "The material base for an uprising has eroded, the working class has betrayed mankind and themselves..."
Zh: “不会的。”他眨了眨黑色的眼睛。“叛乱的物质基础已经被侵蚀，工人阶级背叛了全人类，还有他们自己……”

En: They have *you*. He blinks his black eyes. "The material base for an uprising has eroded, the working class has betrayed mankind and themselves..."
Zh: “他们还有*你*。”他眨了眨黑色的眼睛。“叛乱的物质基础已经被侵蚀，工人阶级背叛了全人类，还有他们自己……”

En: Women *are* more susceptible to bourgeois morals. He blinks his black eyes. "The material base for an uprising has eroded, the working class has betrayed mankind and themselves..."
Zh: “女人*会*更容易受到资产阶级道德的影响。”他眨了眨黑色的眼睛。“叛乱的物质基础已经被侵蚀，工人阶级背叛了全人类，还有他们自己……”

En: No -- this is a vulgar criticism. He blinks his black eyes. "The material base for an uprising has eroded, the working class has betrayed mankind and themselves..."
Zh: “不——这是低俗的批判。”他眨了眨黑色的眼睛。“叛乱的物质基础已经被侵蚀，工人阶级背叛了全人类，还有他们自己……”

En: So that's why he's 'the deserter.'
Zh: 这就是他为什么当‘逃兵’的理由。

En: Once a deserter, always a deserter.
Zh: “一旦当过逃兵，永远都会是逃兵。”

En: Don't say it.
Zh: 别说了。

En: What *can* I do? The old man suddenly looks around, suddenly confused.
Zh: “我*能*怎么做？”老人看了看四周，突然有些困惑。

En: I have done everything a man can do. What have *you* done?
Zh: “我做了一个男人能做的一切。*你*会怎么做？”

En: We keep people alive. We help them survive, whatever the ideological situation. Day in and day out.
Zh: “我们保护大家的性命。我们帮助他们活下来，不论他们到底是什么意识形态。日复一日。”

En: Survive? The old man spits into the dead fire. "For *what*?"
Zh: “活下来？”老人朝燃尽的火堆里吐了一口唾沫。“为了*什么*？”

En: What *has* he done? Perhaps a confession will lighten the load...
Zh: 他*做了*什么？也许忏悔会减轻一些负担……

En: This is not the time to push.
Zh: 现在还不是逼他的时候。

En: The old man suddenly looks around, confused. "What *can* I do? What is there..."
Zh: 老人看了看周围，突然有些困惑。“我*能*怎么做？有什么……”

En: What *have* you done then?
Zh: “那你*做过*什么？”

En: There is no flame to fan. He stares right through at him, blinking his dark eyes. "There is nothing left -- of the world, of our dreams."
Zh: “没有什么可以煽动的情绪。”老人直直地盯着他，眨了眨黑眼睛。“什么也没剩下——这个世界，我们的梦想。”

En: Yes -- what? To get things going again... The lieutenant steps closer. "Fan the flame?"
Zh: “是的，——什么？让事情重新开始……”警督靠近了一步。“煽动情绪？”

En: I just *mourn*. He stares right through you. Then blinks again.
Zh: “我只是在*哀悼*。”他直直地盯着你。然后又眨眨眼。

En: You could say I misunderstood the historic role of the proletariat, and thought Mazovian socio-economics were fallible. For a second I doubted the irreducible laws of historic materialism.
Zh: “你可以说我误解了工人阶级的历史角色，认为马佐夫社会经济学是不可靠的。有那么一瞬，我怀疑过历史唯物主义那不可再分的法则。”

En: A second is all it took.
Zh: “一念之差。”

En: For Reaction to take hold.
Zh: “发生了应激反应。”

En: Lapse of faith?
Zh: “失去信心？”

En: Understood.
Zh: “明白了。”

En: Good. I shouldn't have to explain it to a comrade.
Zh: “很好。我不需要向一个同伴解释。”

En: Well done. I won't explain it to a minion of capital.
Zh: “做得好。我是不会向资本的奴隶解释的。”

En: For what?
Zh: “发生了什么？”

En: It wasn't Reaction -- you were just afraid.
Zh: “不是应激反应——你只是害怕了。”

En: Yes. We all have a tiny bourgeois person in us, trying to run away.
Zh: “是的。我们身体里都有个资产阶级小人，想试着逃跑。”

En: I understand. Communists are natural cowards. Quantity over quality.
Zh: “我能理解。康米主义者是天生的胆小鬼。数量远胜于质量。”

En: And when was this exactly?
Zh: “那到底是什么时候？”

En: It's the same thing... you haven't seen *it*. Not really -- not naked. It's impossible not to be afraid.
Zh: “这是一回事……你没有见过*它*。没见过真的——没见过赤裸裸的。不害怕是不可能的。”

En: He does not seemingly react to what you said. Only his right brow moves a little.
Zh: 他似乎对你说的话没有反应。只有右边的眉毛挑动了一下。

En: You haven't seen *it*. The face of who you serve -- naked. It's impossible not to be afraid.
Zh: “你没有见过*它*。没见过你效忠的那些人的脸——赤裸裸的。不害怕是不可能的。”

En: And this was... when? The lieutenant instinctively looks to his notebook, but does not take it out.
Zh: “那这是……什么时候的事？”警督本能地看向自己的笔记本，不过没有把它拿出来。

En: May the 13th, '08, 44 years ago, he looks north. "The horizon was black with Coalition airships. Their petroleum rose to the sky and it looked like... like it *formed* the clouds. Storm clouds. When they started shelling it was... dark magic."
Zh: “08年，5月13号，44年前，”他看向北边。“地平线上黑压压一片，都是联盟的飞艇。石油冒出的黑烟升向天空，看起来像是……像是*聚成*了一片云。乌云。它们开始开炮的时候，感觉就像……黑魔法一样。”

En: The combined might of international capital, all at once -- all the greed and terror in the world -- tore into Revachol. It lifted streets from the ground and turned houses into ghosts. We were in the flak tower... He gestures toward it.
Zh: “国际资本的联合力量，顷刻之间——世界上所有的贪婪和恐惧——朝瑞瓦肖猛攻而来。街道从地面上掀翻，房屋化作幽灵。我们在高射炮塔里……”他朝那边比了个手势。

En: ...huddled on the floor. The artillery was eighty kilometres away in Ozonne but I *knew*, I knew the Commune would fall. We would all be turned into ash. So I said I was going to the map room... He looks east.
Zh: “……蜷缩在地面上。大炮在80公里远的欧佐纳尔，但是我*知道*，我知道公社将会倾覆。我们都会化为灰烬。所以我说自己要去地图资料室……”他望向东边。

En: The mask of humanity fall from capital. It has to take it off to kill everyone -- everything you love; all the hope and tenderness in the world. It has to take it off, just for one second. To do the deed.
Zh: “人性的面具在资本面前脱落。只有摘下面具，资本才能杀掉所有人——毁掉你心爱的一切；世界上所有的希望和柔情。它不得不把面具取下来，就只有那么一瞬。去付诸行动。”

En: It's not *enough*, he hisses. "The total, combined power of international capital -- all their fear and terror -- tore into Revachol. Streets rose from the ground... houses turned to ghosts." He gestures erratically, then falls silent.
Zh: “这还不*够*，”他发出嘘声。“国际资本动用了所有的、联合的力量——所有的害怕和恐惧——朝瑞瓦肖猛攻而来。街道从地面上掀翻……房屋化作幽灵。”他胡乱地比了个手势，然后陷入沉默。

En: No. I climbed the chain link across the water and hid inland. In the bunkers there, like the weakest of the weak... a mouse. Frightened of the ordnance all night and the sound of the rotors in the morning, whirring -- *thith-thith-thith...* He looks at the sky.
Zh: “没有。我爬过水面上的链环，藏在内陆。就在那边的碉堡，就像弱者中的弱者……一只老鼠。整晚都在害怕不可避免的败局终将来临，清晨则在害怕转子的呼啸声——*嗖嗖嗖嗖嗖……*”他望向天空。

En: Airships. I climbed out. He closes his eyes: "Into hell. The Landing was complete. The chain was submerged, I had to swim back. The fortress was half submerged too. Shattered."
Zh: “飞艇。我爬出来。”他闭上双眼：“来到*地狱*。登陆结束了。链条已经沉入水里，我只能游回去。要塞也半沉入水里，支离破碎。”

En: What was that?
Zh: “那是什么？”

En: And then you see it. As it strangles and beats your friends to death... the sweetest, most courageous people in the world. He's silent for a second. "You see the fear and power in its eyes. Then you *know*."
Zh: “然后你就看见它了。它将你的朋友勒死、活活打死……那些世界上最贴心，最勇敢的人，”他沉默了一秒。“你在它的眼里看到恐惧和力量。然后你就*知道*了。”

En: What?
Zh: “什么？”

En: That the bourgeois are not human.
Zh: “资产阶级不是人类。”

En: What's Reaction?
Zh: “什么应激反应？”

En: Petty-bourgeois terror. It's in all men.
Zh: “小资产阶级恐惧。它存在于所有人类心里。”

En: He is still not convinced of his safety -- you should not be either.
Zh: 他还是不相信自己是安全的——你也不应该相信。

En: Dark magic?
Zh: “黑魔法？”

En: That's enough. Another thing...
Zh: “这个说的差不多了。还有一件事……”

En: A terrible shame, still within him. The lobes of his ears are red with it, the shame and smallness of what he became.
Zh: 一种可怕的耻辱，还隐藏在他心底。他的耳垂变得通红，因为他变成了这副羞愧又渺小的样子。

En: You didn't go to the map room.
Zh: “你没有去地图资料室。”

En: What then?
Zh: “然后呢？”

En: I ran. I climbed the chain link across the water and hid inland. In the bunkers underground, like the weakest of the weak... a mouse. Frightened of the ordnance all night and the sound of the rotors in the morning, whirring -- *thith-thith-thith...* He looks at the sky.
Zh: “我跑了。我爬过水面上的链环，藏在内陆。就在那边的碉堡，就像弱者中的弱者……一只老鼠。整晚都在害怕不可避免的败局终将来临，清晨则在害怕转子的呼啸声——*嗖嗖嗖嗖嗖……*”他望向天空。

En: Airships. Multi-rotored airships used in the Landing.
Zh: 飞艇。登陆时用的是多转子飞艇。

En: Airships?
Zh: “飞艇？”

En: Aerostatics. The Landing had started. I climbed out -- into hell. There were ships all above. Hissing, whirling, and men pouring out. The chain was submerged so I had to swim back. The fortress was half submerged too, shattered.
Zh: “静风舰。登陆已经开始了。我爬了出来——来到地狱。上空全是飞船。呼啸着，旋转着，人们蜂拥而出。链条已经沉入水里，我只能游回去。要塞也半沉入水里。支离破碎。”

En: They'd all drowned in the lower levels, or got torn to shreds above. The anti-aircraft gun had malfunctioned -- so had I. I left them without ideological direction... He opens his eyes and stares right through you. "It was real. I'd seen it. I'd seen it *in reality*."
Zh: “他们都在下层淹死了，或者在上面被炸成了碎片。高射炮故障了——我也一样。失去意识形态的引导，我离开了他们……”他睁开黑色的眼睛，直直地盯着你。“那是真实的。我见过了。我在*现实*中见到了。”

En: Some kind of great terror. Worse than you've ever seen.
Zh: 某种巨大的恐惧。比你见过的要糟糕的多。

En: Seen *what*?
Zh: “看见*什么*？”

En: That's definitely enough now.
Zh: “现在真听够了。”

En: The old man does not say more. Those black eyes of his keep piercing you, as he looks to some great distance and shakes his head slowly -- retreating from it.
Zh: 老人不再言语。他的目光穿透你的身体，看向遥远的地方，慢慢摇了摇头——重复着。

En: These eyes are charred black by the images that have entered them.
Zh: 这双眼睛被映入眼帘的画面烧得焦黑。

En: You've lost your mind.
Zh: “你疯了。”

En: I've always suspected the same..
Zh: “我一直有同样的怀疑……”

En: That's definitely enough now.
Zh: “现在真听够了。”

En: Now is not the time, Lieutenant-Yefreitor... The lieutenant says, gently.
Zh: “现在不是说这个的时侯，荣誉警督……”警督轻声说到。

En: Now is not the time, detective... The lieutenant says, gently.
Zh: “现在不是说这个的时侯，警探……”警督轻声说到。

En: I had to. I *had* to fight it. I could not stop anymore... The old man falls silent. His black eyes keep piercing your skin as he looks to some great distance behind you, shaking his head slowly -- retreating from it.
Zh: “我必须这样。我*必须*与它抗争。我再也停不下来了……”老人陷入沉默。他的目光穿透你的身体，看向你身后遥远的地方，慢慢摇了摇头——不断重复着。

En: What is this place? This island...
Zh: “这是什么地方？这座岛……”

En: He does not believe a police officer is genuinely revolutionary.
Zh: 他不相信一个警察会是真诚的革命者。

En: It remains unclear what *it* is. He makes leaps he doesn't expect you to follow.
Zh: *它*到底是什么还不太清楚。他的思维很跳跃，没指望你能跟上。

En: Say nothing. Let him finish.
Zh: 什么也不说。让他说完。

En: I had to, I *had* to fight it. I had to never stop... The old man falls silent. His black eyes keep piercing your skin as he looks to some great distance behind you, shaking his head slowly -- retreating from it.
Zh: “我必须这样。我*必须*与它抗争。我再也停不下来了……”老人不再言语。他的目光穿透你的身体，看向遥远的地方，慢慢摇了摇头——重复着。

En: It's not an island, droite. He looks around. "It's a defensive fortification of the Commune of Revachol and I am its last surviving defender."
Zh: “这不是一座岛，右派的家伙。”他环顾四周。“这是瑞瓦肖公社的防御工事，而我是这里最后幸存的守护者。”

En: (Point to yourself.) "I'm also a communist."
Zh: （指着你自己。）“我也是一名康米主义者。”

En: I'm a nationalist by the way.
Zh: “顺便说一句，我是个民族主义者。”

En: No you're not. He coughs. "You're a *liberast*."
Zh: “不，你不是。”他咳了几声。“你是一个*自由主义者*。”

En: All the real communists are dead. They died fighting for *communism* -- are you *dead*? His voice turns into a hiss: "No. You're an inert lumpen with a gun."
Zh: “所有真正的康米主义者都死了。他们为了*康米主义*战死了——你*死了*吗？”他的声音变成一阵嘶嘶声。“没有。你是一个呆头呆脑的流浪汉——还带着枪。”

En: You're a lumpen with a gun. He looks away.
Zh: “你是个带枪的流浪汉。”他移开了目光。

En: No, I really am a communist. I have communist thoughts in my head.
Zh: “不，我真是个康米主义者。我的脑袋里装着康米主义的思想。”

En: Okay maybe I'm not.
Zh: “好吧，也许我不是。”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: He looks away, to the sea, and lets out a cough.
Zh: 他移开目光，望向大海，咳嗽出声。

En: Wait, what does a 'political commissar' do?
Zh: “等等，‘政治委员’是做什么的？”

En: The congenitally deformed King Filippe II built it to restrict access to the Bay of Revachol. We captured it in '02, retrofitted the fort with an AA gun to defend against an airborne landing -- against the whole world.
Zh: “先天畸形的国王菲利普二世下令建造了它，以此限制他人接近瑞瓦肖海湾。02年，我们攻占了这里，用高射炮翻新了这座要塞，以此来抵御空降行动——对抗整个世界。”

En: So you were like a priest?
Zh: “所以你像是一个牧师？”

En: No... He shakes his head. "The *opposite* of that. A future human, not a human of the past."
Zh: “不……”他摇摇头。“正好*相反*。一个未来的人类，不是过去的人类。”

En: He was like a cleric, a shepherd.
Zh: 他像是一个传教士，一个牧羊人。

En: *The* Landing. Coalition military called it 'Operation Death Blow.' He winces. "I later found out, on the radio -- they called it..."
Zh: “*登陆*。联盟军队称之为‘致命打击行动’。”他有些畏缩。“我之后听收音机才发现——他们叫它……”

En: What was it used for?
Zh: “它是用来干什么的？”

En: Airborne landing?
Zh: “空降？”

En: You mean the Landing? Retaking of Revachol?
Zh: “你的意思是登陆？重新夺回瑞瓦肖？”

En: Coalition military.
Zh: “联盟军队。”

En: He shakes his head and says: "Iblis."
Zh: 他摇摇头，说到：“易卜劣斯。”

En: Iblis?
Zh: “易卜劣斯？”

En: The black-eyed angel, he nods.
Zh: “黑眼天使，”他点点头。

En: *Death Blow*. You're one of them. Tell me, who speaks like that? We had 50 million people on Caillou alone...
Zh: “*致命打击*。你是他们中的一员。告诉我，谁会那样说？单单一个卡尤岛上就有5000万人……”

En: Coalition military called it Operation *Death Blow*. He winces. "I later found out, on the radio. They called it..."
Zh: “联盟军队称之为‘致命打击行动’。”他有些畏缩。“我之后听收音机才发现——他们叫它……”

En: Someone who's come to end this madness.
Zh: “需要有人来终结这种疯狂。”

En: Murderers. I know what you mean.
Zh: “杀人犯。我知道你的意思。”

En: You *don't* know. You haven't seen it... He shakes his head, slowly. "Iblis..."
Zh: “你*不*知道。你没有见过……”他慢慢摇摇头。“易卜劣斯……”

En: Tell me something else.
Zh: “跟我说点别的。”

En: No. He shakes his head: "Iblis -- Iblis calls it that."
Zh: “不。”他摇摇头：“易卜劣斯——易卜劣斯才会这么说。”

En: Understood -- Iblis.
Zh: “明白了——易卜劣斯。”

En: He nods.
Zh: 他点点头。

En: The old man does not answer. He tilts his silver head and looks at the reeds -- you see a small tremor pass through his legs.
Zh: 老人没有回应。他歪起长满银发的脑袋，看着芦苇丛——你看见他的腿有些颤抖。

En: His job was to assure the army answers to civilian control -- and follows the ideology of the commune, the lieutenant says softly.
Zh: 警督轻声说到。“他的工作是确保军队服从平民的控制——而且遵从公社的意识形态。”

En: Scientific communism! The tracksuit-clad old man is suddenly reanimated. "A *comissaire politique* is a knight-philosopher of the Revolution, a future human."
Zh: “科学康米主义！”穿着运动裤的老人突然亢奋起来。“*政治行纪人*是大革命的哲学骑士，一个未来的人类。”

En: Awakened from shutdown by the promise of *ideology*.
Zh: 因为*意识形态*这个词，从封闭的状态下被唤醒。

En: Really now?
Zh: 真的吗，现在？

En: Okay then. Over-mystified that a bit..
Zh: 那好吧。有点过于神秘化了……

En: Sha'i'tan, Ahura, The Darkened One.
Zh: 撒旦，阿胡拉，黑暗之王。

En: You're with the RCM -- He waves in your general direction. "The Coalition-appointed mob that enforces bourgeois morals in Revachol."
Zh: “你是RCM的——”他朝着你的方向挥挥手。“国际道德伦理委员会任命的暴徒，强化了瑞瓦肖的资产阶级道德规范。”

En: Liberast?
Zh: “自由主义者？”

En: A liberal and a pederast. It's what most liberals are.
Zh: “一个自由主义者，还是个同性恋。大部分自由主义者都是这样。”

En: Understood. (Conclude.)
Zh: “明白了。”（总结。）

En: Hmhm. His leg jerks.
Zh: “嗯。”他的腿猛地抽搐了一下。

En: First, I'm not *one of them*.
Zh: “首先，我不是*其中一员*。”

En: Sure you are, you're RCM. Answer me -- who calls an operation against 50 million people *Death Blow*?
Zh: “你当然是，你是RCM。告诉我——谁会把一场针对5000万人的行动叫做*致命打击*？”

En: We're not 'Coalition-appointed.' We just try to help people.\n
Zh: “我们不是‘联盟任命’的。我们只想帮助别人。”

En: I'm not 'Coalition-appointed.' I just try to help people.
Zh: “我不是‘联盟任命’的。我只想帮助别人。”

En: That's right. We're with the good guys.
Zh: “没错。我们跟好人是一边的。”

En: That's right. I'm with the good guys.
Zh: “没错。我跟好人是一边的。”

En: We enforce the law. We keep these animals from killing each other.
Zh: “我们执行法律。我们不让这群动物自杀残杀。”

En: You're with the RCM -- He waves in your general direction. "The Coalition-appointed mob that oversees the occupation of Revachol. A so-called 'lieutenant'..."
Zh: “你是RCM的——”他朝着你的方向挥挥手。“联盟任命的暴徒，强化了瑞瓦肖的资产阶级道德规范。一个所谓的‘警督’……”

En: You're with the RCM -- He waves in your general direction. "The Coalition-appointed mob that enforces bourgeois morals in Revachol. A so-called 'lieutenant double-yefreitor'..."
Zh: “你是RCM的——”他朝着你的方向挥挥手。“联盟任命的暴徒，强化了瑞瓦肖的资产阶级道德规范。一个所谓的‘双重荣誉警督’……”

En: I know what it looks like. But I have secret plans to turn the RCM into a Mazovian revolutionary unit.
Zh: “我知道看起来是什么样的。不过我有个秘密计划——把RCM变成一支马佐夫主义的革命部队。”

En: We're with the RCM -- let's leave it at that.
Zh: “我们是RCM的——让我们先放下这个话题。”

En: I'm with the RCM -- let's leave it at that.
Zh: “我是RCM的——让我们先放下这个话题。”

En: You're the RCM. He stares at you coldly. "You represent the Moralist International, the enemies of humanity, who took this city. I represent their adversary, le Parti communiste d'Insulinde."
Zh: 他冷漠地凝视着你。“你是RCM的人——你代表国际道德伦理委员会，它是人类的敌人，它夺走了这座城市。我代表的是他们的敌人，伊苏林迪康米党。”

En: Take me to them as a prisoner of war. I have relinquished my weapon, I can no longer serve. No superiors can relieve me of my duty, you bulldozed them all to a mass grave for trying to free humanity... His hand shakes and he breaks into a coughing fit.
Zh: “把我带到他们面前吧，像个战俘一样。我已经放下自己的武器，我无法再完成自己的使命。没有上级能解除我的职务，你把他们全都推进了乱葬岗，就因为他们想要解放人类……”他双手颤抖，突然咳了起来。

En: Murderers... He stares at the embers, then into your eyes. "You're the RCM -- you represent the Moralist International, the enemies of humanity, who took this city. I represent their adversary, le Parti communiste d'Insulinde."
Zh: “杀人犯……”他凝视着余烬，然后望向你的眼睛。“你是RCM的人——你代表国际道德伦理委员会，它是人类的敌人，它夺走了这座城市。我代表的是他们的敌人，伊苏林迪康米党。”

En: You're the RCM. He stares at the embers, then into your eyes. "You represent the Moralist International, the enemies of humanity, who took this city. I represent their adversary, le Parti communiste d'Insulinde."
Zh: 他凝视着余烬，然后望向你的眼睛。“你是RCM的人——你代表国际道德伦理委员会，它是人类的敌人，它夺走了这座城市。我代表的是他们的敌人，伊苏林迪康米党。”

En: A spray of blood from his mouth, on the black charcoal in the firepit...
Zh: 一股鲜血从他的嘴里喷涌而出，落在火堆的黑色焦炭上……

En: Rock and roll posturing... He stares at the embers, then into your eyes. "You're the RCM -- you represent the Moralist International, the enemies of humanity, who took this city. I represent their adversary, le Parti communiste d'Insulinde."
Zh: “装腔作势的摇滚……”他凝视着余烬，然后望向你的眼睛。“你是RCM的人——你代表国际道德伦理委员会，它是人类的敌人，它夺走了这座城市。我代表的是他们的敌人，伊苏林迪康米党。”

En: Let's. He looks you in the eye. "You represent the Moralist International, the enemies of humanity, who took this city. I represent their adversary, le Parti communiste d'Insulinde."
Zh: “这样最好。”他看着你的眼睛。“你代表国际道德伦理委员会，它是人类的敌人，它夺走了这座城市。我代表的是他们的敌人，伊苏林迪康米党。”

En: The communards signed the Revacholian Instrument of Surrender.
Zh: “公社在瑞瓦肖投降书上签了字。”

En: Before that, tell me...
Zh: “在那之前，告诉我……”

En: You never signed the Revacholian Instrument of Surrender...
Zh: “你从来没有签署过瑞瓦肖投降书……”

En: Only the Army. Liberal reactionaries signed it for them. Traitors, who should have been burned alive... He draws his breath. "I am a political commissar of the Communist Party, and the Party *never* surrendered."
Zh: “只有军队。自由党法西斯分子签署了那份投降书。叛徒，他们应该被活活埋葬……”他吸了一口气。“我是康米党的政治委员，康米党是*永远不会*投降的。”

En: Liberal reactionaries signed that instrument -- traitors, who should have been burned alive... He draws his breath. "I answer to the Communist Party."
Zh: “自由党法西斯分子签署了那份投降书——叛徒，他们应该被活活埋葬……”他吸了一口气。“我要为康米党负责。”

En: Is that part of why you've been here all this time? Because the Party didn't surrender?
Zh: “这就是你为什么一直待在这里的原因吗？因为康米党没有投降？”

En: He just wipes the blood from his chin.
Zh: 他擦掉下巴上的血迹。

En: If the Party had surrendered -- then it would not be the Party.
Zh: “如果康米党投降了——那就不会是康米党了。”

En: Honourable.
Zh: “值得尊敬。”

En: That's insane.
Zh: “那也太疯狂了。”

En: Understood.
Zh: “明白了。”

En: *You're* insane. He stares at the firepit. "Radio shows, speed racing, sporting goods... None of it is real."
Zh: “*你*疯了。”他凝视着火堆。“广播节目、赛车、体育用品……这些都不是真的。”

En: Is *that* why you've been here for 43 years? Because the Party didn't surrender?
Zh: “*那*就是你在这里待了43年的原因？因为康米党不会投降？”

En: I don't think you did. He stares at the firepit. "You live in a delusion. Radio shows, speed racing, and sporting goods. It's not real..."
Zh: “我觉得你没有。”他凝视着火堆。“你生活在幻象里。广播节目，赛车，体育用品。这并不是真实的……”

En: Honour is a feudal atavism. He looks at the firepit. "My motive is class."
Zh: “荣誉是封建的返祖现象。”他看着火堆。“我的动机是阶级。”

En: No, I am not a soldier. I am an ideological officer -- I belong to the Party, not the Army.
Zh: “不。我不是一个士兵。我是一名意识形态的捍卫者——我属于党派，而不是军队。”

En: But you said you were trained and assigned to the Defence Corps.
Zh: “但是你说你接受过训练，还被指派到了防卫队。”

En: Understood.
Zh: “明白了。”

En: Trained, he nods, "in *historical materialism*, then assigned as a *political commissar*. By the Party. These things used to mean something."
Zh: “接受过训练，”他点点头，“*历史唯物主义*训练，之后被任命为*政治委员*。党派委任的。这种事曾经是有意义的。”

En: Like you belong to the Moralist Party... He squints his eyes at you.
Zh: “就像你属于道德家党派一样……”他眯起眼睛看着你。

En: Are you the *fire-guy*?
Zh: “你是那个*火人*吗？”

En: The what now? He cups his ear. "I can't hear you."
Zh: “说什么？”他竖起耳朵。“我听不见。”

En: Did you recently tell two kids to put out their fire? Two twins.
Zh: “你最近有没有让两个小孩把火灭掉？一对双胞胎。”

En: Nothing.
Zh: “没什么。”

En: Fire-guy... He shakes his head. "Regressive bourgeoisie henchman. Can't even talk like a grown up."
Zh: “火人……”他摇摇头。“退化的资产阶级走狗。都不能像个成年人好好说话。”

En: I may have. All sorts of little rats have come sniffing around, trying to give up the position...
Zh: “我也许有过。各种各样的小老鼠都跑来这里四处嗅探，想暴露这个位置……”

En: There's definitely something off with his body. Something more than just metabolism, or even cancer...
Zh: 他的身体绝对有什么不对劲的地方。不仅仅是新陈代谢的问题，或者甚至是癌症……

En: That means you're a trained communist, right?
Zh: “那就意味着你是一个受过训练的康米主义者，对吧？”

En: He nods slowly. Then another tremor.
Zh: 他慢慢地点点头。又是一阵震颤。

En: (Point to yourself.) "I'm a moralist."
Zh: （指着你自己。）“我是一个道德家。”

En: Yep -- that's me.
Zh: “没错——那就我。”

En: I'm not a liberal. I told you I'm a communist.
Zh: “我不是自由主义者。都跟你说过了，我是个康米主义者。”

En: I'm a revolutionary too. Today the real revolutionizing is done by entrepreneurs.
Zh: “我也不是革命家。今时今日，真正的革命都是企业家完成的。”

En: You're part of the *meat shield*. He squints. "The human meat shield that surrounds the fascists and the license holders. You take the fire, while they rape and kill. That's what *you* are."
Zh: “你是*肉盾*的一部分。”他眯起眼睛。“环绕在法西斯主义者和许可证持有者之外的人肉肉盾。你拿着火把，而他们就在掠夺和残杀。这就是*你*的真面目。”

En: No you're not. You're part of the *meat shield*. He squints. "The human shield that surrounds the fascists. While they kill and rape. That's what *you* are."
Zh: “不，你不是。”你是*肉盾*的一部分。”他眯起眼睛。“环绕在法西斯主义者之外的肉盾。而他们在掠夺和残杀。这就是*你*的真面目。”

En: I'm not really into politics myself.
Zh: “我本人真的对政治不感兴趣。”

En: You're inert lumpen with a gun.
Zh: “你是一个呆头呆脑的流浪汉——还带着枪。”

En: Detective. The lieutenant gives you a stern look. "We have not come here to discuss ideology." He then turns to the old man.
Zh: “警探。”警督的表情很严肃。“我们来这里不是讨论意识形态的。”然后，他转向老人。

En: The old man spits into the fire pit. He does not say anything more. A jitter passes his lower body...
Zh: 老人朝火坑里吐了口唾沫，自此不再言语。他的下半身一阵颤抖……

En: We have come to ask questions regarding a murder investigation.
Zh: “我们是因为一起凶杀案调查来询问相关问题的。”

En: The expression on his face is unreadable. There's some sort of interference there... neurological?
Zh: 他脸上的表情难以辨认。好像有某种干扰……神经学上的？

En: There's definitely something off with his body. Something more than just metabolism...
Zh: 他的身体绝对有什么不对劲的地方。远远不止是新陈代谢的问题……

En: Her, who?
Zh: “她，是谁？”

En: How does anyone survive? He looks at his worn running shoes. "I *steal*."
Zh: 大家都是怎么生存的？”他盯着脚上那双磨破的运动鞋。“我是用*偷*的。”

En: What do you steal?
Zh: “你偷了什么？”

En: Supplies, vegetables... He winces. "I collect rainwater. It's the life of a dog, not a human being." He coughs once more, then puts his hand on his belly...
Zh: “补给品，蔬菜……”他颤抖着。“我收集雨水。这是一条狗的生活，不是人类的。”他又咳嗽了一阵，然后把手搭在自己的肚子上……

En: Now hold on there...
Zh: 先等一下……

En: That's a *choice*. You could have become self-employed. Create the system.
Zh: “那也只是一种*选择*。你完全可以独立自主的生活。”

En: You're insane and grotesque. Everyone steals: vegetables, supplies. It's the life of a dog. He coughs once more, then puts his hand on his belly...
Zh: “你不仅疯，还很奇怪。每个人都在偷东西：蔬菜，补给品。这是一条狗的生活。”他又咳嗽了一阵，然后把手搭在自己的肚子上……

En: I've been throwing up blood since winter. Red, like beet root -- been passing it in stool too...
Zh: “自从冬天到来之后，我就一直在咳血。红色的，像甜菜根——而且还有便血……”

En: There's no way he could manage the pain without them. It's safe to say he is addicted to painkillers by now.
Zh: 如果没了它们，他肯定承受不了这种痛苦。可以肯定的说，他现在已经对止痛药上瘾了。

En: He does seem frail, gaunt for his age, more like 75 than 65. Trouble putting on weight could mean cancer.
Zh: 按照他的年龄，他确实看起来虚弱而憔悴，更像是75岁，而不是65岁。增重困难可能意味着癌症。

En: Yes. There's a smile on his dry lips. "That is true, comrade. That is true. That is the punishment in the jungle."
Zh: “是的。”他干枯的嘴唇上露出一丝微笑。“是真的，右派的家伙。是真的。这就是待在丛林里的惩罚。”

En: Yes. There's a smile on his dry lips. "That is true, droite. That is true. That's the punishment in the jungle."
Zh: “是的。”他干枯的嘴唇上露出一丝微笑。“是真的，右派的家伙。是真的。这就是待在丛林里的惩罚。”

En: That's what you get stealing things.
Zh: “这是偷东西的惩罚。”

En: The RCM can provide medical services. You need to be looked over.
Zh: “RCM可以为你提供医疗服务。你需要接受检查。”

En: Thank you for clearing that up. (Conclude.)
Zh: “感谢你的澄清。”（总结。）

En: Yes. It may be serious. Cancer, even. The police can give you medical services. You need to be looked over.
Zh: “是的。也许是严重。甚至可能是癌症。警察可以为你提供医疗服务。你需要接受检查。”

En: Yes. It may be serious. Cancer, even. The police can give you medical services. You need to be looked over.
Zh: “是的。也许是严重。甚至可能是癌症。警察可以为你提供医疗服务。你需要接受检查。”

En: It may be serious. Cancer, even. The police can give you medical services. You need to be looked over.
Zh: “也许很严重。甚至可能是癌症。警察可以为你提供医疗服务。你需要接受检查。”

En: The police can give you medical services. You need to be looked over.
Zh: “警察可以为你提供医疗服务。你需要接受检查。”

En: I *have* been running out of that stuff... A light goes on in his eyes. He smacks his dry lips.
Zh: 他的眼睛亮了起来。他砸吧着干枯的嘴唇。“那玩意我*已经*快用完了……”

En: This is a serious situation. You need to be looked over and we can do it.
Zh: “你的状况很严重。你需要接受检查，我们可以安排的。”

En: We have *drouamine*. And other opioid based painkillers. You must be in pain.
Zh: “我们有多巴宁，还有其他阿片类止痛药。你一定很痛苦吧。”

En: He looks at you, his face parched from the sun and the wind -- there's a wince of pain in there somewhere.
Zh: 他看着你，脸庞因为阳光和风变得干燥——某个地方因为疼痛抽搐着。

En: I *need* to die. A droll smile stretches across his mouth. "You don't have medical facilities, you have guns. That's all they give you, toy guns."
Zh: “我必须*死去*。”男人干裂的嘴唇露出一抹滑稽的微笑。“你没有医疗设备，你有枪。他们只会给你这些，玩具枪。”

En: There's nothing to look over. The triage is in and it's black. Administer morphine. Moribund.
Zh: “没什么好检查的。分诊结果有了，黑色的。吗啡治疗。濒临死亡。”

En: You also have Drouamine.
Zh: 你也有多巴宁。

En: How is your health, Mr. Dros?
Zh: “你的身体怎么样，德罗斯先生？”

En: How is your health?
Zh: “你的身体怎么样？”

En: Understood.
Zh: “明白了。”

En: He coughs, then looks to his feet, suddenly despondent.
Zh: 他咳嗽几声，然后看着自己的脚，突然感觉很沮丧。

En: I haven't. I have holes in my brain. Years missing, others filled with pain only. A decade of... His eyes roll into his skull and back...
Zh: “我没应对。我的脑子里有洞。我失去了多年的记忆，留下的只有痛苦，十年了……”他的眼珠深深陷入眼窝……

En: I don't even know what... *Inferno*?
Zh: “我甚至都不知道那是什么……*地狱*？”

En: How have you coped -- mentally?
Zh: “你是怎么应对的——精神上来讲？”

En: You like that drouamine, don't you?
Zh: “你喜欢多巴宁，不是吗？”

En: It's the little joys... A crooked smile appears on his face. "A dark joke. A sunshiny day. Morphine..."
Zh: “它是小玩具……”他的脸上露出扭曲的笑容。“一个黑暗的笑话。一个晴天。吗啡……”

En: (Nod appreciatively.) "I also live in Hell."
Zh: （赞同地点点头）“我也生活在地狱里。”

En: I also have holes in my brain. (Point to your head.)
Zh: “我的脑袋里也有洞。”（指着你的脑袋。）

En: At least you know it. He nods toward Martinaise. "The traitors of this city turned the lights back on in the Thirties, after the fighting stopped. Ruins, glittering in the dark, like a fucking merry-go-round..."
Zh: “至少你知道。”他朝着马丁内斯点点头。“这座城市的叛徒又把灯光打开了。那是30年代，在斗争结束之后。废墟，在黑暗中闪闪发光，像一个该死的旋转木马……”

En: No wonder. All your minds are rotting from the radio waves... He nods toward Martinaise. "I watched the *traitors* of this city turn the lights back on. More and more each year. Ruins, glittering in the dark, like a fucking merry-go-round..."
Zh: “也难怪。你的全部思想都因为无线电波而腐烂……”他朝马丁内斯点点头。“我看着这座城市的*叛徒*把灯又重新打开了。一年比一年更多。废墟，在黑暗中闪闪发光，像一个该死的旋转木马……”

En: (You notice that the adolescent at your side is about to say something.)
Zh: （你注意到身旁的青少年打算说些什么。）

En: (You notice the lieutenant is about to say something.)
Zh: （你注意到警督打算说些什么。）

En: I would imagine it gets tremendously difficult -- mentally -- to live in isolation.
Zh: “我能想象得到，一个人与世隔绝、孤立生活有多艰难——精神上的。”

En: Are they not heartbroken? How could they have moved on?
Zh: 他们不伤心吗？他们是怎么继续生活的？

En: It's disgusting... He looks down at his shoes; his face parched from the sun and the wind -- there's a wince of pain in there somewhere.
Zh: “太恶心了……”他低头看着脚上的鞋，脸庞因为阳光和风变得干燥——某个地方因为疼痛抽搐着。

En: René, the royalist on the coast said...
Zh: 雷内，海岸边那个保皇派说过……

En: What? The old man looks up -- the whites of his eyes are pale yellow.
Zh: “什么？”老人抬起头——他的眼白是淡黄色的。

En: One more question -- do you smoke Tioumoutiri cigarettes?
Zh: “还有一个问题——你抽提欧穆特里牌香烟吗？”

En: I do. He coughs.
Zh: “我抽。”他咳嗽几声。

En: Ever smoke them on the mainland? (Point to Land's End.)
Zh: “有没有在内陆上抽过烟。”（指向地之角。）

En: They're good. He nods. "Plenty of tar. I like that boy on the pack too. Reminds me of the last century."
Zh: “它们很好。”他点点头。“焦油含量很高。我也喜欢包装上那个男孩。让我想起了上个世纪。”

En: The lieutenant exchanges a quick glance with you, then turns to the man...
Zh: 警督快速地跟你交换了一个颜色，然后转向那个男人……

En: Do you go to Martinaise often these days?
Zh: “最近你经常去马丁内斯吗？”

En: Only when my health permits. He shrugs. "I check my old haunts..."
Zh: 他耸耸肩。“只有我身体状况允许的时候才去，去查看一下我常去的地方。”

En: How have you concealed yourself all these years?
Zh: “这些年来你是怎么隐藏自己身份的？”

En: It was hard in the '10s... He shakes his head. "I didn't have partisan training, they were searching for stragglers, those bloodhounds..." He closes his eyes. "Floodlights on the water at night."
Zh: “10年代的时候很困难……”他摇摇头。“我没有接受过游击队的训练，他们正在寻找落伍的士兵，那些侦探猎犬……”他闭上眼睛。“晚上水面上都是探照灯。”

En: We communards still hoped and they needed to snuff that hope out. The East capitulated, Martinaise and Coal City were turned to dust... He looks south. "But Jamrock, Faubourg, even Couron; and Boogie Street of course -- those fucking kipts had Mazov coursing through their veins..."
Zh: “我们公社社员还有希望，而他们需要把希望扼杀掉。东部屈服了，马丁内斯和煤城化为废墟……”他看向南边。“但是加姆洛克，近郊，甚至是科戎；当然还有布吉街……那些该死的吉皮特，身体里流淌着马佐夫主义的血液……”

En: There were posters. Campaigns.
Zh: “有一些海报。活动。”

En: And others too. Some cordons of Revachol were still fighting. There were cells, I tried to contact them... He shakes his head. "Soon they all went silent. The frequencies, dead."
Zh: “其他的地方也是一样。有些瑞瓦肖的隔离带还在抗争。有一些组织，我试过跟他们联系……”他摇摇头。“很快他们全都陷入沉默。那些频率，消失了。”

En: At night. I used a dinghy... He nods toward the deflated tyre in the reeds. "I only went after dark then. When I got to the city I stayed underground. Patrols. You lot. The commons too, they'd started snitching..."
Zh: “晚上。我乘上一条小艇……”他朝着芦苇丛里那个泄气的轮胎点了点头。“我只会在晚上出去。一到城市，我就待在地下。到处是你们的巡逻队，有很多人。还有普通人，他们开始告密……”

En: How did you get between here and the mainland?
Zh: “你是怎么在这里和内陆之间往来的？”

En: So in the city you move... underground?
Zh: “所以你在城市的时候……是在地下行动？”

En: From bunker to bunker... He nods. "Not anymore, no one cares now, I don't even have to hide. They think I'm another antisocial vagrant. I could walk straight into that town if I wanted. I just..." He falls silent, his gaze fixed on the shacks huddled together across the water.
Zh: “从一座碉堡前往另一座碉堡……”他点点头。“再也不用这样了，现在没人在乎。我甚至都不用躲藏。他们觉得我不过又是一个反社会的流浪汉。如果我想，我可以直接走进城镇。我就这么……”他陷入沉默，目光固定在对岸挤成一团的棚屋上。

En: Why don't you just walk there?
Zh: “你为什么去城里呢？”

En: I don't want to. They're all traitors -- pigs, rabbits, and dogs. Men without ideals are only animals.
Zh: “我不想这么做。他们全都是叛徒——猪猡，兔子和野狗。没有理想的人只是动物。”

En: What was it like?
Zh: “那时的情况如何？”

En: In the city you move underground?
Zh: “在城市里的时候，你都在地下行动吗？”

En: Another thing...
Zh: “还有一件事……”

En: He opens his eyes and looks at something, to your left... then at you.
Zh: 他睁开双眼，注视着什么，之后是你的左边……最后看向你。

En: What was it like? There was hope, a little hope. They needed to snuff it out. Martinaise and Coal City were turned to dust... He looks south. "But Jamrock, Faubourg, even Couron; and Boogie Street of course -- those fucking kipts had Kras Mazov coursing in their veins..."
Zh: “情况如何？还有希望，一点点希望。他们需要把它扼杀掉。东部屈服了，马丁内斯和煤城化为废墟……”他看向南边。“但是加姆洛克，近郊，甚至是科戎；当然还有布吉街……那些该死的吉皮特，身体里流淌着马佐夫主义的血液……”

En: The weapons cache under Saint-Ghislaine 22B. (Point to it.) "In the basement. Have you been there?"
Zh: “圣吉莱纳路22B号下的秘密武器库。”（指向它。）“地下室那个。你去过那里吗？”

En: There's a small bunker under the Feld building. Have you stayed there?
Zh: “菲尔德大厦下面有一座小碉堡。你在那里待过吗？”

En: The propaganda bunker? He coughs. "I used to, but not anymore."
Zh: “宣传碉堡？”他咳了几声。“以前待过，不过现在没有了。”

En: Propaganda bunker?
Zh: “宣传碉堡？”

En: They stored leaflets there, broadcasting equipment too. Made broadcasts, I think. Propaganda officers... I buried them with their leaflets. They killed themselves. Two young boys.
Zh: “那里存放着宣传单，还有广播设备。我想是用来做广播节目的。宣传人员……我用宣传单埋葬了他们。他们自杀了。两个年轻小伙子。”

En: So you finally found it. He looks at you -- then pulls the raincoat tighter around his neck. "There must have been a small squadron's worth of arms in there. Belle-Magraves, right?"
Zh: 他看着你——然后拉紧了脖子周围的雨衣。“看来你最后还是找到它了。那里的武器肯定能武装一支小中队吧。贝莱-马格雷，对吗？”

En: They were.
Zh: “是的。”

En: They were damaged beyond use.
Zh: “它们已经不能用了。”

En: I know.
Zh: “我知道。”

En: Useless now. Rusted away...
Zh: “现在已经没用了。生锈了……”

En: So you've been there?
Zh: “所以你去过那里？”

En: Sleeping... He coughs. "Some nights. Ammo-scrounging on others. Those Magraves were shit even before they corroded -- some had bullets in the chamber, however."
Zh: “睡觉……”他咳了几声。“有些晚上。搜寻其他的弹药。那些马格雷没被腐蚀之前就挺垃圾的——不过有的枪膛里还有子弹。”

En: So you've been there?
Zh: “所以你去过那里？”

En: Wait! How did he get down there?
Zh: 等等！他是怎么下去的？

En: How did you access the building? It's locked, at least now it is...
Zh: “你是怎么进入那栋大楼的？它上锁了，至少现在是……”

En: Not important.
Zh: 不重要。

En: I didn't have to. Came in through the storm drains.
Zh: “不用这么做。我是从雨水沟进去的。”

En: Are you sure? Forget about it then...
Zh: 你确定吗？那就忘了吧……

En: Propaganda bunker?
Zh: “宣传碉堡？”

En: He does not want to see life moving on. People forgetting. Drinking. Laughing.
Zh: 他不想看见生活在继续。人们会遗忘。喝酒。欢笑。

En: Storm drains?
Zh: “雨水沟？”

En: Storm drains?
Zh: “雨水沟？”

En: There used to be a system that connected the bunkers. Tunnels and such. Under the church and... everywhere. Most of them are gone now, collapsed -- just bricks. All the old infrastructure has...
Zh: “曾经有一个系统连接着各个碉堡。隧道之类的。就在教堂下面，还有……任何地方。现在大部分都没了，坍塌了——只剩下砖头。所有旧的技术设施都……”

En: You *feel* the dots connecting. Little dots on the map he's walked across.
Zh: 你*感觉*一个个点连接了起来。他在地图上走过的那些小点。

En: Tell me another thing... (Conclude.)
Zh: “再告诉我一件事……”（总结。）

En: Killed themselves?
Zh: “自杀？”

En: A lot of our boys did... I spent some winters there. Never liked it. Kept thinking of them... He stares at the ruins of the Feld building. "No need to go underground anymore. It's better in the ruins on the ground."
Zh: “很多小伙子都是……我在那里度过了几个冬天。从来都不喜欢那个地方。总会想起他们……”他凝视着菲尔德大楼的废墟。“再也不用隐藏在地下。在地上的废墟更好。”

En: The old man looks inland: at the city, the ruins, the motorways rising above it. The new *batiments* twinkling in the night sky.
Zh: 老人望向内陆：看着城市，废墟，还有在那上方的高速公路。新*建筑*在夜空中闪烁着耀眼的光芒。

En: The old man looks inland: at the city, the ruins, the motorways rising above it. The new *batiments* twinkling in the evening sky.
Zh: 老人望向内陆：看着城市，废墟，还有在那上方的高速公路。新*建筑*在傍晚的空中闪烁着耀眼的光芒。

En: The old man looks across the water: at the city, the ruins, the motorways rising above it...
Zh: 老人望向对岸：看着城市，废墟，还有在那上方的高速公路……

En: Like the secret route in the Whirling-in-Rags? This is one for later. When you really need it.
Zh: 就像褴褛飞旋里的秘密通道？这个之后再说。等到真正有需要的时候。

En: Traitors. It's better alone. He nods toward Martinaise. "I watched the people of this city turn the lights back on, more and more each year. Ruins, glimmering in the dark, like a fucking merry-go-round..."
Zh: “叛徒。最好还是一个人。”他朝着马丁内斯点点头。“我看着这座城市的人们把灯又重新打开了。一年比一年更多。废墟，在黑暗中闪闪发光，像一个该死的旋转木马……”

En: Loyalist clown uniform... He clears his throat, pointing at your coat. "I see they sent the full *fasces*. Royal treatment."
Zh: “保皇派的小丑制服……”他清清喉咙，用手指着你的衣服。“我看见他们派出了所有*法西斯分子*。皇家待遇。”

En: You don't like this uniform? (Gesture toward your coat.)
Zh: “你不喜欢这件制服？”（朝着衣服比划。）

En: Oh, I love it. Makes me nostalgic for the time we... He pauses for a moment, catching his breath.
Zh: “哦，我爱死它了。让我怀念那个时候，我们……”他停顿下来，喘了口气。

En: The time we wiped every last fucking one of them off this Earth.
Zh: “那个时候，我们把这帮狗娘养的从地球上一个一个地消灭掉。”

En: Grand, violent pride swells in him.
Zh: 他心里涌现出无比强烈的自豪感。

En: Pride of the "at least we have this" kind. This is a cracked honour, a bitter pride. The man sounds like a *communard*. Be careful.
Zh: 那种*至少我们还做到了这个*的自豪。这是一种破碎的荣誉，一种苦涩的自豪。男人听起来像是一个*公社社员*。要小心。

En: The old man stares despondently at the logs. It's like he's forgotten you're there...
Zh: 老人沮丧地盯着木块。好像已经忘记了你的存在……

En: Minions of capital, he spits. "What do you want?"
Zh: “资本的奴隶，”他吐了口唾沫。“你想要什么？”

En: What is it? The old man looks around, confused. "What do you want from me? I can't go..."
Zh: “又怎么了？”老人环顾四周，有点困惑。“你想从我这里得到什么？我不能走……”

En: Something is very wrong with him now.
Zh: 现在他肯定是有点不对劲了。

En: Minion of capital. He spits. "What do you want?"
Zh: “资本的奴隶，”他吐了口唾沫。“你想要什么？”

En: The old man stares at the reeds. His face shows no emotion -- only a faint tremor passes over his features, like a leaf in the wind.
Zh: 老人凝视着芦苇丛，毫无表情——只是脸部微微颤抖，就像一片风中的树叶。

En: Even with the intensity he's putting in those words, and the fidgeting in his pocket, the kid is unconvincing.
Zh: 尽管他说得那些话很强硬，口袋里的手指还在躁动不安，这孩子还是很难让人信服。

En: You didn't say that, Cuno. You weren't even on the boat.
Zh: “你没说过，坤诺。你甚至都不在那条船上。”

En: Fucking old man... couldn't keep his rock in... he whispers, agitated.
Zh: “该死的老头……就是控制不了自己……”他低语着，有些激动不安。

En: Technically this wasn't traditional rock. It was more *independent melodic*.
Zh: 从严格意义上讲，那并不是传统的摇滚乐。更像是一种*独立旋律*。

En: That wasn't even ordinary rock, it was...
Zh: “那甚至都不是普通的摇滚乐，它是……”

En: Ssssssh! You're making us look like shit.
Zh: “嘘！你搞得我们跟狗屎一样。”

En: It's actually quite light. It was sent to us by our brothers in the Hsin-Yao Commune. Military aid. He pats the rifle.
Zh: “其实它挺轻的。是赫辛欧公社的兄弟们送给我们的。军事援助。”他轻轻拍了拍步枪。

En: It has stayed true to him. He can still make it sing.
Zh: 它一直效忠于他。他还能让它歌唱。

En: Oh yeah... that's hard core, Cuno's gonna like this.
Zh: “哦耶……这他妈才叫硬核，坤诺喜欢这玩意。”

En: Fuck yeah, this is happening, he comments breathlessly, in awe of the potential violence implied.
Zh: “牛逼，要出事了，”他预感到潜在的暴力，急促地评论道。

En: He's high off the fear.
Zh: 他不再害怕了。

En: Like an untrained fighter he leans forward, back hunched, ready to spring.
Zh: 他像个未受过训练的士兵，身体前倾，弓着背，准备一跃而起。

En: Disarmed by a kid... He smiles to himself. "To hell with it. It's a walking stick anyway."
Zh: “被一个小孩缴械……”他暗自发笑。“见鬼去吧。反正它就是根拐杖。”

En: Not in a million years does he believe Cuno is armed. Perhaps it's the best end he can hope for?
Zh: 他绝对不相信坤诺有武器。也许这是他期望的最好结局？

En: Fucking NOW!
Zh: “妈的，就是现在！”

En: I told you not to play shitty rock.
Zh: “我告诉过你，不要放什么该死的摇滚乐。”

En: Whoa... massive gun. Cuno looks at the weapon.
Zh: “哇哦……大枪。”坤诺看着武器。

En: The fuck?! Cuno's looking at you like you just shat yourself.
Zh: “妈的？！”坤诺看着你，像是你刚刚大便失禁一样。

En: No fucking way, not on Cuno's life... he mumbles. With his finger pointing at the deserter -- through his jacket pocket -- the kid turns to the old man.
Zh: “他妈的绝对不行，坤诺的生活里不可以……”他嘟囔着。用手指指着那个逃兵——手还放在他的外套口袋里——孩子转向那个老人。

En: Officer Cuno's got his Kiejl A9 pointed at your fucking head and he's gonna blow it clean off if you don't drop your weapon right now! His pointed finger is moving inside his pocket.
Zh: “坤诺警官正用他的基耶尔A9指着你的脑袋呢，如果你丫的不赶紧放下武器的话，他就要把你的脑袋打爆！”他突出的手指在口袋里移动着。

En: Okay, you can keep it -- but keep the gun down while we talk.
Zh: “好吧，你可以留着它——不过我们说话的时候要把枪放下。”

En: (Whisper.) "Cuno, I know Seraise."
Zh: （耳语。）“坤诺，我懂萨弗里语。”

En: Supercool. What's it say? He sounds incredulous.
Zh: “酷毙了。它说什么？”他的声音充满怀疑。

En: This guy's smoked a lot of people with this, huh?
Zh: “这家伙用它杀了很多人，对吗？”

En: Looks like old shit.
Zh: “看起来像是个破玩意。”

En: Wait-wait! he turns to you, mouth open. "Like the fucking... *ancient* army?"
Zh: “等等！”他转向你，长大了嘴巴。“就像是他妈的……*古代*军队吗？”

En: Cuno's dad has this shit. Wine belly. The kid looks at you. "The cops can take care of this, right? Medicine shit. With, like, facilities."
Zh: “坤诺的爸爸有这种狗屁玩意。啤酒肚。”孩子看着你。“警察会处理好这个的，对吧？医学什么的。那个，什么，设备。”

En: Cuno could do this shit. Live all alone like this. Cuno could hack it.
Zh: “坤诺可以干这种破事。像这样一个人生活。坤诺可以应付。”

En: Hey... The kid must have some idea. "You go to Martinaise lately? Cuno hasn't seen you around..."
Zh: “喂……”小孩肯定想到了什么。“你最近有没有去过马丁内斯？坤诺没见过你……”

En: Assess his body language.
Zh: 评估他的肢体语言。

En: Phasmid Appearance.
Zh: 竹节虫的外观。

En: More than poor health.
Zh: 不仅仅是身体不好。

En: Disturbed motorics.
Zh: 不安的肌肉运动。

En: Possible neurological damage?
Zh: 也许是神经损伤？

En: Neurological aberration?
Zh: 神经失常？

En: Odd flower behaviour.
Zh: 奇怪花的习性。

En: Dresscode: Winter revolutionary.
Zh: 着装要求：冬日革命。

En: What have you been using this gun for?
Zh: “你用这支枪做了什么？”

En: One more time: what have you used this gun for?
Zh: “再问你一次：你用这支枪做什么了？”

En: One more time, Mr. Dros -- the Colonel. We need to talk about you *killing* him.
Zh: “再问一次，德罗斯先生——上校。我们要聊聊你*杀害*他的事。”

En: When did you first see the deceased?
Zh: “你第一次看见死者是什么时候？”

En: What, specifically, did you not *like* about what you saw the night of the murder?
Zh: “具体一些，凶杀案当晚，你看到了什么不*喜欢*的东西？”

En: Been looking at anything else you haven't *liked*?
Zh: “还有没有看见其他你*不喜欢*的东西？”

En: Iosef Lilianovich Dros, you're under arrest for the murder of Ellis Kortenaer.
Zh: “伊索夫·利连诺维奇·德罗斯，你因为谋杀埃利斯·科顿艾尔而被逮捕了。”

En: Iosef Lilianovich Dros, you're under arrest for the murder of the Krenel colonel here in Martinaise.
Zh: “伊索夫·利连诺维奇·德罗斯，你因为在马丁内斯谋杀科奈尔上校而被逮捕了。”

En: Iosef Lilianovich Dros, you're under arrest for the murder of the colonel.
Zh: “伊索夫·利连诺维奇·德罗斯，你因为谋杀上校而被逮捕了。”

En: (Now we are done.) "Iosef Lilianovich Dros, you are under arrest for the murder of Ellis Kortenaer."
Zh: （现在可以结束了。）“伊索夫·利连诺维奇·德罗斯，你因为谋杀埃利斯·科顿艾尔而被逮捕了。”

En: (Now we are done.) "Iosef Lilianovich Dros, you are under arrest for the murder of the colonel known as Lely."
Zh: （现在可以结束了。）“伊索夫·利连诺维奇·德罗斯，你因为谋杀一位名叫莱利的上校而被逮捕了。”

En: (Now we are done.) "Iosef Lilianovich Dros, you are under arrest for the murder of the colonel."
Zh: （现在可以结束了。）“伊索夫·利连诺维奇·德罗斯，你因为谋杀上校而被逮捕了。”

En: No, don't. This man does not subscribe to intellectual daydreams. The communism he mourns is a planetary force.
No, I really am a communist. A Nilsenist inframaterialist.
No, I really am a communist. I have communist thoughts in my head.
You should engage him about inframaterialism. Impress him with all the *ideas* you picked up from the reading group.
